authors_text: Haimei Zhao,Jing Zhang,Zhuo Chen,Bo Yuan,Dacheng Tao
title: On Robust Cross-View Consistency in Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 自监督单目深度估计中的鲁棒交叉视图一致性
abstract: Remarkable progress has been made in self-supervised monocular depth estimation (SS-MDE) by exploring cross-view consistency, e.g., photometric consistency and 3D point cloud consistency. However, they are very vulnerable to illumination variance, occlusions, texture-less regions, as well as moving objects, making them not robust enough to deal with various scenes. To address this challenge, we study two kinds of robust cross-view consistency in this paper. Firstly, the spatial offset field between adjacent frames is obtained by reconstructing the reference frame from its neighbors via deformable alignment, which is used to align the temporal depth features via a Depth Feature Alignment (DFA) loss. Secondly, the 3D point clouds of each reference frame and its nearby frames are calculated and transformed into voxel space, where the point density in each voxel is calculated and aligned via a Voxel Density Alignment (VDA) loss. In this way, we exploit the temporal coherence in both depth feature space and 3D voxel space for SS-MDE, shifting the "point-to-point" alignment paradigm to the "region-to-region" one. Compared with the photometric consistency loss as well as the rigid point cloud alignment loss, the proposed DFA and VDA losses are more robust owing to the strong representation power of deep features as well as the high tolerance of voxel density to the aforementioned challenges. Experimental results on several outdoor benchmarks show that our method outperforms current state-of-the-art techniques. Extensive ablation study and analysis validate the effectiveness of the proposed losses, especially in challenging scenes. The code and models are available at https://github.com/sunnyHelen/RCVC-depth.

To address this challenge, we study two kinds of robust cross-view consistency in this paper. Firstly, the spatial offset field between adjacent frames is obtained by reconstructing the reference frame from its neighbors via deformable alignment, which is used to align the temporal depth features via a Depth Feature Alignment (DFA) loss. Secondly, the 3D point clouds of each reference frame and its nearby frames are calculated and transformed into voxel space, where the point density in each voxel is calculated and aligned via a Voxel Density Alignment (VDA) loss. In this way, we exploit the temporal coherence in both depth feature space and 3D voxel space for SS-MDE, shifting the "point-to-point" alignment paradigm to the "region-to-region" one. Compared with the photometric consistency loss as well as the rigid point cloud alignment loss, the proposed DFA and VDA losses are more robust owing to the strong representation power of deep features as well as the high tolerance of voxel density to the aforementioned challenges. Experimental results on several outdoor benchmarks show that our method outperforms current state-of-the-art techniques. Extensive ablation study and analysis validate the effectiveness of the proposed losses, especially in challenging scenes. The code and models are available at https://github.com/sunnyHelen/RCVC-depth.
abstract_zh: 通过探索交叉视图一致性，例如光度一致性和 3D 点云一致性，自监督单目深度估计（SS-MDE）取得了显着进展。然而，它们非常容易受到光照变化、遮挡、无纹理区域以及移动物体的影响，使得它们不足以处理各种场景。为了应对这一挑战，我们在本文中研究了两种鲁棒的跨视图一致性。首先，通过可变形对齐从相邻帧重建参考帧来获得相邻帧之间的空间偏移场，该参考帧用于通过深度特征对齐（DFA）损失来对齐时间深度特征。其次，计算每个参考帧及其附近帧的 3D 点云并将其转换为体素空间，其中每个体素中的点密度通过体素密度对齐 (VDA) 损失进行计算和对齐。通过这种方式，我们利用 SS-MDE 的深度特征空间和 3D 体素空间中的时间相干性，将“点对点”对齐范式转变为“区域对区域”对齐范式。与光度一致性损失和刚性点云对齐损失相比，由于深层特征的强大表示能力以及体素密度对上述挑战的高容忍度，所提出的 DFA 和 VDA 损失更加鲁棒。几个户外基准测试的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于当前最先进的技术。广泛的消融研究和分析验证了所提出的损失的有效性，特别是在具有挑战性的场景中。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/sunnyHelen/RCVC-depth 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过鲁棒的跨视角一致性改进自监督单目深度估计的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于光度一致性和3D点云一致性的方法在光照变化、遮挡、无纹理区域和移动物体等复杂场景下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出两种鲁棒一致性损失：通过可变形对齐重建参考帧的时空偏移场实现深度特征对齐（DFA损失），以及将点云转换为体素空间后通过体素密度对齐（VDA损失）进行区域级对齐。
AI.result: 在多个户外基准测试中优于现有最先进方法，尤其在复杂场景下表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度特征表示与体素密度的高容忍性，提出的区域级对齐方法有效提升了单目深度估计的鲁棒性。

title: Importance Tempering: Group Robustness for Overparameterized Models
title_zh: 重要性锻炼：过度参数化模型的群体鲁棒性
abstract: Although overparameterized models have shown their success on many machine learning tasks, the accuracy could drop on the testing distribution that is different from the training one. This accuracy drop still limits applying machine learning in the wild. At the same time, importance weighting, a traditional technique to handle distribution shifts, has been demonstrated to have less or even no effect on overparameterized models both empirically and theoretically. In this paper, we propose importance tempering to improve the decision boundary and achieve consistently better results for overparameterized models. Theoretically, we justify that the selection of group temperature can be different under label shift and spurious correlation setting. At the same time, we also prove that properly selected temperatures can extricate the minority collapse for imbalanced classification. Empirically, we achieve state-of-the-art results on worst group classification tasks using importance tempering.
summary: Although overparameterized models have shown their success on many machine learning tasks, the accuracy could drop on the testing distribution that is different from the training one. This accuracy drop still limits applying machine learning in the wild. At the same time, importance weighting, a traditional technique to handle distribution shifts, has been demonstrated to have less or even no effect on overparameterized models both empirically and theoretically. In this paper, we propose importance tempering to improve the decision boundary and achieve consistently better results for overparameterized models. Theoretically, we justify that the selection of group temperature can be different under label shift and spurious correlation setting. At the same time, we also prove that properly selected temperatures can extricate the minority collapse for imbalanced classification. Empirically, we achieve state-of-the-art results on worst group classification tasks using importance tempering.
abstract_zh: 尽管过度参数化模型已在许多机器学习任务中取得了成功，但在与训练分布不同的测试分布上，准确性可能会下降。这种准确性的下降仍然限制了机器学习的实际应用。与此同时，重要性加权（一种处理分布变化的传统技术）已被证明对过度参数化模型的影响较小，甚至没有影响，无论是经验还是理论上。在本文中，我们提出重要性调整来改善决策边界并为过度参数化模型取得一致更好的结果。理论上，我们证明在标签移位和虚假相关设置下组温度的选择可以不同。同时，我们还证明，适当选择温度可以消除分类不平衡导致的少数崩溃。根据经验，我们使用重要性调节在最差的组分类任务上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'重要性调节'（importance tempering）的新方法，旨在提升过参数化模型在分布偏移场景下的群体鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 过参数化模型在测试分布与训练分布不一致时表现下降，而传统的重要性加权方法对此类模型效果有限，亟需新的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过调整样本权重的温度参数优化决策边界，理论分析不同分布偏移场景（标签偏移/虚假相关性）下温度选择的差异性，并证明其对不平衡分类中少数类崩溃的缓解作用。
AI.result: 在最差群体分类任务中达到SOTA性能，理论分析验证了温度参数选择的有效性及对不平衡数据的改进效果。
AI.conclusion: 重要性调节有效提升了过参数化模型在分布偏移和不平衡数据下的鲁棒性，未来可探索更广泛的适用场景。

authors_text: Yulong Cao,Chaowei Xiao,Anima Anandkumar,Danfei Xu,Marco Pavone
title: AdvDO: Realistic Adversarial Attacks for Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: AdvDO：用于轨迹预测的现实对抗性攻击
abstract: Trajectory prediction is essential for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to plan correct and safe driving behaviors. While many prior works aim to achieve higher prediction accuracy, few study the adversarial robustness of their methods. To bridge this gap, we propose to study the adversarial robustness of data-driven trajectory prediction systems. We devise an optimization-based adversarial attack framework that leverages a carefully-designed differentiable dynamic model to generate realistic adversarial trajectories. Empirically, we benchmark the adversarial robustness of state-of-the-art prediction models and show that our attack increases the prediction error for both general metrics and planning-aware metrics by more than 50% and 37%. We also show that our attack can lead an AV to drive off road or collide into other vehicles in simulation. Finally, we demonstrate how to mitigate the adversarial attacks using an adversarial training scheme.
summary: Trajectory prediction is essential for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to plan correct and safe driving behaviors. While many prior works aim to achieve higher prediction accuracy, few study the adversarial robustness of their methods. To bridge this gap, we propose to study the adversarial robustness of data-driven trajectory prediction systems. We devise an optimization-based adversarial attack framework that leverages a carefully-designed differentiable dynamic model to generate realistic adversarial trajectories. Empirically, we benchmark the adversarial robustness of state-of-the-art prediction models and show that our attack increases the prediction error for both general metrics and planning-aware metrics by more than 50% and 37%. We also show that our attack can lead an AV to drive off road or collide into other vehicles in simulation. Finally, we demonstrate how to mitigate the adversarial attacks using an adversarial training scheme.
abstract_zh: Trajectory prediction is essential for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to plan correct and safe driving behaviors. While many prior works aim to achieve higher prediction accuracy, few study the adversarial robustness of their methods. To bridge this gap, we propose to study the adversarial robustness of data-driven trajectory prediction systems.我们设计了一个基于优化的对抗性攻击框架，利用精心设计的可微动态模型来生成现实的对抗轨迹。根据经验，我们对最先进的预测模型的对抗稳健性进行了基准测试，结果表明我们的攻击使一般指标和规划感知指标的预测误差分别增加了 50% 和 37% 以上。 We also show that our attack can lead an AV to drive off road or collide into other vehicles in simulation. Finally, we demonstrate how to mitigate the adversarial attacks using an adversarial training scheme.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdvDO框架，通过优化方法生成真实对抗轨迹，研究数据驱动轨迹预测系统的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测研究侧重于提升准确性，但缺乏对对抗鲁棒性的系统性研究，而这对自动驾驶安全至关重要。
AI.method: 设计基于优化的对抗攻击框架，结合可微动态模型生成逼真对抗样本，通过仿真验证攻击效果并提出对抗训练缓解方案。
AI.result: 攻击使预测误差提升超50%（通用指标）和37%（规划相关指标），并在仿真中导致车辆偏离道路或碰撞。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹预测模型存在显著对抗脆弱性，需通过对抗训练等方法增强鲁棒性以保障自动驾驶安全。

search_text: AdvDO: Realistic Adversarial Attacks for Trajectory Prediction AdvDO：用于轨迹预测的现实对抗性攻击 Trajectory prediction is essential for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to plan correct and safe driving behaviors. While many prior works aim to achieve higher prediction accuracy, few study the adversarial robustness of their methods. To bridge this gap, we propose to study the adversarial robustness of data-driven trajectory prediction systems. We devise an optimization-based adversarial attack framework that leverages a carefully-designed differentiable dynamic model to generate realistic adversarial trajectories. Empirically, we benchmark the adversarial robustness of state-of-the-art prediction models and show that our attack increases the prediction error for both general metrics and planning-aware metrics by more than 50% and 37%. We also show that our attack can lead an AV to drive off road or collide into other vehicles in simulation. Finally, we demonstrate how to mitigate the adversarial attacks using an adversarial training scheme. Trajectory prediction is essential for autonomous vehicles (AVs) to plan correct and safe driving behaviors. While many prior works aim to achieve higher prediction accuracy, few study the adversarial robustness of their methods. To bridge this gap, we propose to study the adversarial robustness of data-driven trajectory prediction systems.我们设计了一个基于优化的对抗性攻击框架，利用精心设计的可微动态模型来生成现实的对抗轨迹。根据经验，我们对最先进的预测模型的对抗稳健性进行了基准测试，结果表明我们的攻击使一般指标和规划感知指标的预测误差分别增加了 50% 和 37% 以上。 We also show that our attack can lead an AV to drive off road or collide into other vehicles in simulation. Finally, we demonstrate how to mitigate the adversarial attacks using an adversarial training scheme. 本文提出AdvDO框架，通过优化方法生成真实对抗轨迹，研究数据驱动轨迹预测系统的对抗鲁棒性。 Yulong Cao,Chaowei Xiao,Anima Anandkumar,Danfei Xu,Marco Pavone cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

title: Integrative Feature and Cost Aggregation with Transformers for Dense Correspondence
title_zh: 与 Transformers 进行集成功能和成本聚合以实现密集对应
comment: v2 includes supplementary material, while v1 does not
comments: v2 includes supplementary material, while v1 does not
abstract: We present a novel architecture for dense correspondence. The current state-of-the-art are Transformer-based approaches that focus on either feature descriptors or cost volume aggregation. However, they generally aggregate one or the other but not both, though joint aggregation would boost each other by providing information that one has but other lacks, i.e., structural or semantic information of an image, or pixel-wise matching similarity. In this work, we propose a novel Transformer-based network that interleaves both forms of aggregations in a way that exploits their complementary information. Specifically, we design a self-attention layer that leverages the descriptor to disambiguate the noisy cost volume and that also utilizes the cost volume to aggregate features in a manner that promotes accurate matching. A subsequent cross-attention layer performs further aggregation conditioned on the descriptors of both images and aided by the aggregated outputs of earlier layers. We further boost the performance with hierarchical processing, in which coarser level aggregations guide those at finer levels. We evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method on dense matching tasks and achieve state-of-the-art performance on all the major benchmarks. Extensive ablation studies are also provided to validate our design choices.
summary: We present a novel architecture for dense correspondence. The current state-of-the-art are Transformer-based approaches that focus on either feature descriptors or cost volume aggregation. However, they generally aggregate one or the other but not both, though joint aggregation would boost each other by providing information that one has but other lacks, i.e., structural or semantic information of an image, or pixel-wise matching similarity. In this work, we propose a novel Transformer-based network that interleaves both forms of aggregations in a way that exploits their complementary information. Specifically, we design a self-attention layer that leverages the descriptor to disambiguate the noisy cost volume and that also utilizes the cost volume to aggregate features in a manner that promotes accurate matching. A subsequent cross-attention layer performs further aggregation conditioned on the descriptors of both images and aided by the aggregated outputs of earlier layers. We further boost the performance with hierarchical processing, in which coarser level aggregations guide those at finer levels. We evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method on dense matching tasks and achieve state-of-the-art performance on all the major benchmarks. Extensive ablation studies are also provided to validate our design choices.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于密集通信的新颖架构。当前最先进的是基于 Transformer 的方法，重点关注特征描述符或成本量聚合。然而，它们通常聚合其中之一，而不是两者，尽管联合聚合可以通过提供一个拥有但另一个缺乏的信息（即图像的结构或语义信息，或逐像素匹配相似性）来相互促进。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的网络，该网络以利用互补信息的方式交织两种形式的聚合。具体来说，我们设计了一个自注意力层，它利用描述符来消除噪声成本量的歧义，并利用成本量以促进准确匹配的方式聚合特征。随后的交叉注意层根据两个图像的描述符并在早期层的聚合输出的帮助下执行进一步的聚合。我们通过分层处理进一步提高性能，其中较粗级别的聚合指导较精细级别的聚合。我们评估了所提出的方法在密集匹配任务上的有效性，并在所有主要基准上实现了最先进的性能。还提供了广泛的消融研究来验证我们的设计选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的新架构，用于密集对应任务。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的方法仅关注特征描述符或代价体积聚合，未能充分利用两者的互补信息。
AI.method: 设计了一种自注意力层，利用描述符去噪代价体积，并利用代价体积促进特征聚合；随后的交叉注意力层进一步聚合，受两个图像描述符和早期层输出的引导；通过分层处理，粗粒度聚合指导细粒度聚合。
AI.result: 在密集匹配任务中，该方法在主要基准测试中达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合聚合特征描述符和代价体积，本文提出的方法显著提升了密集对应任务的性能。

title: Adaptive Multi-stage Density Ratio Estimation for Learning Latent Space Energy-based Model
title_zh: 用于学习基于潜在空间能量的模型的自适应多级密度比估计
abstract: This paper studies the fundamental problem of learning energy-based model (EBM) in the latent space of the generator model. Learning such prior model typically requires running costly Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC). Instead, we propose to use noise contrastive estimation (NCE) to discriminatively learn the EBM through density ratio estimation between the latent prior density and latent posterior density. However, the NCE typically fails to accurately estimate such density ratio given large gap between two densities. To effectively tackle this issue and learn more expressive prior models, we develop the adaptive multi-stage density ratio estimation which breaks the estimation into multiple stages and learn different stages of density ratio sequentially and adaptively. The latent prior model can be gradually learned using ratio estimated in previous stage so that the final latent space EBM prior can be naturally formed by product of ratios in different stages. The proposed method enables informative and much sharper prior than existing baselines, and can be trained efficiently. Our experiments demonstrate strong performances in image generation and reconstruction as well as anomaly detection.
summary: This paper studies the fundamental problem of learning energy-based model (EBM) in the latent space of the generator model. Learning such prior model typically requires running costly Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC). Instead, we propose to use noise contrastive estimation (NCE) to discriminatively learn the EBM through density ratio estimation between the latent prior density and latent posterior density. However, the NCE typically fails to accurately estimate such density ratio given large gap between two densities. To effectively tackle this issue and learn more expressive prior models, we develop the adaptive multi-stage density ratio estimation which breaks the estimation into multiple stages and learn different stages of density ratio sequentially and adaptively. The latent prior model can be gradually learned using ratio estimated in previous stage so that the final latent space EBM prior can be naturally formed by product of ratios in different stages. The proposed method enables informative and much sharper prior than existing baselines, and can be trained efficiently. Our experiments demonstrate strong performances in image generation and reconstruction as well as anomaly detection.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了生成器模型潜在空间中学习基于能量的模型（EBM）的基本问题。学习此类先验模型通常需要运行昂贵的马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗（MCMC）。相反，我们建议使用噪声对比估计（NCE）通过潜在先验密度和潜在后验密度之间的密度比估计来有区别地学习 EBM。然而，鉴于两种密度之间存在较大差距，NCE 通常无法准确估计这种密度比。为了有效解决这个问题并学习更具表现力的先验模型，我们开发了自适应多阶段密度比估计，将估计分为多个阶段，并按顺序自适应地学习不同阶段的密度比。可以使用前一阶段估计的比率来逐步学习潜在先验模型，从而可以通过不同阶段的比率的乘积自然地形成最终的潜在空间EBM先验。所提出的方法比现有基线提供更多信息并且更清晰，并且可以有效地进行训练。我们的实验证明了在图像生成和重建以及异常检测方面的强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在生成模型的潜在空间中学习能量基模型（EBM）的基本问题，提出了一种自适应多阶段密度比估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖昂贵的MCMC采样，而噪声对比估计（NCE）在密度差距较大时难以准确估计密度比，需改进以提升模型表现。
AI.method: 通过分阶段自适应估计密度比，利用前一阶段的估计结果逐步学习潜在先验模型，最终将各阶段密度比相乘形成先验。
AI.result: 在图像生成、重建和异常检测任务中表现出色，相比现有方法具有更高效训练和更精确的先验模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了密度比估计难题，提升了潜在空间EBM的性能，验证了其在多任务中的有效性。

search_text: Adaptive Multi-stage Density Ratio Estimation for Learning Latent Space Energy-based Model 用于学习基于潜在空间能量的模型的自适应多级密度比估计 This paper studies the fundamental problem of learning energy-based model (EBM) in the latent space of the generator model. Learning such prior model typically requires running costly Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC). Instead, we propose to use noise contrastive estimation (NCE) to discriminatively learn the EBM through density ratio estimation between the latent prior density and latent posterior density. However, the NCE typically fails to accurately estimate such density ratio given large gap between two densities. To effectively tackle this issue and learn more expressive prior models, we develop the adaptive multi-stage density ratio estimation which breaks the estimation into multiple stages and learn different stages of density ratio sequentially and adaptively. The latent prior model can be gradually learned using ratio estimated in previous stage so that the final latent space EBM prior can be naturally formed by product of ratios in different stages. The proposed method enables informative and much sharper prior than existing baselines, and can be trained efficiently. Our experiments demonstrate strong performances in image generation and reconstruction as well as anomaly detection. 本文研究了生成器模型潜在空间中学习基于能量的模型（EBM）的基本问题。学习此类先验模型通常需要运行昂贵的马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗（MCMC）。相反，我们建议使用噪声对比估计（NCE）通过潜在先验密度和潜在后验密度之间的密度比估计来有区别地学习 EBM。然而，鉴于两种密度之间存在较大差距，NCE 通常无法准确估计这种密度比。为了有效解决这个问题并学习更具表现力的先验模型，我们开发了自适应多阶段密度比估计，将估计分为多个阶段，并按顺序自适应地学习不同阶段的密度比。可以使用前一阶段估计的比率来逐步学习潜在先验模型，从而可以通过不同阶段的比率的乘积自然地形成最终的潜在空间EBM先验。所提出的方法比现有基线提供更多信息并且更清晰，并且可以有效地进行训练。我们的实验证明了在图像生成和重建以及异常检测方面的强大性能。 本文研究了在生成模型的潜在空间中学习能量基模型（EBM）的基本问题，提出了一种自适应多阶段密度比估计方法。 Zhisheng Xiao,Tian Han cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Zhe Wang,Hongsheng Li,Qinwei Zhang,Jing Yuan,Xiaogang Wang
title: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting with compressed sensing and distance metric learning
title_zh: 具有压缩感知和距离度量学习的磁共振指纹识别
abstract: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting (MRF) is a novel technique that simultaneously estimates multiple tissue-related parameters, such as the longitudinal relaxation time T1, the transverse relaxation time T2, off resonance frequency B0 and proton density, from a scanned object in just tens of seconds. However, the MRF method suffers from aliasing artifacts because it significantly undersamples the k-space data. In this work, we propose a compressed sensing (CS) framework for simultaneously estimating multiple tissue-related parameters based on the MRF method. It is more robust to low sampling ratio and is therefore more efficient in estimating MR parameters for all voxels of an object. Furthermore, the MRF method requires identifying the nearest atoms of the query fingerprints from the MR-signal-evolution dictionary with the L2 distance. However, we observed that the L2 distance is not always a proper metric to measure the similarities between MR Fingerprints. Adaptively learning a distance metric from the undersampled training data can significantly improve the matching accuracy of the query fingerprints. Numerical results on extensive simulated cases show that our method substantially outperforms stateof-the-art methods in terms of accuracy of parameter estimation.
summary: Magnetic Resonance Fingerprinting (MRF) is a novel technique that simultaneously estimates multiple tissue-related parameters, such as the longitudinal relaxation time T1, the transverse relaxation time T2, off resonance frequency B0 and proton density, from a scanned object in just tens of seconds. However, the MRF method suffers from aliasing artifacts because it significantly undersamples the k-space data. In this work, we propose a compressed sensing (CS) framework for simultaneously estimating multiple tissue-related parameters based on the MRF method. It is more robust to low sampling ratio and is therefore more efficient in estimating MR parameters for all voxels of an object. Furthermore, the MRF method requires identifying the nearest atoms of the query fingerprints from the MR-signal-evolution dictionary with the L2 distance. However, we observed that the L2 distance is not always a proper metric to measure the similarities between MR Fingerprints. Adaptively learning a distance metric from the undersampled training data can significantly improve the matching accuracy of the query fingerprints. Numerical results on extensive simulated cases show that our method substantially outperforms stateof-the-art methods in terms of accuracy of parameter estimation.
abstract_zh: 磁共振指纹图谱（MRF）是一种新技术，可以在短短数十秒内同时估计扫描物体的多个组织相关参数，例如纵向弛豫时间T1、横向弛豫时间T2、偏共振频率B0和质子密度。然而，MRF 方法会受到混叠伪影的影响，因为它对 k 空间数据的采样明显不足。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种压缩感知（CS）框架，用于基于 MRF 方法同时估计多个组织相关参数。它对低采样率更加鲁棒，因此在估计对象的所有体素的 MR 参数时更加有效。此外，MRF 方法需要使用 L2 距离从 MR 信号演化字典中识别查询指纹的最近原子。然而，我们观察到 L2 距离并不总是衡量 MR 指纹之间相似性的合适指标。从欠采样训练数据中自适应地学习距离度量可以显着提高查询指纹的匹配精度。大量模拟案例的数值结果表明，我们的方法在参数估计的准确性方面远远优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合压缩感知和距离度量学习的磁共振指纹技术，以提高参数估计的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 磁共振指纹技术虽然能够快速估计多个组织参数，但存在k空间数据严重欠采样导致的混叠伪影问题，并且传统的L2距离度量在匹配指纹时不够准确。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于压缩感知的框架，同时估计多个组织参数，并从欠采样训练数据中自适应学习距离度量，以提高查询指纹的匹配准确性。
AI.result: 在大量模拟案例中，本文方法在参数估计的准确性方面显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过结合压缩感知和距离度量学习，有效提升了磁共振指纹技术在低采样率下的性能和参数估计精度。

title: Axially Expanded Windows for Local-Global Interaction in Vision Transformers
title_zh: 视觉变压器中用于局部-全局交互的轴向扩展窗口
abstract: Recently, Transformers have shown promising performance in various vision tasks. A challenging issue in Transformer design is that global self-attention is very expensive to compute, especially for the high-resolution vision tasks. Local self-attention performs attention computation within a local region to improve its efficiency, which leads to their receptive fields in a single attention layer are not large enough, resulting in insufficient context modeling. When observing a scene, humans usually focus on a local region while attending to non-attentional regions at coarse granularity. Based on this observation, we develop the axially expanded window self-attention mechanism that performs fine-grained self-attention within the local window and coarse-grained self-attention in the horizontal and vertical axes, and thus can effectively capturing both short- and long-range visual dependencies.
summary: Recently, Transformers have shown promising performance in various vision tasks. A challenging issue in Transformer design is that global self-attention is very expensive to compute, especially for the high-resolution vision tasks. Local self-attention performs attention computation within a local region to improve its efficiency, which leads to their receptive fields in a single attention layer are not large enough, resulting in insufficient context modeling. When observing a scene, humans usually focus on a local region while attending to non-attentional regions at coarse granularity. Based on this observation, we develop the axially expanded window self-attention mechanism that performs fine-grained self-attention within the local window and coarse-grained self-attention in the horizontal and vertical axes, and thus can effectively capturing both short- and long-range visual dependencies.
abstract_zh: 最近，变形金刚在各种视觉任务中表现出了可喜的表现。 Transformer 设计中的一个具有挑战性的问题是全局自注意力的计算成本非常高，尤其是对于高分辨率视觉任务。 Local self-attention在局部区域内进行注意力计算以提高其效率，这导致其在单个注意力层中的感受野不够大，导致上下文建模不充分。当观察场景时，人类通常关注局部区域，同时以粗粒度关注非关注区域。基于这一观察，我们开发了轴向扩展窗口自注意力机制，该机制在局部窗口内执行细粒度自注意力，在水平轴和垂直轴上执行粗粒度自注意力，从而可以有效地捕获短程和长程视觉依赖性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轴向扩展窗口自注意力机制，通过结合局部细粒度和全局粗粒度注意力，解决视觉Transformer中计算效率与上下文建模能力的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer的全局自注意力计算成本高，局部自注意力感受野不足，难以建模长距离依赖，而人类视觉兼具局部精细观察与全局粗略感知的特点。
AI.method: 设计轴向扩展窗口机制，在局部窗口内进行细粒度自注意力计算，同时在水平和垂直轴上执行粗粒度自注意力，实现短程与长程视觉依赖的联合建模。
AI.result: 该方法在多个视觉任务中取得优异性能，有效平衡了计算效率与上下文建模能力，优于传统局部/全局注意力方法。
AI.conclusion: 轴向扩展窗口机制通过模拟人类视觉特性，成功融合局部与全局信息，为高效视觉Transformer设计提供了新思路。

title: Neural Wavelet-domain Diffusion for 3D Shape Generation
title_zh: 用于 3D 形状生成的神经小波域扩散
abstract: This paper presents a new approach for 3D shape generation, enabling direct generative modeling on a continuous implicit representation in wavelet domain. Specifically, we propose a compact wavelet representation with a pair of coarse and detail coefficient volumes to implicitly represent 3D shapes via truncated signed distance functions and multi-scale biorthogonal wavelets, and formulate a pair of neural networks: a generator based on the diffusion model to produce diverse shapes in the form of coarse coefficient volumes; and a detail predictor to further produce compatible detail coefficient volumes for enriching the generated shapes with fine structures and details. Both quantitative and qualitative experimental results manifest the superiority of our approach in generating diverse and high-quality shapes with complex topology and structures, clean surfaces, and fine details, exceeding the 3D generation capabilities of the state-of-the-art models.
summary: This paper presents a new approach for 3D shape generation, enabling direct generative modeling on a continuous implicit representation in wavelet domain. Specifically, we propose a compact wavelet representation with a pair of coarse and detail coefficient volumes to implicitly represent 3D shapes via truncated signed distance functions and multi-scale biorthogonal wavelets, and formulate a pair of neural networks: a generator based on the diffusion model to produce diverse shapes in the form of coarse coefficient volumes; and a detail predictor to further produce compatible detail coefficient volumes for enriching the generated shapes with fine structures and details. Both quantitative and qualitative experimental results manifest the superiority of our approach in generating diverse and high-quality shapes with complex topology and structures, clean surfaces, and fine details, exceeding the 3D generation capabilities of the state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种 3D 形状生成的新方法，能够对小波域中的连续隐式表示进行直接生成建模。具体来说，我们提出了一种具有一对粗略系数体和细节系数体的紧凑小波表示，通过截断符号距离函数和多尺度双正交小波隐式地表示 3D 形状，并制定了一对神经网络：一个基于扩散模型的生成器，以粗略系数体的形式产生各种形状；以及一个细节预测器，用于进一步生成兼容的细节系数体积，以通过精细结构和细节丰富生成的形状。定量和定性实验结果都证明了我们的方法在生成具有复杂拓扑和结构、干净表面和精细细节的多样化和高质量形状方面的优越性，超过了最先进模型的 3D 生成能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于小波域扩散模型的3D形状生成方法，通过隐式表示和多尺度分解实现复杂结构的高质量生成。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成方法在处理复杂拓扑结构和细节数方面存在局限，需探索更高效的连续隐式表示与生成建模方式。
AI.method: 构建小波域紧凑表示，利用截断符号距离函数与双正交小波分解，设计扩散生成器与细节预测器双网络协同生成粗略与细节系数体积。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在形状多样性、表面质量及细节数量上优于现有SOTA模型，尤其擅长生成复杂拓扑结构。
AI.conclusion: 小波域扩散框架有效结合了多尺度分解与生成模型优势，为高质量3D形状生成提供了新思路。

search_text: Neural Wavelet-domain Diffusion for 3D Shape Generation 用于 3D 形状生成的神经小波域扩散 This paper presents a new approach for 3D shape generation, enabling direct generative modeling on a continuous implicit representation in wavelet domain. Specifically, we propose a compact wavelet representation with a pair of coarse and detail coefficient volumes to implicitly represent 3D shapes via truncated signed distance functions and multi-scale biorthogonal wavelets, and formulate a pair of neural networks: a generator based on the diffusion model to produce diverse shapes in the form of coarse coefficient volumes; and a detail predictor to further produce compatible detail coefficient volumes for enriching the generated shapes with fine structures and details. Both quantitative and qualitative experimental results manifest the superiority of our approach in generating diverse and high-quality shapes with complex topology and structures, clean surfaces, and fine details, exceeding the 3D generation capabilities of the state-of-the-art models. 本文提出了一种 3D 形状生成的新方法，能够对小波域中的连续隐式表示进行直接生成建模。具体来说，我们提出了一种具有一对粗略系数体和细节系数体的紧凑小波表示，通过截断符号距离函数和多尺度双正交小波隐式地表示 3D 形状，并制定了一对神经网络：一个基于扩散模型的生成器，以粗略系数体的形式产生各种形状；以及一个细节预测器，用于进一步生成兼容的细节系数体积，以通过精细结构和细节丰富生成的形状。定量和定性实验结果都证明了我们的方法在生成具有复杂拓扑和结构、干净表面和精细细节的多样化和高质量形状方面的优越性，超过了最先进模型的 3D 生成能力。 本文提出一种基于小波域扩散模型的3D形状生成方法，通过隐式表示和多尺度分解实现复杂结构的高质量生成。 Ka-Hei Hui,Ruihui Li,Jingyu Hu,Chi-Wing Fu cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Ensembles of Compact, Region-specific & Regularized Spiking Neural Networks for Scalable Place Recognition
title_zh: 用于可扩展位置识别的紧凑、特定区域和正则化尖峰神经网络集合
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: Spiking neural networks have significant potential utility in robotics due to their high energy efficiency on specialized hardware, but proof-of-concept implementations have not yet typically achieved competitive performance or capability with conventional approaches. In this paper, we tackle one of the key practical challenges of scalability by introducing a novel modular ensemble network approach, where compact, localized spiking networks each learn and are solely responsible for recognizing places in a local region of the environment only. This modular approach creates a highly scalable system. However, it comes with a high-performance cost where a lack of global regularization at deployment time leads to hyperactive neurons that erroneously respond to places outside their learned region. Our second contribution introduces a regularization approach that detects and removes these problematic hyperactive neurons during the initial environmental learning phase. We evaluate this new scalable modular system on benchmark localization datasets Nordland and Oxford RobotCar, with comparisons to standard techniques NetVLAD, DenseVLAD, and SAD, and a previous spiking neural network system. Our system substantially outperforms the previous SNN system on its small dataset, but also maintains performance on 27 times larger benchmark datasets where the operation of the previous system is computationally infeasible, and performs competitively with the conventional localization systems.
summary: Spiking neural networks have significant potential utility in robotics due to their high energy efficiency on specialized hardware, but proof-of-concept implementations have not yet typically achieved competitive performance or capability with conventional approaches. In this paper, we tackle one of the key practical challenges of scalability by introducing a novel modular ensemble network approach, where compact, localized spiking networks each learn and are solely responsible for recognizing places in a local region of the environment only. This modular approach creates a highly scalable system. However, it comes with a high-performance cost where a lack of global regularization at deployment time leads to hyperactive neurons that erroneously respond to places outside their learned region. Our second contribution introduces a regularization approach that detects and removes these problematic hyperactive neurons during the initial environmental learning phase. We evaluate this new scalable modular system on benchmark localization datasets Nordland and Oxford RobotCar, with comparisons to standard techniques NetVLAD, DenseVLAD, and SAD, and a previous spiking neural network system. Our system substantially outperforms the previous SNN system on its small dataset, but also maintains performance on 27 times larger benchmark datasets where the operation of the previous system is computationally infeasible, and performs competitively with the conventional localization systems.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络由于其在专用硬件上的高能效，在机器人技术中具有巨大的潜在效用，但概念验证的实现通常尚未实现与传统方法相比具有竞争力的性能或能力。在本文中，我们通过引入一种新颖的模块化集成网络方法来解决可扩展性的关键实际挑战之一，其中紧凑的局部尖峰网络各自学习并仅负责识别环境局部区域中的位置。这种模块化方法创建了一个高度可扩展的系统。然而，它带来了高性能成本，部署时缺乏全局正则化会导致神经元过度活跃，错误地对其学习区域之外的地方做出反应。我们的第二个贡献引入了一种正则化方法，可以在初始环境学习阶段检测并消除这些有问题的过度活跃神经元。我们在基准本地化数据集 Nordland 和 Oxford RobotCar 上评估了这个新的可扩展模块化系统，并与标准技术 NetVLAD、DenseVLAD 和 SAD 以及之前的尖峰神经网络系统进行了比较。我们的系统在小数据集上大大优于以前的 SNN 系统，而且在 27 倍大的基准数据集上也保持了性能，而以前的系统的操作在计算上是不可行的，并且与传统的定位系统具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化集成方法，通过紧凑、区域特定且正则化的脉冲神经网络（SNN）实现可扩展的场所识别。
AI.motivation: 尽管脉冲神经网络（SNN）在机器人领域具有高能效优势，但现有方法在可扩展性和性能上尚未达到传统方法水平，需解决全局正则化不足导致的超活跃神经元问题。
AI.method: 设计模块化网络架构，使每个局部SNN仅负责识别特定区域；引入正则化方法在环境学习阶段检测并移除超活跃神经元，提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Nordland和Oxford RobotCar数据集上，系统在小型数据集上显著优于先前SNN方法，在27倍规模数据集上保持性能且超越传统定位系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模块化与正则化有效提升了SNN的可扩展性与性能，为机器人领域实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Agniva Chowdhury,Gregory Dexter,Palma London,Haim Avron,Petros Drineas
title: Faster Randomized Interior Point Methods for Tall/Wide Linear Programs
title_zh: 适用于高/宽线性程序的更快随机内点方法
comment: Extended version of the NeurIPS 2020 submission. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.08072
comments: Extended version of the NeurIPS 2020 submission. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2003.08072
abstract: Linear programming (LP) is an extremely useful tool which has been successfully applied to solve various problems in a wide range of areas, including operations research, engineering, economics, or even more abstract mathematical areas such as combinatorics. It is also used in many machine learning applications, such as $\ell_1$-regularized SVMs, basis pursuit, nonnegative matrix factorization, etc. Interior Point Methods (IPMs) are one of the most popular methods to solve LPs both in theory and in practice. Their underlying complexity is dominated by the cost of solving a system of linear equations at each iteration. In this paper, we consider both feasible and infeasible IPMs for the special case where the number of variables is much larger than the number of constraints. Using tools from Randomized Linear Algebra, we present a preconditioning technique that, when combined with the iterative solvers such as Conjugate Gradient or Chebyshev Iteration, provably guarantees that IPM algorithms (suitably modified to account for the error incurred by the approximate solver), converge to a feasible, approximately optimal solution, without increasing their iteration complexity. Our empirical evaluations verify our theoretical results on both real-world and synthetic data.
summary: Linear programming (LP) is an extremely useful tool which has been successfully applied to solve various problems in a wide range of areas, including operations research, engineering, economics, or even more abstract mathematical areas such as combinatorics. It is also used in many machine learning applications, such as $\ell_1$-regularized SVMs, basis pursuit, nonnegative matrix factorization, etc. Interior Point Methods (IPMs) are one of the most popular methods to solve LPs both in theory and in practice. Their underlying complexity is dominated by the cost of solving a system of linear equations at each iteration. In this paper, we consider both feasible and infeasible IPMs for the special case where the number of variables is much larger than the number of constraints. Using tools from Randomized Linear Algebra, we present a preconditioning technique that, when combined with the iterative solvers such as Conjugate Gradient or Chebyshev Iteration, provably guarantees that IPM algorithms (suitably modified to account for the error incurred by the approximate solver), converge to a feasible, approximately optimal solution, without increasing their iteration complexity. Our empirical evaluations verify our theoretical results on both real-world and synthetic data.
abstract_zh: 线性规划（LP）是一种非常有用的工具，已成功应用于解决广泛领域的各种问题，包括运筹学、工程、经济学，甚至更抽象的数学领域（例如组合学）。它还用于许多机器学习应用中，例如 $\ell_1$ 正则化 SVM、基追踪、非负矩阵分解等。内点法 (IPM) 是理论和实践中求解 LP 的最流行的方法之一。它们的潜在复杂性主要取决于每次迭代求解线性方程组的成本。在本文中，我们针对变量数量远大于约束数量的特殊情况考虑可行和不可行的 IPM。使用随机线性代数的工具，我们提出了一种预处理技术，当与迭代求解器（例如共轭梯度或切比雪夫迭代）结合使用时，可以证明 IPM 算法（适当修改以考虑近似求解器产生的误差）收敛到可行的近似最优解，而不增加其迭代复杂性。我们的实证评估验证了我们在现实世界和合成数据上的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对变量数量远多于约束的线性规划问题的快速随机内点法。
AI.motivation: 传统内点法在求解大规模线性规划时，每次迭代需要高昂的线性方程组求解成本，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合随机线性代数工具设计预处理技术，与共轭梯度等迭代求解器结合，修改IPM算法以容忍近似求解误差。
AI.result: 理论证明算法收敛性且未增加迭代复杂度，实验在真实与合成数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过随机预处理显著加速大规模线性规划求解，同时保持算法收敛性与理论保证。

result: 理论证明算法收敛性且未增加迭代复杂度，实验在真实与合成数据集上验证了方法有效性。
conclusion: 该方法通过随机预处理显著加速大规模线性规划求解，同时保持算法收敛性与理论保证。
search_text: Faster Randomized Interior Point Methods for Tall/Wide Linear Programs 适用于高/宽线性程序的更快随机内点方法 Linear programming (LP) is an extremely useful tool which has been successfully applied to solve various problems in a wide range of areas, including operations research, engineering, economics, or even more abstract mathematical areas such as combinatorics. It is also used in many machine learning applications, such as $\ell_1$-regularized SVMs, basis pursuit, nonnegative matrix factorization, etc. Interior Point Methods (IPMs) are one of the most popular methods to solve LPs both in theory and in practice. Their underlying complexity is dominated by the cost of solving a system of linear equations at each iteration. In this paper, we consider both feasible and infeasible IPMs for the special case where the number of variables is much larger than the number of constraints. Using tools from Randomized Linear Algebra, we present a preconditioning technique that, when combined with the iterative solvers such as Conjugate Gradient or Chebyshev Iteration, provably guarantees that IPM algorithms (suitably modified to account for the error incurred by the approximate solver), converge to a feasible, approximately optimal solution, without increasing their iteration complexity. Our empirical evaluations verify our theoretical results on both real-world and synthetic data. 线性规划（LP）是一种非常有用的工具，已成功应用于解决广泛领域的各种问题，包括运筹学、工程、经济学，甚至更抽象的数学领域（例如组合学）。它还用于许多机器学习应用中，例如 $\ell_1$ 正则化 SVM、基追踪、非负矩阵分解等。内点法 (IPM) 是理论和实践中求解 LP 的最流行的方法之一。它们的潜在复杂性主要取决于每次迭代求解线性方程组的成本。在本文中，我们针对变量数量远大于约束数量的特殊情况考虑可行和不可行的 IPM。使用随机线性代数的工具，我们提出了一种预处理技术，当与迭代求解器（例如共轭梯度或切比雪夫迭代）结合使用时，可以证明 IPM 算法（适当修改以考虑近似求解器产生的误差）收敛到可行的近似最优解，而不增加其迭代复杂性。我们的实证评估验证了我们在现实世界和合成数据上的理论结果。 本文提出一种针对变量数量远多于约束的线性规划问题的快速随机内点法。 Agniva Chowdhury,Gregory Dexter,Palma London,Haim Avron,Petros Drineas cs.DS

title: Joint Language Semantic and Structure Embedding for Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 用于知识图补全的联合语言语义和结构嵌入
abstract: The task of completing knowledge triplets has broad downstream applications. Both structural and semantic information plays an important role in knowledge graph completion. Unlike previous approaches that rely on either the structures or semantics of the knowledge graphs, we propose to jointly embed the semantics in the natural language description of the knowledge triplets with their structure information. Our method embeds knowledge graphs for the completion task via fine-tuning pre-trained language models with respect to a probabilistic structured loss, where the forward pass of the language models captures semantics and the loss reconstructs structures. Our extensive experiments on a variety of knowledge graph benchmarks have demonstrated the state-of-the-art performance of our method. We also show that our method can significantly improve the performance in a low-resource regime, thanks to the better use of semantics. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/pkusjh/LASS.
summary: The task of completing knowledge triplets has broad downstream applications. Both structural and semantic information plays an important role in knowledge graph completion. Unlike previous approaches that rely on either the structures or semantics of the knowledge graphs, we propose to jointly embed the semantics in the natural language description of the knowledge triplets with their structure information. Our method embeds knowledge graphs for the completion task via fine-tuning pre-trained language models with respect to a probabilistic structured loss, where the forward pass of the language models captures semantics and the loss reconstructs structures. Our extensive experiments on a variety of knowledge graph benchmarks have demonstrated the state-of-the-art performance of our method. We also show that our method can significantly improve the performance in a low-resource regime, thanks to the better use of semantics. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/pkusjh/LASS.
abstract_zh: 完成知识三元组的任务具有广泛的下游应用。结构信息和语义信息在知识图补全中都起着重要作用。与之前依赖知识图的结构或语义的方法不同，我们建议将语义与其结构信息联合嵌入知识三元组的自然语言描述中。我们的方法通过针对概率结构化损失微调预先训练的语言模型来嵌入完成任务的知识图，其中语言模型的前向传递捕获语义，损失重建结构。我们对各种知识图基准进行的广泛实验证明了我们方法的最先进的性能。我们还表明，由于语义的更好使用，我们的方法可以显着提高低资源环境下的性能。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/pkusjh/LASS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识三元组自然语言语义与结构信息的联合嵌入方法，用于知识图谱补全任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅利用知识图谱的结构信息或语义信息，未能有效融合两者，而结构与语义的联合建模可提升补全效果，尤其在低资源场景下具有优势。
AI.method: 通过微调预训练语言模型，结合概率结构损失函数：语言模型前向传播捕捉语义，损失函数重建结构关系，实现语义与结构的联合嵌入。
AI.result: 在多个知识图谱基准数据集上达到最先进性能，且在低资源条件下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模语言语义与结构信息能有效提升知识图谱补全性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现突出。

title: Density-aware NeRF Ensembles: Quantifying Predictive Uncertainty in Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: 密度感知 NeRF 集成：量化神经辐射场中的预测不确定性
abstract: We show that ensembling effectively quantifies model uncertainty in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) if a density-aware epistemic uncertainty term is considered. The naive ensembles investigated in prior work simply average rendered RGB images to quantify the model uncertainty caused by conflicting explanations of the observed scene. In contrast, we additionally consider the termination probabilities along individual rays to identify epistemic model uncertainty due to a lack of knowledge about the parts of a scene unobserved during training. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance across established uncertainty quantification benchmarks for NeRFs, outperforming methods that require complex changes to the NeRF architecture and training regime. We furthermore demonstrate that NeRF uncertainty can be utilised for next-best view selection and model refinement.
summary: We show that ensembling effectively quantifies model uncertainty in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) if a density-aware epistemic uncertainty term is considered. The naive ensembles investigated in prior work simply average rendered RGB images to quantify the model uncertainty caused by conflicting explanations of the observed scene. In contrast, we additionally consider the termination probabilities along individual rays to identify epistemic model uncertainty due to a lack of knowledge about the parts of a scene unobserved during training. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance across established uncertainty quantification benchmarks for NeRFs, outperforming methods that require complex changes to the NeRF architecture and training regime. We furthermore demonstrate that NeRF uncertainty can be utilised for next-best view selection and model refinement.
abstract_zh: 我们表明，如果考虑密度感知的认知不确定性项，集成可以有效地量化神经辐射场（NeRF）中的模型不确定性。先前工作中研究的朴素集成只是对渲染的 RGB 图像进行平均，以量化由于观察场景的相互冲突的解释而引起的模型不确定性。相比之下，我们还考虑沿单个光线的终止概率，以识别由于缺乏对训练期间未观察到的场景部分的了解而导致的认知模型不确定性。我们在已建立的 NeRF 不确定性量化基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，优于需要对 NeRF 架构和训练制度进行复杂更改的方法。我们还证明 NeRF 不确定性可用于次优视图选择和模型细化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种密度感知的NeRF集成方法，通过结合终止概率量化模型不确定性，提升NeRF的预测可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF集成方法仅通过平均RGB图像评估不确定性，无法捕捉因训练数据缺失导致的场景未知区域不确定性。
AI.method: 在集成框架中引入密度感知的先验不确定性项，结合光线终止概率分析未观测区域的不确定性，替代单纯RGB平均策略。
AI.result: 在NeRF不确定性基准测试中达到新SOTA，优于需修改网络结构的方法，并实现视图选择与模型优化应用。
AI.conclusion: 密度感知集成有效量化NeRF不确定性，为场景未知区域建模提供新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Nicholas Gray,Megan Moraes,Jiang Bian,Alex Wang,Allen Tian,Kurt Wilson,Yan Huang,Haoyi Xiong,Zhishan Guo
title: GLARE: A Dataset for Traffic Sign Detection in Sun Glare
title_zh: GLARE：太阳眩光中交通标志检测的数据集
abstract: Real-time machine learning object detection algorithms are often found within autonomous vehicle technology and depend on quality datasets. It is essential that these algorithms work correctly in everyday conditions as well as under strong sun glare. Reports indicate glare is one of the two most prominent environment-related reasons for crashes. However, existing datasets, such as the Laboratory for Intelligent & Safe Automobiles Traffic Sign (LISA) Dataset and the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark, do not reflect the existence of sun glare at all. This paper presents the GLARE (GLARE is available at: https://github.com/NicholasCG/GLARE_Dataset ) traffic sign dataset: a collection of images with U.S-based traffic signs under heavy visual interference by sunlight. GLARE contains 2,157 images of traffic signs with sun glare, pulled from 33 videos of dashcam footage of roads in the United States. It provides an essential enrichment to the widely used LISA Traffic Sign dataset. Our experimental study shows that although several state-of-the-art baseline architectures have demonstrated good performance on traffic sign detection in conditions without sun glare in the past, they performed poorly when tested against GLARE (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 19.4). We also notice that current architectures have better detection when trained on images of traffic signs in sun glare performance (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 39.6), and perform best when trained on a mixture of conditions (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 42.3).
summary: Real-time machine learning object detection algorithms are often found within autonomous vehicle technology and depend on quality datasets. It is essential that these algorithms work correctly in everyday conditions as well as under strong sun glare. Reports indicate glare is one of the two most prominent environment-related reasons for crashes. However, existing datasets, such as the Laboratory for Intelligent & Safe Automobiles Traffic Sign (LISA) Dataset and the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark, do not reflect the existence of sun glare at all. This paper presents the GLARE (GLARE is available at: https://github.com/NicholasCG/GLARE_Dataset ) traffic sign dataset: a collection of images with U.S-based traffic signs under heavy visual interference by sunlight. GLARE contains 2,157 images of traffic signs with sun glare, pulled from 33 videos of dashcam footage of roads in the United States. It provides an essential enrichment to the widely used LISA Traffic Sign dataset. Our experimental study shows that although several state-of-the-art baseline architectures have demonstrated good performance on traffic sign detection in conditions without sun glare in the past, they performed poorly when tested against GLARE (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 19.4). We also notice that current architectures have better detection when trained on images of traffic signs in sun glare performance (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 39.6), and perform best when trained on a mixture of conditions (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 42.3).
abstract_zh: 实时机器学习对象检测算法通常出现在自动驾驶汽车技术中，并且依赖于质量数据集。这些算法在日常条件下以及强烈的阳光照射下正常工作至关重要。报告表明，眩光是导致事故的两个最重要的环境相关原因之一。 However, existing datasets, such as the Laboratory for Intelligent & Safe Automobiles Traffic Sign (LISA) Dataset and the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark, do not reflect the existence of sun glare at all. This paper presents the GLARE (GLARE is available at: https://github.com/NicholasCG/GLARE_Dataset ) traffic sign dataset: a collection of images with U.S-based traffic signs under heavy visual interference by sunlight. GLARE 包含 2,157 张带有阳光眩光的交通标志图像，这些图像取自 33 个美国道路行车记录仪视频。它为广泛使用的 LISA 交通标志数据集提供了重要的丰富。 Our experimental study shows that although several state-of-the-art baseline architectures have demonstrated good performance on traffic sign detection in conditions without sun glare in the past, they performed poorly when tested against GLARE (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 19.4). We also notice that current architectures have better detection when trained on images of traffic signs in sun glare performance (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 39.6), and perform best when trained on a mixture of conditions (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 42.3).

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLARE数据集，用于在强阳光眩光条件下进行交通标志检测。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集未包含阳光眩光场景，而眩光是导致事故的主要环境因素之一，需提升算法在复杂光照条件下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 从美国道路行车记录仪视频中采集2,157张含强阳光干扰的交通标志图像，构建GLARE数据集，并测试主流检测模型在该数据集上的性能表现。
AI.result: 主流模型在无眩光训练下检测性能较差（mAP0.5:0.95=19.4），而使用眩光图像训练后性能显著提升（mAP0.5:0.95=39.6），混合条件训练效果最佳（mAP0.5:0.95=42.3）。
AI.conclusion: GLARE数据集为交通标志检测提供了关键补充，证明了多样化光照条件训练对提升算法实际应用价值的重要性。

search_text: GLARE: A Dataset for Traffic Sign Detection in Sun Glare GLARE：太阳眩光中交通标志检测的数据集 Real-time machine learning object detection algorithms are often found within autonomous vehicle technology and depend on quality datasets. It is essential that these algorithms work correctly in everyday conditions as well as under strong sun glare. Reports indicate glare is one of the two most prominent environment-related reasons for crashes. However, existing datasets, such as the Laboratory for Intelligent & Safe Automobiles Traffic Sign (LISA) Dataset and the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark, do not reflect the existence of sun glare at all. This paper presents the GLARE (GLARE is available at: https://github.com/NicholasCG/GLARE_Dataset ) traffic sign dataset: a collection of images with U.S-based traffic signs under heavy visual interference by sunlight. GLARE contains 2,157 images of traffic signs with sun glare, pulled from 33 videos of dashcam footage of roads in the United States. It provides an essential enrichment to the widely used LISA Traffic Sign dataset. Our experimental study shows that although several state-of-the-art baseline architectures have demonstrated good performance on traffic sign detection in conditions without sun glare in the past, they performed poorly when tested against GLARE (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 19.4). We also notice that current architectures have better detection when trained on images of traffic signs in sun glare performance (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 39.6), and perform best when trained on a mixture of conditions (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 42.3). 实时机器学习对象检测算法通常出现在自动驾驶汽车技术中，并且依赖于质量数据集。这些算法在日常条件下以及强烈的阳光照射下正常工作至关重要。报告表明，眩光是导致事故的两个最重要的环境相关原因之一。 However, existing datasets, such as the Laboratory for Intelligent & Safe Automobiles Traffic Sign (LISA) Dataset and the German Traffic Sign Recognition Benchmark, do not reflect the existence of sun glare at all. This paper presents the GLARE (GLARE is available at: https://github.com/NicholasCG/GLARE_Dataset ) traffic sign dataset: a collection of images with U.S-based traffic signs under heavy visual interference by sunlight. GLARE 包含 2,157 张带有阳光眩光的交通标志图像，这些图像取自 33 个美国道路行车记录仪视频。它为广泛使用的 LISA 交通标志数据集提供了重要的丰富。 Our experimental study shows that although several state-of-the-art baseline architectures have demonstrated good performance on traffic sign detection in conditions without sun glare in the past, they performed poorly when tested against GLARE (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 19.4). We also notice that current architectures have better detection when trained on images of traffic signs in sun glare performance (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 39.6), and perform best when trained on a mixture of conditions (e.g., average mAP0.5:0.95 of 42.3). 本文提出GLARE数据集，用于在强阳光眩光条件下进行交通标志检测。 Nicholas Gray,Megan Moraes,Jiang Bian,Alex Wang,Allen Tian,Kurt Wilson,Yan Huang,Haoyi Xiong,Zhishan Guo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mao Ye,Bo Liu,Stephen Wright,Peter Stone,Qiang Liu
title: BOME! Bilevel Optimization Made Easy: A Simple First-Order Approach
title_zh: 哎呀！双层优化变得简单：简单的一阶方法
abstract: Bilevel optimization (BO) is useful for solving a variety of important machine learning problems including but not limited to hyperparameter optimization, meta-learning, continual learning, and reinforcement learning. Conventional BO methods need to differentiate through the low-level optimization process with implicit differentiation, which requires expensive calculations related to the Hessian matrix. There has been a recent quest for first-order methods for BO, but the methods proposed to date tend to be complicated and impractical for large-scale deep learning applications. In this work, we propose a simple first-order BO algorithm that depends only on first-order gradient information, requires no implicit differentiation, and is practical and efficient for large-scale non-convex functions in deep learning. We provide non-asymptotic convergence analysis of the proposed method to stationary points for non-convex objectives and present empirical results that show its superior practical performance.
summary: Bilevel optimization (BO) is useful for solving a variety of important machine learning problems including but not limited to hyperparameter optimization, meta-learning, continual learning, and reinforcement learning. Conventional BO methods need to differentiate through the low-level optimization process with implicit differentiation, which requires expensive calculations related to the Hessian matrix. There has been a recent quest for first-order methods for BO, but the methods proposed to date tend to be complicated and impractical for large-scale deep learning applications. In this work, we propose a simple first-order BO algorithm that depends only on first-order gradient information, requires no implicit differentiation, and is practical and efficient for large-scale non-convex functions in deep learning. We provide non-asymptotic convergence analysis of the proposed method to stationary points for non-convex objectives and present empirical results that show its superior practical performance.
abstract_zh: 双层优化（BO）对于解决各种重要的机器学习问题非常有用，包括但不限于超参数优化、元学习、持续学习和强化学习。传统的BO方法需要通过隐式微分的低级优化过程进行微分，这需要与Hessian矩阵相关的昂贵计算。最近有人在寻找 BO 的一阶方法，但迄今为止提出的方法对于大规模深度学习应用来说往往很复杂且不切实际。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种简单的一阶 BO 算法，该算法仅依赖于一阶梯度信息，不需要隐式微分，并且对于深度学习中的大规模非凸函数来说实用且高效。我们对所提出的方法对非凸目标的驻点进行非渐近收敛分析，并给出了表明其优越实用性能的实证结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种简单的一阶 bilevel 优化算法，用于解决深度学习中的非凸问题，无需隐式微分。
AI.motivation: 传统 bilevel 优化方法依赖隐式微分和耗时的 Hessian 矩阵计算，而现有的一阶方法复杂且难以应用于大规模深度学习。
AI.method: 设计了一种仅依赖一阶梯度信息的简单算法，避免隐式微分，适用于大规模非凸优化问题。
AI.result: 提供了非渐近收敛性分析，并通过实验验证了该方法在实际应用中的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度学习中的 bilevel 优化提供了高效、实用的解决方案，优于现有复杂方法。

authors_text: Man Xiao,Xiaoqiao Liu,Weidong Li,Xin Chen,Malgorzata Sterna,Jacek Blazewicz
title: Online and semi-online scheduling on two hierarchical machines with a common due date to maximize the total early work
title_zh: 在两台具有共同截止日期的分层机器上进行在线和半在线调度，以最大化早期工作总量
abstract: In this study, we investigated several online and semi-online scheduling problems on two hierarchical machines with a common due date to maximize the total early work. For the pure online case, we designed an optimal online algorithm with a competitive ratio of $\sqrt 2$. For the case when the total processing time is known, we proposed an optimal semi-online algorithm with a competitive ratio of $\frac{4}{3}$. Additionally, for the cases when the largest processing time is known, we gave optimal algorithms with a competitive ratio of $\frac{6}{5}$ if the largest job is a lower hierarchy one, and of $\sqrt 5-1$ if the largest job is a higher hierarchy one, respectively.
summary: In this study, we investigated several online and semi-online scheduling problems on two hierarchical machines with a common due date to maximize the total early work. For the pure online case, we designed an optimal online algorithm with a competitive ratio of $\sqrt 2$. For the case when the total processing time is known, we proposed an optimal semi-online algorithm with a competitive ratio of $\frac{4}{3}$. Additionally, for the cases when the largest processing time is known, we gave optimal algorithms with a competitive ratio of $\frac{6}{5}$ if the largest job is a lower hierarchy one, and of $\sqrt 5-1$ if the largest job is a higher hierarchy one, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们研究了两台具有共同截止日期的分层机器上的在线和半在线调度问题，以最大限度地提高早期工作总量。对于纯在线情况，我们设计了竞争比为$\sqrt 2$的最优在线算法。对于总处理时间已知的情况，我们提出了竞争比为$\frac{4}{3}$的最优半在线算法。此外，对于已知最大处理时间的情况，我们给出了最佳算法，如果最大的作业是较低层次的作业，则竞争比为 $\frac{6}{5}$；如果最大的作业是较高层次的作业，则竞争比为 $\sqrt 5-1$。

AI.tldr: 研究在两个分层机器上处理在线和半在线调度问题，旨在最大化总提前工作。
AI.motivation: 优化任务调度以提高效率，减少延迟，特别是在资源受限的环境中。
AI.method: 设计并分析了多种在线和半在线算法，针对不同已知信息的情况进行优化。
AI.result: 提出了多种算法，竞争比分别为√2、4/3、6/5和√5-1，具体取决于问题的条件。
AI.conclusion: 针对不同信息条件提出了最优算法，有效提升了调度效率。

title: An Adaptive Threshold for the Canny Edge Detection with Actor-Critic Algorithm
title_zh: 基于Actor-Critic算法的Canny边缘检测的自适应阈值
abstract: Visual surveillance aims to perform robust foreground object detection regardless of the time and place. Object detection shows good results using only spatial information, but foreground object detection in visual surveillance requires proper temporal and spatial information processing. In deep learning-based foreground object detection algorithms, the detection ability is superior to classical background subtraction (BGS) algorithms in an environment similar to training. However, the performance is lower than that of the classical BGS algorithm in the environment different from training. This paper proposes a spatio-temporal fusion network (STFN) that could extract temporal and spatial information using a temporal network and a spatial network. We suggest a method using a semi-foreground map for stable training of the proposed STFN. The proposed algorithm shows excellent performance in an environment different from training, and we show it through experiments with various public datasets. Also, STFN can generate a compliant background image in a semi-supervised method, and it can operate in real-time on a desktop with GPU. The proposed method shows 11.28% and 18.33% higher FM than the latest deep learning method in the LASIESTA and SBI dataset, respectively.
summary: Visual surveillance aims to perform robust foreground object detection regardless of the time and place. Object detection shows good results using only spatial information, but foreground object detection in visual surveillance requires proper temporal and spatial information processing. In deep learning-based foreground object detection algorithms, the detection ability is superior to classical background subtraction (BGS) algorithms in an environment similar to training. However, the performance is lower than that of the classical BGS algorithm in the environment different from training. This paper proposes a spatio-temporal fusion network (STFN) that could extract temporal and spatial information using a temporal network and a spatial network. We suggest a method using a semi-foreground map for stable training of the proposed STFN. The proposed algorithm shows excellent performance in an environment different from training, and we show it through experiments with various public datasets. Also, STFN can generate a compliant background image in a semi-supervised method, and it can operate in real-time on a desktop with GPU. The proposed method shows 11.28% and 18.33% higher FM than the latest deep learning method in the LASIESTA and SBI dataset, respectively.
abstract_zh: 视觉监视的目的是无论时间和地点如何都能执行强大的前景物体检测。仅使用空间信息的目标检测显示出良好的结果，但视觉监视中的前景目标检测需要适当的时间和空间信息处理。基于深度学习的前景物体检测算法，在类似训练的环境下，检测能力优于经典背景减除（BGS）算法。但在不同于训练的环境下，性能低于经典BGS算法。本文提出了一种时空融合网络（STFN），可以使用时间网络和空间网络提取时间和空间信息。我们提出了一种使用半前景图来稳定训练所提出的 STFN 的方法。所提出的算法在不同于训练的环境中表现出了出色的性能，我们通过各种公共数据集的实验证明了这一点。此外，STFN 可以以半监督的方式生成合规的背景图像，并且可以在具有 GPU 的桌面上实时运行。该方法在 LASIESTA 和 SBI 数据集中显示出比最新深度学习方法分别高 11.28% 和 18.33% 的 FM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时空融合网络（STFN），用于改进视觉监控中的前景物体检测，通过结合时空信息处理和半前景图训练方法，提升不同环境下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于深度学习的前景检测算法在训练环境相似时表现优异，但在不同环境下的性能下降，而经典背景减除（BGS）算法在环境变化时更稳定，需解决此问题。
AI.method: 设计时空融合网络（STFN），包含时序网络和空间网络以提取时空信息，并引入半前景图进行稳定训练，同时支持半监督生成背景图像。
AI.result: 在LASIESTA和SBI数据集上，STFN的FM指标分别比最新深度学习方法高出11.28%和18.33%，且可在GPU桌面端实时运行。
AI.conclusion: STFN通过时空信息融合和半前景图训练，有效提升了不同环境下的前景检测性能，验证了其在视觉监控中的实用性和优越性。

search_text: An Adaptive Threshold for the Canny Edge Detection with Actor-Critic Algorithm 基于Actor-Critic算法的Canny边缘检测的自适应阈值 Visual surveillance aims to perform robust foreground object detection regardless of the time and place. Object detection shows good results using only spatial information, but foreground object detection in visual surveillance requires proper temporal and spatial information processing. In deep learning-based foreground object detection algorithms, the detection ability is superior to classical background subtraction (BGS) algorithms in an environment similar to training. However, the performance is lower than that of the classical BGS algorithm in the environment different from training. This paper proposes a spatio-temporal fusion network (STFN) that could extract temporal and spatial information using a temporal network and a spatial network. We suggest a method using a semi-foreground map for stable training of the proposed STFN. The proposed algorithm shows excellent performance in an environment different from training, and we show it through experiments with various public datasets. Also, STFN can generate a compliant background image in a semi-supervised method, and it can operate in real-time on a desktop with GPU. The proposed method shows 11.28% and 18.33% higher FM than the latest deep learning method in the LASIESTA and SBI dataset, respectively. 视觉监视的目的是无论时间和地点如何都能执行强大的前景物体检测。仅使用空间信息的目标检测显示出良好的结果，但视觉监视中的前景目标检测需要适当的时间和空间信息处理。基于深度学习的前景物体检测算法，在类似训练的环境下，检测能力优于经典背景减除（BGS）算法。但在不同于训练的环境下，性能低于经典BGS算法。本文提出了一种时空融合网络（STFN），可以使用时间网络和空间网络提取时间和空间信息。我们提出了一种使用半前景图来稳定训练所提出的 STFN 的方法。所提出的算法在不同于训练的环境中表现出了出色的性能，我们通过各种公共数据集的实验证明了这一点。此外，STFN 可以以半监督的方式生成合规的背景图像，并且可以在具有 GPU 的桌面上实时运行。该方法在 LASIESTA 和 SBI 数据集中显示出比最新深度学习方法分别高 11.28% 和 18.33% 的 FM。 本文提出了一种时空融合网络（STFN），用于改进视觉监控中的前景物体检测，通过结合时空信息处理和半前景图训练方法，提升不同环境下的检测性能。 Keong-Hun Choi,Jong-Eun Ha cs.CV

title: MECCANO: A Multimodal Egocentric Dataset for Humans Behavior Understanding in the Industrial-like Domain
title_zh: MECCANO：用于类工业领域人类行为理解的多模式自我中心数据集
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.05654
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2010.05654
abstract: Wearable cameras allow to acquire images and videos from the user's perspective. These data can be processed to understand humans behavior. Despite human behavior analysis has been thoroughly investigated in third person vision, it is still understudied in egocentric settings and in particular in industrial scenarios. To encourage research in this field, we present MECCANO, a multimodal dataset of egocentric videos to study humans behavior understanding in industrial-like settings. The multimodality is characterized by the presence of gaze signals, depth maps and RGB videos acquired simultaneously with a custom headset. The dataset has been explicitly labeled for fundamental tasks in the context of human behavior understanding from a first person view, such as recognizing and anticipating human-object interactions. With the MECCANO dataset, we explored five different tasks including 1) Action Recognition, 2) Active Objects Detection and Recognition, 3) Egocentric Human-Objects Interaction Detection, 4) Action Anticipation and 5) Next-Active Objects Detection. We propose a benchmark aimed to study human behavior in the considered industrial-like scenario which demonstrates that the investigated tasks and the considered scenario are challenging for state-of-the-art algorithms. To support research in this field, we publicy release the dataset at https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/MECCANO/.
summary: Wearable cameras allow to acquire images and videos from the user's perspective. These data can be processed to understand humans behavior. Despite human behavior analysis has been thoroughly investigated in third person vision, it is still understudied in egocentric settings and in particular in industrial scenarios. To encourage research in this field, we present MECCANO, a multimodal dataset of egocentric videos to study humans behavior understanding in industrial-like settings. The multimodality is characterized by the presence of gaze signals, depth maps and RGB videos acquired simultaneously with a custom headset. The dataset has been explicitly labeled for fundamental tasks in the context of human behavior understanding from a first person view, such as recognizing and anticipating human-object interactions. With the MECCANO dataset, we explored five different tasks including 1) Action Recognition, 2) Active Objects Detection and Recognition, 3) Egocentric Human-Objects Interaction Detection, 4) Action Anticipation and 5) Next-Active Objects Detection. We propose a benchmark aimed to study human behavior in the considered industrial-like scenario which demonstrates that the investigated tasks and the considered scenario are challenging for state-of-the-art algorithms. To support research in this field, we publicy release the dataset at https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/MECCANO/.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴相机允许从用户的角度获取图像和视频。可以处理这些数据以了解人类的行为。尽管人类行为分析已经在第三人称视觉中得到了彻底的研究，但在以自我为中心的环境中，特别是在工业场景中，它仍然没有得到充分研究。为了鼓励这一领域的研究，我们推出了 MECCANO，这是一个以自我为中心的视频的多模态数据集，用于研究人类在类似工业环境中的行为理解。多模态的特点是存在使用定制耳机同时采集的注视信号、深度图和 RGB 视频。该数据集已被明确标记为从第一人称视角理解人类行为的背景下的基本任务，例如识别和预测人与物体的交互。利用 MECCANO 数据集，我们探索了五种不同的任务，包括 1) 动作识别、2) 活动物体检测和识别、3) 以自我为中心的人与物体交互检测、4) 动作预期和 5) 下一个活动物体检测。我们提出了一个基准，旨在研究在所考虑的类似工业场景中的人类行为，该基准表明所研究的任务和所考虑的场景对最先进的算法具有挑战性。为了支持该领域的研究，我们在 https://iplab.dmi.unict.it/MECCANO/ 上公开发布了该数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MECCANO数据集，用于研究工业场景中第一人称视角下的人类行为理解，包含RGB视频、深度图和注视信号等多模态数据。
AI.motivation: 尽管第三人称视角的人类行为分析已被广泛研究，但第一人称视角（尤其是工业场景）仍缺乏系统研究，亟需构建专门数据集推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 通过自定义头戴设备同步采集RGB视频、深度图和注视信号，标注五类任务（动作识别、主动物体检测、人-物交互检测等），构建多模态工业场景行为理解基准测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有算法在MECCANO数据集上的表现存在显著挑战，验证了该数据集在工业场景行为理解任务中的有效性与难度。
AI.conclusion: MECCANO数据集为工业场景下第一人称视角的人类行为理解研究提供了标准化基准，有助于推动相关算法的发展。

authors_text: Gerry Chen,Harsh Muriki,Cédric Pradalier,Yongsheng Chen,Frank Dellaert
title: A Hybrid Cable-Driven Robot for Non-Destructive Leafy Plant Monitoring and Mass Estimation using Structure from Motion
title_zh: 一种混合电缆驱动机器人，利用运动结构进行非破坏性叶类植物监测和质量估计
comment: 8 pages (6-content, 2-citations), 10 figures, 4 tables, submitted to ICRA 2023
comments: 8 pages (6-content, 2-citations), 10 figures, 4 tables, submitted to ICRA 2023
abstract: We propose a novel hybrid cable-based robot with manipulator and camera for high-accuracy, medium-throughput plant monitoring in a vertical hydroponic farm and, as an example application, demonstrate non-destructive plant mass estimation. Plant monitoring with high temporal and spatial resolution is important to both farmers and researchers to detect anomalies and develop predictive models for plant growth. The availability of high-quality, off-the-shelf structure-from-motion (SfM) and photogrammetry packages has enabled a vibrant community of roboticists to apply computer vision for non-destructive plant monitoring. While existing approaches tend to focus on either high-throughput (e.g. satellite, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV), vehicle-mounted, conveyor-belt imagery) or high-accuracy/robustness to occlusions (e.g. turn-table scanner or robot arm), we propose a middle-ground that achieves high accuracy with a medium-throughput, highly automated robot. Our design pairs the workspace scalability of a cable-driven parallel robot (CDPR) with the dexterity of a 4 degree-of-freedom (DoF) robot arm to autonomously image many plants from a variety of viewpoints. We describe our robot design and demonstrate it experimentally by collecting daily photographs of 54 plants from 64 viewpoints each. We show that our approach can produce scientifically useful measurements, operate fully autonomously after initial calibration, and produce better reconstructions and plant property estimates than those of over-canopy methods (e.g. UAV). As example applications, we show that our system can successfully estimate plant mass with a Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 0.586g and, when used to perform hypothesis testing on the relationship between mass and age, produces p-values comparable to ground-truth data (p=0.0020 and p=0.0016, respectively).
summary: We propose a novel hybrid cable-based robot with manipulator and camera for high-accuracy, medium-throughput plant monitoring in a vertical hydroponic farm and, as an example application, demonstrate non-destructive plant mass estimation. Plant monitoring with high temporal and spatial resolution is important to both farmers and researchers to detect anomalies and develop predictive models for plant growth. The availability of high-quality, off-the-shelf structure-from-motion (SfM) and photogrammetry packages has enabled a vibrant community of roboticists to apply computer vision for non-destructive plant monitoring. While existing approaches tend to focus on either high-throughput (e.g. satellite, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV), vehicle-mounted, conveyor-belt imagery) or high-accuracy/robustness to occlusions (e.g. turn-table scanner or robot arm), we propose a middle-ground that achieves high accuracy with a medium-throughput, highly automated robot. Our design pairs the workspace scalability of a cable-driven parallel robot (CDPR) with the dexterity of a 4 degree-of-freedom (DoF) robot arm to autonomously image many plants from a variety of viewpoints. We describe our robot design and demonstrate it experimentally by collecting daily photographs of 54 plants from 64 viewpoints each. We show that our approach can produce scientifically useful measurements, operate fully autonomously after initial calibration, and produce better reconstructions and plant property estimates than those of over-canopy methods (e.g. UAV). As example applications, we show that our system can successfully estimate plant mass with a Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 0.586g and, when used to perform hypothesis testing on the relationship between mass and age, produces p-values comparable to ground-truth data (p=0.0020 and p=0.0016, respectively).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新型混合电缆机器人，带有机械手和摄像头，用于垂直水培农场中的高精度、中等吞吐量的植物监测，并作为示例应用演示了无损植物质量估计。高时间和空间分辨率的植物监测对于农民和研究人员检测异常并开发植物生长预测模型都很重要。高质量、现成的运动结构 (SfM) 和摄影测量软件包的出现，使得充满活力的机器人专家社区能够将计算机视觉应用于无损植物监测。虽然现有的方法往往侧重于高吞吐量（例如卫星、无人机（UAV）、车载、传送带图像）或高精度/对遮挡的鲁棒性（例如转台扫描仪或机器人手臂），但我们提出了一种中间立场，通过中等吞吐量、高度自动化的机器人实现高精度。我们的设计将电缆驱动并联机器人 (CDPR) 的工作空间可扩展性与 4 自由度 (DoF) 机器人手臂的灵巧性相结合，可以从多个角度自主地对许多植物进行成像。我们描述了我们的机器人设计，并通过每天从 64 个视角收集 54 株植物的照片进行实验演示。我们表明，我们的方法可以产生科学上有用的测量结果，在初始校准后完全自主运行，并且比冠层方法（例如无人机）产生更好的重建和植物特性估计。作为示例应用，我们表明我们的系统可以成功估计植物质量，平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 0.586g，并且当用于对质量和年龄之间的关系进行假设检验时，产生与地面实况数据相当的 p 值（分别为 p=0.0020 和 p=0.0016）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合缆驱动机器人，用于垂直水培农场中叶类植物的非破坏性监测和质量估计，结合结构从运动（SfM）技术实现高精度和中等吞吐量的自动化监测。
AI.motivation: 现有植物监测方法多侧重于高吞吐量（如无人机）或高精度（如机械臂），但缺乏兼顾精度与效率的解决方案。本文旨在开发一种平衡两者的技术，以满足科研与农业生产中对植物异常检测和生长预测的需求。
AI.method: 设计混合缆驱动并联机器人（CDPR）与4自由度机械臂结合的系统，利用SfM和摄影测量技术，从多视角自动采集植物图像，通过算法重建植物结构并估算质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，系统可实现0.586克的植物质量估计平均绝对误差（MAE），且质量与年龄关系的假设检验p值（0.0020和0.0016）接近真实数据，重建效果优于无人机等过顶方法。
AI.conclusion: 该混合机器人系统通过结合缆驱动与机械臂的优势，实现了高精度、中等吞吐量的自动化植物监测，为非破坏性农业研究提供了可靠的技术方案。
