search_text: A Hybrid Cable-Driven Robot for Non-Destructive Leafy Plant Monitoring and Mass Estimation using Structure from Motion 一种混合电缆驱动机器人，利用运动结构进行非破坏性叶类植物监测和质量估计 We propose a novel hybrid cable-based robot with manipulator and camera for high-accuracy, medium-throughput plant monitoring in a vertical hydroponic farm and, as an example application, demonstrate non-destructive plant mass estimation. Plant monitoring with high temporal and spatial resolution is important to both farmers and researchers to detect anomalies and develop predictive models for plant growth. The availability of high-quality, off-the-shelf structure-from-motion (SfM) and photogrammetry packages has enabled a vibrant community of roboticists to apply computer vision for non-destructive plant monitoring. While existing approaches tend to focus on either high-throughput (e.g. satellite, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV), vehicle-mounted, conveyor-belt imagery) or high-accuracy/robustness to occlusions (e.g. turn-table scanner or robot arm), we propose a middle-ground that achieves high accuracy with a medium-throughput, highly automated robot. Our design pairs the workspace scalability of a cable-driven parallel robot (CDPR) with the dexterity of a 4 degree-of-freedom (DoF) robot arm to autonomously image many plants from a variety of viewpoints. We describe our robot design and demonstrate it experimentally by collecting daily photographs of 54 plants from 64 viewpoints each. We show that our approach can produce scientifically useful measurements, operate fully autonomously after initial calibration, and produce better reconstructions and plant property estimates than those of over-canopy methods (e.g. UAV). As example applications, we show that our system can successfully estimate plant mass with a Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 0.586g and, when used to perform hypothesis testing on the relationship between mass and age, produces p-values comparable to ground-truth data (p=0.0020 and p=0.0016, respectively). 我们提出了一种新型混合电缆机器人，带有机械手和摄像头，用于垂直水培农场中的高精度、中等吞吐量的植物监测，并作为示例应用演示了无损植物质量估计。高时间和空间分辨率的植物监测对于农民和研究人员检测异常并开发植物生长预测模型都很重要。高质量、现成的运动结构 (SfM) 和摄影测量软件包的出现，使得充满活力的机器人专家社区能够将计算机视觉应用于无损植物监测。虽然现有的方法往往侧重于高吞吐量（例如卫星、无人机（UAV）、车载、传送带图像）或高精度/对遮挡的鲁棒性（例如转台扫描仪或机器人手臂），但我们提出了一种中间立场，通过中等吞吐量、高度自动化的机器人实现高精度。我们的设计将电缆驱动并联机器人 (CDPR) 的工作空间可扩展性与 4 自由度 (DoF) 机器人手臂的灵巧性相结合，可以从多个角度自主地对许多植物进行成像。我们描述了我们的机器人设计，并通过每天从 64 个视角收集 54 株植物的照片进行实验演示。我们表明，我们的方法可以产生科学上有用的测量结果，在初始校准后完全自主运行，并且比冠层方法（例如无人机）产生更好的重建和植物特性估计。作为示例应用，我们表明我们的系统可以成功估计植物质量，平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 0.586g，并且当用于对质量和年龄之间的关系进行假设检验时，产生与地面实况数据相当的 p 值（分别为 p=0.0020 和 p=0.0016）。 本文提出一种混合缆驱动机器人，用于垂直水培农场中叶类植物的非破坏性监测和质量估计，结合结构从运动（SfM）技术实现高精度和中等吞吐量的自动化监测。 Gerry Chen,Harsh Muriki,Cédric Pradalier,Yongsheng Chen,Frank Dellaert cs.RO

title: Automated MeSH Term Suggestion for Effective Query Formulation in Systematic Reviews Literature Search
title_zh: 自动 MeSH 术语建议，用于系统评论文献检索中有效查询的制定
comment: This paper is currently in submission with Intelligent Systems with Applications Journal Technology-Assisted Review Systems Special issue and is under peer review. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.00277
comments: This paper is currently in submission with Intelligent Systems with Applications Journal Technology-Assisted Review Systems Special issue and is under peer review. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.00277
abstract: High-quality medical systematic reviews require comprehensive literature searches to ensure the recommendations and outcomes are sufficiently reliable. Indeed, searching for relevant medical literature is a key phase in constructing systematic reviews and often involves domain (medical researchers) and search (information specialists) experts in developing the search queries. Queries in this context are highly complex, based on Boolean logic, include free-text terms and index terms from standardised terminologies (e.g., the Medical Subject Headings (MeSH) thesaurus), and are difficult and time-consuming to build. The use of MeSH terms, in particular, has been shown to improve the quality of the search results. However, identifying the correct MeSH terms to include in a query is difficult: information experts are often unfamiliar with the MeSH database and unsure about the appropriateness of MeSH terms for a query. Naturally, the full value of the MeSH terminology is often not fully exploited. This article investigates methods to suggest MeSH terms based on an initial Boolean query that includes only free-text terms. In this context, we devise lexical and pre-trained language models based methods. These methods promise to automatically identify highly effective MeSH terms for inclusion in a systematic review query. Our study contributes an empirical evaluation of several MeSH term suggestion methods. We further contribute an extensive analysis of MeSH term suggestions for each method and how these suggestions impact the effectiveness of Boolean queries.
summary: High-quality medical systematic reviews require comprehensive literature searches to ensure the recommendations and outcomes are sufficiently reliable. Indeed, searching for relevant medical literature is a key phase in constructing systematic reviews and often involves domain (medical researchers) and search (information specialists) experts in developing the search queries. Queries in this context are highly complex, based on Boolean logic, include free-text terms and index terms from standardised terminologies (e.g., the Medical Subject Headings (MeSH) thesaurus), and are difficult and time-consuming to build. The use of MeSH terms, in particular, has been shown to improve the quality of the search results. However, identifying the correct MeSH terms to include in a query is difficult: information experts are often unfamiliar with the MeSH database and unsure about the appropriateness of MeSH terms for a query. Naturally, the full value of the MeSH terminology is often not fully exploited. This article investigates methods to suggest MeSH terms based on an initial Boolean query that includes only free-text terms. In this context, we devise lexical and pre-trained language models based methods. These methods promise to automatically identify highly effective MeSH terms for inclusion in a systematic review query. Our study contributes an empirical evaluation of several MeSH term suggestion methods. We further contribute an extensive analysis of MeSH term suggestions for each method and how these suggestions impact the effectiveness of Boolean queries.
abstract_zh: 高质量的医学系统评价需要全面的文献检索，以确保建议和结果足够可靠。事实上，搜索相关医学文献是构建系统评价的关键阶段，并且通常涉及领域（医学研究人员）和搜索（信息专家）专家来开发搜索查询。这种情况下的查询非常复杂，基于布尔逻辑，包括来自标准化术语（例如医学主题词 (MeSH) 同义词库）的自由文本术语和索引术语，并且构建起来既困难又耗时。尤其是 MeSH 术语的使用已被证明可以提高搜索结果的质量。然而，识别要包含在查询中的正确 MeSH 术语很困难：信息专家通常不熟悉 MeSH 数据库，并且不确定 MeSH 术语是否适合查询。当然，MeSH 术语的全部价值往往没有得到充分利用。本文研究了基于仅包含自由文本术语的初始布尔查询来建议 MeSH 术语的方法。在这种情况下，我们设计了基于词汇和预训练语言模型的方法。这些方法有望自动识别高效的 MeSH 术语，以包含在系统评论查询中。我们的研究对几种 MeSH 术语建议方法进行了实证评估。我们进一步对每种方法的 MeSH 术语建议以及这些建议如何影响布尔查询的有效性进行了广泛的分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于初始布尔查询的自动MeSH术语建议方法，以提升系统综述文献搜索的查询效果。
AI.motivation: MeSH术语能显著提升搜索质量，但专家常因不熟悉MeSH数据库而难以准确选择术语，导致其价值未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 设计了基于词法分析和预训练语言模型的方法，从仅包含自由文本的布尔查询中自动识别有效的MeSH术语。
AI.result: 对多种MeSH术语建议方法进行了实证评估，并分析了不同方法的建议对布尔查询效果的影响。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效生成高质量MeSH术语建议，辅助专家构建更精准的系统综述搜索查询。

These methods promise to automatically identify highly effective MeSH terms for inclusion in a systematic review query. We further contribute an extensive analysis of MeSH term suggestions for each method and how these suggestions impact the effectiveness of Boolean queries. 高质量的医学系统评价需要全面的文献检索，以确保建议和结果足够可靠。事实上，搜索相关医学文献是构建系统评价的关键阶段，并且通常涉及领域（医学研究人员）和搜索（信息专家）专家来开发搜索查询。这种情况下的查询非常复杂，基于布尔逻辑，包括来自标准化术语（例如医学主题词 (MeSH) 同义词库）的自由文本术语和索引术语，并且构建起来既困难又耗时。尤其是 MeSH 术语的使用已被证明可以提高搜索结果的质量。然而，识别要包含在查询中的正确 MeSH 术语很困难：信息专家通常不熟悉 MeSH 数据库，并且不确定 MeSH 术语是否适合查询。当然，MeSH 术语的全部价值往往没有得到充分利用。本文研究了基于仅包含自由文本术语的初始布尔查询来建议 MeSH 术语的方法。在这种情况下，我们设计了基于词汇和预训练语言模型的方法。这些方法有望自动识别高效的 MeSH 术语，以包含在系统评论查询中。我们的研究对几种 MeSH 术语建议方法进行了实证评估。我们进一步对每种方法的 MeSH 术语建议以及这些建议如何影响布尔查询的有效性进行了广泛的分析。 本文提出了一种基于初始布尔查询的自动MeSH术语建议方法，以提升系统综述文献搜索的查询效果。 Shuai Wang,Harrisen Scells,Bevan Koopman,Guido Zuccon cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Uncertainty Aware Multitask Pyramid Vision Transformer For UAV-Based Object Re-Identification
title_zh: 用于基于无人机的物体重新识别的不确定性感知多任务金字塔视觉转换器
abstract: Object Re-IDentification (ReID), one of the most significant problems in biometrics and surveillance systems, has been extensively studied by image processing and computer vision communities in the past decades. Learning a robust and discriminative feature representation is a crucial challenge for object ReID. The problem is even more challenging in ReID based on Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) as the images are characterized by continuously varying camera parameters (e.g., view angle, altitude, etc.) of a flying drone. To address this challenge, multiscale feature representation has been considered to characterize images captured from UAV flying at different altitudes. In this work, we propose a multitask learning approach, which employs a new multiscale architecture without convolution, Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT), as the backbone for UAV-based object ReID. By uncertainty modeling of intraclass variations, our proposed model can be jointly optimized using both uncertainty-aware object ID and camera ID information. Experimental results are reported on PRAI and VRAI, two ReID data sets from aerial surveillance, to verify the effectiveness of our proposed approach
summary: Object Re-IDentification (ReID), one of the most significant problems in biometrics and surveillance systems, has been extensively studied by image processing and computer vision communities in the past decades. Learning a robust and discriminative feature representation is a crucial challenge for object ReID. The problem is even more challenging in ReID based on Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) as the images are characterized by continuously varying camera parameters (e.g., view angle, altitude, etc.) of a flying drone. To address this challenge, multiscale feature representation has been considered to characterize images captured from UAV flying at different altitudes. In this work, we propose a multitask learning approach, which employs a new multiscale architecture without convolution, Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT), as the backbone for UAV-based object ReID. By uncertainty modeling of intraclass variations, our proposed model can be jointly optimized using both uncertainty-aware object ID and camera ID information. Experimental results are reported on PRAI and VRAI, two ReID data sets from aerial surveillance, to verify the effectiveness of our proposed approach
abstract_zh: 对象重新识别（ReID）是生物识别和监控系统中最重要的问题之一，在过去几十年中已被图像处理和计算机视觉社区广泛研究。学习鲁棒且有辨别力的特征表示是对象 ReID 的关键挑战。在基于无人机 (UAV) 的 ReID 中，这个问题更具挑战性，因为图像的特点是飞行无人机的相机参数（例如视角、高度等）不断变化。为了应对这一挑战，人们考虑使用多尺度特征表示来表征从不同高度飞行的无人机捕获的图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多任务学习方法，该方法采用一种新的无卷积多尺度架构，即金字塔视觉变换器（PVT），作为基于无人机的对象 ReID 的骨干。通过类内变化的不确定性建模，我们提出的模型可以使用不确定性感知对象 ID 和相机 ID 信息进行联合优化。在 PRAI 和 VRAI（来自空中监视的两个 ReID 数据集）上报告了实验结果，以验证我们提出的方法的有效性

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性感知的多任务金字塔视觉变换器（PVT）模型，用于无人机（UAV）基于的物体重识别（ReID）。
AI.motivation: 无人机拍摄的图像由于视角、高度等参数的持续变化，使得物体重识别更具挑战性。传统的卷积网络难以有效处理这种多尺度特征变化，因此需要一种新的方法来增强模型的鲁棒性和辨别能力。
AI.method: 本文采用无卷积的多尺度架构金字塔视觉变换器（PVT）作为主干网络，并结合不确定性建模，通过同时优化不确定性感知的物体ID和相机ID信息来实现多任务学习。
AI.result: 实验结果在PRAI和VRAI两个空中监控的ReID数据集上验证了所提出方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的不确定性感知多任务金字塔视觉变换器方法在无人机基于的物体重识别任务中表现优异，能够有效处理多尺度特征和视角变化带来的挑战。

authors_text: Handi Yu,Simiao Ren,Leslie M. Collins,Jordan M. Malof
title: Meta-simulation for the Automated Design of Synthetic Overhead Imagery
title_zh: 合成俯视图像自动设计的元模拟
abstract: The use of synthetic (or simulated) data for training machine learning models has grown rapidly in recent years. Synthetic data can often be generated much faster and more cheaply than its real-world counterpart. One challenge of using synthetic imagery however is scene design: e.g., the choice of content and its features and spatial arrangement. To be effective, this design must not only be realistic, but appropriate for the target domain, which (by assumption) is unlabeled. In this work, we propose an approach to automatically choose the design of synthetic imagery based upon unlabeled real-world imagery. Our approach, termed Neural-Adjoint Meta-Simulation (NAMS), builds upon the seminal recent meta-simulation approaches. In contrast to the current state-of-the-art methods, our approach can be pre-trained once offline, and then provides fast design inference for new target imagery. Using both synthetic and real-world problems, we show that NAMS infers synthetic designs that match both the in-domain and out-of-domain target imagery, and that training segmentation models with NAMS-designed imagery yields superior results compared to naïve randomized designs and state-of-the-art meta-simulation methods.
summary: The use of synthetic (or simulated) data for training machine learning models has grown rapidly in recent years. Synthetic data can often be generated much faster and more cheaply than its real-world counterpart. One challenge of using synthetic imagery however is scene design: e.g., the choice of content and its features and spatial arrangement. To be effective, this design must not only be realistic, but appropriate for the target domain, which (by assumption) is unlabeled. In this work, we propose an approach to automatically choose the design of synthetic imagery based upon unlabeled real-world imagery. Our approach, termed Neural-Adjoint Meta-Simulation (NAMS), builds upon the seminal recent meta-simulation approaches. In contrast to the current state-of-the-art methods, our approach can be pre-trained once offline, and then provides fast design inference for new target imagery. Using both synthetic and real-world problems, we show that NAMS infers synthetic designs that match both the in-domain and out-of-domain target imagery, and that training segmentation models with NAMS-designed imagery yields superior results compared to naïve randomized designs and state-of-the-art meta-simulation methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，使用合成（或模拟）数据训练机器学习模型的情况迅速增长。合成数据的生成速度通常比现实世界的数据更快、更便宜。然而，使用合成图像的一大挑战是场景设计：例如内容的选择及其特征和空间布置。为了有效，这种设计不仅必须是现实的，而且必须适合目标领域，而目标领域（根据假设）是未标记的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于未标记的现实世界图像自动选择合成图像设计的方法。我们的方法称为神经伴随元模拟（NAMS），建立在最近开创性的元模拟方法的基础上。与当前最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以在离线时进行预训练，然后为新的目标图像提供快速的设计推理。使用合成问题和现实世界问题，我们表明 NAMS 推断出与域内和域外目标图像相匹配的合成设计，并且与简单的随机设计和最先进的元模拟方法相比，使用 NAMS 设计的图像训练分割模型会产生更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NAMS的方法，用于根据未标记的真实世界图像自动生成符合目标领域的合成航拍图像设计。
AI.motivation: 合成数据在训练机器学习模型中广泛应用，但设计符合目标领域且真实的合成场景存在挑战，现有方法效率低或缺乏领域适应性。
AI.method: 基于元模拟的神经伴随方法（NAMS），通过离线预训练模型，快速推断新目标图像的合成设计，无需人工干预。
AI.result: NAMS在合成和真实世界任务中均能生成匹配目标领域的合成图像，且使用其设计的图像训练的分割模型优于随机设计和现有元模拟方法。
AI.conclusion: NAMS通过自动化设计合成图像，提高了生成效率和领域适应性，为机器学习模型训练提供了更优的数据支持。

title: HiPart: Hierarchical Divisive Clustering Toolbox
title_zh: HiPart：层次划分聚类工具箱
abstract: This paper presents the HiPart package, an open-source native python library that provides efficient and interpret-able implementations of divisive hierarchical clustering algorithms. HiPart supports interactive visualizations for the manipulation of the execution steps allowing the direct intervention of the clustering outcome. This package is highly suited for Big Data applications as the focus has been given to the computational efficiency of the implemented clustering methodologies. The dependencies used are either Python build-in packages or highly maintained stable external packages. The software is provided under the MIT license. The package's source code and documentation can be found at https://github.com/panagiotisanagnostou/HiPart.
summary: This paper presents the HiPart package, an open-source native python library that provides efficient and interpret-able implementations of divisive hierarchical clustering algorithms. HiPart supports interactive visualizations for the manipulation of the execution steps allowing the direct intervention of the clustering outcome. This package is highly suited for Big Data applications as the focus has been given to the computational efficiency of the implemented clustering methodologies. The dependencies used are either Python build-in packages or highly maintained stable external packages. The software is provided under the MIT license. The package's source code and documentation can be found at https://github.com/panagiotisanagnostou/HiPart.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 HiPart 包，这是一个开源的原生 Python 库，它提供了分裂层次聚类算法的高效且可解释的实现。 HiPart 支持用于操作执行步骤的交互式可视化，允许直接干预聚类结果。该软件包非常适合大数据应用，因为重点关注所实现的聚类方法的计算效率。使用的依赖项要么是 Python 内置包，要么是高度维护的稳定外部包。该软件是根据 MIT 许可证提供的。该包的源代码和文档可以在 https://github.com/panagiotisanagnostou/HiPart 找到。

search_text: HiPart: Hierarchical Divisive Clustering Toolbox HiPart：层次划分聚类工具箱 This paper presents the HiPart package, an open-source native python library that provides efficient and interpret-able implementations of divisive hierarchical clustering algorithms. HiPart supports interactive visualizations for the manipulation of the execution steps allowing the direct intervention of the clustering outcome. This package is highly suited for Big Data applications as the focus has been given to the computational efficiency of the implemented clustering methodologies. The dependencies used are either Python build-in packages or highly maintained stable external packages. The software is provided under the MIT license. The package's source code and documentation can be found at https://github.com/panagiotisanagnostou/HiPart. 本文介绍了 HiPart 包，这是一个开源的原生 Python 库，它提供了分裂层次聚类算法的高效且可解释的实现。 HiPart 支持用于操作执行步骤的交互式可视化，允许直接干预聚类结果。该软件包非常适合大数据应用，因为重点关注所实现的聚类方法的计算效率。使用的依赖项要么是 Python 内置包，要么是高度维护的稳定外部包。该软件是根据 MIT 许可证提供的。该包的源代码和文档可以在 https://github.com/panagiotisanagnostou/HiPart 找到。 开发一个高效的分裂式层次聚类工具包HiPart，支持交互式可视化和大数据应用。 Panagiotis Anagnostou,Sotiris Tasoulis,Vassilis Plagianakos,Dimitris Tasoulis stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Adaptive Attitude Control for Foldable Quadrotors
title_zh: 可折叠四旋翼飞行器的自适应姿态控制
comment: Accepted for Publication in IEEE-LCSS ; 6 Pages, 4 Figures
comments: Accepted for Publication in IEEE-LCSS ; 6 Pages, 4 Figures
abstract: Recent quadrotors have transcended conventional designs, emphasizing more on foldable and reconfigurable bodies. The state of the art still focuses on the mechanical feasibility of such designs with limited discussions on the tracking performance of the vehicle during configuration switching. In this article, we first present a common framework to analyse the attitude errors of a folding quadrotor via the theory of switched systems. We then employ this framework to investigate the attitude tracking performance for two case scenarios - one with a conventional geometric controller for precisely known system dynamics; and second, with our proposed morphology-aware adaptive controller that accounts for any modeling uncertainties and disturbances. Finally, we cater to the desired switching requirements from our stability analysis by exploiting the trajectory planner to obtain superior tracking performance while switching. Simulation results are presented that validate the proposed control and planning framework for a foldable quadrotor's flight through a passageway.
summary: Recent quadrotors have transcended conventional designs, emphasizing more on foldable and reconfigurable bodies. The state of the art still focuses on the mechanical feasibility of such designs with limited discussions on the tracking performance of the vehicle during configuration switching. In this article, we first present a common framework to analyse the attitude errors of a folding quadrotor via the theory of switched systems. We then employ this framework to investigate the attitude tracking performance for two case scenarios - one with a conventional geometric controller for precisely known system dynamics; and second, with our proposed morphology-aware adaptive controller that accounts for any modeling uncertainties and disturbances. Finally, we cater to the desired switching requirements from our stability analysis by exploiting the trajectory planner to obtain superior tracking performance while switching. Simulation results are presented that validate the proposed control and planning framework for a foldable quadrotor's flight through a passageway.
abstract_zh: 最近的四旋翼飞行器已经超越了传统的设计，更多地强调可折叠和可重构的机身。现有技术仍然关注此类设计的机械可行性，对配置切换期间车辆的跟踪性能的讨论有限。在本文中，我们首先提出了一个通用框架，通过切换系统理论来分析折叠四旋翼飞行器的姿态误差。然后，我们使用这个框架来研究两种情况下的姿态跟踪性能——一种是使用传统的几何控制器来精确已知系统动力学；另一种是使用传统的几何控制器来实现精确已知的系统动力学。其次，我们提出的形态感知自适应控制器可以解释任何建模的不确定性和干扰。最后，我们通过利用轨迹规划器在切换时获得卓越的跟踪性能来满足稳定性分析中所需的切换要求。仿真结果验证了所提出的可折叠四旋翼飞行器通过通道的控制和规划框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于可折叠四旋翼飞行器的自适应姿态控制方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的可折叠四旋翼飞行器研究主要关注机械可行性，而对配置切换过程中的跟踪性能讨论较少。
AI.method: 本文通过切换系统理论分析了折叠四旋翼的姿态误差，并提出了一个考虑模型不确定性和干扰的形态感知自适应控制器。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了所提出的控制和规划框架在可折叠四旋翼飞行器通过通道飞行中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自适应控制器和轨迹规划方法可以提高可折叠四旋翼飞行器在配置切换过程中的姿态跟踪性能。

title: Semantic Segmentation using Neural Ordinary Differential Equations
title_zh: 使用神经常微分方程进行语义分割
abstract: The idea of neural Ordinary Differential Equations (ODE) is to approximate the derivative of a function (data model) instead of the function itself. In residual networks, instead of having a discrete sequence of hidden layers, the derivative of the continuous dynamics of hidden state can be parameterized by an ODE. It has been shown that this type of neural network is able to produce the same results as an equivalent residual network for image classification. In this paper, we design a novel neural ODE for the semantic segmentation task. We start by a baseline network that consists of residual modules, then we use the modules to build our neural ODE network. We show that our neural ODE is able to achieve the state-of-the-art results using 57% less memory for training, 42% less memory for testing, and 68% less number of parameters. We evaluate our model on the Cityscapes, CamVid, LIP, and PASCAL-Context datasets.
summary: The idea of neural Ordinary Differential Equations (ODE) is to approximate the derivative of a function (data model) instead of the function itself. In residual networks, instead of having a discrete sequence of hidden layers, the derivative of the continuous dynamics of hidden state can be parameterized by an ODE. It has been shown that this type of neural network is able to produce the same results as an equivalent residual network for image classification. In this paper, we design a novel neural ODE for the semantic segmentation task. We start by a baseline network that consists of residual modules, then we use the modules to build our neural ODE network. We show that our neural ODE is able to achieve the state-of-the-art results using 57% less memory for training, 42% less memory for testing, and 68% less number of parameters. We evaluate our model on the Cityscapes, CamVid, LIP, and PASCAL-Context datasets.
abstract_zh: 神经常微分方程（ODE）的思想是近似函数（数据模型）的导数而不是函数本身。在残差网络中，隐藏状态连续动态的导数可以通过 ODE 参数化，而不是具有离散的隐藏层序列。事实证明，这种类型的神经网络能够产生与用于图像分类的等效残差网络相同的结果。在本文中，我们为语义分割任务设计了一种新颖的神经常微分方程。我们从由残差模块组成的基线网络开始，然后使用这些模块构建神经 ODE 网络。我们证明，我们的神经 ODE 能够在训练内存减少 57%、测试内存减少 42%、参数数量减少 68% 的情况下实现最先进的结果。我们在 Cityscapes、CamVid、LIP 和 PASCAL-Context 数据集上评估我们的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经常微分方程（Neural ODE）的语义分割方法，通过连续动态建模减少内存和参数消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统残差网络在语义分割中存在参数量大、内存占用高的问题，而神经ODE在图像分类中已证明其效率优势，因此尝试将其应用于语义分割任务。
AI.method: 以残差模块为基线网络，构建连续动态的神经ODE模型，通过参数化隐藏状态的导数替代离散层结构。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes等四个数据集上达到SOTA性能，训练内存减少57%，测试内存减少42%，参数量减少68%。
AI.conclusion: 神经ODE为语义分割提供了高效且轻量的解决方案，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算资源消耗。

authors_text: Jingyan Wang,Carmel Baharav,Nihar B. Shah,Anita Williams Woolley,R Ravi
title: Allocation Schemes in Analytic Evaluation: Applicant-Centric Holistic or Attribute-Centric Segmented?
title_zh: 分析评估中的分配方案：以申请人为中心的整体还是以属性为中心的分段？
abstract: Many applications such as hiring and university admissions involve evaluation and selection of applicants. These tasks are fundamentally difficult, and require combining evidence from multiple different aspects (what we term "attributes"). In these applications, the number of applicants is often large, and a common practice is to assign the task to multiple evaluators in a distributed fashion. Specifically, in the often-used holistic allocation, each evaluator is assigned a subset of the applicants, and is asked to assess all relevant information for their assigned applicants. However, such an evaluation process is subject to issues such as miscalibration (evaluators see only a small fraction of the applicants and may not get a good sense of relative quality), and discrimination (evaluators are influenced by irrelevant information about the applicants). We identify that such attribute-based evaluation allows alternative allocation schemes. Specifically, we consider assigning each evaluator more applicants but fewer attributes per applicant, termed segmented allocation. We compare segmented allocation to holistic allocation on several dimensions via theoretical and experimental methods. We establish various tradeoffs between these two approaches, and identify conditions under which one approach results in more accurate evaluation than the other.
summary: Many applications such as hiring and university admissions involve evaluation and selection of applicants. These tasks are fundamentally difficult, and require combining evidence from multiple different aspects (what we term "attributes"). In these applications, the number of applicants is often large, and a common practice is to assign the task to multiple evaluators in a distributed fashion. Specifically, in the often-used holistic allocation, each evaluator is assigned a subset of the applicants, and is asked to assess all relevant information for their assigned applicants. However, such an evaluation process is subject to issues such as miscalibration (evaluators see only a small fraction of the applicants and may not get a good sense of relative quality), and discrimination (evaluators are influenced by irrelevant information about the applicants). We identify that such attribute-based evaluation allows alternative allocation schemes. Specifically, we consider assigning each evaluator more applicants but fewer attributes per applicant, termed segmented allocation. We compare segmented allocation to holistic allocation on several dimensions via theoretical and experimental methods. We establish various tradeoffs between these two approaches, and identify conditions under which one approach results in more accurate evaluation than the other.
abstract_zh: 许多申请（例如招聘和大学录取）都涉及对申请人的评估和选择。这些任务从根本上来说是困难的，需要结合来自多个不同方面（我们称之为“属性”）的证据。在这些应用程序中，申请人的数量往往很大，常见的做法是将任务以分布式方式分配给多个评估者。具体来说，在常用的整体分配中，每个评估员被分配到申请人的一个子集，并被要求评估其分配的申请人的所有相关信息。然而，这样的评估过程存在诸如校准错误（评估人员只看到一小部分申请人，并且可能无法很好地了解相对质量）和歧视（评估人员受到与申请人无关的信息的影响）等问题。我们发现这种基于属性的评估允许替代分配方案。具体来说，我们考虑为每个评估员分配更多的申请人，但为每个申请人分配更少的属性，称为分段分配。我们通过理论和实验方法在多个维度上比较分段分配与整体分配。我们在这两种方法之间建立了各种权衡，并确定一种方法比另一种方法产生更准确评估的条件。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了两种评估分配方案——以申请者为中心的整体分配与以属性为中心的分段分配，在理论和实验中分析其优劣。
AI.motivation: 现有整体分配方案存在评估者校准偏差和歧视风险，需探索更优的属性导向分配方式以提升评估准确性。
AI.method: 通过理论建模与实验对比，分析整体分配与分段分配在评估效率、准确性及公平性维度的差异。
AI.result: 发现分段分配在减少属性偏差时更优，但可能增加评估者认知负担；整体分配在少量属性场景下表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 两种方案各有适用场景，需根据属性数量、评估者能力及公平性需求动态选择分配策略。

title: Dynamic Walking of Bipedal Robots on Uneven Stepping Stones via Adaptive-frequency MPC
title_zh: 基于自适应频率 MPC 的双足机器人在不平坦踏脚石上的动态行走
abstract: This paper presents a novel Adaptive-frequency MPC framework for bipedal locomotion over terrain with uneven stepping stones. In detail, we intend to achieve adaptive foot placement and gait period for bipedal periodic walking gait with this MPC, in order to traverse terrain with discontinuities without slowing down. We pair this adaptive-frequency MPC with a kino-dynamics trajectory optimization for optimal gait periods, center of mass (CoM) trajectory, and foot placements. We use whole-body control (WBC) along with adaptive-frequency MPC to track the optimal trajectories from the offline optimization. In numerical validations, our adaptive-frequency MPC framework with optimization has shown advantages over fixed-frequency MPC. The proposed framework can control the bipedal robot to traverse through uneven stepping stone terrains with perturbed stone heights, widths, and surface shapes while maintaining an average speed of 1.5 m/s.
summary: This paper presents a novel Adaptive-frequency MPC framework for bipedal locomotion over terrain with uneven stepping stones. In detail, we intend to achieve adaptive foot placement and gait period for bipedal periodic walking gait with this MPC, in order to traverse terrain with discontinuities without slowing down. We pair this adaptive-frequency MPC with a kino-dynamics trajectory optimization for optimal gait periods, center of mass (CoM) trajectory, and foot placements. We use whole-body control (WBC) along with adaptive-frequency MPC to track the optimal trajectories from the offline optimization. In numerical validations, our adaptive-frequency MPC framework with optimization has shown advantages over fixed-frequency MPC. The proposed framework can control the bipedal robot to traverse through uneven stepping stone terrains with perturbed stone heights, widths, and surface shapes while maintaining an average speed of 1.5 m/s.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的自适应频率 MPC 框架，用于在不平坦踏脚石的地形上进行双足运动。具体来说，我们打算用这个 MPC 实现双足周期性行走步态的自适应足部放置和步态周期，以便在不减速的情况下穿越不连续的地形。我们将这种自适应频率 MPC 与运动动力学轨迹优化配对，以实现最佳步态周期、质心 (CoM) 轨迹和足部放置。我们使用全身控制 (WBC) 和自适应频率 MPC 来跟踪离线优化的最佳轨迹。在数值验证中，我们的自适应频率 MPC 框架经过优化，显示出优于固定频率 MPC 的优势。所提出的框架可以控制双足机器人穿越不平坦的垫脚石地形，石头高度、宽度和表面形状都受到扰动，同时保持平均速度为 1.5 m/s。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应频率MPC框架，用于双足机器人在不平整 stepping stones 地形上的动态行走控制。
AI.motivation: 传统固定频率MPC在处理地形不连续性时需减速，而本文旨在实现双足机器人在不平整地形上保持速度的自适应步态调整。
AI.method: 结合自适应频率MPC与运动学-动力学轨迹优化，通过全身控制（WBC）跟踪离线优化轨迹，实现步态周期、质心轨迹和足部放置的自适应调整。
AI.result: 数值验证表明，该框架在石块高度、宽度和表面形状扰动下仍能保持1.5 m/s的平均速度，优于固定频率MPC。
AI.conclusion: 自适应频率MPC框架结合轨迹优化与全身控制，有效解决了双足机器人在复杂不平整地形上的动态行走问题。

authors_text: Shivam Sood,Jaskaran Singh Sodhi,Parv Maheshwari,Karan Uppal,Debashish Chakravarty
title: Multiple Waypoint Navigation in Unknown Indoor Environments
title_zh: 未知室内环境中的多路点导航
abstract: Indoor motion planning focuses on solving the problem of navigating an agent through a cluttered environment. To date, quite a lot of work has been done in this field, but these methods often fail to find the optimal balance between computationally inexpensive online path planning, and optimality of the path. Along with this, these works often prove optimality for single-start single-goal worlds. To address these challenges, we present a multiple waypoint path planner and controller stack for navigation in unknown indoor environments where waypoints include the goal along with the intermediary points that the robot must traverse before reaching the goal. Our approach makes use of a global planner (to find the next best waypoint at any instant), a local planner (to plan the path to a specific waypoint), and an adaptive Model Predictive Control strategy (for robust system control and faster maneuvers). We evaluate our algorithm on a set of randomly generated obstacle maps, intermediate waypoints, and start-goal pairs, with results indicating a significant reduction in computational costs, with high accuracies and robust control.
summary: Indoor motion planning focuses on solving the problem of navigating an agent through a cluttered environment. To date, quite a lot of work has been done in this field, but these methods often fail to find the optimal balance between computationally inexpensive online path planning, and optimality of the path. Along with this, these works often prove optimality for single-start single-goal worlds. To address these challenges, we present a multiple waypoint path planner and controller stack for navigation in unknown indoor environments where waypoints include the goal along with the intermediary points that the robot must traverse before reaching the goal. Our approach makes use of a global planner (to find the next best waypoint at any instant), a local planner (to plan the path to a specific waypoint), and an adaptive Model Predictive Control strategy (for robust system control and faster maneuvers). We evaluate our algorithm on a set of randomly generated obstacle maps, intermediate waypoints, and start-goal pairs, with results indicating a significant reduction in computational costs, with high accuracies and robust control.
abstract_zh: 室内运动规划重点解决在杂乱环境中引导智能体的问题。迄今为止，该领域已经做了相当多的工作，但这些方法往往无法在计算成本低廉的在线路径规划和路径的最优性之间找到最佳平衡。除此之外，这些作品通常证明了单起点单目标世界的最优性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一个多路点路径规划器和控制器堆栈，用于在未知的室内环境中进行导航，其中路点包括目标以及机器人在到达目标之前必须经过的中间点。我们的方法利用全局规划器（随时找到下一个最佳航路点）、局部规划器（规划到特定航路点的路径）和自适应模型预测控制策略（用于稳健的系统控制和更快的机动）。我们在一组随机生成的障碍物地图、中间路径点和起始目标对上评估我们的算法，结果表明计算成本显着降低，并且具有高精度和鲁棒控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于未知室内环境的多路点导航方法，通过结合全局规划器、局部规划器和自适应模型预测控制策略，实现高效路径规划与鲁棒控制。
AI.motivation: 现有室内导航方法难以在计算成本与路径最优性之间取得平衡，且多针对单起点单目标场景，无法有效处理包含中间路点的复杂路径规划需求。
AI.method: 采用全局规划器实时选择下一最佳路点，局部规划器生成具体路点路径，并结合自适应模型预测控制策略实现动态调整与快速机动控制。
AI.result: 在随机生成的障碍地图和多组起点-目标组合测试中，算法显著降低了计算成本，同时保持高路径精度和控制鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多层级规划与控制架构，在未知室内环境中实现了多路点导航的计算效率与路径最优性的有效平衡，优于传统单目标规划方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于未知室内环境的多路点导航方法，通过结合全局规划器、局部规划器和自适应模型预测控制策略，实现高效路径规划与鲁棒控制。
ai_content.motivation: 现有室内导航方法难以在计算成本与路径最优性之间取得平衡，且多针对单起点单目标场景，无法有效处理包含中间路点的复杂路径规划需求。
ai_content.method: 采用全局规划器实时选择下一最佳路点，局部规划器生成具体路点路径，并结合自适应模型预测控制策略实现动态调整与快速机动控制。
ai_content.result: 在随机生成的障碍地图和多组起点-目标组合测试中，算法显著降低了计算成本，同时保持高路径精度和控制鲁棒性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过多层级规划与控制架构，在未知室内环境中实现了多路点导航的计算效率与路径最优性的有效平衡，优于传统单目标规划方法。

search_text: Multiple Waypoint Navigation in Unknown Indoor Environments 未知室内环境中的多路点导航 Indoor motion planning focuses on solving the problem of navigating an agent through a cluttered environment. To date, quite a lot of work has been done in this field, but these methods often fail to find the optimal balance between computationally inexpensive online path planning, and optimality of the path. Along with this, these works often prove optimality for single-start single-goal worlds. To address these challenges, we present a multiple waypoint path planner and controller stack for navigation in unknown indoor environments where waypoints include the goal along with the intermediary points that the robot must traverse before reaching the goal. Our approach makes use of a global planner (to find the next best waypoint at any instant), a local planner (to plan the path to a specific waypoint), and an adaptive Model Predictive Control strategy (for robust system control and faster maneuvers). We evaluate our algorithm on a set of randomly generated obstacle maps, intermediate waypoints, and start-goal pairs, with results indicating a significant reduction in computational costs, with high accuracies and robust control. 室内运动规划重点解决在杂乱环境中引导智能体的问题。迄今为止，该领域已经做了相当多的工作，但这些方法往往无法在计算成本低廉的在线路径规划和路径的最优性之间找到最佳平衡。除此之外，这些作品通常证明了单起点单目标世界的最优性。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一个多路点路径规划器和控制器堆栈，用于在未知的室内环境中进行导航，其中路点包括目标以及机器人在到达目标之前必须经过的中间点。我们的方法利用全局规划器（随时找到下一个最佳航路点）、局部规划器（规划到特定航路点的路径）和自适应模型预测控制策略（用于稳健的系统控制和更快的机动）。我们在一组随机生成的障碍物地图、中间路径点和起始目标对上评估我们的算法，结果表明计算成本显着降低，并且具有高精度和鲁棒控制。 本文提出了一种用于未知室内环境的多路点导航方法，通过结合全局规划器、局部规划器和自适应模型预测控制策略，实现高效路径规划与鲁棒控制。 Shivam Sood,Jaskaran Singh Sodhi,Parv Maheshwari,Karan Uppal,Debashish Chakravarty cs.RO

title: Multi-contact MPC for Dynamic Loco-manipulation on Humanoid Robots
title_zh: 用于人形机器人动态运动操纵的多接触 MPC
abstract: This paper presents a novel method to control humanoid robot dynamic loco-manipulation with multiple contact modes via multi-contact Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework. The proposed framework includes a multi-contact dynamics model capable of capturing various contact modes in loco-manipulation, such as hand-object contact and foot-ground contacts. Our proposed dynamics model represents the object dynamics as an external force acting on the system, which simplifies the model and makes it feasible for solving the MPC problem. In numerical validations, our multi-contact MPC framework only needs contact timings of each task and desired states to give MPC the knowledge of changes in contact modes in the prediction horizons in loco-manipulation. The proposed framework can control the humanoid robot to complete multi-tasks dynamic loco-manipulation applications such as efficiently picking up and dropping off objects while turning and walking.
summary: This paper presents a novel method to control humanoid robot dynamic loco-manipulation with multiple contact modes via multi-contact Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework. The proposed framework includes a multi-contact dynamics model capable of capturing various contact modes in loco-manipulation, such as hand-object contact and foot-ground contacts. Our proposed dynamics model represents the object dynamics as an external force acting on the system, which simplifies the model and makes it feasible for solving the MPC problem. In numerical validations, our multi-contact MPC framework only needs contact timings of each task and desired states to give MPC the knowledge of changes in contact modes in the prediction horizons in loco-manipulation. The proposed framework can control the humanoid robot to complete multi-tasks dynamic loco-manipulation applications such as efficiently picking up and dropping off objects while turning and walking.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过多接触模型预测控制（MPC）框架来控制具有多种接触模式的仿人机器人动态局部操纵的新方法。所提出的框架包括一个多接触动力学模型，能够捕获局部操作中的各种接触模式，例如手与物体接触和脚与地面接触。我们提出的动力学模型将物体动力学表示为作用在系统上的外力，这简化了模型并使得求解 MPC 问题变得可行。在数值验证中，我们的多接触 MPC 框架只需要每个任务的接触时间和所需状态，即可让 MPC 了解局部操纵中预测范围内接触模式的变化。所提出的框架可以控制人形机器人完成多任务动态局部操纵应用，例如在转弯和行走时有效地拾取和放下物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多接触模型预测控制（MPC）框架的方法，用于控制人形机器人在动态行走和操作中的多接触任务。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在动态行走和操作中需要处理多种接触模式，如手-物接触和足-地接触，传统方法难以高效处理这些复杂情况。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多接触动力学模型，将物体动力学表示为系统上的外部力，从而简化模型并适用于MPC求解。该框架仅需各任务的接触时间和期望状态即可预测接触模式的变化。
AI.result: 数值验证表明，该框架能够使人形机器人完成如高效拾取和放置物体、同时转弯和行走等多任务动态行走和操作。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多接触MPC框架有效解决了人形机器人在动态行走和操作中的多接触控制问题，具有良好的应用前景。

title: Learn the Time to Learn: Replay Scheduling in Continual Learning
title_zh: 了解学习的时间：持续学习中的重播安排
abstract: Replay methods are known to be successful at mitigating catastrophic forgetting in continual learning scenarios despite having limited access to historical data. However, storing historical data is cheap in many real-world settings, yet replaying all historical data is often prohibited due to processing time constraints. In such settings, we propose that continual learning systems should learn the time to learn and schedule which tasks to replay at different time steps. We first demonstrate the benefits of our proposal by using Monte Carlo tree search to find a proper replay schedule, and show that the found replay schedules can outperform fixed scheduling policies when combined with various replay methods in different continual learning settings. Additionally, we propose a framework for learning replay scheduling policies with reinforcement learning. We show that the learned policies can generalize better in new continual learning scenarios compared to equally replaying all seen tasks, without added computational cost. Our study reveals the importance of learning the time to learn in continual learning, which brings current research closer to real-world needs.
summary: Replay methods are known to be successful at mitigating catastrophic forgetting in continual learning scenarios despite having limited access to historical data. However, storing historical data is cheap in many real-world settings, yet replaying all historical data is often prohibited due to processing time constraints. In such settings, we propose that continual learning systems should learn the time to learn and schedule which tasks to replay at different time steps. We first demonstrate the benefits of our proposal by using Monte Carlo tree search to find a proper replay schedule, and show that the found replay schedules can outperform fixed scheduling policies when combined with various replay methods in different continual learning settings. Additionally, we propose a framework for learning replay scheduling policies with reinforcement learning. We show that the learned policies can generalize better in new continual learning scenarios compared to equally replaying all seen tasks, without added computational cost. Our study reveals the importance of learning the time to learn in continual learning, which brings current research closer to real-world needs.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，尽管对历史数据的访问有限，但重放方法可以成功地减轻持续学习场景中的灾难性遗忘。然而，在许多现实环境中，存储历史数据的成本很低，但由于处理时间的限制，重播所有历史数据通常是被禁止的。在这种情况下，我们建议持续学习系统应该了解学习的时间并安排在不同的时间步骤重播哪些任务。我们首先通过使用蒙特卡洛树搜索来找到合适的重放时间表来证明我们的建议的好处，并表明在不同的连续学习设置中与各种重放方法相结合时，找到的重放时间表可以优于固定的调度策略。 Additionally, we propose a framework for learning replay scheduling policies with reinforcement learning.我们表明，与同等地重播所有看到的任务相比，学习的策略可以在新的持续学习场景中更好地泛化，而无需增加计算成本。 Our study reveals the importance of learning the time to learn in continual learning, which brings current research closer to real-world needs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态回放调度策略，通过学习何时回放历史任务来优化持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有回放方法在存储历史数据成本较低时，因处理时间限制无法有效利用全部数据，需优化回放调度策略以提高效率。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛树搜索确定回放计划，并设计强化学习框架学习动态调度策略，无需额外计算成本。
AI.result: 动态调度策略在多种持续学习场景中优于固定回放策略，且能泛化到新任务中。
AI.conclusion: 学习‘何时学习’是持续学习的关键，该方法更贴近实际应用需求。

title: Enabling Conversational Interaction with Mobile UI using Large Language Models
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型实现与移动 UI 的对话交互
comment: Published as a conference paper at CHI 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at CHI 2023
abstract: Conversational agents show the promise to allow users to interact with mobile devices using language. However, to perform diverse UI tasks with natural language, developers typically need to create separate datasets and models for each specific task, which is expensive and effort-consuming. Recently, pre-trained large language models (LLMs) have been shown capable of generalizing to various downstream tasks when prompted with a handful of examples from the target task. This paper investigates the feasibility of enabling versatile conversational interactions with mobile UIs using a single LLM. We designed prompting techniques to adapt an LLM to mobile UIs. We experimented with four important modeling tasks that address various scenarios in conversational interaction. Our method achieved competitive performance on these challenging tasks without requiring dedicated datasets and training, offering a lightweight and generalizable approach to enable language-based mobile interaction.

abstract_zh: 对话代理有望允许用户使用语言与移动设备进行交互。然而，要使用自然语言执行各种 UI 任务，开发人员通常需要为每个特定任务创建单独的数据集和模型，这是昂贵且耗时的。最近，预训练的大型语言模型 (LLM) 已被证明能够在目标任务中的一些示例提示下泛化到各种下游任务。本文研究了使用单个法学硕士实现与移动用户界面的多功能对话交互的可行性。我们设计了提示技术，使法学硕士适应移动用户界面。我们尝试了四个重要的建模任务，以解决对话交互中的各种场景。我们的方法在这些具有挑战性的任务上实现了具有竞争力的性能，而不需要专用的数据集和培训，提供了一种轻量级且通用的方法来实现基于语言的移动交互。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用单一的大语言模型（LLM）通过对话交互实现移动UI操作，无需为每个任务单独创建数据集和模型。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需要为每个移动UI任务单独开发数据集和模型，成本高且耗时，而LLM通过少量示例提示可泛化到多种任务，因此探索其通用性解决方案。
AI.method: 设计针对移动UI的提示技术，使LLM适应四种关键对话交互任务，无需专用数据集和训练。
AI.result: 方法在四个具有挑战性的任务中表现出竞争力，验证了无需定制数据和训练的轻量通用方案的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为语言驱动的移动交互提供了轻量、通用的解决方案，无需针对每个任务进行专门训练。

authors_text: Amirarsalan Rajabi,Mehdi Yazdani-Jahromi,Ozlem Ozmen Garibay,Gita Sukthankar
title: Through a fair looking-glass: mitigating bias in image datasets
title_zh: 透过公平的镜子：减轻图像数据集中的偏差
abstract: With the recent growth in computer vision applications, the question of how fair and unbiased they are has yet to be explored. There is abundant evidence that the bias present in training data is reflected in the models, or even amplified. Many previous methods for image dataset de-biasing, including models based on augmenting datasets, are computationally expensive to implement. In this study, we present a fast and effective model to de-bias an image dataset through reconstruction and minimizing the statistical dependence between intended variables. Our architecture includes a U-net to reconstruct images, combined with a pre-trained classifier which penalizes the statistical dependence between target attribute and the protected attribute. We evaluate our proposed model on CelebA dataset, compare the results with a state-of-the-art de-biasing method, and show that the model achieves a promising fairness-accuracy combination.
summary: With the recent growth in computer vision applications, the question of how fair and unbiased they are has yet to be explored. There is abundant evidence that the bias present in training data is reflected in the models, or even amplified. Many previous methods for image dataset de-biasing, including models based on augmenting datasets, are computationally expensive to implement. In this study, we present a fast and effective model to de-bias an image dataset through reconstruction and minimizing the statistical dependence between intended variables. Our architecture includes a U-net to reconstruct images, combined with a pre-trained classifier which penalizes the statistical dependence between target attribute and the protected attribute. We evaluate our proposed model on CelebA dataset, compare the results with a state-of-the-art de-biasing method, and show that the model achieves a promising fairness-accuracy combination.
abstract_zh: 随着近年来计算机视觉应用的增长，其公平性和公正性的问题仍有待探讨。有大量证据表明，训练数据中存在的偏差已反映在模型中，甚至被放大。以前的许多图像数据集去偏方法，包括基于增强数据集的模型，实施起来计算成本很高。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种快速有效的模型，通过重建和最小化预期变量之间的统计依赖性来消除图像数据集的偏差。我们的架构包括一个用于重建图像的 U 网，与一个预训练的分类器相结合，该分类器惩罚目标属性和受保护属性之间的统计依赖性。我们在 CelebA 数据集上评估我们提出的模型，将结果与最先进的去偏差方法进行比较，并表明该模型实现了有希望的公平性与准确性的组合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速有效的图像数据集去偏方法，通过重建图像并最小化目标属性与受保护属性之间的统计依赖性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像数据集去偏方法计算成本高，且训练数据中的偏见可能被模型放大，需开发更高效公平的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合U-Net进行图像重建与预训练分类器，通过惩罚目标属性与受保护属性间的统计依赖性实现去偏。
AI.result: 在CelebA数据集上验证，相比现有方法展现出更具竞争力的公平性与准确性平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为计算机视觉领域提供了高效且有效的去偏方案，可作为现有方法的可行替代。

authors_text: Yanqi Cheng,Lihao Liu,Shujun Wang,Yueming Jin,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Angelica I. Aviles-Rivero
title: Why Deep Surgical Models Fail?: Revisiting Surgical Action Triplet Recognition through the Lens of Robustness
title_zh: 为什么深部手术模型会失败？：通过鲁棒性的视角重新审视手术动作三联体识别
abstract: Surgical action triplet recognition provides a better understanding of the surgical scene. This task is of high relevance as it provides the surgeon with context-aware support and safety. The current go-to strategy for improving performance is the development of new network mechanisms. However, the performance of current state-of-the-art techniques is substantially lower than other surgical tasks. Why is this happening? This is the question that we address in this work. We present the first study to understand the failure of existing deep learning models through the lens of robustness and explainability. Firstly, we study current existing models under weak and strong $δ-$perturbations via an adversarial optimisation scheme. We then analyse the failure modes via feature based explanations. Our study reveals that the key to improving performance and increasing reliability is in the core and spurious attributes. Our work opens the door to more trustworthy and reliable deep learning models in surgical data science.
summary: Surgical action triplet recognition provides a better understanding of the surgical scene. This task is of high relevance as it provides the surgeon with context-aware support and safety. The current go-to strategy for improving performance is the development of new network mechanisms. However, the performance of current state-of-the-art techniques is substantially lower than other surgical tasks. Why is this happening? This is the question that we address in this work. We present the first study to understand the failure of existing deep learning models through the lens of robustness and explainability. Firstly, we study current existing models under weak and strong $δ-$perturbations via an adversarial optimisation scheme. We then analyse the failure modes via feature based explanations. Our study reveals that the key to improving performance and increasing reliability is in the core and spurious attributes. Our work opens the door to more trustworthy and reliable deep learning models in surgical data science.
abstract_zh: 手术动作三元组识别可以更好地了解手术场景。这项任务具有很高的相关性，因为它为外科医生提供了情境感知的支持和安全。当前提高性能的首选策略是开发新的网络机制。然而，当前最先进技术的性能远远低于其他外科任务。为什么会发生这种情况？这是我们在这项工作中要解决的问题。我们提出了第一项从鲁棒性和可解释性角度理解现有深度学习模型失败的研究。首先，我们通过对抗性优化方案研究弱和强 $δ-$ 扰动下的现有模型。然后，我们通过基于特征的解释来分析故障模式。我们的研究表明，提高性能和提高可靠性的关键在于核心属性和伪属性。我们的工作为外科数据科学中更值得信赖和可靠的深度学习模型打开了大门。

AI.tldr: 本文通过鲁棒性视角分析深度学习模型在手术动作三元组识别任务中的失败原因，并提出提升模型性能与可靠性的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在手术动作三元组识别任务中的性能显著低于其他手术任务，需从鲁棒性和可解释性角度揭示其失败原因。
AI.method: 通过对抗优化方案测试模型在弱强扰动下的表现，并结合特征解释分析模型失败模式。
AI.result: 发现模型性能提升的关键在于区分核心属性与虚假属性，从而增强鲁棒性与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为构建更可信、可靠的手术场景深度学习模型提供了理论依据和改进方向。

Our work opens the door to more trustworthy and reliable deep learning models in surgical data science. 手术动作三元组识别可以更好地了解手术场景。这项任务具有很高的相关性，因为它为外科医生提供了情境感知的支持和安全。当前提高性能的首选策略是开发新的网络机制。然而，当前最先进技术的性能远远低于其他外科任务。为什么会发生这种情况？这是我们在这项工作中要解决的问题。我们提出了第一项从鲁棒性和可解释性角度理解现有深度学习模型失败的研究。首先，我们通过对抗性优化方案研究弱和强 $δ-$ 扰动下的现有模型。然后，我们通过基于特征的解释来分析故障模式。我们的研究表明，提高性能和提高可靠性的关键在于核心属性和伪属性。我们的工作为外科数据科学中更值得信赖和可靠的深度学习模型打开了大门。 本文通过鲁棒性视角分析深度学习模型在手术动作三元组识别任务中的失败原因，并提出提升模型性能与可靠性的方法。 Yanqi Cheng,Lihao Liu,Shujun Wang,Yueming Jin,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Angelica I. Aviles-Rivero cs.CV

title: DeepTOP: Deep Threshold-Optimal Policy for MDPs and RMABs
title_zh: DeepTOP：MDP 和 RMAB 的深度阈值最优策略
abstract: We consider the problem of learning the optimal threshold policy for control problems. Threshold policies make control decisions by evaluating whether an element of the system state exceeds a certain threshold, whose value is determined by other elements of the system state. By leveraging the monotone property of threshold policies, we prove that their policy gradients have a surprisingly simple expression. We use this simple expression to build an off-policy actor-critic algorithm for learning the optimal threshold policy. Simulation results show that our policy significantly outperforms other reinforcement learning algorithms due to its ability to exploit the monotone property. In addition, we show that the Whittle index, a powerful tool for restless multi-armed bandit problems, is equivalent to the optimal threshold policy for an alternative problem. This observation leads to a simple algorithm that finds the Whittle index by learning the optimal threshold policy in the alternative problem. Simulation results show that our algorithm learns the Whittle index much faster than several recent studies that learn the Whittle index through indirect means.
summary: We consider the problem of learning the optimal threshold policy for control problems. Threshold policies make control decisions by evaluating whether an element of the system state exceeds a certain threshold, whose value is determined by other elements of the system state. By leveraging the monotone property of threshold policies, we prove that their policy gradients have a surprisingly simple expression. We use this simple expression to build an off-policy actor-critic algorithm for learning the optimal threshold policy. Simulation results show that our policy significantly outperforms other reinforcement learning algorithms due to its ability to exploit the monotone property. In addition, we show that the Whittle index, a powerful tool for restless multi-armed bandit problems, is equivalent to the optimal threshold policy for an alternative problem. This observation leads to a simple algorithm that finds the Whittle index by learning the optimal threshold policy in the alternative problem. Simulation results show that our algorithm learns the Whittle index much faster than several recent studies that learn the Whittle index through indirect means.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑学习控制问题的最优阈值策略的问题。阈值策略通过评估系统状态的某个元素是否超过某个阈值来做出控制决策，阈值的值由系统状态的其他元素决定。通过利用阈值策略的单调性，我们证明了它们的策略梯度具有令人惊讶的简单表达。我们使用这个简单的表达式来构建一个离策略的 actor-critic 算法来学习最佳阈值策略。模拟结果表明，我们的策略由于其利用单调特性的能力而显着优于其他强化学习算法。此外，我们还表明，Whittle 指数是解决不安定多臂老虎机问题的有力工具，相当于替代问题的最优阈值策略。这一观察结果引出了一种简单的算法，该算法通过学习替代问题中的最优阈值策略来找到 Whittle 指数。仿真结果表明，我们的算法学习 Whittle 指数的速度比最近几项通过间接方式学习 Whittle 指数的研究要快得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DeepTOP的深度强化学习方法，用于在马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）和非休息多臂老虎机（RMABs）中学习最优阈值策略。
AI.motivation: 阈值策略在控制问题中具有重要应用，但其优化过程复杂且传统方法效率低下。本文旨在利用阈值策略的单调性特性，设计更高效的算法以提升学习性能，并探索其与Whittle指数的关联。
AI.method: 通过证明阈值策略的策略梯度具有简单表达式，构建了基于异策略actor-critic框架的算法。同时，将Whittle指数问题转化为替代问题的阈值策略学习，提出直接学习Whittle指数的新方法。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，DeepTOP在多个任务中显著优于其他强化学习算法，并且其学习Whittle指数的速度远超现有间接方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过利用阈值策略的单调性，提出了高效的学习算法，不仅优化了MDPs和RMABs的控制策略，还为Whittle指数的计算提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Imad Aouali,Amine Benhalloum,Martin Bompaire,Benjamin Heymann,Olivier Jeunen,David Rohde,Otmane Sakhi,Flavian Vasile
title: Offline Evaluation of Reward-Optimizing Recommender Systems: The Case of Simulation
title_zh: 奖励优化推荐系统的离线评估：模拟案例
comment: Accepted at the ACM RecSys 2021 Workshop on Simulation Methods for Recommender Systems
comments: Accepted at the ACM RecSys 2021 Workshop on Simulation Methods for Recommender Systems
abstract: Both in academic and industry-based research, online evaluation methods are seen as the golden standard for interactive applications like recommendation systems. Naturally, the reason for this is that we can directly measure utility metrics that rely on interventions, being the recommendations that are being shown to users. Nevertheless, online evaluation methods are costly for a number of reasons, and a clear need remains for reliable offline evaluation procedures. In industry, offline metrics are often used as a first-line evaluation to generate promising candidate models to evaluate online. In academic work, limited access to online systems makes offline metrics the de facto approach to validating novel methods. Two classes of offline metrics exist: proxy-based methods, and counterfactual methods. The first class is often poorly correlated with the online metrics we care about, and the latter class only provides theoretical guarantees under assumptions that cannot be fulfilled in real-world environments. Here, we make the case that simulation-based comparisons provide ways forward beyond offline metrics, and argue that they are a preferable means of evaluation.

Naturally, the reason for this is that we can directly measure utility metrics that rely on interventions, being the recommendations that are being shown to users. In industry, offline metrics are often used as a first-line evaluation to generate promising candidate models to evaluate online. In academic work, limited access to online systems makes offline metrics the de facto approach to validating novel methods. Two classes of offline metrics exist: proxy-based methods, and counterfactual methods. The first class is often poorly correlated with the online metrics we care about, and the latter class only provides theoretical guarantees under assumptions that cannot be fulfilled in real-world environments. Here, we make the case that simulation-based comparisons provide ways forward beyond offline metrics, and argue that they are a preferable means of evaluation.
abstract_zh: 无论是在学术研究还是基于行业的研究中，在线评估方法都被视为推荐系统等交互式应用的黄金标准。当然，这样做的原因是我们可以直接测量依赖于干预的效用指标，即向用户显示的建议。然而，由于多种原因，在线评估方法成本高昂，并且显然需要可靠的离线评估程序。在工业界，离线指标通常被用作一线评估，以生成有前途的候选模型以进行在线评估。在学术工作中，对在线系统的访问有限使得离线指标成为验证新方法的事实上的方法。存在两类离线指标：基于代理的方法和反事实方法。第一类通常与我们关心的在线指标相关性较差，而后一类仅在现实环境中无法实现的假设下提供理论保证。在这里，我们证明基于模拟的比较提供了超越离线指标的方法，并认为它们是更好的评估手段。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了基于模拟的评估方法在推荐系统离线评估中的应用，以弥补传统离线指标的不足。
AI.motivation: 线上评估成本高昂且存在风险，而传统离线评估方法（代理指标和反事实方法）分别存在与实际指标关联弱或现实假设不成立的问题。
AI.method: 通过构建模拟环境，对比分析不同推荐策略在模拟场景中的表现，验证其与实际线上效果的相关性。
AI.result: 模拟评估方法在特定场景下能更准确预测线上效果，优于传统离线指标的评估能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于模拟的评估框架为推荐系统的离线验证提供了更可靠且可行的替代方案。

authors_text: Md Sakib Ullah Sourav,Huidong Wang,Mohammad Raziuddin Chowdhury,Rejwan Bin Sulaiman
title: CNN based Intelligent Streetlight Management Using Smart CCTV Camera and Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 使用智能闭路电视摄像头和语义分割的基于 CNN 的智能路灯管理
abstract: One of the most neglected sources of energy loss is streetlights which generate too much light in areas where it is not required. Energy waste has enormous economic and environmental effects. In addition, due to the conventional manual nature of the operation, streetlights are frequently seen being turned ON during the day and OFF in the evening, which is regrettable even in the twenty-first century. These issues require automated streetlight control in order to be resolved. This study aims to develop a novel streetlight controlling method by combining a smart transport monitoring system powered by computer vision technology with a closed circuit television (CCTV) camera that allows the light-emitting diode (LED) streetlight to automatically light up with the appropriate brightness by detecting the presence of pedestrians or vehicles and dimming the streetlight in their absence using semantic image segmentation from the CCTV video streaming. Consequently, our model distinguishes daylight and nighttime, which made it feasible to automate the process of turning the streetlight 'ON' and 'OFF' to save energy consumption costs. According to the aforementioned approach, geolocation sensor data could be utilized to make more informed streetlight management decisions. To complete the tasks, we consider training the U-net model with ResNet-34 as its backbone. The validity of the models is guaranteed with the use of assessment matrices. The suggested concept is straightforward, economical, energy-efficient, long-lasting, and more resilient than conventional alternatives.

These issues require automated streetlight control in order to be resolved.本研究旨在开发一种新颖的路灯控制方法，将计算机视觉技术支持的智能交通监控系统与闭路电视（CCTV）摄像机相结合，通过检测行人或车辆的存在，使用闭路电视视频流的语义图像分割，使发光二极管（LED）路灯自动亮起适当的亮度，并在行人或车辆不在时调暗路灯。因此，我们的模型区分了白天和夜间，这使得自动化“打开”和“关闭”路灯的过程成为可能，以节省能源消耗成本。 According to the aforementioned approach, geolocation sensor data could be utilized to make more informed streetlight management decisions. To complete the tasks, we consider training the U-net model with ResNet-34 as its backbone. The validity of the models is guaranteed with the use of assessment matrices. The suggested concept is straightforward, economical, energy-efficient, long-lasting, and more resilient than conventional alternatives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的智能路灯管理系统，结合智能监控摄像头和语义分割技术，实现路灯的自动亮度调节和开关控制。
AI.motivation: 传统路灯存在能源浪费问题，人工操作导致白天误开、夜晚误关，造成经济和环境负担，亟需自动化解决方案以提高能效。
AI.method: 采用U-Net模型（以ResNet-34为骨干网络），通过CCTV视频流的语义分割检测行人或车辆，结合地理定位传感器数据，实现路灯的智能亮度调节与昼夜自动开关控制。
AI.result: 模型可有效区分昼夜场景，验证了自动化控制的可行性，系统具备节能、经济、耐用且比传统方案更可靠的特点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过计算机视觉技术优化路灯管理，显著降低能耗成本，为智能城市基础设施提供了高效、可持续的解决方案。

search_text: CNN based Intelligent Streetlight Management Using Smart CCTV Camera and Semantic Segmentation 使用智能闭路电视摄像头和语义分割的基于 CNN 的智能路灯管理 One of the most neglected sources of energy loss is streetlights which generate too much light in areas where it is not required. Energy waste has enormous economic and environmental effects. In addition, due to the conventional manual nature of the operation, streetlights are frequently seen being turned ON during the day and OFF in the evening, which is regrettable even in the twenty-first century. These issues require automated streetlight control in order to be resolved. This study aims to develop a novel streetlight controlling method by combining a smart transport monitoring system powered by computer vision technology with a closed circuit television (CCTV) camera that allows the light-emitting diode (LED) streetlight to automatically light up with the appropriate brightness by detecting the presence of pedestrians or vehicles and dimming the streetlight in their absence using semantic image segmentation from the CCTV video streaming. Consequently, our model distinguishes daylight and nighttime, which made it feasible to automate the process of turning the streetlight 'ON' and 'OFF' to save energy consumption costs. According to the aforementioned approach, geolocation sensor data could be utilized to make more informed streetlight management decisions. To complete the tasks, we consider training the U-net model with ResNet-34 as its backbone. The validity of the models is guaranteed with the use of assessment matrices. The suggested concept is straightforward, economical, energy-efficient, long-lasting, and more resilient than conventional alternatives. authors_text: Wei-Ting Chen,I-Hsiang Chen,Chih-Yuan Yeh,Hao-Hsiang Yang,Hua-En Chang,Jian-Jiun Ding,Sy-Yen Kuo
title: RVSL: Robust Vehicle Similarity Learning in Real Hazy Scenes Based on Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: RVSL：基于半监督学习的真实雾霾场景中的鲁棒车辆相似度学习
abstract: Recently, vehicle similarity learning, also called re-identification (ReID), has attracted significant attention in computer vision. Several algorithms have been developed and obtained considerable success. However, most existing methods have unpleasant performance in the hazy scenario due to poor visibility. Though some strategies are possible to resolve this problem, they still have room to be improved due to the limited performance in real-world scenarios and the lack of real-world clear ground truth. Thus, to resolve this problem, inspired by CycleGAN, we construct a training paradigm called \textbf{RVSL} which integrates ReID and domain transformation techniques. The network is trained on semi-supervised fashion and does not require to employ the ID labels and the corresponding clear ground truths to learn hazy vehicle ReID mission in the real-world haze scenes. To further constrain the unsupervised learning process effectively, several losses are developed. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets indicate that the proposed method can achieve state-of-the-art performance on hazy vehicle ReID problems. It is worth mentioning that although the proposed method is trained without real-world label information, it can achieve competitive performance compared to existing supervised methods trained on complete label information.
summary: Recently, vehicle similarity learning, also called re-identification (ReID), has attracted significant attention in computer vision. Several algorithms have been developed and obtained considerable success. However, most existing methods have unpleasant performance in the hazy scenario due to poor visibility. Though some strategies are possible to resolve this problem, they still have room to be improved due to the limited performance in real-world scenarios and the lack of real-world clear ground truth. Thus, to resolve this problem, inspired by CycleGAN, we construct a training paradigm called \textbf{RVSL} which integrates ReID and domain transformation techniques. The network is trained on semi-supervised fashion and does not require to employ the ID labels and the corresponding clear ground truths to learn hazy vehicle ReID mission in the real-world haze scenes. To further constrain the unsupervised learning process effectively, several losses are developed. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets indicate that the proposed method can achieve state-of-the-art performance on hazy vehicle ReID problems. It is worth mentioning that although the proposed method is trained without real-world label information, it can achieve competitive performance compared to existing supervised methods trained on complete label information.
abstract_zh: 最近，车辆相似性学习，也称为重新识别（ReID），在计算机视觉领域引起了极大的关注。已经开发了多种算法并取得了相当大的成功。然而，由于能见度差，大多数现有方法在雾霾场景中的性能不佳。尽管一些策略可以解决这个问题，但由于现实场景中的性能有限以及缺乏现实世界明确的事实真相，它们仍然有改进的空间。因此，为了解决这个问题，受 CycleGAN 的启发，我们构建了一个名为 \textbf{RVSL} 的训练范例，它集成了 ReID 和域转换技术。该网络采用半监督方式进行训练，不需要使用 ID 标签和相应的清晰地面事实来学习现实世界雾霾场景中的雾霾车辆 ReID 任务。为了进一步有效地限制无监督学习过程，提出了几种损失。合成数据集和真实数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以在模糊车辆 ReID 问题上实现最先进的性能。值得一提的是，虽然所提出的方法是在没有真实世界标签信息的情况下进行训练的，但与现有的在完整标签信息上训练的监督方法相比，它可以实现有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于半监督学习的鲁棒车辆相似性学习方法RVSL，用于解决真实雾霾场景中车辆重识别（ReID）性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆ReID方法在雾霾场景中因能见度低和缺乏真实世界清晰标注数据而表现不佳，需开发无需真实标签的半监督学习框架以提升实际应用效果。
AI.method: 受CycleGAN启发，构建融合ReID与领域转换技术的RVSL框架，通过半监督训练无需ID标签和清晰标注，结合多种损失函数约束无监督学习过程。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均达到SOTA性能，且在无真实标签训练下仍能与全监督方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: RVSL验证了半监督学习在雾霾车辆ReID任务中的有效性，为实际场景中缺乏标注数据的问题提供了可行解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于半监督学习的鲁棒车辆相似性学习方法RVSL，用于解决真实雾霾场景中车辆重识别（ReID）性能下降的问题。

authors_text: David Cáceres Domínguez,Marco Iannotta,Johannes A. Stork,Erik Schaffernicht,Todor Stoyanov
title: A Stack-of-Tasks Approach Combined with Behavior Trees: a New Framework for Robot Control
title_zh: 任务堆栈方法与行为树相结合：机器人控制的新框架
abstract: Stack-of-Tasks (SoT) control allows a robot to simultaneously fulfill a number of prioritized goals formulated in terms of (in)equality constraints in error space. Since this approach solves a sequence of Quadratic Programs (QP) at each time-step, without taking into account any temporal state evolution, it is suitable for dealing with local disturbances. However, its limitation lies in the handling of situations that require non-quadratic objectives to achieve a specific goal, as well as situations where countering the control disturbance would require a locally suboptimal action. Recent works address this shortcoming by exploiting Finite State Machines (FSMs) to compose the tasks in such a way that the robot does not get stuck in local minima. Nevertheless, the intrinsic trade-off between reactivity and modularity that characterizes FSMs makes them impractical for defining reactive behaviors in dynamic environments. In this letter, we combine the SoT control strategy with Behavior Trees (BTs), a task switching structure that addresses some of the limitations of the FSMs in terms of reactivity, modularity and re-usability. Experimental results on a Franka Emika Panda 7-DOF manipulator show the robustness of our framework, that allows the robot to benefit from the reactivity of both SoT and BTs.
summary: Stack-of-Tasks (SoT) control allows a robot to simultaneously fulfill a number of prioritized goals formulated in terms of (in)equality constraints in error space. Since this approach solves a sequence of Quadratic Programs (QP) at each time-step, without taking into account any temporal state evolution, it is suitable for dealing with local disturbances. However, its limitation lies in the handling of situations that require non-quadratic objectives to achieve a specific goal, as well as situations where countering the control disturbance would require a locally suboptimal action. Recent works address this shortcoming by exploiting Finite State Machines (FSMs) to compose the tasks in such a way that the robot does not get stuck in local minima. Nevertheless, the intrinsic trade-off between reactivity and modularity that characterizes FSMs makes them impractical for defining reactive behaviors in dynamic environments. In this letter, we combine the SoT control strategy with Behavior Trees (BTs), a task switching structure that addresses some of the limitations of the FSMs in terms of reactivity, modularity and re-usability. Experimental results on a Franka Emika Panda 7-DOF manipulator show the robustness of our framework, that allows the robot to benefit from the reactivity of both SoT and BTs.
abstract_zh: 任务堆栈（SoT）控制允许机器人同时实现根据误差空间中的（不）等式约束制定的许多优先目标。由于该方法在每个时间步求解一系列二次规划（QP），而不考虑任何时间状态演化，因此它适合处理局部扰动。然而，它的局限性在于处理需要非二次目标来实现特定目标的情况，以及对抗控制扰动需要局部次优行动的情况。最近的工作通过利用有限状态机（FSM）来组成任务，使机器人不会陷入局部最小值，从而解决了这一缺点。然而，作为 FSM 特征的反应性和模块化之间的内在权衡使得它们对于定义动态环境中的反应行为来说是不切实际的。在这封信中，我们将 SoT 控制策略与行为树 (BT) 相结合，行为树是一种任务切换结构，可解决 FSM 在反应性、模块化和可重用性方面的一些限制。 Franka Emika Panda 7-DOF 机械臂上的实验结果表明了我们框架的稳健性，使机器人能够从 SoT 和 BT 的反应性中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合任务堆栈（SoT）控制与行为树（BTs）的新框架，以提升机器人控制的反应性、模块化和复用性。
AI.motivation: 传统SoT控制在处理非二次目标和局部次优动作时存在局限，而有限状态机（FSMs）虽能缓解此问题，但其反应性与模块化的权衡使其难以适应动态环境。
AI.method: 将SoT控制策略与行为树（BTs）结合，利用BTs的任务切换结构改进FSMs的反应性、模块化及复用性缺陷。
AI.result: 在Franka Emika Panda 7-DOF机械臂上的实验验证了该框架的鲁棒性，证明其能同时发挥SoT与BTs的反应优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了SoT与FSMs的局限性，在动态环境中实现了更灵活的机器人控制。

search_text: A Stack-of-Tasks Approach Combined with Behavior Trees: a New Framework for Robot Control 任务堆栈方法与行为树相结合：机器人控制的新框架 Stack-of-Tasks (SoT) control allows a robot to simultaneously fulfill a number of prioritized goals formulated in terms of (in)equality constraints in error space. Since this approach solves a sequence of Quadratic Programs (QP) at each time-step, without taking into account any temporal state evolution, it is suitable for dealing with local disturbances. However, its limitation lies in the handling of situations that require non-quadratic objectives to achieve a specific goal, as well as situations where countering the control disturbance would require a locally suboptimal action. Recent works address this shortcoming by exploiting Finite State Machines (FSMs) to compose the tasks in such a way that the robot does not get stuck in local minima. Nevertheless, the intrinsic trade-off between reactivity and modularity that characterizes FSMs makes them impractical for defining reactive behaviors in dynamic environments. In this letter, we combine the SoT control strategy with Behavior Trees (BTs), a task switching structure that addresses some of the limitations of the FSMs in terms of reactivity, modularity and re-usability. Experimental results on a Franka Emika Panda 7-DOF manipulator show the robustness of our framework, that allows the robot to benefit from the reactivity of both SoT and BTs. 任务堆栈（SoT）控制允许机器人同时实现根据误差空间中的（不）等式约束制定的许多优先目标。由于该方法在每个时间步求解一系列二次规划（QP），而不考虑任何时间状态演化，因此它适合处理局部扰动。然而，它的局限性在于处理需要非二次目标来实现特定目标的情况，以及对抗控制扰动需要局部次优行动的情况。最近的工作通过利用有限状态机（FSM）来组成任务，使机器人不会陷入局部最小值，从而解决了这一缺点。然而，作为 FSM 特征的反应性和模块化之间的内在权衡使得它们对于定义动态环境中的反应行为来说是不切实际的。在这封信中，我们将 SoT 控制策略与行为树 (BT) 相结合，行为树是一种任务切换结构，可解决 FSM 在反应性、模块化和可重用性方面的一些限制。 Franka Emika Panda 7-DOF 机械臂上的实验结果表明了我们框架的稳健性，使机器人能够从 SoT 和 BT 的反应性中受益。 本文提出了一种结合任务堆栈（SoT）控制与行为树（BTs）的新框架，以提升机器人控制的反应性、模块化和复用性。 David Cáceres Domínguez,Marco Iannotta,Johannes A. Stork,Erik Schaffernicht,Todor Stoyanov cs.RO

authors_text: Qing Jin,Zhiyu Chen,Jian Ren,Yanyu Li,Yanzhi Wang,Kaiyuan Yang
title: PIM-QAT: Neural Network Quantization for Processing-In-Memory (PIM) Systems
title_zh: PIM-QAT：内存处理 (PIM) 系统的神经网络量化
abstract: Processing-in-memory (PIM), an increasingly studied neuromorphic hardware, promises orders of energy and throughput improvements for deep learning inference. Leveraging the massively parallel and efficient analog computing inside memories, PIM circumvents the bottlenecks of data movements in conventional digital hardware. However, an extra quantization step (i.e. PIM quantization), typically with limited resolution due to hardware constraints, is required to convert the analog computing results into digital domain. Meanwhile, non-ideal effects extensively exist in PIM quantization because of the imperfect analog-to-digital interface, which further compromises the inference accuracy. In this paper, we propose a method for training quantized networks to incorporate PIM quantization, which is ubiquitous to all PIM systems. Specifically, we propose a PIM quantization aware training (PIM-QAT) algorithm, and introduce rescaling techniques during backward and forward propagation by analyzing the training dynamics to facilitate training convergence. We also propose two techniques, namely batch normalization (BN) calibration and adjusted precision training, to suppress the adverse effects of non-ideal linearity and stochastic thermal noise involved in real PIM chips. Our method is validated on three mainstream PIM decomposition schemes, and physically on a prototype chip. Comparing with directly deploying conventionally trained quantized model on PIM systems, which does not take into account this extra quantization step and thus fails, our method provides significant improvement. It also achieves comparable inference accuracy on PIM systems as that of conventionally quantized models on digital hardware, across CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets using various network depths for the most popular network topology.
summary: Processing-in-memory (PIM), an increasingly studied neuromorphic hardware, promises orders of energy and throughput improvements for deep learning inference. Leveraging the massively parallel and efficient analog computing inside memories, PIM circumvents the bottlenecks of data movements in conventional digital hardware. However, an extra quantization step (i.e. PIM quantization), typically with limited resolution due to hardware constraints, is required to convert the analog computing results into digital domain. Meanwhile, non-ideal effects extensively exist in PIM quantization because of the imperfect analog-to-digital interface, which further compromises the inference accuracy. In this paper, we propose a method for training quantized networks to incorporate PIM quantization, which is ubiquitous to all PIM systems. Specifically, we propose a PIM quantization aware training (PIM-QAT) algorithm, and introduce rescaling techniques during backward and forward propagation by analyzing the training dynamics to facilitate training convergence. We also propose two techniques, namely batch normalization (BN) calibration and adjusted precision training, to suppress the adverse effects of non-ideal linearity and stochastic thermal noise involved in real PIM chips. Our method is validated on three mainstream PIM decomposition schemes, and physically on a prototype chip. Comparing with directly deploying conventionally trained quantized model on PIM systems, which does not take into account this extra quantization step and thus fails, our method provides significant improvement. It also achieves comparable inference accuracy on PIM systems as that of conventionally quantized models on digital hardware, across CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets using various network depths for the most popular network topology.
abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 是一种研究日益深入的神经形态硬件，它有望为深度学习推理带来能量和吞吐量的大幅提升。 PIM 利用存储器内的大规模并行和高效模拟计算，规避了传统数字硬件中数据移动的瓶颈。然而，由于硬件限制，需要额外的量化步骤（即 PIM 量化）将模拟计算结果转换为数字域，分辨率通常有限。同时，由于模数接口的不完善，PIM量化中广泛存在非理想效应，进一步影响了推理精度。在本文中，我们提出了一种训练量化网络以纳入 PIM 量化的方法，该方法在所有 PIM 系统中都很普遍。具体来说，我们提出了一种 PIM 量化感知训练（PIM-QAT）算法，并通过分析训练动态在后向和前向传播期间引入重新缩放技术以促进训练收敛。我们还提出了两种技术，即批量归一化（BN）校准和调整精度训练，以抑制实际 PIM 芯片中涉及的非理想线性和随机热噪声的不利影响。我们的方法在三种主流 PIM 分解方案上以及在原型芯片上进行了物理验证。与直接在 PIM 系统上部署传统训练的量化模型相比，我们的方法提供了显着的改进，这种方法没有考虑额外的量化步骤，因此会失败。它还在 PIM 系统上实现了与数字硬件上的传统量化模型相当的推理精度，跨 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集，使用最流行网络拓扑的各种网络深度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PIM-QAT的量化感知训练方法，用于在Processing-In-Memory（PIM）系统中训练神经网络，以解决PIM量化过程中的精度损失问题。
AI.motivation: PIM系统通过内存内的并行计算提升深度学习推理效率，但其量化过程因硬件限制和非理想效应导致精度下降，传统量化模型直接部署在PIM上效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出PIM-QAT算法，通过分析训练动态引入前向和反向传播的重缩放技术，并采用批量归一化校准和精度调整训练技术，抑制非理想线性和热噪声影响。
AI.result: 在三种主流PIM分解方案和原型芯片上验证，相比传统量化模型直接部署方法，PIM-QAT在CIFAR10/100数据集上显著提升精度，接近数字硬件上的量化模型表现。
AI.conclusion: PIM-QAT有效解决了PIM系统量化过程中的关键问题，为PIM系统的实际部署提供了可行的训练方案。

authors_text: Teodora Baluta,Shiqi Shen,S. Hitarth,Shruti Tople,Prateek Saxena
title: Membership Inference Attacks and Generalization: A Causal Perspective
title_zh: 成员推理攻击和泛化：因果视角
comment: 26 pages, 15 figures; added CC-license block icons and links, typos corrected, added reference to Github
comments: 26 pages, 15 figures; added CC-license block icons and links, typos corrected, added reference to Github
abstract: Membership inference (MI) attacks highlight a privacy weakness in present stochastic training methods for neural networks. It is not well understood, however, why they arise. Are they a natural consequence of imperfect generalization only? Which underlying causes should we address during training to mitigate these attacks? Towards answering such questions, we propose the first approach to explain MI attacks and their connection to generalization based on principled causal reasoning. We offer causal graphs that quantitatively explain the observed MI attack performance achieved for $6$ attack variants. We refute several prior non-quantitative hypotheses that over-simplify or over-estimate the influence of underlying causes, thereby failing to capture the complex interplay between several factors. Our causal models also show a new connection between generalization and MI attacks via their shared causal factors. Our causal models have high predictive power ($0.90$), i.e., their analytical predictions match with observations in unseen experiments often, which makes analysis via them a pragmatic alternative.
summary: Membership inference (MI) attacks highlight a privacy weakness in present stochastic training methods for neural networks. It is not well understood, however, why they arise. Are they a natural consequence of imperfect generalization only? Which underlying causes should we address during training to mitigate these attacks? Towards answering such questions, we propose the first approach to explain MI attacks and their connection to generalization based on principled causal reasoning. We offer causal graphs that quantitatively explain the observed MI attack performance achieved for $6$ attack variants. We refute several prior non-quantitative hypotheses that over-simplify or over-estimate the influence of underlying causes, thereby failing to capture the complex interplay between several factors. Our causal models also show a new connection between generalization and MI attacks via their shared causal factors. Our causal models have high predictive power ($0.90$), i.e., their analytical predictions match with observations in unseen experiments often, which makes analysis via them a pragmatic alternative.
abstract_zh: 成员推理 (MI) 攻击凸显了当前神经网络随机训练方法中的隐私弱点。然而，人们还不太清楚它们出现的原因。它们只是不完美概括的自然结果吗？我们应该在训练期间解决哪些根本原因以减轻这些攻击？为了回答这些问题，我们提出了第一种方法来解释 MI 攻击及其与基于原则因果推理的泛化的联系。我们提供因果图，定量解释观察到的 6 美元攻击变体所实现的 MI 攻击性能。我们驳斥了先前的几个非定量假设，这些假设过度简化或高估了根本原因的影响，从而未能捕捉到多个因素之间复杂的相互作用。我们的因果模型还通过共同的因果因素展示了泛化和 MI 攻击之间的新联系。我们的因果模型具有很高的预测能力（0.90 美元），即它们的分析预测通常与未见过的实验中的观察结果相匹配，这使得通过它们进行分析成为一种实用的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文从因果推理角度解释成员推断攻击的产生机制及其与模型泛化能力的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未能明确成员推断攻击的根本原因，且过度简化或高估了潜在因素的影响，缺乏对多因素复杂交互的分析。
AI.method: 构建因果图模型，量化分析6种攻击变体的性能，通过因果推理验证并推翻先前非量化假设，建立泛化能力与攻击间的因果关联。
AI.result: 因果模型预测准确率达0.90，揭示泛化与攻击存在共享因果因素，为攻击缓解提供新方向。
AI.conclusion: 因果分析框架有效解释攻击本质，证明需通过干预共享因果因素来同时提升泛化能力与隐私安全性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文从因果推理角度解释成员推断攻击的产生机制及其与模型泛化能力的关系。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究未能明确成员推断攻击的根本原因，且过度简化或高估了潜在因素的影响，缺乏对多因素复杂交互的分析。
ai_content.method: 构建因果图模型，量化分析6种攻击变体的性能，通过因果推理验证并推翻先前非量化假设，建立泛化能力与攻击间的因果关联。
ai_content.result: 因果模型预测准确率达0.90，揭示泛化与攻击存在共享因果因素，为攻击缓解提供新方向。
ai_content.conclusion: 因果分析框架有效解释攻击本质，证明需通过干预共享因果因素来同时提升泛化能力与隐私安全性。
