search_text: Membership Inference Attacks and Generalization: A Causal Perspective 成员推理攻击和泛化：因果视角 Membership inference (MI) attacks highlight a privacy weakness in present stochastic training methods for neural networks. It is not well understood, however, why they arise. Are they a natural consequence of imperfect generalization only? Which underlying causes should we address during training to mitigate these attacks? Towards answering such questions, we propose the first approach to explain MI attacks and their connection to generalization based on principled causal reasoning. We offer causal graphs that quantitatively explain the observed MI attack performance achieved for $6$ attack variants. We refute several prior non-quantitative hypotheses that over-simplify or over-estimate the influence of underlying causes, thereby failing to capture the complex interplay between several factors. Our causal models also show a new connection between generalization and MI attacks via their shared causal factors. Our causal models have high predictive power ($0.90$), i.e., their analytical predictions match with observations in unseen experiments often, which makes analysis via them a pragmatic alternative. 成员推理 (MI) 攻击凸显了当前神经网络随机训练方法中的隐私弱点。然而，人们还不太清楚它们出现的原因。它们只是不完美概括的自然结果吗？我们应该在训练期间解决哪些根本原因以减轻这些攻击？为了回答这些问题，我们提出了第一种方法来解释 MI 攻击及其与基于原则因果推理的泛化的联系。我们提供因果图，定量解释观察到的 6 美元攻击变体所实现的 MI 攻击性能。我们驳斥了先前的几个非定量假设，这些假设过度简化或高估了根本原因的影响，从而未能捕捉到多个因素之间复杂的相互作用。我们的因果模型还通过共同的因果因素展示了泛化和 MI 攻击之间的新联系。我们的因果模型具有很高的预测能力（0.90 美元），即它们的分析预测通常与未见过的实验中的观察结果相匹配，这使得通过它们进行分析成为一种实用的替代方案。 本文从因果推理角度解释成员推断攻击的产生机制及其与模型泛化能力的关系。 Teodora Baluta,Shiqi Shen,S. Hitarth,Shruti Tople,Prateek Saxena cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Thang Vu,Kookhoi Kim,Tung M. Luu,Thanh Nguyen,Junyeong Kim,Chang D. Yoo
title: Scalable SoftGroup for 3D Instance Segmentation on Point Clouds
title_zh: 用于点云上 3D 实例分割的可扩展 SoftGroup
comment: Accepted by TPAMI. Extension of arXiv:2203.01509
comments: Accepted by TPAMI. Extension of arXiv:2203.01509
abstract: This paper considers a network referred to as SoftGroup for accurate and scalable 3D instance segmentation. Existing state-of-the-art methods produce hard semantic predictions followed by grouping instance segmentation results. Unfortunately, errors stemming from hard decisions propagate into the grouping, resulting in poor overlap between predicted instances and ground truth and substantial false positives. To address the abovementioned problems, SoftGroup allows each point to be associated with multiple classes to mitigate the uncertainty stemming from semantic prediction. It also suppresses false positive instances by learning to categorize them as background. Regarding scalability, the existing fast methods require computational time on the order of tens of seconds on large-scale scenes, which is unsatisfactory and far from applicable for real-time. Our finding is that the $k$-Nearest Neighbor ($k$-NN) module, which serves as the prerequisite of grouping, introduces a computational bottleneck. SoftGroup is extended to resolve this computational bottleneck, referred to as SoftGroup++. The proposed SoftGroup++ reduces time complexity with octree $k$-NN and reduces search space with class-aware pyramid scaling and late devoxelization. Experimental results on various indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate the efficacy and generality of the proposed SoftGroup and SoftGroup++. Their performances surpass the best-performing baseline by a large margin (6\% $\sim$ 16\%) in terms of AP$_{50}$. On datasets with large-scale scenes, SoftGroup++ achieves a 6$\times$ speed boost on average compared to SoftGroup. Furthermore, SoftGroup can be extended to perform object detection and panoptic segmentation with nontrivial improvements over existing methods. The source code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/thangvubk/SoftGroup}.

Existing state-of-the-art methods produce hard semantic predictions followed by grouping instance segmentation results. Unfortunately, errors stemming from hard decisions propagate into the grouping, resulting in poor overlap between predicted instances and ground truth and substantial false positives. To address the abovementioned problems, SoftGroup allows each point to be associated with multiple classes to mitigate the uncertainty stemming from semantic prediction. It also suppresses false positive instances by learning to categorize them as background. Regarding scalability, the existing fast methods require computational time on the order of tens of seconds on large-scale scenes, which is unsatisfactory and far from applicable for real-time. Our finding is that the $k$-Nearest Neighbor ($k$-NN) module, which serves as the prerequisite of grouping, introduces a computational bottleneck. SoftGroup is extended to resolve this computational bottleneck, referred to as SoftGroup++. The proposed SoftGroup++ reduces time complexity with octree $k$-NN and reduces search space with class-aware pyramid scaling and late devoxelization. Experimental results on various indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate the efficacy and generality of the proposed SoftGroup and SoftGroup++. Their performances surpass the best-performing baseline by a large margin (6\% $\sim$ 16\%) in terms of AP$_{50}$. On datasets with large-scale scenes, SoftGroup++ achieves a 6$\times$ speed boost on average compared to SoftGroup. Furthermore, SoftGroup can be extended to perform object detection and panoptic segmentation with nontrivial improvements over existing methods. The source code and trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/thangvubk/SoftGroup}.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑使用称为 SoftGroup 的网络来实现准确且可扩展的 3D 实例分割。现有的最先进的方法产生硬语义预测，然后对实例分割结果进行分组。不幸的是，硬决策产生的错误会传播到分组中，导致预测实例和真实情况之间的重叠度较差，并导致大量误报。为了解决上述问题，SoftGroup 允许每个点与多个类关联，以减轻语义预测带来的不确定性。它还通过学习将误报实例分类为背景来抑制误报实例。在可扩展性方面，现有的快速方法在大规模场景下需要数十秒量级的计算时间，这并不令人满意，远不能适用于实时。我们的发现是，作为分组先决条件的 $k$-Nearest Neighbor ($k$-NN) 模块引入了计算瓶颈。 SoftGroup 被扩展来解决这个计算瓶颈，称为 SoftGroup++。所提出的 SoftGroup++ 使用八叉树 $k$-NN 降低了时间复杂度，并通过类感知金字塔缩放和后期去像素化减少了搜索空间。各种室内和室外数据集的实验结果证明了所提出的 SoftGroup 和 SoftGroup++ 的有效性和通用性。就 AP$_{50}$ 而言，他们的表现大幅超越了最佳表现基线 (6\% $\sim$ 16\%)。在大规模场景的数据集上，SoftGroup++ 与 SoftGroup 相比平均实现了 6$\times$ 的速度提升。此外，SoftGroup 可以扩展到执行对象检测和全景分割，并对现有方法进行重大改进。源代码和训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/thangvubk/SoftGroup} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SoftGroup的网络及其可扩展版本SoftGroup++，用于解决点云中3D实例分割的准确性和可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过硬语义预测进行分组，导致预测实例与真实值重叠度低且存在大量误检；同时，传统方法在大规模场景下的计算效率不足，难以实现实时应用。
AI.method: SoftGroup允许每个点关联多个类别以降低语义预测的不确定性，并通过学习将误检实例归类为背景。SoftGroup++通过八叉树k-NN、类别感知金字塔缩放和延迟去体素化优化计算瓶颈。
AI.result: 在多个室内外数据集上，SoftGroup和SoftGroup++的AP50指标优于最佳基线6%-16%；SoftGroup++在大规模场景下平均速度提升6倍，且可扩展至目标检测和全景分割任务。
AI.conclusion: SoftGroup系列方法有效解决了3D实例分割中的准确性与可扩展性矛盾，为点云处理提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Durga Shree Nagabushanam,Steve Mathew,Chiranji Lal Chowdhary
title: A study on the deviations in performance of FNNs and CNNs in the realm of grayscale adversarial images
title_zh: FNN 和 CNN 在灰度对抗图像领域的性能偏差研究
abstract: Neural Networks are prone to having lesser accuracy in the classification of images with noise perturbation. Convolutional Neural Networks, CNNs are known for their unparalleled accuracy in the classification of benign images. But our study shows that they are extremely vulnerable to noise addition while Feed-forward Neural Networks, FNNs show very less correspondence with noise perturbation, maintaining their accuracy almost undisturbed. FNNs are observed to be better at classifying noise-intensive, single-channeled images that are just sheer noise to human vision. In our study, we have used the hand-written digits dataset, MNIST with the following architectures: FNNs with 1 and 2 hidden layers and CNNs with 3, 4, 6 and 8 convolutions and analyzed their accuracies. FNNs stand out to show that irrespective of the intensity of noise, they have a classification accuracy of more than 85%. In our analysis of CNNs with this data, the deceleration of classification accuracy of CNN with 8 convolutions was half of that of the rest of the CNNs. Correlation analysis and mathematical modelling of the accuracy trends act as roadmaps to these conclusions.
summary: Neural Networks are prone to having lesser accuracy in the classification of images with noise perturbation. Convolutional Neural Networks, CNNs are known for their unparalleled accuracy in the classification of benign images. But our study shows that they are extremely vulnerable to noise addition while Feed-forward Neural Networks, FNNs show very less correspondence with noise perturbation, maintaining their accuracy almost undisturbed. FNNs are observed to be better at classifying noise-intensive, single-channeled images that are just sheer noise to human vision. In our study, we have used the hand-written digits dataset, MNIST with the following architectures: FNNs with 1 and 2 hidden layers and CNNs with 3, 4, 6 and 8 convolutions and analyzed their accuracies. FNNs stand out to show that irrespective of the intensity of noise, they have a classification accuracy of more than 85%. In our analysis of CNNs with this data, the deceleration of classification accuracy of CNN with 8 convolutions was half of that of the rest of the CNNs. Correlation analysis and mathematical modelling of the accuracy trends act as roadmaps to these conclusions.
abstract_zh: 神经网络在对具有噪声扰动的图像进行分类时容易出现精度较低的情况。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 以其在良性图像分类方面无与伦比的准确性而闻名。但我们的研究表明，它们极易受到噪声添加的影响，而前馈神经网络、FNN 与噪声扰动的对应性非常低，从而保持其准确性几乎不受干扰。据观察，FNN 更擅长对噪声密集的单通道图像进行分类，而这些图像对人类视觉来说纯粹是噪声。在我们的研究中，我们使用了具有以下架构的手写数字数据集 MNIST：具有 1 和 2 个隐藏层的 FNN 以及具有 3、4、6 和 8 个卷积的 CNN，并分析了它们的准确性。 FNN 脱颖而出，表明无论噪声强度如何，它们的分类准确率都超过 85%。在我们使用这些数据对 CNN 进行分析时，具有 8 个卷积的 CNN 的分类准确率下降是其余 CNN 的一半。准确性趋势的相关分析和数学建模充当这些结论的路线图。

AI.tldr: 研究前馈神经网络（FNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）在灰度对抗图像中的性能偏差。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在良性图像分类中表现优异，但其对噪声扰动敏感；而FNN在噪声环境中可能更稳健，需验证其分类能力。
AI.method: 使用MNIST数据集，构建1层和2层FNN、3/4/6/8卷积层的CNN，分析不同噪声强度下的分类准确率，并进行相关性分析和数学建模。
AI.result: FNN在任意噪声强度下准确率均超85%，而8卷积层CNN的准确率下降速度仅为其他CNN的一半；FNN更擅长分类高噪声单通道图像。
AI.conclusion: FNN在灰度对抗图像中比CNN更稳健，CNN性能与卷积层数相关，相关性分析和数学模型可解释这一现象。

ai_content.method: 使用MNIST数据集，构建1层和2层FNN、3/4/6/8卷积层的CNN，分析不同噪声强度下的分类准确率，并进行相关性分析和数学建模。
ai_content.result: FNN在任意噪声强度下准确率均超85%，而8卷积层CNN的准确率下降速度仅为其他CNN的一半；FNN更擅长分类高噪声单通道图像。
ai_content.conclusion: FNN在灰度对抗图像中比CNN更稳健，CNN性能与卷积层数相关，相关性分析和数学模型可解释这一现象。

search_text: A study on the deviations in performance of FNNs and CNNs in the realm of grayscale adversarial images FNN 和 CNN 在灰度对抗图像领域的性能偏差研究 Neural Networks are prone to having lesser accuracy in the classification of images with noise perturbation. Convolutional Neural Networks, CNNs are known for their unparalleled accuracy in the classification of benign images. But our study shows that they are extremely vulnerable to noise addition while Feed-forward Neural Networks, FNNs show very less correspondence with noise perturbation, maintaining their accuracy almost undisturbed. FNNs are observed to be better at classifying noise-intensive, single-channeled images that are just sheer noise to human vision. In our study, we have used the hand-written digits dataset, MNIST with the following architectures: FNNs with 1 and 2 hidden layers and CNNs with 3, 4, 6 and 8 convolutions and analyzed their accuracies. FNNs stand out to show that irrespective of the intensity of noise, they have a classification accuracy of more than 85%. In our analysis of CNNs with this data, the deceleration of classification accuracy of CNN with 8 convolutions was half of that of the rest of the CNNs. Correlation analysis and mathematical modelling of the accuracy trends act as roadmaps to these conclusions. 神经网络在对具有噪声扰动的图像进行分类时容易出现精度较低的情况。卷积神经网络 (CNN) 以其在良性图像分类方面无与伦比的准确性而闻名。但我们的研究表明，它们极易受到噪声添加的影响，而前馈神经网络、FNN 与噪声扰动的对应性非常低，从而保持其准确性几乎不受干扰。据观察，FNN 更擅长对噪声密集的单通道图像进行分类，而这些图像对人类视觉来说纯粹是噪声。在我们的研究中，我们使用了具有以下架构的手写数字数据集 MNIST：具有 1 和 2 个隐藏层的 FNN 以及具有 3、4、6 和 8 个卷积的 CNN，并分析了它们的准确性。 FNN 脱颖而出，表明无论噪声强度如何，它们的分类准确率都超过 85%。在我们使用这些数据对 CNN 进行分析时，具有 8 个卷积的 CNN 的分类准确率下降是其余 CNN 的一半。准确性趋势的相关分析和数学建模充当这些结论的路线图。 研究前馈神经网络（FNN）和卷积神经网络（CNN）在灰度对抗图像中的性能偏差。 Durga Shree Nagabushanam,Steve Mathew,Chiranji Lal Chowdhary cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhefan Xu,Xiaoyang Zhan,Baihan Chen,Yumeng Xiu,Chenhao Yang,Kenji Shimada
title: A real-time dynamic obstacle tracking and mapping system for UAV navigation and collision avoidance with an RGB-D camera
title_zh: 使用 RGB-D 相机实现无人机导航和防撞的实时动态障碍物跟踪和绘图系统
comment: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: The real-time dynamic environment perception has become vital for autonomous robots in crowded spaces. Although the popular voxel-based mapping methods can efficiently represent 3D obstacles with arbitrarily complex shapes, they can hardly distinguish between static and dynamic obstacles, leading to the limited performance of obstacle avoidance. While plenty of sophisticated learning-based dynamic obstacle detection algorithms exist in autonomous driving, the quadcopter's limited computation resources cannot achieve real-time performance using those approaches. To address these issues, we propose a real-time dynamic obstacle tracking and mapping system for quadcopter obstacle avoidance using an RGB-D camera. The proposed system first utilizes a depth image with an occupancy voxel map to generate potential dynamic obstacle regions as proposals. With the obstacle region proposals, the Kalman filter and our continuity filter are applied to track each dynamic obstacle. Finally, the environment-aware trajectory prediction method is proposed based on the Markov chain using the states of tracked dynamic obstacles. We implemented the proposed system with our custom quadcopter and navigation planner. The simulation and physical experiments show that our methods can successfully track and represent obstacles in dynamic environments in real-time and safely avoid obstacles. Our software is available on GitHub as an open-source ROS package.

To address these issues, we propose a real-time dynamic obstacle tracking and mapping system for quadcopter obstacle avoidance using an RGB-D camera. The proposed system first utilizes a depth image with an occupancy voxel map to generate potential dynamic obstacle regions as proposals. With the obstacle region proposals, the Kalman filter and our continuity filter are applied to track each dynamic obstacle. Finally, the environment-aware trajectory prediction method is proposed based on the Markov chain using the states of tracked dynamic obstacles. We implemented the proposed system with our custom quadcopter and navigation planner. The simulation and physical experiments show that our methods can successfully track and represent obstacles in dynamic environments in real-time and safely avoid obstacles. Our software is available on GitHub as an open-source ROS package.
abstract_zh: 实时动态环境感知对于拥挤空间中的自主机器人至关重要。尽管流行的基于体素的映射方法可以有效地表示任意复杂形状的3D障碍物，但它们很难区分静态和动态障碍物，导致避障性能有限。虽然自动驾驶中存在大量复杂的基于学习的动态障碍物检测算法，但四轴飞行器有限的计算资源无法使用这些方法实现实时性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种使用 RGB-D 相机进行四轴飞行器避障的实时动态障碍物跟踪和绘图系统。所提出的系统首先利用具有占用体素图的深度图像来生成潜在的动态障碍物区域作为建议。通过障碍物区域建议，卡尔曼滤波器和我们的连续性滤波器被应用于跟踪每个动态障碍物。最后，利用跟踪的动态障碍物的状态，提出了基于马尔可夫链的环境感知轨迹预测方法。我们使用定制的四轴飞行器和导航规划器实施了拟议的系统。仿真和物理实验表明，我们的方法可以成功地实时跟踪和表示动态环境中的障碍物并安全地避开障碍物。我们的软件作为开源 ROS 包在 GitHub 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RGB-D相机的实时动态障碍物跟踪与地图构建系统，用于四旋翼无人机的导航和避障。
AI.motivation: 现有体素映射方法难以区分静态与动态障碍物，而基于学习的动态障碍物检测算法因计算资源限制无法在无人机上实时运行。
AI.method: 结合深度图像与占用体素地图生成动态障碍物候选区域，采用卡尔曼滤波和连续性滤波跟踪障碍物，并基于马尔可夫链进行环境感知轨迹预测。
AI.result: 在仿真和物理实验中验证了系统可实时跟踪动态障碍物并实现安全避障，软件已开源为ROS包。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无人机在动态环境中的导航提供了有效解决方案，平衡了实时性与计算效率。

authors_text: Virginia Fernandez,Walter Hugo Lopez Pinaya,Pedro Borges,Petru-Daniel Tudosiu,Mark S Graham,Tom Vercauteren,M Jorge Cardoso
title: Can segmentation models be trained with fully synthetically generated data?
title_zh: 可以使用完全综合生成的数据来训练分割模型吗？
comment: 12 pages, 2 (+2 App.) figures, 3 tables. Accepted at Simulation and Synthesis in Medical Imaging workshop (MICCAI 2022)
comments: 12 pages, 2 (+2 App.) figures, 3 tables. Accepted at Simulation and Synthesis in Medical Imaging workshop (MICCAI 2022)
abstract: In order to achieve good performance and generalisability, medical image segmentation models should be trained on sizeable datasets with sufficient variability. Due to ethics and governance restrictions, and the costs associated with labelling data, scientific development is often stifled, with models trained and tested on limited data. Data augmentation is often used to artificially increase the variability in the data distribution and improve model generalisability. Recent works have explored deep generative models for image synthesis, as such an approach would enable the generation of an effectively infinite amount of varied data, addressing the generalisability and data access problems. However, many proposed solutions limit the user's control over what is generated. In this work, we propose brainSPADE, a model which combines a synthetic diffusion-based label generator with a semantic image generator. Our model can produce fully synthetic brain labels on-demand, with or without pathology of interest, and then generate a corresponding MRI image of an arbitrary guided style. Experiments show that brainSPADE synthetic data can be used to train segmentation models with performance comparable to that of models trained on real data.
summary: In order to achieve good performance and generalisability, medical image segmentation models should be trained on sizeable datasets with sufficient variability. Due to ethics and governance restrictions, and the costs associated with labelling data, scientific development is often stifled, with models trained and tested on limited data. Data augmentation is often used to artificially increase the variability in the data distribution and improve model generalisability. Recent works have explored deep generative models for image synthesis, as such an approach would enable the generation of an effectively infinite amount of varied data, addressing the generalisability and data access problems. However, many proposed solutions limit the user's control over what is generated. In this work, we propose brainSPADE, a model which combines a synthetic diffusion-based label generator with a semantic image generator. Our model can produce fully synthetic brain labels on-demand, with or without pathology of interest, and then generate a corresponding MRI image of an arbitrary guided style. Experiments show that brainSPADE synthetic data can be used to train segmentation models with performance comparable to that of models trained on real data.
abstract_zh: 为了获得良好的性能和通用性，医学图像分割模型应该在具有足够可变性的大量数据集上进行训练。由于道德和治理的限制，以及与标记数据相关的成本，科学发展常常受到抑制，模型是在有限的数据上进行训练和测试的。数据增强通常用于人为地增加数据分布的可变性并提高模型的通用性。最近的工作探索了图像合成的深度生成模型，因为这种方法将能够有效生成无限量的不同数据，解决通用性和数据访问问题。然而，许多提出的解决方案限制了用户对生成内容的控制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BrainSPADE，一种将基于扩散的合成标签生成器与语义图像生成器相结合的模型。我们的模型可以按需生成完全合成的大脑标签，无论是否有感兴趣的病理学，然后生成任意引导风格的相应 MRI 图像。实验表明，brainSPADE 合成数据可用于训练分割模型，其性能与在真实数据上训练的模型相当。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨是否能用完全合成数据训练医学图像分割模型，并提出brainSPADE方法实现可控的合成数据生成。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分割需大量多样化数据，但真实数据获取受限于伦理、成本及标注难度，现有数据增强方法难以满足需求且控制性不足。
AI.method: 提出brainSPADE模型，结合扩散模型生成脑部标签与语义图像生成器，可按需生成带/不带病理的合成脑部标签及对应MRI图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用brainSPADE生成的合成数据训练的分割模型性能可与真实数据训练模型媲美。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效替代真实数据训练分割模型，为医学图像分析提供新途径，缓解数据获取难题。

Experiments show that brainSPADE synthetic data can be used to train segmentation models with performance comparable to that of models trained on real data. 为了获得良好的性能和通用性，医学图像分割模型应该在具有足够可变性的大量数据集上进行训练。由于道德和治理的限制，以及与标记数据相关的成本，科学发展常常受到抑制，模型是在有限的数据上进行训练和测试的。数据增强通常用于人为地增加数据分布的可变性并提高模型的通用性。最近的工作探索了图像合成的深度生成模型，因为这种方法将能够有效生成无限量的不同数据，解决通用性和数据访问问题。然而，许多提出的解决方案限制了用户对生成内容的控制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BrainSPADE，一种将基于扩散的合成标签生成器与语义图像生成器相结合的模型。我们的模型可以按需生成完全合成的大脑标签，无论是否有感兴趣的病理学，然后生成任意引导风格的相应 MRI 图像。实验表明，brainSPADE 合成数据可用于训练分割模型，其性能与在真实数据上训练的模型相当。 本文探讨是否能用完全合成数据训练医学图像分割模型，并提出brainSPADE方法实现可控的合成数据生成。 Virginia Fernandez,Walter Hugo Lopez Pinaya,Pedro Borges,Petru-Daniel Tudosiu,Mark S Graham,Tom Vercauteren,M Jorge Cardoso cs.CV

title: Mitigating Both Covariate and Conditional Shift for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 减轻域泛化的协变量和条件转变
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) aims to learn a model on several source domains, hoping that the model can generalize well to unseen target domains. The distribution shift between domains contains the covariate shift and conditional shift, both of which the model must be able to handle for better generalizability. In this paper, a novel DG method is proposed to deal with the distribution shift via Visual Alignment and Uncertainty-guided belief Ensemble (VAUE). Specifically, for the covariate shift, a visual alignment module is designed to align the distribution of image style to a common empirical Gaussian distribution so that the covariate shift can be eliminated in the visual space. For the conditional shift, we adopt an uncertainty-guided belief ensemble strategy based on the subjective logic and Dempster-Shafer theory. The conditional distribution given a test sample is estimated by the dynamic combination of that of source domains. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed method on four widely used datasets, i.e., Office-Home, VLCS, TerraIncognita, and PACS.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) aims to learn a model on several source domains, hoping that the model can generalize well to unseen target domains. The distribution shift between domains contains the covariate shift and conditional shift, both of which the model must be able to handle for better generalizability. In this paper, a novel DG method is proposed to deal with the distribution shift via Visual Alignment and Uncertainty-guided belief Ensemble (VAUE). Specifically, for the covariate shift, a visual alignment module is designed to align the distribution of image style to a common empirical Gaussian distribution so that the covariate shift can be eliminated in the visual space. For the conditional shift, we adopt an uncertainty-guided belief ensemble strategy based on the subjective logic and Dempster-Shafer theory. The conditional distribution given a test sample is estimated by the dynamic combination of that of source domains. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed method on four widely used datasets, i.e., Office-Home, VLCS, TerraIncognita, and PACS.
abstract_zh: 领域泛化（DG）旨在学习多个源领域的模型，希望该模型能够很好地泛化到未见过的目标领域。域之间的分布偏移包含协变量偏移和条件偏移，模型必须能够处理这两种偏移以获得更好的泛化性。本文提出了一种新颖的 DG 方法，通过视觉对齐和不确定性引导置信集成（VAUE）来处理分布偏移。具体来说，对于协变量偏移，设计了视觉对齐模块，将图像风格的分布与常见的经验高斯分布对齐，从而可以在视觉空间中消除协变量偏移。对于条件转变，我们采用基于主观逻辑和登普斯特-谢弗理论的不确定性引导的信念集合策略。给定测试样本的条件分布是通过源域的动态组合来估计的。进行了全面的实验，以证明所提出的方法在四个广泛使用的数据集（即 Office-Home、VLCS、TerraIncognita 和 PACS）上的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种领域泛化方法，解决协变量和条件偏移问题，以提升模型在未见目标领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理协变量和条件偏移，需新方法提升模型在未知目标领域的适应性。
AI.method: 设计视觉对齐模块消除协变量偏移，并采用不确定性引导的信念集成策略动态组合源领域条件分布，以处理条件偏移。
AI.result: 在Office-Home、VLCS、TerraIncognita和PACS四个数据集上，实验结果验证了方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: VAUE方法通过同时处理协变量和条件偏移，有效提升了领域泛化性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

title: PlaneSLAM: Plane-based LiDAR SLAM for Motion Planning in Structured 3D Environments
title_zh: PlaneSLAM：基于平面的 LiDAR SLAM，用于结构化 3D 环境中的运动规划
abstract: LiDAR sensors are a powerful tool for robot simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) in unknown environments, but the raw point clouds they produce are dense, computationally expensive to store, and unsuited for direct use by downstream autonomy tasks, such as motion planning. For integration with motion planning, it is desirable for SLAM pipelines to generate lightweight geometric map representations. Such representations are also particularly well-suited for man-made environments, which can often be viewed as a so-called "Manhattan world" built on a Cartesian grid. In this work we present a 3D LiDAR SLAM algorithm for Manhattan world environments which extracts planar features from point clouds to achieve lightweight, real-time localization and mapping. Our approach generates plane-based maps which occupy significantly less memory than their point cloud equivalents, and are suited towards fast collision checking for motion planning. By leveraging the Manhattan world assumption, we target extraction of orthogonal planes to generate maps which are more structured and organized than those of existing plane-based LiDAR SLAM approaches. We demonstrate our approach in the high-fidelity AirSim simulator and in real-world experiments with a ground rover equipped with a Velodyne LiDAR. For both cases, we are able to generate high quality maps and trajectory estimates at a rate matching the sensor rate of 10 Hz.
summary: LiDAR sensors are a powerful tool for robot simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) in unknown environments, but the raw point clouds they produce are dense, computationally expensive to store, and unsuited for direct use by downstream autonomy tasks, such as motion planning. For integration with motion planning, it is desirable for SLAM pipelines to generate lightweight geometric map representations. Such representations are also particularly well-suited for man-made environments, which can often be viewed as a so-called "Manhattan world" built on a Cartesian grid. In this work we present a 3D LiDAR SLAM algorithm for Manhattan world environments which extracts planar features from point clouds to achieve lightweight, real-time localization and mapping. Our approach generates plane-based maps which occupy significantly less memory than their point cloud equivalents, and are suited towards fast collision checking for motion planning. By leveraging the Manhattan world assumption, we target extraction of orthogonal planes to generate maps which are more structured and organized than those of existing plane-based LiDAR SLAM approaches. We demonstrate our approach in the high-fidelity AirSim simulator and in real-world experiments with a ground rover equipped with a Velodyne LiDAR. For both cases, we are able to generate high quality maps and trajectory estimates at a rate matching the sensor rate of 10 Hz.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 传感器是未知环境中机器人同步定位和建图 (SLAM) 的强大工具，但它们生成的原始点云密集，存储计算成本昂贵，并且不适合下游自主任务（例如运动规划）直接使用。为了与运动规划集成，SLAM 管道需要生成轻量级几何地图表示。这种表示方法也特别适合人造环境，通常可以将其视为建立在笛卡尔网格上的所谓“曼哈顿世界”。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种适用于曼哈顿世界环境的 3D LiDAR SLAM 算法，该算法从点云中提取平面特征，以实现轻量级、实时的定位和建图。我们的方法生成基于平面的地图，其占用的内存比其点云等效物少得多，并且适合运动规划的快速碰撞检查。通过利用曼哈顿世界假设，我们的目标是提取正交平面来生成比现有基于平面的 LiDAR SLAM 方法更加结构化和组织的地图。我们在高保真 AirSim 模拟器和配备 Velodyne LiDAR 的地面流动站的实际实验中展示了我们的方法。对于这两种情况，我们都能够以与 10 Hz 传感器速率匹配的速率生成高质量地图和轨迹估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于平面特征的3D LiDAR SLAM算法PlaneSLAM，用于结构化3D环境中的运动规划。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR点云数据存储成本高且不适用于运动规划任务，而结构化人-made环境（如曼哈顿世界）具有大量平面特征，需开发轻量化地图表示方法。
AI.method: 通过提取点云中的平面特征生成基于平面的轻量化地图，利用曼哈顿世界假设提取正交平面，提升地图结构化程度并支持快速碰撞检测。
AI.result: 在AirSim仿真和真实地面无人车实验中，算法以10Hz传感器速率生成高质量地图和轨迹估计，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PlaneSLAM通过平面特征提取实现了结构化、轻量化的3D SLAM，为运动规划提供了高效的地图表示，适用于曼哈顿世界等结构化环境。

title: Quantum Computing Methods for Supply Chain Management
title_zh: 供应链管理的量子计算方法
abstract: Quantum computing is expected to have transformative influences on many domains, but its practical deployments on industry problems are underexplored. We focus on applying quantum computing to operations management problems in industry, and in particular, supply chain management. Many problems in supply chain management involve large state and action spaces and pose computational challenges on classic computers. We develop a quantized policy iteration algorithm to solve an inventory control problem and demonstrative its effectiveness. We also discuss in-depth the hardware requirements and potential challenges on implementing this quantum algorithm in the near term. Our simulations and experiments are powered by \texttt{IBM Qiskit} and the \texttt{qBraid} system.
summary: Quantum computing is expected to have transformative influences on many domains, but its practical deployments on industry problems are underexplored. We focus on applying quantum computing to operations management problems in industry, and in particular, supply chain management. Many problems in supply chain management involve large state and action spaces and pose computational challenges on classic computers. We develop a quantized policy iteration algorithm to solve an inventory control problem and demonstrative its effectiveness. We also discuss in-depth the hardware requirements and potential challenges on implementing this quantum algorithm in the near term. Our simulations and experiments are powered by \texttt{IBM Qiskit} and the \texttt{qBraid} system.
abstract_zh: 量子计算预计将对许多领域产生变革性影响，但其在行业问题上的实际部署尚未得到充分探索。我们专注于将量子计算应用于工业中的运营管理问题，特别是供应链管理。供应链管理中的许多问题涉及大型状态和行动空间，并对经典计算机提出计算挑战。我们开发了一种量化策略迭代算法来解决库存控制问题并证明其有效性。我们还深入讨论了近期实施该量子算法的硬件要求和潜在挑战。我们的模拟和实验由 \texttt{IBM Qiskit} 和 \texttt{qBraid} 系统提供支持。

AI.tldr: 本文研究量子计算在供应链管理中的应用，提出量化策略迭代算法解决库存控制问题，并探讨其硬件需求与实施挑战。
AI.motivation: 经典计算机难以高效处理供应链管理中的大规模状态和动作空间问题，而量子计算具有潜在优势但工业应用尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 开发量化策略迭代算法，结合IBM Qiskit和qBraid系统进行仿真与实验验证。
AI.result: 验证了量化策略迭代算法在库存控制问题中的有效性，并分析了近期内量子算法实施的硬件限制与技术挑战。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算为供应链管理提供新思路，但需进一步解决硬件适配性与算法稳定性问题以实现实际应用。

search_text: Quantum Computing Methods for Supply Chain Management 供应链管理的量子计算方法 Quantum computing is expected to have transformative influences on many domains, but its practical deployments on industry problems are underexplored. We focus on applying quantum computing to operations management problems in industry, and in particular, supply chain management. Many problems in supply chain management involve large state and action spaces and pose computational challenges on classic computers. We develop a quantized policy iteration algorithm to solve an inventory control problem and demonstrative its effectiveness. We also discuss in-depth the hardware requirements and potential challenges on implementing this quantum algorithm in the near term. Our simulations and experiments are powered by \texttt{IBM Qiskit} and the \texttt{qBraid} system. 量子计算预计将对许多领域产生变革性影响，但其在行业问题上的实际部署尚未得到充分探索。我们专注于将量子计算应用于工业中的运营管理问题，特别是供应链管理。供应链管理中的许多问题涉及大型状态和行动空间，并对经典计算机提出计算挑战。我们开发了一种量化策略迭代算法来解决库存控制问题并证明其有效性。我们还深入讨论了近期实施该量子算法的硬件要求和潜在挑战。我们的模拟和实验由 \texttt{IBM Qiskit} 和 \texttt{qBraid} 系统提供支持。 本文研究量子计算在供应链管理中的应用，提出量化策略迭代算法解决库存控制问题，并探讨其硬件需求与实施挑战。 Hansheng Jiang,Zuo-Jun Max Shen,Junyu Liu quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.OC

title: Fast, Accurate and Object Boundary-Aware Surface Normal Estimation from Depth Maps
title_zh: 根据深度图快速、准确且具有对象边界感知的表面法线估计
abstract: This paper proposes a fast and accurate surface normal estimation method which can be directly used on depth maps (organized point clouds). The surface normal estimation process is formulated as a closed-form expression. In order to reduce the effect of measurement noise, the averaging operation is utilized in multi-direction manner. The multi-direction normal estimation process is reformulated in the next step to be implemented efficiently. Finally, a simple yet effective method is proposed to remove erroneous normal estimation at depth discontinuities. The proposed method is compared to well-known surface normal estimation algorithms. The results show that the proposed algorithm not only outperforms the baseline algorithms in term of accuracy, but also is fast enough to be used in real-time applications.
summary: This paper proposes a fast and accurate surface normal estimation method which can be directly used on depth maps (organized point clouds). The surface normal estimation process is formulated as a closed-form expression. In order to reduce the effect of measurement noise, the averaging operation is utilized in multi-direction manner. The multi-direction normal estimation process is reformulated in the next step to be implemented efficiently. Finally, a simple yet effective method is proposed to remove erroneous normal estimation at depth discontinuities. The proposed method is compared to well-known surface normal estimation algorithms. The results show that the proposed algorithm not only outperforms the baseline algorithms in term of accuracy, but also is fast enough to be used in real-time applications.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种快速准确的表面法线估计方法，可以直接用于深度图（组织点云）。表面法线估计过程被表述为封闭式表达式。为了减少测量噪声的影响，以多方向的方式利用平均运算。下一步将重新制定多方向法线估计过程，以便有效实施。最后，提出了一种简单而有效的方法来消除深度不连续处的错误法线估计。将所提出的方法与众所周知的表面法线估计算法进行比较。结果表明，所提出的算法不仅在精度方面优于基线算法，而且速度足够快，可以用于实时应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速、准确且考虑物体边界的表面法线估计方法，直接用于深度图。
AI.motivation: 现有表面法线估计方法在处理深度图噪声和实时性方面存在不足，需更高效且鲁棒的算法。
AI.method: 通过闭式表达式建模法线估计，结合多方向平均降噪，优化多方向计算效率，并提出深度不连续处的错误修正方法。
AI.result: 算法在精度上优于基线方法，且速度满足实时应用需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度图处理提供了高效准确的表面法线估计方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: Deep Plug-and-Play Prior for Hyperspectral Image Restoration
title_zh: 用于高光谱图像恢复的深度即插即用 Prior
abstract: Deep-learning-based hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration methods have gained great popularity for their remarkable performance but often demand expensive network retraining whenever the specifics of task changes. In this paper, we propose to restore HSIs in a unified approach with an effective plug-and-play method, which can jointly retain the flexibility of optimization-based methods and utilize the powerful representation capability of deep neural networks. Specifically, we first develop a new deep HSI denoiser leveraging gated recurrent convolution units, short- and long-term skip connections, and an augmented noise level map to better exploit the abundant spatio-spectral information within HSIs. It, therefore, leads to the state-of-the-art performance on HSI denoising under both Gaussian and complex noise settings. Then, the proposed denoiser is inserted into the plug-and-play framework as a powerful implicit HSI prior to tackle various HSI restoration tasks. Through extensive experiments on HSI super-resolution, compressed sensing, and inpainting, we demonstrate that our approach often achieves superior performance, which is competitive with or even better than the state-of-the-art on each task, via a single model without any task-specific training.
summary: Deep-learning-based hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration methods have gained great popularity for their remarkable performance but often demand expensive network retraining whenever the specifics of task changes. In this paper, we propose to restore HSIs in a unified approach with an effective plug-and-play method, which can jointly retain the flexibility of optimization-based methods and utilize the powerful representation capability of deep neural networks. Specifically, we first develop a new deep HSI denoiser leveraging gated recurrent convolution units, short- and long-term skip connections, and an augmented noise level map to better exploit the abundant spatio-spectral information within HSIs. It, therefore, leads to the state-of-the-art performance on HSI denoising under both Gaussian and complex noise settings. Then, the proposed denoiser is inserted into the plug-and-play framework as a powerful implicit HSI prior to tackle various HSI restoration tasks. Through extensive experiments on HSI super-resolution, compressed sensing, and inpainting, we demonstrate that our approach often achieves superior performance, which is competitive with or even better than the state-of-the-art on each task, via a single model without any task-specific training.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的高光谱图像（HSI）恢复方法因其卓越的性能而广受欢迎，但每当任务细节发生变化时，通常需要昂贵的网络重新训练。在本文中，我们提出通过有效的即插即用方法以统一的方法恢复HSI，该方法可以共同保留基于优化的方法的灵活性并利用深度神经网络强大的表示能力。具体来说，我们首先开发一种新的深度 HSI 降噪器，利用门控循环卷积单元、短期和长期跳跃连接以及增强的噪声级别图，以更好地利用 HSI 中丰富的空间频谱信息。因此，它在高斯和复杂噪声设置下实现了最先进的 HSI 去噪性能。然后，在处理各种 HSI 恢复任务之前，将所提出的降噪器作为强大的隐式 HSI 插入即插即用框架中。通过对 HSI 超分辨率、压缩感知和修复的大量实验，我们证明了我们的方法通常可以通过单个模型实现卓越的性能，在每个任务上都可以与最先进的技术竞争甚至更好，而无需任何特定于任务的训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的深度插件即用先验方法，用于高光谱图像（HSI）恢复任务，无需针对不同任务进行重新训练。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的HSI恢复方法在任务变化时需耗费高昂成本进行网络重训练，缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 设计融合门控循环卷积单元、长短时跳连与增强噪声图的HSI去噪器，并将其作为隐式先验嵌入插件框架，适配多种恢复任务。
AI.result: 在超分辨率、压缩感知和修复任务中，单模型性能优于或媲美现有最佳方法，且无需任务特定训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合深度学习表征能力与优化框架灵活性，为HSI恢复提供了高效通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Yu Hao,Haoyang Pei,Yixuan Lyu,Zhongzheng Yuan,John-Ross Rizzo,Yao Wang,Yi Fang
title: Understanding the Impact of Image Quality and Distance of Objects to Object Detection Performance
title_zh: 了解图像质量和物体距离对物体检测性能的影响
abstract: Deep learning has made great strides for object detection in images. The detection accuracy and computational cost of object detection depend on the spatial resolution of an image, which may be constrained by both the camera and storage considerations. Compression is often achieved by reducing either spatial or amplitude resolution or, at times, both, both of which have well-known effects on performance. Detection accuracy also depends on the distance of the object of interest from the camera. Our work examines the impact of spatial and amplitude resolution, as well as object distance, on object detection accuracy and computational cost. We develop a resolution-adaptive variant of YOLOv5 (RA-YOLO), which varies the number of scales in the feature pyramid and detection head based on the spatial resolution of the input image. To train and evaluate this new method, we created a dataset of images with diverse spatial and amplitude resolutions by combining images from the TJU and Eurocity datasets and generating different resolutions by applying spatial resizing and compression. We first show that RA-YOLO achieves a good trade-off between detection accuracy and inference time over a large range of spatial resolutions. We then evaluate the impact of spatial and amplitude resolutions on object detection accuracy using the proposed RA-YOLO model. We demonstrate that the optimal spatial resolution that leads to the highest detection accuracy depends on the 'tolerated' image size. We further assess the impact of the distance of an object to the camera on the detection accuracy and show that higher spatial resolution enables a greater detection range. These results provide important guidelines for choosing the image spatial resolution and compression settings predicated on available bandwidth, storage, desired inference time, and/or desired detection range, in practical applications.
summary: Deep learning has made great strides for object detection in images. The detection accuracy and computational cost of object detection depend on the spatial resolution of an image, which may be constrained by both the camera and storage considerations. Compression is often achieved by reducing either spatial or amplitude resolution or, at times, both, both of which have well-known effects on performance. Detection accuracy also depends on the distance of the object of interest from the camera. Our work examines the impact of spatial and amplitude resolution, as well as object distance, on object detection accuracy and computational cost. We develop a resolution-adaptive variant of YOLOv5 (RA-YOLO), which varies the number of scales in the feature pyramid and detection head based on the spatial resolution of the input image. To train and evaluate this new method, we created a dataset of images with diverse spatial and amplitude resolutions by combining images from the TJU and Eurocity datasets and generating different resolutions by applying spatial resizing and compression. We first show that RA-YOLO achieves a good trade-off between detection accuracy and inference time over a large range of spatial resolutions. We then evaluate the impact of spatial and amplitude resolutions on object detection accuracy using the proposed RA-YOLO model. We demonstrate that the optimal spatial resolution that leads to the highest detection accuracy depends on the 'tolerated' image size. We further assess the impact of the distance of an object to the camera on the detection accuracy and show that higher spatial resolution enables a greater detection range. These results provide important guidelines for choosing the image spatial resolution and compression settings predicated on available bandwidth, storage, desired inference time, and/or desired detection range, in practical applications.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在图像中的目标检测方面取得了巨大进步。对象检测的检测精度和计算成本取决于图像的空间分辨率，这可能受到相机和存储考虑因素的限制。压缩通常是通过降低空间分辨率或幅度分辨率或有时同时降低两者来实现的，这两者对性能都有众所周知的影响。检测精度还取决于感兴趣的物体距相机的距离。我们的工作研究了空间和幅度分辨率以及物体距离对物体检测精度和计算成本的影响。我们开发了 YOLOv5 的分辨率自适应变体（RA-YOLO），它根据输入图像的空间分辨率改变特征金字塔和检测头中的尺度数量。为了训练和评估这种新方法，我们通过组合来自 TJU 和 Eurocity 数据集的图像并通过应用空间调整大小和压缩生成不同的分辨率，创建了具有不同空间和幅度分辨率的图像数据集。我们首先证明 RA-YOLO 在大范围的空间分辨率下实现了检测精度和推理时间之间的良好权衡。然后，我们使用提出的 RA-YOLO 模型评估空间和幅度分辨率对目标检测精度的影响。我们证明，导致最高检测精度的最佳空间分辨率取决于“容忍”图像大小。我们进一步评估了物体到相机的距离对检测精度的影响，并表明更高的空间分辨率可以实现更大的检测范围。这些结果为在实际应用中根据可用带宽、存储、所需推理时间和/或所需检测范围选择图像空间分辨率和压缩设置提供了重要指导。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图像分辨率、压缩程度及物体与相机距离对目标检测性能的影响，并提出一种自适应分辨率的YOLOv5模型（RA-YOLO）以优化检测效果与计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测模型的性能受图像分辨率限制，而实际应用中需权衡存储、带宽与检测精度，同时物体距离对检测效果的影响尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 开发RA-YOLO模型，根据输入图像分辨率动态调整特征金字塔和检测头的尺度数量；构建包含多分辨率及压缩级别的数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: RA-YOLO在宽范围分辨率下实现检测精度与推理时间的平衡；最优分辨率取决于系统容忍的图像尺寸；高分辨率可提升远距离物体的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 实际应用中需根据带宽、存储、推理时间需求及检测范围选择图像分辨率与压缩策略，RA-YOLO为动态调整提供了有效方案。

search_text: Understanding the Impact of Image Quality and Distance of Objects to Object Detection Performance 了解图像质量和物体距离对物体检测性能的影响 Deep learning has made great strides for object detection in images. The detection accuracy and computational cost of object detection depend on the spatial resolution of an image, which may be constrained by both the camera and storage considerations. Compression is often achieved by reducing either spatial or amplitude resolution or, at times, both, both of which have well-known effects on performance. Detection accuracy also depends on the distance of the object of interest from the camera. Our work examines the impact of spatial and amplitude resolution, as well as object distance, on object detection accuracy and computational cost. We develop a resolution-adaptive variant of YOLOv5 (RA-YOLO), which varies the number of scales in the feature pyramid and detection head based on the spatial resolution of the input image. To train and evaluate this new method, we created a dataset of images with diverse spatial and amplitude resolutions by combining images from the TJU and Eurocity datasets and generating different resolutions by applying spatial resizing and compression. We first show that RA-YOLO achieves a good trade-off between detection accuracy and inference time over a large range of spatial resolutions. We then evaluate the impact of spatial and amplitude resolutions on object detection accuracy using the proposed RA-YOLO model. We demonstrate that the optimal spatial resolution that leads to the highest detection accuracy depends on the 'tolerated' image size. We further assess the impact of the distance of an object to the camera on the detection accuracy and show that higher spatial resolution enables a greater detection range. These results provide important guidelines for choosing the image spatial resolution and compression settings predicated on available bandwidth, storage, desired inference time, and/or desired detection range, in practical applications. 深度学习在图像中的目标检测方面取得了巨大进步。对象检测的检测精度和计算成本取决于图像的空间分辨率，这可能受到相机和存储考虑因素的限制。压缩通常是通过降低空间分辨率或幅度分辨率或有时同时降低两者来实现的，这两者对性能都有众所周知的影响。检测精度还取决于感兴趣的物体距相机的距离。我们的工作研究了空间和幅度分辨率以及物体距离对物体检测精度和计算成本的影响。我们开发了 YOLOv5 的分辨率自适应变体（RA-YOLO），它根据输入图像的空间分辨率改变特征金字塔和检测头中的尺度数量。为了训练和评估这种新方法，我们通过组合来自 TJU 和 Eurocity 数据集的图像并通过应用空间调整大小和压缩生成不同的分辨率，创建了具有不同空间和幅度分辨率的图像数据集。我们首先证明 RA-YOLO 在大范围的空间分辨率下实现了检测精度和推理时间之间的良好权衡。然后，我们使用提出的 RA-YOLO 模型评估空间和幅度分辨率对目标检测精度的影响。我们证明，导致最高检测精度的最佳空间分辨率取决于“容忍”图像大小。我们进一步评估了物体到相机的距离对检测精度的影响，并表明更高的空间分辨率可以实现更大的检测范围。这些结果为在实际应用中根据可用带宽、存储、所需推理时间和/或所需检测范围选择图像空间分辨率和压缩设置提供了重要指导。 本文研究图像分辨率、压缩程度及物体与相机距离对目标检测性能的影响，并提出一种自适应分辨率的YOLOv5模型（RA-YOLO）以优化检测效果与计算成本。 Yu Hao,Haoyang Pei,Yixuan Lyu,Zhongzheng Yuan,John-Ross Rizzo,Yao Wang,Yi Fang cs.CV

authors_text: Takashi Wada,Timothy Baldwin,Yuji Matsumoto,Jey Han Lau
title: Unsupervised Lexical Substitution with Decontextualised Embeddings
title_zh: 具有去上下文嵌入的无监督词汇替换
abstract: We propose a new unsupervised method for lexical substitution using pre-trained language models. Compared to previous approaches that use the generative capability of language models to predict substitutes, our method retrieves substitutes based on the similarity of contextualised and decontextualised word embeddings, i.e. the average contextual representation of a word in multiple contexts. We conduct experiments in English and Italian, and show that our method substantially outperforms strong baselines and establishes a new state-of-the-art without any explicit supervision or fine-tuning. We further show that our method performs particularly well at predicting low-frequency substitutes, and also generates a diverse list of substitute candidates, reducing morphophonetic or morphosyntactic biases induced by article-noun agreement.
summary: We propose a new unsupervised method for lexical substitution using pre-trained language models. Compared to previous approaches that use the generative capability of language models to predict substitutes, our method retrieves substitutes based on the similarity of contextualised and decontextualised word embeddings, i.e. the average contextual representation of a word in multiple contexts. We conduct experiments in English and Italian, and show that our method substantially outperforms strong baselines and establishes a new state-of-the-art without any explicit supervision or fine-tuning. We further show that our method performs particularly well at predicting low-frequency substitutes, and also generates a diverse list of substitute candidates, reducing morphophonetic or morphosyntactic biases induced by article-noun agreement.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用预先训练的语言模型进行词汇替换的新的无监督方法。与以前使用语言模型的生成能力来预测替代项的方法相比，我们的方法根据上下文和去上下文词嵌入的相似性（即单词在多个上下文中的平均上下文表示）来检索替代项。我们用英语和意大利语进行实验，结果表明我们的方法大大优于强大的基线，并在没有任何明确监督或微调的情况下建立了新的最先进技术。我们进一步表明，我们的方法在预测低频替代品方面表现得特别好，并且还生成了多样化的候选替代品列表，减少了由冠词-名词一致性引起的形态语音或形态句法偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的词替换方法，利用预训练语言模型的上下文和去上下文词向量相似性进行替换。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式方法依赖语言模型的生成能力，可能受上下文限制；需探索更有效的无监督词替换策略。
AI.method: 通过比较词在多上下文中的平均上下文表示与去上下文向量的相似性，检索语义相近的替换词，无需显式监督或微调。
AI.result: 在英意语料中显著优于现有基线，尤其擅长预测低频词替换，且减少形态或句法偏见。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需监督即可实现高性能词替换，为低频词处理和多样性候选生成提供新思路。

title: Learning Distinct and Representative Styles for Image Captioning
title_zh: 学习独特且有代表性的图像字幕风格
abstract: Over the years, state-of-the-art (SoTA) image captioning methods have achieved promising results on some evaluation metrics (e.g., CIDEr). However, recent findings show that the captions generated by these methods tend to be biased toward the "average" caption that only captures the most general mode (a.k.a, language pattern) in the training corpus, i.e., the so-called mode collapse problem. Affected by it, the generated captions are limited in diversity and usually less informative than natural image descriptions made by humans. In this paper, we seek to avoid this problem by proposing a Discrete Mode Learning (DML) paradigm for image captioning. Our innovative idea is to explore the rich modes in the training caption corpus to learn a set of "mode embeddings", and further use them to control the mode of the generated captions for existing image captioning models. Specifically, the proposed DML optimizes a dual architecture that consists of an image-conditioned discrete variational autoencoder (CdVAE) branch and a mode-conditioned image captioning (MIC) branch. The CdVAE branch maps each image caption to one of the mode embeddings stored in a learned codebook, and is trained with a pure non-autoregressive generation objective to make the modes distinct and representative. The MIC branch can be simply modified from an existing image captioning model, where the mode embedding is added to the original word embeddings as the control signal. In the experiments, we apply the proposed DML to two widely used image captioning models, Transformer and AoANet. The results show that the learned mode embedding successfully facilitates these models to generate high-quality image captions with different modes, further leading to better performance for both diversity and quality on the MSCOCO dataset.
summary: Over the years, state-of-the-art (SoTA) image captioning methods have achieved promising results on some evaluation metrics (e.g., CIDEr). However, recent findings show that the captions generated by these methods tend to be biased toward the "average" caption that only captures the most general mode (a.k.a, language pattern) in the training corpus, i.e., the so-called mode collapse problem. Affected by it, the generated captions are limited in diversity and usually less informative than natural image descriptions made by humans. In this paper, we seek to avoid this problem by proposing a Discrete Mode Learning (DML) paradigm for image captioning. Our innovative idea is to explore the rich modes in the training caption corpus to learn a set of "mode embeddings", and further use them to control the mode of the generated captions for existing image captioning models. Specifically, the proposed DML optimizes a dual architecture that consists of an image-conditioned discrete variational autoencoder (CdVAE) branch and a mode-conditioned image captioning (MIC) branch. The CdVAE branch maps each image caption to one of the mode embeddings stored in a learned codebook, and is trained with a pure non-autoregressive generation objective to make the modes distinct and representative. The MIC branch can be simply modified from an existing image captioning model, where the mode embedding is added to the original word embeddings as the control signal. In the experiments, we apply the proposed DML to two widely used image captioning models, Transformer and AoANet. The results show that the learned mode embedding successfully facilitates these models to generate high-quality image captions with different modes, further leading to better performance for both diversity and quality on the MSCOCO dataset.
abstract_zh: 多年来，最先进的 (SoTA) 图像字幕方法在一些评估指标（例如 CIDEr）上取得了有希望的结果。然而，最近的研究结果表明，这些方法生成的字幕往往偏向于“平均”字幕，仅捕获训练语料库中最一般的模式（又称语言模式），即所谓的模式崩溃问题。受其影响，生成的字幕多样性有限，并且通常比人类做出的自然图像描述信息量少。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像字幕的离散模式学习（DML）范式，试图避免这个问题。我们的创新想法是探索训练字幕语料库中的丰富模式来学习一组“模式嵌入”，并进一步使用它们来控制现有图像字幕模型生成的字幕的模式。具体来说，所提出的 DML 优化了由图像条件离散变分自动编码器 (CdVAE) 分支和模式条件图像字幕 (MIC) 分支组成的双架构。 CdVAE 分支将每个图像标题映射到存储在学习密码本中的模式嵌入之一，并使用纯非自回归生成目标进行训练，以使模式独特且具有代表性。 MIC 分支可以简单地从现有的图像字幕模型进行修改，其中模式嵌入作为控制信号添加到原始词嵌入中。在实验中，我们将所提出的 DML 应用于两种广泛使用的图像字幕模型：Transformer 和 AoANet。结果表明，学习的模式嵌入成功地促进了这些模型生成具有不同模式的高质量图像标题，进一步在 MSCOCO 数据集上实现更好的多样性和质量性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种离散模式学习（DML）框架，通过学习多样化的模式嵌入来提升图像描述生成的多样性和质量。
AI.motivation: 现有图像描述生成方法存在模式崩溃问题，生成的描述过于通用且缺乏多样性，无法达到人类描述的丰富性。
AI.method: 设计包含图像条件离散变分自编码器（CdVAE）分支和模式条件图像描述（MIC）分支的双分支架构，通过学习模式嵌入控制生成模式。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO数据集上，改进后的模型在多样性和描述质量指标上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: DML通过显式建模多样化模式嵌入，有效缓解了图像描述生成中的模式崩溃问题，提升了生成结果的丰富性与质量。

search_text: Learning Distinct and Representative Styles for Image Captioning 学习独特且有代表性的图像字幕风格 Over the years, state-of-the-art (SoTA) image captioning methods have achieved promising results on some evaluation metrics (e.g., CIDEr). However, recent findings show that the captions generated by these methods tend to be biased toward the "average" caption that only captures the most general mode (a.k.a, language pattern) in the training corpus, i.e., the so-called mode collapse problem. Affected by it, the generated captions are limited in diversity and usually less informative than natural image descriptions made by humans. In this paper, we seek to avoid this problem by proposing a Discrete Mode Learning (DML) paradigm for image captioning. Our innovative idea is to explore the rich modes in the training caption corpus to learn a set of "mode embeddings", and further use them to control the mode of the generated captions for existing image captioning models. Specifically, the proposed DML optimizes a dual architecture that consists of an image-conditioned discrete variational autoencoder (CdVAE) branch and a mode-conditioned image captioning (MIC) branch. The CdVAE branch maps each image caption to one of the mode embeddings stored in a learned codebook, and is trained with a pure non-autoregressive generation objective to make the modes distinct and representative. The MIC branch can be simply modified from an existing image captioning model, where the mode embedding is added to the original word embeddings as the control signal. In the experiments, we apply the proposed DML to two widely used image captioning models, Transformer and AoANet. The results show that the learned mode embedding successfully facilitates these models to generate high-quality image captions with different modes, further leading to better performance for both diversity and quality on the MSCOCO dataset. 多年来，最先进的 (SoTA) 图像字幕方法在一些评估指标（例如 CIDEr）上取得了有希望的结果。然而，最近的研究结果表明，这些方法生成的字幕往往偏向于“平均”字幕，仅捕获训练语料库中最一般的模式（又称语言模式），即所谓的模式崩溃问题。受其影响，生成的字幕多样性有限，并且通常比人类做出的自然图像描述信息量少。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于图像字幕的离散模式学习（DML）范式，试图避免这个问题。我们的创新想法是探索训练字幕语料库中的丰富模式来学习一组“模式嵌入”，并进一步使用它们来控制现有图像字幕模型生成的字幕的模式。具体来说，所提出的 DML 优化了由图像条件离散变分自动编码器 (CdVAE) 分支和模式条件图像字幕 (MIC) 分支组成的双架构。 CdVAE 分支将每个图像标题映射到存储在学习密码本中的模式嵌入之一，并使用纯非自回归生成目标进行训练，以使模式独特且具有代表性。 MIC 分支可以简单地从现有的图像字幕模型进行修改，其中模式嵌入作为控制信号添加到原始词嵌入中。在实验中，我们将所提出的 DML 应用于两种广泛使用的图像字幕模型：Transformer 和 AoANet。结果表明，学习的模式嵌入成功地促进了这些模型生成具有不同模式的高质量图像标题，进一步在 MSCOCO 数据集上实现更好的多样性和质量性能。 本文提出一种离散模式学习（DML）框架，通过学习多样化的模式嵌入来提升图像描述生成的多样性和质量。 Qi Chen,Chaorui Deng,Qi Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Sihong He,Yue Wang,Shuo Han,Shaofeng Zou,Fei Miao
title: A Robust and Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning Electric Vehicle Rebalancing Method in AMoD Systems
title_zh: AMoD 系统中鲁棒且受限的多智能体强化学习电动汽车再平衡方法
abstract: Electric vehicles (EVs) play critical roles in autonomous mobility-on-demand (AMoD) systems, but their unique charging patterns increase the model uncertainties in AMoD systems (e.g. state transition probability). Since there usually exists a mismatch between the training and test/true environments, incorporating model uncertainty into system design is of critical importance in real-world applications. However, model uncertainties have not been considered explicitly in EV AMoD system rebalancing by existing literature yet, and the coexistence of model uncertainties and constraints that the decision should satisfy makes the problem even more challenging. In this work, we design a robust and constrained multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework with state transition kernel uncertainty for EV AMoD systems. We then propose a robust and constrained MARL algorithm (ROCOMA) with robust natural policy gradients (RNPG) that trains a robust EV rebalancing policy to balance the supply-demand ratio and the charging utilization rate across the city under model uncertainty. Experiments show that the ROCOMA can learn an effective and robust rebalancing policy. It outperforms non-robust MARL methods in the presence of model uncertainties. It increases the system fairness by 19.6% and decreases the rebalancing costs by 75.8%.
summary: Electric vehicles (EVs) play critical roles in autonomous mobility-on-demand (AMoD) systems, but their unique charging patterns increase the model uncertainties in AMoD systems (e.g. state transition probability). Since there usually exists a mismatch between the training and test/true environments, incorporating model uncertainty into system design is of critical importance in real-world applications. However, model uncertainties have not been considered explicitly in EV AMoD system rebalancing by existing literature yet, and the coexistence of model uncertainties and constraints that the decision should satisfy makes the problem even more challenging. In this work, we design a robust and constrained multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework with state transition kernel uncertainty for EV AMoD systems. We then propose a robust and constrained MARL algorithm (ROCOMA) with robust natural policy gradients (RNPG) that trains a robust EV rebalancing policy to balance the supply-demand ratio and the charging utilization rate across the city under model uncertainty. Experiments show that the ROCOMA can learn an effective and robust rebalancing policy. It outperforms non-robust MARL methods in the presence of model uncertainties. It increases the system fairness by 19.6% and decreases the rebalancing costs by 75.8%.
abstract_zh: 电动汽车 (EV) 在自主按需出行 (AMoD) 系统中发挥着关键作用，但其独特的充电模式增加了 AMoD 系统中的模型不确定性（例如状态转换概率）。由于训练和测试/真实环境之间通常存在不匹配，因此将模型不确定性纳入系统设计在实际应用中至关重要。然而，现有文献尚未在EV AMoD系统再平衡中明确考虑模型不确定性，模型不确定性与决策应满足的约束条件并存使得问题更具挑战性。在这项工作中，我们为 EV AMoD 系统设计了一个鲁棒且受限的多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 框架，该框架具有状态转换内核不确定性。然后，我们提出了一种具有鲁棒自然策略梯度（RNPG）的鲁棒约束MARL算法（ROCOMA），该算法训练鲁棒的电动汽车再平衡策略，以在模型不确定性下平衡整个城市的供需比和充电利用率。实验表明，ROCOMA 可以学习有效且稳健的再平衡策略。在存在模型不确定性的情况下，它的性能优于非鲁棒 MARL 方法。它将系统公平性提高了 19.6%，重新平衡成本降低了 75.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒且受约束的多智能体强化学习框架，用于解决自动驾驶按需出行系统中电动车辆再平衡问题，考虑模型不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确考虑电动车辆再平衡中的模型不确定性及约束条件，导致实际应用中系统鲁棒性不足，需设计兼顾不确定性和约束的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含状态转移核不确定性的鲁棒约束多智能体强化学习框架，并提出结合鲁棒自然策略梯度的ROCOMA算法以训练再平衡策略。
AI.result: 实验表明ROCOMA在模型不确定性下优于非鲁棒方法，系统公平性提升19.6%，再平衡成本降低75.8%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效应对模型不确定性与约束，显著提升城市供需平衡与充电利用率，为AMoD系统提供更可靠的决策方案。

authors_text: Xihao Wang,Hao Shen,Hui Yu,Jielong Guo,Xian Wei
title: Hand and Arm Gesture-based Human-Robot Interaction: A Review
title_zh: 基于手和手臂手势的人机交互：回顾
abstract: The study of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) aims to create close and friendly communication between humans and robots. In the human-center HRI, an essential aspect of implementing a successful and effective HRI is building a natural and intuitive interaction, including verbal and nonverbal. As a prevalent nonverbally communication approach, hand and arm gesture communication happen ubiquitously in our daily life. A considerable amount of work on gesture-based HRI is scattered in various research domains. However, a systematic understanding of the works on gesture-based HRI is still lacking. This paper intends to provide a comprehensive review of gesture-based HRI and focus on the advanced finding in this area. Following the stimulus-organism-response framework, this review consists of: (i) Generation of human gesture(stimulus). (ii) Robot recognition of human gesture(organism). (iii) Robot reaction to human gesture(response). Besides, this review summarizes the research status of each element in the framework and analyze the advantages and disadvantages of related works. Toward the last part, this paper discusses the current research challenges on gesture-based HRI and provides possible future directions.
summary: The study of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) aims to create close and friendly communication between humans and robots. In the human-center HRI, an essential aspect of implementing a successful and effective HRI is building a natural and intuitive interaction, including verbal and nonverbal. As a prevalent nonverbally communication approach, hand and arm gesture communication happen ubiquitously in our daily life. A considerable amount of work on gesture-based HRI is scattered in various research domains. However, a systematic understanding of the works on gesture-based HRI is still lacking. This paper intends to provide a comprehensive review of gesture-based HRI and focus on the advanced finding in this area. Following the stimulus-organism-response framework, this review consists of: (i) Generation of human gesture(stimulus). (ii) Robot recognition of human gesture(organism). (iii) Robot reaction to human gesture(response). Besides, this review summarizes the research status of each element in the framework and analyze the advantages and disadvantages of related works. Toward the last part, this paper discusses the current research challenges on gesture-based HRI and provides possible future directions.
abstract_zh: 人机交互（HRI）的研究旨在建立人与机器人之间密切、友好的沟通。在以人为本的 HRI 中，实施成功且有效的 HRI 的一个重要方面是建立自然且直观的互动，包括言语和非言语。作为一种流行的非语言交流方式，手势交流在我们的日常生活中无处不在。基于手势的 HRI 的大量工作分散在各个研究领域。然而，对基于手势的 HRI 工作仍然缺乏系统的理解。本文旨在对基于手势的 HRI 进行全面回顾，并重点关注该领域的先进发现。遵循刺激-有机体-反应框架，本综述包括：（i）人类手势（刺激）的生成。 (ii) 机器人识别人类手势（有机体）。 (iii) 机器人对人类手势的反应（响应）。 Besides, this review summarizes the research status of each element in the framework and analyze the advantages and disadvantages of related works.最后一部分，本文讨论了基于手势的人机交互技术当前的研究挑战，并提出了未来可能的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过刺激-机体-反应框架，对基于手部和臂部手势的人机交互（HRI）进行系统性综述，总结现有研究并分析未来方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管手势交互在日常生活中普遍存在，但针对基于手势的HRI研究缺乏系统性梳理，亟需整合现有成果以明确技术挑战与发展方向。
AI.method: 基于刺激-机体-反应框架，从人类手势生成（刺激）、机器人识别（机体）和机器人响应（反应）三个维度展开综述，分析各环节研究现状及优缺点。
AI.result: 总结了手势生成、识别与响应的技术进展，指出现有方法在实时性、鲁棒性和跨场景适应性方面的不足，并提出了多模态融合、自适应算法等未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前基于手势的HRI仍面临环境干扰、复杂手势识别及自然交互体验等挑战，未来需结合深度学习与认知科学提升交互的智能化与人性化水平。

search_text: Hand and Arm Gesture-based Human-Robot Interaction: A Review 基于手和手臂手势的人机交互：回顾 The study of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) aims to create close and friendly communication between humans and robots. In the human-center HRI, an essential aspect of implementing a successful and effective HRI is building a natural and intuitive interaction, including verbal and nonverbal. As a prevalent nonverbally communication approach, hand and arm gesture communication happen ubiquitously in our daily life. A considerable amount of work on gesture-based HRI is scattered in various research domains. However, a systematic understanding of the works on gesture-based HRI is still lacking. This paper intends to provide a comprehensive review of gesture-based HRI and focus on the advanced finding in this area. Following the stimulus-organism-response framework, this review consists of: (i) Generation of human gesture(stimulus). (ii) Robot recognition of human gesture(organism). (iii) Robot reaction to human gesture(response). Besides, this review summarizes the research status of each element in the framework and analyze the advantages and disadvantages of related works. Toward the last part, this paper discusses the current research challenges on gesture-based HRI and provides possible future directions. 人机交互（HRI）的研究旨在建立人与机器人之间密切、友好的沟通。在以人为本的 HRI 中，实施成功且有效的 HRI 的一个重要方面是建立自然且直观的互动，包括言语和非言语。作为一种流行的非语言交流方式，手势交流在我们的日常生活中无处不在。基于手势的 HRI 的大量工作分散在各个研究领域。然而，对基于手势的 HRI 工作仍然缺乏系统的理解。本文旨在对基于手势的 HRI 进行全面回顾，并重点关注该领域的先进发现。遵循刺激-有机体-反应框架，本综述包括：（i）人类手势（刺激）的生成。 (ii) 机器人识别人类手势（有机体）。 (iii) 机器人对人类手势的反应（响应）。 Besides, this review summarizes the research status of each element in the framework and analyze the advantages and disadvantages of related works.最后一部分，本文讨论了基于手势的人机交互技术当前的研究挑战，并提出了未来可能的方向。 本文旨在通过刺激-机体-反应框架，对基于手部和臂部手势的人机交互（HRI）进行系统性综述，总结现有研究并分析未来方向。 Xihao Wang,Hao Shen,Hui Yu,Jielong Guo,Xian Wei cs.HC,cs.RO

title: Few-Shot Classification with Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对比学习进行少样本分类
abstract: A two-stage training paradigm consisting of sequential pre-training and meta-training stages has been widely used in current few-shot learning (FSL) research. Many of these methods use self-supervised learning and contrastive learning to achieve new state-of-the-art results. However, the potential of contrastive learning in both stages of FSL training paradigm is still not fully exploited. In this paper, we propose a novel contrastive learning-based framework that seamlessly integrates contrastive learning into both stages to improve the performance of few-shot classification. In the pre-training stage, we propose a self-supervised contrastive loss in the forms of feature vector vs. feature map and feature map vs. feature map, which uses global and local information to learn good initial representations. In the meta-training stage, we propose a cross-view episodic training mechanism to perform the nearest centroid classification on two different views of the same episode and adopt a distance-scaled contrastive loss based on them. These two strategies force the model to overcome the bias between views and promote the transferability of representations. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive results.
summary: A two-stage training paradigm consisting of sequential pre-training and meta-training stages has been widely used in current few-shot learning (FSL) research. Many of these methods use self-supervised learning and contrastive learning to achieve new state-of-the-art results. However, the potential of contrastive learning in both stages of FSL training paradigm is still not fully exploited. In this paper, we propose a novel contrastive learning-based framework that seamlessly integrates contrastive learning into both stages to improve the performance of few-shot classification. In the pre-training stage, we propose a self-supervised contrastive loss in the forms of feature vector vs. feature map and feature map vs. feature map, which uses global and local information to learn good initial representations. In the meta-training stage, we propose a cross-view episodic training mechanism to perform the nearest centroid classification on two different views of the same episode and adopt a distance-scaled contrastive loss based on them. These two strategies force the model to overcome the bias between views and promote the transferability of representations. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive results.
abstract_zh: 由顺序预训练和元训练阶段组成的两阶段训练范式已广泛应用于当前的少样本学习（FSL）研究中。其中许多方法使用自我监督学习和对比学习来实现新的最先进的结果。然而，FSL 训练范式的两个阶段中对比学习的潜力仍未得到充分开发。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于对比学习的框架，它将对比学习无缝地集成到两个阶段中，以提高少样本分类的性能。在预训练阶段，我们提出了特征向量与特征图和特征图与特征图形式的自监督对比损失，它使用全局和局部信息来学习良好的初始表示。在元训练阶段，我们提出了一种跨视图情景训练机制，对同一情景的两个不同视图进行最近质心分类，并基于它们采用距离缩放对比损失。这两种策略迫使模型克服观点之间的偏见并促进表示的可转移性。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法取得了有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的框架，通过在预训练和元训练阶段无缝集成对比学习，提升少样本分类性能。
AI.motivation: 当前少样本学习方法虽使用自监督和对比学习，但对比学习在预训练和元训练阶段的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 预训练阶段设计自监督对比损失（特征向量对特征图、特征图对特征图），利用全局与局部信息学习初始表示；元训练阶段提出跨视角的episode训练机制，结合距离缩放对比损失以提升表示迁移性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法取得具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过在两个训练阶段有效整合对比学习，所提框架显著提升了少样本分类的性能。

title: Neural Implicit Surface Reconstruction using Imaging Sonar
title_zh: 使用成像声纳进行神经隐式表面重建
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures. This paper is under review
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures. This paper is under review
abstract: We present a technique for dense 3D reconstruction of objects using an imaging sonar, also known as forward-looking sonar (FLS). Compared to previous methods that model the scene geometry as point clouds or volumetric grids, we represent the geometry as a neural implicit function. Additionally, given such a representation, we use a differentiable volumetric renderer that models the propagation of acoustic waves to synthesize imaging sonar measurements. We perform experiments on real and synthetic datasets and show that our algorithm reconstructs high-fidelity surface geometry from multi-view FLS images at much higher quality than was possible with previous techniques and without suffering from their associated memory overhead.
summary: We present a technique for dense 3D reconstruction of objects using an imaging sonar, also known as forward-looking sonar (FLS). Compared to previous methods that model the scene geometry as point clouds or volumetric grids, we represent the geometry as a neural implicit function. Additionally, given such a representation, we use a differentiable volumetric renderer that models the propagation of acoustic waves to synthesize imaging sonar measurements. We perform experiments on real and synthetic datasets and show that our algorithm reconstructs high-fidelity surface geometry from multi-view FLS images at much higher quality than was possible with previous techniques and without suffering from their associated memory overhead.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用成像声纳（也称为前视声纳 (FLS)）对物体进行密集 3D 重建的技术。与以前将场景几何建模为点云或体积网格的方法相比，我们将几何表示为神经隐式函数。此外，给定这样的表示，我们使用可微分体积渲染器来模拟声波的传播来合成成像声纳测量。我们对真实数据集和合成数据集进行了实验，结果表明，我们的算法可以从多视图 FLS 图像中重建高保真表面几何形状，其质量比以前的技术高得多，并且不会受到相关内存开销的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用成像声纳进行密集3D重建的新方法，通过神经隐式函数表示几何结构，并结合可微分体绘制器模拟声波传播。
AI.motivation: 传统点云或体素网格方法在处理声纳数据时存在内存开销大、重建质量低的问题，需更高效且高保真的重建方案。
AI.method: 采用神经隐式函数表示物体几何，设计可微分体绘制器模拟声波传播过程，通过多视角FLS图像合成声纳测量数据。
AI.result: 在真实与合成数据集上实现高保真表面重建，相比传统方法显著提升质量且降低内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: 神经隐式函数结合可微分渲染有效解决了声纳3D重建的精度与效率问题，为该领域提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种利用成像声纳进行密集3D重建的新方法，通过神经隐式函数表示几何结构，并结合可微分体绘制器模拟声波传播。
motivation: 传统点云或体素网格方法在处理声纳数据时存在内存开销大、重建质量低的问题，需更高效且高保真的重建方案。
method: 采用神经隐式函数表示物体几何，设计可微分体绘制器模拟声波传播过程，通过多视角FLS图像合成声纳测量数据。
result: 在真实与合成数据集上实现高保真表面重建，相比传统方法显著提升质量且降低内存消耗。
conclusion: 神经隐式函数结合可微分渲染有效解决了声纳3D重建的精度与效率问题，为该领域提供新思路。
search_text: Neural Implicit Surface Reconstruction using Imaging Sonar 使用成像声纳进行神经隐式表面重建 We present a technique for dense 3D reconstruction of objects using an imaging sonar, also known as forward-looking sonar (FLS). Compared to previous methods that model the scene geometry as point clouds or volumetric grids, we represent the geometry as a neural implicit function. Additionally, given such a representation, we use a differentiable volumetric renderer that models the propagation of acoustic waves to synthesize imaging sonar measurements. We perform experiments on real and synthetic datasets and show that our algorithm reconstructs high-fidelity surface geometry from multi-view FLS images at much higher quality than was possible with previous techniques and without suffering from their associated memory overhead. 我们提出了一种使用成像声纳（也称为前视声纳 (FLS)）对物体进行密集 3D 重建的技术。与以前将场景几何建模为点云或体积网格的方法相比，我们将几何表示为神经隐式函数。此外，给定这样的表示，我们使用可微分体积渲染器来模拟声波的传播来合成成像声纳测量。我们对真实数据集和合成数据集进行了实验，结果表明，我们的算法可以从多视图 FLS 图像中重建高保真表面几何形状，其质量比以前的技术高得多，并且不会受到相关内存开销的影响。 本文提出一种利用成像声纳进行密集3D重建的新方法，通过神经隐式函数表示几何结构，并结合可微分体绘制器模拟声波传播。 Mohamad Qadri,Michael Kaess,Ioannis Gkioulekas cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Delving Globally into Texture and Structure for Image Inpainting
title_zh: 全面深入研究图像修复的纹理和结构
comment: 9 pages, 10 figures, accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022
comments: 9 pages, 10 figures, accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022
abstract: Image inpainting has achieved remarkable progress and inspired abundant methods, where the critical bottleneck is identified as how to fulfill the high-frequency structure and low-frequency texture information on the masked regions with semantics. To this end, deep models exhibit powerful superiority to capture them, yet constrained on the local spatial regions. In this paper, we delve globally into texture and structure information to well capture the semantics for image inpainting. As opposed to the existing arts trapped on the independent local patches, the texture information of each patch is reconstructed from all other patches across the whole image, to match the coarsely filled information, specially the structure information over the masked regions. Unlike the current decoder-only transformer within the pixel level for image inpainting, our model adopts the transformer pipeline paired with both encoder and decoder. On one hand, the encoder captures the texture semantic correlations of all patches across image via self-attention module. On the other hand, an adaptive patch vocabulary is dynamically established in the decoder for the filled patches over the masked regions. Building on this, a structure-texture matching attention module anchored on the known regions comes up to marry the best of these two worlds for progressive inpainting via a probabilistic diffusion process. Our model is orthogonal to the fashionable arts, such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Attention and Transformer model, from the perspective of texture and structure information for image inpainting. The extensive experiments over the benchmarks validate its superiority. Our code is available at https://github.com/htyjers/DGTS-Inpainting.
summary: Image inpainting has achieved remarkable progress and inspired abundant methods, where the critical bottleneck is identified as how to fulfill the high-frequency structure and low-frequency texture information on the masked regions with semantics. To this end, deep models exhibit powerful superiority to capture them, yet constrained on the local spatial regions. Unlike the current decoder-only transformer within the pixel level for image inpainting, our model adopts the transformer pipeline paired with both encoder and decoder. On one hand, the encoder captures the texture semantic correlations of all patches across image via self-attention module. On the other hand, an adaptive patch vocabulary is dynamically established in the decoder for the filled patches over the masked regions. Building on this, a structure-texture matching attention module anchored on the known regions comes up to marry the best of these two worlds for progressive inpainting via a probabilistic diffusion process. Our model is orthogonal to the fashionable arts, such as Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Attention and Transformer model, from the perspective of texture and structure information for image inpainting. The extensive experiments over the benchmarks validate its superiority. Our code is available at https://github.com/htyjers/DGTS-Inpainting.
abstract_zh: 图像修复已经取得了显着的进展并激发了丰富的方法，其中关键的瓶颈是如何用语义实现遮蔽区域的高频结构和低频纹理信息。为此，深度模型表现出捕获它们的强大优势，但受限于局部空间区域。在本文中，我们全面深入研究纹理和结构信息，以更好地捕获图像修复的语义。与困在独立局部补丁上的现有技术相反，每个补丁的纹理信息是从整个图像上的所有其他补丁重建的，以匹配粗略填充的信息，特别是掩模区域上的结构信息。与当前用于图像修复的像素级内的仅解码器变压器不同，我们的模型采用与编码器和解码器配对的变压器管道。一方面，编码器通过自注意力模块捕获图像上所有块的纹理语义相关性。另一方面，在解码器中为屏蔽区域上的填充补丁动态建立自适应补丁词汇表。在此基础上，基于已知区域的结构-纹理匹配注意力模块将这两个世界中最好的结合起来，通过概率扩散过程进行渐进式修复。我们的模型与流行的艺术正交，如卷积神经网络（CNN）、注意力和变压器模型，从纹理和结构信息的角度进行图像修复。对基准的广泛实验验证了其优越性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/htyjers/DGTS-Inpainting 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局纹理与结构信息的图像修复方法，通过结合Transformer编码器-解码器框架和结构-纹理匹配注意力模块，提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复方法受限于局部区域的信息捕捉，难以同时有效恢复高频结构与低频纹理的语义信息，需探索全局信息交互机制。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器Transformer架构，编码器通过自注意力模块学习全局纹理语义，解码器构建动态自适应补丁词汇表，并引入结构-纹理匹配注意力模块实现渐进式修复。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，修复结果在结构完整性与纹理真实性上优于现有CNN、注意力模型及Transformer方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文从纹理与结构信息角度提出新颖框架，通过全局信息交互与概率扩散过程实现高质量图像修复，为该领域提供新思路。

title: Compose & Embellish: Well-Structured Piano Performance Generation via A Two-Stage Approach
title_zh: 作曲和修饰：通过两阶段方法生成结构良好的钢琴演奏
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2023
abstract: Even with strong sequence models like Transformers, generating expressive piano performances with long-range musical structures remains challenging. Meanwhile, methods to compose well-structured melodies or lead sheets (melody + chords), i.e., simpler forms of music, gained more success. Observing the above, we devise a two-stage Transformer-based framework that Composes a lead sheet first, and then Embellishes it with accompaniment and expressive touches. Such a factorization also enables pretraining on non-piano data. Our objective and subjective experiments show that Compose & Embellish shrinks the gap in structureness between a current state of the art and real performances by half, and improves other musical aspects such as richness and coherence as well.
summary: Even with strong sequence models like Transformers, generating expressive piano performances with long-range musical structures remains challenging. Meanwhile, methods to compose well-structured melodies or lead sheets (melody + chords), i.e., simpler forms of music, gained more success. Observing the above, we devise a two-stage Transformer-based framework that Composes a lead sheet first, and then Embellishes it with accompaniment and expressive touches. Such a factorization also enables pretraining on non-piano data. Our objective and subjective experiments show that Compose & Embellish shrinks the gap in structureness between a current state of the art and real performances by half, and improves other musical aspects such as richness and coherence as well.
abstract_zh: 即使使用像《变形金刚》这样强大的序列模型，生成具有长音域音乐结构的富有表现力的钢琴演奏仍然具有挑战性。与此同时，创作结构良好的旋律或主奏曲（旋律+和弦）的方法，即更简单的音乐形式，获得了更大的成功。观察上述情况，我们设计了一个基于 Transformer 的两阶段框架，首先组成主乐谱，然后用伴奏和表现力修饰它。这种分解还可以对非钢琴数据进行预训练。我们的客观和主观实验表明，Compose & Embellish 将当前艺术水平与真实表演之间的结构性差距缩小了一半，并提高了其他音乐方面，例如丰富性和连贯性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种两阶段Transformer框架，通过先创作lead sheet再添加伴奏和表现力，生成结构良好的钢琴演奏
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以生成兼具长距离结构和表现力的钢琴演奏，而lead sheet生成方法更成熟，需探索分阶段策略提升生成效果
AI.method: 两阶段Transformer架构：第一阶段生成旋律与和弦（lead sheet），第二阶段添加伴奏与表现细节，支持非钢琴数据预训练
AI.result: 结构完整性与真实演奏差距缩小50%，同时提升音乐丰富度与连贯性等指标
AI.conclusion: 分阶段生成策略有效解决复杂结构与表现力平衡问题，验证了音乐生成任务中模块化设计的优势

authors_text: Jakkrit Nukitram,Rattanaphon Chaisaen,Phairot Autthasan,Narumon Sengnon,Juraithip Wungsintaweekul,Wanumaidah Saengmolee,Dania Cheaha,Ekkasit Kumarnsit,Thapanun Sudhawiyangkul,Theerawit Wilaiprasitporn
title: ANet: Autoencoder-Based Local Field Potential Feature Extractor for Evaluating An Antidepressant Effect in Mice after Administering Kratom Leaf Extracts
title_zh: ANet：基于自动编码器的局部场电位特征提取器，用于评估服用卡痛叶提取物后小鼠的抗抑郁效果
abstract: Kratom (KT) typically exerts antidepressant (AD) effects. However, evaluating which form of KT extracts possesses AD properties similar to the standard AD fluoxetine (flu) remained challenging. Here, we adopted an autoencoder (AE)-based anomaly detector called ANet to measure the similarity of mice's local field potential (LFP) features that responded to KT leave extracts and AD flu. The features that responded to KT syrup had the highest similarity to those that responded to the AD flu at 85.62 $\pm$ 0.29%. This finding presents the higher feasibility of using KT syrup as an alternative substance for depressant therapy than KT alkaloids and KT aqueous, which are the other candidates in this study. Apart from the similarity measurement, we utilized ANet as a multi-task AE and evaluated the performance in discriminating multi-class LFP responses corresponding to the effect of different KT extracts and AD flu simultaneously. Furthermore, we visualized learned latent features among LFP responses qualitatively and quantitatively as t-SNE projection and maximum mean discrepancy distance, respectively. The classification results reported the accuracy and F1-score of 79.78 $\pm$ 0.39% and 79.53 $\pm$ 0.00%. In summary, the outcomes of this research might help therapeutic design devices for an alternative substance profile evaluation, such as Kratom-based form in real-world applications.

abstract_zh: 卡痛 (KT) 通常具有抗抑郁 (AD) 作用。然而，评估哪种形式的 KT 提取物具有与标准 AD 氟西汀 (flu) 相似的 AD 特性仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们采用了一种名为 ANet 的基于自动编码器 (AE) 的异常检测器来测量小鼠对 KT 叶子提取物和 AD 流感做出反应的局部场电位 (LFP) 特征的相似性。对 KT 糖浆做出反应的特征与对 AD 流感做出反应的特征具有最高的相似度，为 85.62 $\pm$ 0.29%。这一发现表明，与本研究中的其他候选药物 KT 生物碱和 KT 水剂相比，使用 KT 糖浆作为抑郁治疗的替代物质具有更高的可行性。除了相似性测量之外，我们还利用 ANet 作为多任务 AE，并同时评估了区分与不同 KT 提取物和 AD 流感效果相对应的多类 LFP 响应的性能。此外，我们将 LFP 响应中学习到的潜在特征定性和定量地分别可视化为 t-SNE 投影和最大平均差异距离。分类结果报告的准确度和 F1 分数分别为 79.78 $\pm$ 0.39% 和 79.53 $\pm$ 0.00%。总之，这项研究的结果可能有助于用于替代物质概况评估的治疗设计设备，例如现实应用中基于卡痛叶的形式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自编码器（ANet）的局部场电位（LFP）特征提取方法，用于评估大麻叶提取物对小鼠的抗抑郁效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以准确评估不同形式的大麻叶提取物与标准抗抑郁药氟西汀的相似性，需开发高效特征分析工具。
AI.method: 采用自编码器ANet作为异常检测器，通过LFP特征相似性度量及多任务分类（t-SNE可视化、最大均值差异距离）分析不同提取物效果。
AI.result: 大麻糖浆提取物与氟西汀的LFP特征相似度达85.62%，分类准确率79.78%，F1-score为79.53%。
AI.conclusion: ANet可有效评估替代物质（如大麻叶提取物）的抗抑郁潜力，为药物开发提供数据支持。
