authors_text: Yu-Chung Hsiao,Fedir Zubach,Gilles Baechler,Srinivas Sunkara,Victor Carbune,Jason Lin,Maria Wang,Yun Zhu,Jindong Chen
title: ScreenQA: Large-Scale Question-Answer Pairs over Mobile App Screenshots
title_zh: ScreenQA：移动应用程序屏幕截图上的大规模问答对
abstract: We introduce ScreenQA, a novel benchmarking dataset designed to advance screen content understanding through question answering. The existing screen datasets are focused either on low-level structural and component understanding, or on a much higher-level composite task such as navigation and task completion for autonomous agents. ScreenQA attempts to bridge this gap. By annotating 86k question-answer pairs over the RICO dataset, we aim to benchmark the screen reading comprehension capacity, thereby laying the foundation for vision-based automation over screenshots. Our annotations encompass full answers, short answer phrases, and corresponding UI contents with bounding boxes, enabling four subtasks to address various application scenarios. We evaluate the dataset's efficacy using both open-weight and proprietary models in zero-shot, fine-tuned, and transfer learning settings. We further demonstrate positive transfer to web applications, highlighting its potential beyond mobile applications.
summary: We introduce ScreenQA, a novel benchmarking dataset designed to advance screen content understanding through question answering. The existing screen datasets are focused either on low-level structural and component understanding, or on a much higher-level composite task such as navigation and task completion for autonomous agents. ScreenQA attempts to bridge this gap. By annotating 86k question-answer pairs over the RICO dataset, we aim to benchmark the screen reading comprehension capacity, thereby laying the foundation for vision-based automation over screenshots. Our annotations encompass full answers, short answer phrases, and corresponding UI contents with bounding boxes, enabling four subtasks to address various application scenarios. We evaluate the dataset's efficacy using both open-weight and proprietary models in zero-shot, fine-tuned, and transfer learning settings. We further demonstrate positive transfer to web applications, highlighting its potential beyond mobile applications.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 ScreenQA，这是一种新颖的基准测试数据集，旨在通过问答来促进屏幕内容的理解。现有的屏幕数据集要么侧重于低级结构和组件理解，要么侧重于更高级别的复合任务，例如自主代理的导航和任务完成。 ScreenQA 试图弥补这一差距。通过在 RICO 数据集上注释 86k 个问答对，我们的目标是对屏幕阅读理解能力进行基准测试，从而为基于视觉的屏幕截图自动化奠定基础。我们的注释包括完整答案、简短答案短语以及带有边界框的相应 UI 内容，从而支持四个子任务来解决各种应用场景。我们在零样本、微调和迁移学习设置中使用开放权重和专有模型来评估数据集的功效。我们进一步展示了向网络应用程序的积极转移，强调了其超越移动应用程序的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ScreenQA数据集，通过标注86k个移动应用截图的问答对，推动屏幕内容理解的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有屏幕数据集仅关注低层次结构分析或高层次导航任务，缺乏中间层次的阅读理解能力评估。
AI.method: 基于RICO数据集标注包含完整答案、短语及UI边界框的问答对，设计四个子任务，并在多种模型设置下评估效果。
AI.result: 验证了数据集的有效性，并证明其能力可正向迁移至网页应用，显示跨场景适用性。
AI.conclusion: ScreenQA为视觉驱动的自动化奠定了基础，未来可拓展至更多应用场景的屏幕理解任务。

authors_text: Kartik Anand Pant,Amod Hegde,K. V. Srinivas
title: Thompson Sampling with Virtual Helping Agents
title_zh: 汤普森采样与虚拟帮助代理
abstract: We address the problem of online sequential decision making, i.e., balancing the trade-off between exploiting the current knowledge to maximize immediate performance and exploring the new information to gain long-term benefits using the multi-armed bandit framework. Thompson sampling is one of the heuristics for choosing actions that address this exploration-exploitation dilemma. We first propose a general framework that helps heuristically tune the exploration versus exploitation trade-off in Thompson sampling using multiple samples from the posterior distribution. Utilizing this framework, we propose two algorithms for the multi-armed bandit problem and provide theoretical bounds on the cumulative regret. Next, we demonstrate the empirical improvement in the cumulative regret performance of the proposed algorithm over Thompson Sampling. We also show the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on real-world datasets. Contrary to the existing methods, our framework provides a mechanism to vary the amount of exploration/ exploitation based on the task at hand. Towards this end, we extend our framework for two additional problems, i.e., best arm identification and time-sensitive learning in bandits and compare our algorithm with existing methods.
summary: We address the problem of online sequential decision making, i.e., balancing the trade-off between exploiting the current knowledge to maximize immediate performance and exploring the new information to gain long-term benefits using the multi-armed bandit framework. Thompson sampling is one of the heuristics for choosing actions that address this exploration-exploitation dilemma. We first propose a general framework that helps heuristically tune the exploration versus exploitation trade-off in Thompson sampling using multiple samples from the posterior distribution. Utilizing this framework, we propose two algorithms for the multi-armed bandit problem and provide theoretical bounds on the cumulative regret. Next, we demonstrate the empirical improvement in the cumulative regret performance of the proposed algorithm over Thompson Sampling. We also show the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on real-world datasets. Contrary to the existing methods, our framework provides a mechanism to vary the amount of exploration/ exploitation based on the task at hand. Towards this end, we extend our framework for two additional problems, i.e., best arm identification and time-sensitive learning in bandits and compare our algorithm with existing methods.
abstract_zh: 我们解决在线顺序决策的问题，即利用多臂老虎机框架平衡利用当前知识以最大化即时性能和探索新信息以获得长期利益之间的权衡。汤普森采样是选择解决这种探索-利用困境的行动的启发法之一。我们首先提出了一个通用框架，该框架有助于使用后验分布中的多个样本启发式地调整汤普森采样中的探索与利用权衡。利用这个框架，我们提出了两种用于多臂老虎机问题的算法，并提供了累积遗憾的理论界限。接下来，我们证明了所提出的算法相对于汤普森采样在累积后悔性能方面的实证改进。我们还展示了所提出的算法在现实数据集上的有效性。与现有方法相反，我们的框架提供了一种机制，可以根据手头的任务改变探索/利用的数量。为此，我们将我们的框架扩展到两个额外的问题，即最佳手臂识别和强盗中的时间敏感学习，并将我们的算法与现有方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟辅助代理的汤普森采样框架，通过调整探索与利用的平衡来改进多臂老虎机问题的决策性能。
AI.motivation: 传统汤普森采样在探索与利用的权衡上缺乏灵活性，难以适应不同任务需求，需设计更通用的调参机制。
AI.method: 构建多后验样本框架实现动态权衡，提出两种算法并证明累积遗憾理论界，扩展至最佳臂识别和时敏学习场景。
AI.result: 算法在合成数据和真实数据集上均优于传统汤普森采样，理论分析与实证结果验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了任务自适应的探索控制机制，在多个变体问题中展现出更优性能和广泛适用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟辅助代理的汤普森采样框架，通过调整探索与利用的平衡来改进多臂老虎机问题的决策性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统汤普森采样在探索与利用的权衡上缺乏灵活性，难以适应不同任务需求，需设计更通用的调参机制。

ai_content.conclusion: 该框架提供了任务自适应的探索控制机制，在多个变体问题中展现出更优性能和广泛适用性。

search_text: Thompson Sampling with Virtual Helping Agents 汤普森采样与虚拟帮助代理 We address the problem of online sequential decision making, i.e., balancing the trade-off between exploiting the current knowledge to maximize immediate performance and exploring the new information to gain long-term benefits using the multi-armed bandit framework. Thompson sampling is one of the heuristics for choosing actions that address this exploration-exploitation dilemma. We first propose a general framework that helps heuristically tune the exploration versus exploitation trade-off in Thompson sampling using multiple samples from the posterior distribution. Utilizing this framework, we propose two algorithms for the multi-armed bandit problem and provide theoretical bounds on the cumulative regret. Next, we demonstrate the empirical improvement in the cumulative regret performance of the proposed algorithm over Thompson Sampling. We also show the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on real-world datasets. Contrary to the existing methods, our framework provides a mechanism to vary the amount of exploration/ exploitation based on the task at hand. Towards this end, we extend our framework for two additional problems, i.e., best arm identification and time-sensitive learning in bandits and compare our algorithm with existing methods. 我们解决在线顺序决策的问题，即利用多臂老虎机框架平衡利用当前知识以最大化即时性能和探索新信息以获得长期利益之间的权衡。汤普森采样是选择解决这种探索-利用困境的行动的启发法之一。我们首先提出了一个通用框架，该框架有助于使用后验分布中的多个样本启发式地调整汤普森采样中的探索与利用权衡。利用这个框架，我们提出了两种用于多臂老虎机问题的算法，并提供了累积遗憾的理论界限。接下来，我们证明了所提出的算法相对于汤普森采样在累积后悔性能方面的实证改进。我们还展示了所提出的算法在现实数据集上的有效性。与现有方法相反，我们的框架提供了一种机制，可以根据手头的任务改变探索/利用的数量。为此，我们将我们的框架扩展到两个额外的问题，即最佳手臂识别和强盗中的时间敏感学习，并将我们的算法与现有方法进行比较。 本文提出一种基于虚拟辅助代理的汤普森采样框架，通过调整探索与利用的平衡来改进多臂老虎机问题的决策性能。 Kartik Anand Pant,Amod Hegde,K. V. Srinivas cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Lossless SIMD Compression of LiDAR Range and Attribute Scan Sequences
title_zh: LiDAR 距离和属性扫描序列的无损 SIMD 压缩
abstract: As LiDAR sensors have become ubiquitous, the need for an efficient LiDAR data compression algorithm has increased. Modern LiDARs produce gigabytes of scan data per hour and are often used in applications with limited compute, bandwidth, and storage resources. We present a fast, lossless compression algorithm for LiDAR range and attribute scan sequences including multiple-return range, signal, reflectivity, and ambient infrared. Our algorithm -- dubbed "Jiffy" -- achieves substantial compression by exploiting spatiotemporal redundancy and sparsity. Speed is accomplished by maximizing use of single-instruction-multiple-data (SIMD) instructions. In autonomous driving, infrastructure monitoring, drone inspection, and handheld mapping benchmarks, the Jiffy algorithm consistently outcompresses competing lossless codecs while operating at speeds in excess of 65M points/sec on a single core. In a typical autonomous vehicle use case, single-threaded Jiffy achieves 6x compression of centimeter-precision range scans at 500+ scans per second. To ensure reproducibility and enable adoption, the software is freely available as an open source library.
summary: As LiDAR sensors have become ubiquitous, the need for an efficient LiDAR data compression algorithm has increased. Modern LiDARs produce gigabytes of scan data per hour and are often used in applications with limited compute, bandwidth, and storage resources. We present a fast, lossless compression algorithm for LiDAR range and attribute scan sequences including multiple-return range, signal, reflectivity, and ambient infrared. Our algorithm -- dubbed "Jiffy" -- achieves substantial compression by exploiting spatiotemporal redundancy and sparsity. Speed is accomplished by maximizing use of single-instruction-multiple-data (SIMD) instructions. In autonomous driving, infrastructure monitoring, drone inspection, and handheld mapping benchmarks, the Jiffy algorithm consistently outcompresses competing lossless codecs while operating at speeds in excess of 65M points/sec on a single core. In a typical autonomous vehicle use case, single-threaded Jiffy achieves 6x compression of centimeter-precision range scans at 500+ scans per second. To ensure reproducibility and enable adoption, the software is freely available as an open source library.
abstract_zh: 随着 LiDAR 传感器变得无处不在，对高效 LiDAR 数据压缩算法的需求也随之增加。现代激光雷达每小时产生千兆字节的扫描数据，通常用于计算、带宽和存储资源有限的应用程序。我们提出了一种用于 LiDAR 距离和属性扫描序列的快速无损压缩算法，包括多回程距离、信号、反射率和环境红外。我们的算法——被称为“Jiffy”——通过利用时空冗余和稀疏性实现了实质性压缩。速度是通过最大限度地使用单指令多数据 (SIMD) 指令来实现的。在自动驾驶、基础设施监控、无人机检查和手持测绘基准测试中，Jiffy 算法在压缩方面始终优于竞争对手的无损编解码器，同时在单核上以超过 65M 点/秒的速度运行。在典型的自动驾驶汽车用例中，单线程 Jiffy 以每秒 500 多次扫描的速度实现了厘米精度范围扫描的 6 倍压缩。为了确保可重复性并促进采用，该软件作为开源库免费提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Jiffy的无损SIMD压缩算法，用于压缩LiDAR的范围和属性扫描序列。
AI.motivation: 随着LiDAR传感器的普及，其产生的海量数据对存储、带宽和计算资源提出了更高要求，亟需高效压缩算法。
AI.method: 通过利用时空冗余性和稀疏性，结合SIMD指令集加速处理，实现对多返回范围、信号、反射率等属性的高效压缩。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶等场景中，Jiffy在单核上实现每秒65M点的压缩速度，达到6倍压缩率且优于现有无损编解码器。
AI.conclusion: Jiffy算法通过开源库形式发布，为资源受限场景下的LiDAR数据压缩提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Haoyu Ma,Zhe Wang,Yifei Chen,Deying Kong,Liangjian Chen,Xingwei Liu,Xiangyi Yan,Hao Tang,Xiaohui Xie
title: PPT: token-Pruned Pose Transformer for monocular and multi-view human pose estimation
title_zh: PPT：用于单眼和多视图人体姿势估计的 token-Pruned Pose Transformer
comment: ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/HowieMa/PPT
comments: ECCV 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/HowieMa/PPT
abstract: Recently, the vision transformer and its variants have played an increasingly important role in both monocular and multi-view human pose estimation. Considering image patches as tokens, transformers can model the global dependencies within the entire image or across images from other views. However, global attention is computationally expensive. As a consequence, it is difficult to scale up these transformer-based methods to high-resolution features and many views. In this paper, we propose the token-Pruned Pose Transformer (PPT) for 2D human pose estimation, which can locate a rough human mask and performs self-attention only within selected tokens. Furthermore, we extend our PPT to multi-view human pose estimation. Built upon PPT, we propose a new cross-view fusion strategy, called human area fusion, which considers all human foreground pixels as corresponding candidates. Experimental results on COCO and MPII demonstrate that our PPT can match the accuracy of previous pose transformer methods while reducing the computation. Moreover, experiments on Human 3.6M and Ski-Pose demonstrate that our Multi-view PPT can efficiently fuse cues from multiple views and achieve new state-of-the-art results.
summary: Recently, the vision transformer and its variants have played an increasingly important role in both monocular and multi-view human pose estimation. Considering image patches as tokens, transformers can model the global dependencies within the entire image or across images from other views. However, global attention is computationally expensive. As a consequence, it is difficult to scale up these transformer-based methods to high-resolution features and many views. In this paper, we propose the token-Pruned Pose Transformer (PPT) for 2D human pose estimation, which can locate a rough human mask and performs self-attention only within selected tokens. Furthermore, we extend our PPT to multi-view human pose estimation. Built upon PPT, we propose a new cross-view fusion strategy, called human area fusion, which considers all human foreground pixels as corresponding candidates. Experimental results on COCO and MPII demonstrate that our PPT can match the accuracy of previous pose transformer methods while reducing the computation. Moreover, experiments on Human 3.6M and Ski-Pose demonstrate that our Multi-view PPT can efficiently fuse cues from multiple views and achieve new state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 最近，视觉变换器及其变体在单眼和多视图人体姿态估计中发挥着越来越重要的作用。将图像补丁视为令牌，转换器可以对整个图像内或来自其他视图的图像之间的全局依赖关系进行建模。然而，全局注意力的计算成本很高。因此，很难将这些基于转换器的方法扩展到高分辨率特征和许多视图。在本文中，我们提出了用于 2D 人体姿势估计的 token-Pruned Pose Transformer (PPT)，它可以定位粗略的人体掩模并仅在选定的 token 内执行自注意力。此外，我们将 PPT 扩展到多视图人体姿势估计。基于 PPT，我们提出了一种新的跨视图融合策略，称为人体区域融合，它将所有人体前景像素视为相应的候选像素。 COCO 和 MPII 上的实验结果表明，我们的 PPT 可以与之前的位姿变换方法的精度相匹配，同时减少计算量。此外，在 Human 3.6M 和 Ski-Pose 上的实验表明，我们的多视图 PPT 可以有效地融合来自多个视图的线索，并实现新的最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PPT的token-Pruned Pose Transformer模型，用于单目和多视角人体姿态估计，旨在解决传统Transformer计算量大的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于Transformer的方法在处理高分辨率特征和多视角数据时存在计算成本高的问题，难以实现高效的人体姿态估计。
AI.method: 通过定位粗糙的人体掩码并仅在选定的token上进行自注意力计算，减少计算量；同时提出跨视角的人体区域融合策略，提升多视角姿态估计效果。
AI.result: 在COCO和MPII数据集上，PPT在保持精度的同时降低了计算量；在Human 3.6M和Ski-Pose数据集上，多视角PPT实现了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: PPT通过token剪枝和跨视角融合策略，在单目和多视角人体姿态估计任务中均表现出更高的效率和精度。

Built upon PPT, we propose a new cross-view fusion strategy, called human area fusion, which considers all human foreground pixels as corresponding candidates. Experimental results on COCO and MPII demonstrate that our PPT can match the accuracy of previous pose transformer methods while reducing the computation. Moreover, experiments on Human 3.6M and Ski-Pose demonstrate that our Multi-view PPT can efficiently fuse cues from multiple views and achieve new state-of-the-art results. 最近，视觉变换器及其变体在单眼和多视图人体姿态估计中发挥着越来越重要的作用。将图像补丁视为令牌，转换器可以对整个图像内或来自其他视图的图像之间的全局依赖关系进行建模。然而，全局注意力的计算成本很高。因此，很难将这些基于转换器的方法扩展到高分辨率特征和许多视图。在本文中，我们提出了用于 2D 人体姿势估计的 token-Pruned Pose Transformer (PPT)，它可以定位粗略的人体掩模并仅在选定的 token 内执行自注意力。此外，我们将 PPT 扩展到多视图人体姿势估计。基于 PPT，我们提出了一种新的跨视图融合策略，称为人体区域融合，它将所有人体前景像素视为相应的候选像素。 COCO 和 MPII 上的实验结果表明，我们的 PPT 可以与之前的位姿变换方法的精度相匹配，同时减少计算量。此外，在 Human 3.6M 和 Ski-Pose 上的实验表明，我们的多视图 PPT 可以有效地融合来自多个视图的线索，并实现新的最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种名为PPT的token-Pruned Pose Transformer模型，用于单目和多视角人体姿态估计，旨在解决传统Transformer计算量大的问题。 Haoyu Ma,Zhe Wang,Yifei Chen,Deying Kong,Liangjian Chen,Xingwei Liu,Xiangyi Yan,Hao Tang,Xiaohui Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Naveen Himthani,Malte Brunn,Jae-Youn Kim,Miriam Schulte,Andreas Mang,George Biros
title: CLAIRE -- Parallelized Diffeomorphic Image Registration for Large-Scale Biomedical Imaging Applications
title_zh: CLAIRE——大规模生物医学成像应用的并行微分形图像配准
abstract: We study the performance of CLAIRE -- a diffeomorphic multi-node, multi-GPU image-registration algorithm, and software -- in large-scale biomedical imaging applications with billions of voxels. At such resolutions, most existing software packages for diffeomorphic image registration are prohibitively expensive. As a result, practitioners first significantly downsample the original images and then register them using existing tools. Our main contribution is an extensive analysis of the impact of downsampling on registration performance. We study this impact by comparing full-resolution registrations obtained with CLAIRE to lower-resolution registrations for synthetic and real-world imaging datasets. Our results suggest that registration at full resolution can yield a superior registration quality -- but not always. For example, downsampling a synthetic image from $1024^3$ to $256^3$ decreases the Dice coefficient from 92% to 79%. However, the differences are less pronounced for noisy or low-contrast high-resolution images. CLAIRE allows us not only to register images of clinically relevant size in a few seconds but also to register images at unprecedented resolution in a reasonable time. The highest resolution considered is CLARITY images of size $2816\times3016\times1162$. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study on image registration quality at such resolutions.
summary: We study the performance of CLAIRE -- a diffeomorphic multi-node, multi-GPU image-registration algorithm, and software -- in large-scale biomedical imaging applications with billions of voxels. At such resolutions, most existing software packages for diffeomorphic image registration are prohibitively expensive. As a result, practitioners first significantly downsample the original images and then register them using existing tools. Our main contribution is an extensive analysis of the impact of downsampling on registration performance. We study this impact by comparing full-resolution registrations obtained with CLAIRE to lower-resolution registrations for synthetic and real-world imaging datasets. Our results suggest that registration at full resolution can yield a superior registration quality -- but not always. For example, downsampling a synthetic image from $1024^3$ to $256^3$ decreases the Dice coefficient from 92% to 79%. However, the differences are less pronounced for noisy or low-contrast high-resolution images. CLAIRE allows us not only to register images of clinically relevant size in a few seconds but also to register images at unprecedented resolution in a reasonable time. The highest resolution considered is CLARITY images of size $2816\times3016\times1162$. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study on image registration quality at such resolutions.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 CLAIRE（一种微分同胚多节点、多 GPU 图像配准算法和软件）在具有数十亿体素的大规模生物医学成像应用中的性能。在这样的分辨率下，大多数现有的微分同胚图像配准软件包都非常昂贵。因此，从业者首先对原始图像进行大幅缩减采样，然后使用现有工具对它们进行注册。我们的主要贡献是对下采样对配准性能的影响进行了广泛的分析。我们通过将 CLAIRE 获得的全分辨率配准与合成和真实世界成像数据集的低分辨率配准进行比较来研究这种影响。我们的结果表明，以全分辨率配准可以产生卓越的配准质量，但并非总是如此。例如，将合成图像从 $1024^3$ 降采样到 $256^3$ 会将 Dice 系数从 92% 降低到 79%。然而，对于有噪声或低对比度的高分辨率图像，差异不太明显。 CLAIRE 不仅使我们能够在几秒钟内配准临床相关尺寸的图像，而且能够在合理的时间内以前所未有的分辨率配准图像。考虑的最高分辨率是大小为 $2816\times3016\times1162$ 的 CLARITY 图像。据我们所知，这是首次针对此类分辨率下的图像配准质量进行研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了CLAIRE算法在大规模生物医学图像配准中的性能，特别是在处理数十亿体素的高分辨率图像时的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有软件在处理高分辨率图像时计算成本过高，通常需要先降采样再配准，但降采样可能影响配准质量。本文旨在分析降采样对配准效果的影响，并验证CLAIRE在高分辨率下的可行性。
AI.method: 通过对比CLAIRE在全分辨率与降采样后的合成及真实数据集上的配准结果，分析降采样对Dice系数等指标的影响，并测试CLAIRE处理超大尺寸图像（如2816×3016×1162）的效率。
AI.result: 全分辨率配准在多数情况下显著优于降采样（如合成图像Dice系数从92%降至79%），但噪声或低对比度图像差异较小。CLAIRE可在数秒内完成临床相关尺寸图像配准，并首次实现超大分辨率图像的高效配准。
AI.conclusion: CLAIRE通过并行化技术突破了传统软件的分辨率限制，为高精度生物医学图像配准提供了可行方案，尤其适用于需要保留细节的场景。

title: LEARNEST: LEARNing Enhanced Model-based State ESTimation for Robots using Knowledge-based Neural Ordinary Differential Equations
title_zh: 学习：使用基于知识的神经常微分方程学习增强型基于模型的机器人状态估计
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Accepted at 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, 1 table. Accepted at 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: State estimation is an important aspect in many robotics applications. In this work, we consider the task of obtaining accurate state estimates for robotic systems by enhancing the dynamics model used in state estimation algorithms. Existing frameworks such as moving horizon estimation (MHE) and the unscented Kalman filter (UKF) provide the flexibility to incorporate nonlinear dynamics and measurement models. However, this implies that the dynamics model within these algorithms has to be sufficiently accurate in order to warrant the accuracy of the state estimates. To enhance the dynamics models and improve the estimation accuracy, we utilize a deep learning framework known as knowledge-based neural ordinary differential equations (KNODEs). The KNODE framework embeds prior knowledge into the training procedure and synthesizes an accurate hybrid model by fusing a prior first-principles model with a neural ordinary differential equation (NODE) model. In our proposed LEARNEST framework, we integrate the data-driven model into two novel model-based state estimation algorithms, which are denoted as KNODE-MHE and KNODE-UKF. These two algorithms are compared against their conventional counterparts across a number of robotic applications; state estimation for a cartpole system using partial measurements, localization for a ground robot, as well as state estimation for a quadrotor. Through simulations and tests using real-world experimental data, we demonstrate the versatility and efficacy of the proposed learning-enhanced state estimation framework.

In this work, we consider the task of obtaining accurate state estimates for robotic systems by enhancing the dynamics model used in state estimation algorithms. Existing frameworks such as moving horizon estimation (MHE) and the unscented Kalman filter (UKF) provide the flexibility to incorporate nonlinear dynamics and measurement models. However, this implies that the dynamics model within these algorithms has to be sufficiently accurate in order to warrant the accuracy of the state estimates. To enhance the dynamics models and improve the estimation accuracy, we utilize a deep learning framework known as knowledge-based neural ordinary differential equations (KNODEs). The KNODE framework embeds prior knowledge into the training procedure and synthesizes an accurate hybrid model by fusing a prior first-principles model with a neural ordinary differential equation (NODE) model. In our proposed LEARNEST framework, we integrate the data-driven model into two novel model-based state estimation algorithms, which are denoted as KNODE-MHE and KNODE-UKF. These two algorithms are compared against their conventional counterparts across a number of robotic applications; state estimation for a cartpole system using partial measurements, localization for a ground robot, as well as state estimation for a quadrotor. Through simulations and tests using real-world experimental data, we demonstrate the versatility and efficacy of the proposed learning-enhanced state estimation framework.
abstract_zh: 状态估计是许多机器人应用中的一个重要方面。在这项工作中，我们考虑通过增强状态估计算法中使用的动力学模型来获得机器人系统的准确状态估计的任务。移动地平线估计 (MHE) 和无迹卡尔曼滤波器 (UKF) 等现有框架提供了整合非线性动力学和测量模型的灵活性。然而，这意味着这些算法中的动力学模型必须足够准确，才能保证状态估计的准确性。为了增强动力学模型并提高估计精度，我们利用了一种称为基于知识的神经常微分方程（KNODE）的深度学习框架。 KNODE 框架将先验知识嵌入到训练过程中，并通过将先验第一原理模型与神经常微分方程 (NODE) 模型融合来合成精确的混合模型。在我们提出的 LEARNEST 框架中，我们将数据驱动模型集成到两种新颖的基于模型的状态估计算法中，分别表示为 KNODE-MHE 和 KNODE-UKF。在许多机器人应用中将这两种算法与传统算法进行比较；使用部分测量的 cartpole 系统的状态估计、地面机器人的定位以及四旋翼飞行器的状态估计。通过使用真实世界实验数据的模拟和测试，我们证明了所提出的学习增强状态估计框架的多功能性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEARNEST框架，通过结合基于知识的神经常微分方程（KNODE）与模型预测算法（如MHE和UKF），提升机器人系统的状态估计精度。
AI.motivation: 传统状态估计方法（如MHE和UKF）依赖精确的动力学模型，而实际系统中模型误差常导致估计不准确，需通过数据驱动方法增强模型。
AI.method: 利用KNODE框架融合先验物理模型与神经网络，构建混合动力学模型，并将其集成到MHE和UKF中，形成KNODE-MHE和KNODE-UKF算法。
AI.result: 在Cartpole系统、地面机器人定位和四旋翼无人机的仿真与实验中，KNODE方法显著提升了状态估计的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习增强的模型预测方法，可有效提升机器人状态估计性能，为复杂动态系统的建模提供新思路。

Through simulations and tests using real-world experimental data, we demonstrate the versatility and efficacy of the proposed learning-enhanced state estimation framework. 状态估计是许多机器人应用中的一个重要方面。在这项工作中，我们考虑通过增强状态估计算法中使用的动力学模型来获得机器人系统的准确状态估计的任务。移动地平线估计 (MHE) 和无迹卡尔曼滤波器 (UKF) 等现有框架提供了整合非线性动力学和测量模型的灵活性。然而，这意味着这些算法中的动力学模型必须足够准确，才能保证状态估计的准确性。为了增强动力学模型并提高估计精度，我们利用了一种称为基于知识的神经常微分方程（KNODE）的深度学习框架。 KNODE 框架将先验知识嵌入到训练过程中，并通过将先验第一原理模型与神经常微分方程 (NODE) 模型融合来合成精确的混合模型。在我们提出的 LEARNEST 框架中，我们将数据驱动模型集成到两种新颖的基于模型的状态估计算法中，分别表示为 KNODE-MHE 和 KNODE-UKF。在许多机器人应用中将这两种算法与传统算法进行比较；使用部分测量的 cartpole 系统的状态估计、地面机器人的定位以及四旋翼飞行器的状态估计。通过使用真实世界实验数据的模拟和测试，我们证明了所提出的学习增强状态估计框架的多功能性和有效性。 本文提出LEARNEST框架，通过结合基于知识的神经常微分方程（KNODE）与模型预测算法（如MHE和UKF），提升机器人系统的状态估计精度。 Kong Yao Chee,M. Ani Hsieh cs.RO,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Lorenzo Giusti,Claudio Battiloro,Lucia Testa,Paolo Di Lorenzo,Stefania Sardellitti,Sergio Barbarossa
title: Cell Attention Networks
title_zh: 细胞注意力网络
abstract: Since their introduction, graph attention networks achieved outstanding results in graph representation learning tasks. However, these networks consider only pairwise relationships among nodes and then they are not able to fully exploit higher-order interactions present in many real world data-sets. In this paper, we introduce Cell Attention Networks (CANs), a neural architecture operating on data defined over the vertices of a graph, representing the graph as the 1-skeleton of a cell complex introduced to capture higher order interactions. In particular, we exploit the lower and upper neighborhoods, as encoded in the cell complex, to design two independent masked self-attention mechanisms, thus generalizing the conventional graph attention strategy. The approach used in CANs is hierarchical and it incorporates the following steps: i) a lifting algorithm that learns {\it edge features} from {\it node features}; ii) a cell attention mechanism to find the optimal combination of edge features over both lower and upper neighbors; iii) a hierarchical {\it edge pooling} mechanism to extract a compact meaningful set of features. The experimental results show that CAN is a low complexity strategy that compares favorably with state of the art results on graph-based learning tasks.
summary: Since their introduction, graph attention networks achieved outstanding results in graph representation learning tasks. However, these networks consider only pairwise relationships among nodes and then they are not able to fully exploit higher-order interactions present in many real world data-sets. In this paper, we introduce Cell Attention Networks (CANs), a neural architecture operating on data defined over the vertices of a graph, representing the graph as the 1-skeleton of a cell complex introduced to capture higher order interactions. In particular, we exploit the lower and upper neighborhoods, as encoded in the cell complex, to design two independent masked self-attention mechanisms, thus generalizing the conventional graph attention strategy. The approach used in CANs is hierarchical and it incorporates the following steps: i) a lifting algorithm that learns {\it edge features} from {\it node features}; ii) a cell attention mechanism to find the optimal combination of edge features over both lower and upper neighbors; iii) a hierarchical {\it edge pooling} mechanism to extract a compact meaningful set of features. The experimental results show that CAN is a low complexity strategy that compares favorably with state of the art results on graph-based learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 自推出以来，图注意力网络在图表示学习任务中取得了出色的成果。然而，这些网络仅考虑节点之间的成对关系，因此它们无法充分利用许多现实世界数据集中存在的高阶交互。在本文中，我们介绍了细胞注意力网络 (CAN)，这是一种对图顶点定义的数据进行操作的神经架构，将图表示为细胞复合体的 1-骨架，引入该细胞复合体来捕获更高阶的交互。特别是，我们利用细胞复合体中编码的下邻域和上邻域来设计两个独立的屏蔽自注意力机制，从而概括了传统的图注意力策略。 CAN 中使用的方法是分层的，它包含以下步骤： i) 从 {\it 节点特征} 学习 {\it 边缘特征} 的提升算法； ii）一种细胞注意机制，用于寻找下层和上层邻居的边缘特征的最佳组合； iii）分层{\it边缘池}机制来提取一组紧凑且有意义的特征。实验结果表明，CAN 是一种低复杂度策略，与基于图的学​​习任务的最新结果相比毫不逊色。

AI.tldr: 提出Cell Attention Networks（CANs）以解决传统图注意力网络无法有效捕捉高阶交互的问题，通过细胞复形结构建模图数据并设计分层注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 传统图注意力网络（GATs）仅考虑节点间的二元关系，难以捕捉现实数据中的高阶相互作用，需改进模型以利用更高阶的结构信息。
AI.method: 通过细胞复形结构表示图，设计上下邻域的掩码自注意力机制，分层提取边特征并进行池化，实现高阶交互建模。
AI.result: 实验表明CAN在保持低计算复杂度的同时，在图学习任务中优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CAN通过建模高阶交互提升图表示学习效果，为复杂数据提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaomin Lin,Nitin J. Sanket,Nare Karapetyan,Yiannis Aloimonos
title: OysterNet: Enhanced Oyster Detection Using Simulation
title_zh: OysterNet：使用模拟增强牡蛎检测
comment: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Oysters play a pivotal role in the bay living ecosystem and are considered the living filters for the ocean. In recent years, oyster reefs have undergone major devastation caused by commercial over-harvesting, requiring preservation to maintain ecological balance. The foundation of this preservation is to estimate the oyster density which requires accurate oyster detection. However, systems for accurate oyster detection require large datasets obtaining which is an expensive and labor-intensive task in underwater environments. To this end, we present a novel method to mathematically model oysters and render images of oysters in simulation to boost the detection performance with minimal real data. Utilizing our synthetic data along with real data for oyster detection, we obtain up to 35.1% boost in performance as compared to using only real data with our OysterNet network. We also improve the state-of-the-art by 12.7%. This shows that using underlying geometrical properties of objects can help to enhance recognition task accuracy on limited datasets successfully and we hope more researchers adopt such a strategy for hard-to-obtain datasets.
summary: Oysters play a pivotal role in the bay living ecosystem and are considered the living filters for the ocean. In recent years, oyster reefs have undergone major devastation caused by commercial over-harvesting, requiring preservation to maintain ecological balance. The foundation of this preservation is to estimate the oyster density which requires accurate oyster detection. However, systems for accurate oyster detection require large datasets obtaining which is an expensive and labor-intensive task in underwater environments. To this end, we present a novel method to mathematically model oysters and render images of oysters in simulation to boost the detection performance with minimal real data. Utilizing our synthetic data along with real data for oyster detection, we obtain up to 35.1% boost in performance as compared to using only real data with our OysterNet network. We also improve the state-of-the-art by 12.7%. This shows that using underlying geometrical properties of objects can help to enhance recognition task accuracy on limited datasets successfully and we hope more researchers adopt such a strategy for hard-to-obtain datasets.
abstract_zh: Oysters play a pivotal role in the bay living ecosystem and are considered the living filters for the ocean.近年来，牡蛎礁因商业过度捕捞而遭受严重破坏，需要保护以维持生态平衡。 The foundation of this preservation is to estimate the oyster density which requires accurate oyster detection.然而，用于精确牡蛎检测的系统需要获取大量数据集，这在水下环境中是一项昂贵且劳动密集型的任务。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来对牡蛎进行数学建模并在模拟中渲染牡蛎图像，以用最少的实际数据提高检测性能。与仅使用 OysterNet 网络的真实数据相比，利用我们的合成数据和真实数据进行牡蛎检测，性能提升高达 35.1%。 We also improve the state-of-the-art by 12.7%.这表明，利用对象的底层几何属性可以帮助成功地提高有限数据集上的识别任务准确性，我们希望更多的研究人员对难以获得的数据集采用这种策略。

AI.tldr: 提出OysterNet网络，通过模拟生成数据提升牡蛎检测性能
AI.motivation: 真实环境中获取大量牡蛎数据成本高且困难，需在有限数据下提升检测准确率以保护生态
AI.method: 数学建模生成合成牡蛎图像，结合真实数据训练OysterNet网络
AI.result: 检测性能提升35.1%，优于现有方法12.7%
AI.conclusion: 利用几何特性可有效提升有限数据集的识别准确率，建议在数据获取困难的领域应用此方法

title: Confidence-Guided Data Augmentation for Improved Semi-Supervised Training
title_zh: 用于改进半监督训练的置信引导数据增强
abstract: We propose a new strategy to improve the accuracy and robustness of image classification. First, we train a baseline CNN model. Then, we identify challenging regions in the feature space by identifying all misclassified samples, and correctly classified samples with low confidence values. These samples are then used to train a Variational AutoEncoder (VAE). Next, the VAE is used to generate synthetic images. Finally, the generated synthetic images are used in conjunction with the original labeled images to train a new model in a semi-supervised fashion. Empirical results on benchmark datasets such as STL10 and CIFAR-100 show that the synthetically generated samples can further diversify the training data, leading to improvement in image classification in comparison with the fully supervised baseline approaches using only the available data.
summary: We propose a new strategy to improve the accuracy and robustness of image classification. First, we train a baseline CNN model. Then, we identify challenging regions in the feature space by identifying all misclassified samples, and correctly classified samples with low confidence values. These samples are then used to train a Variational AutoEncoder (VAE). Next, the VAE is used to generate synthetic images. Finally, the generated synthetic images are used in conjunction with the original labeled images to train a new model in a semi-supervised fashion. Empirical results on benchmark datasets such as STL10 and CIFAR-100 show that the synthetically generated samples can further diversify the training data, leading to improvement in image classification in comparison with the fully supervised baseline approaches using only the available data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新策略来提高图像分类的准确性和鲁棒性。首先，我们训练一个基线 CNN 模型。 Then, we identify challenging regions in the feature space by identifying all misclassified samples, and correctly classified samples with low confidence values.然后使用这些样本来训练变分自动编码器 (VAE)。接下来，VAE 用于生成合成图像。最后，生成的合成图像与原始标记图像结合使用，以半监督方式训练新模型。 STL10 和 CIFAR-100 等基准数据集的实证结果表明，综合生成的样本可以进一步使训练数据多样化，与仅使用可用数据的完全监督基线方法相比，可以改善图像分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于置信度引导的数据增强策略，通过生成合成图像提升半监督图像分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法在利用未标记数据时效果有限，且传统数据增强难以有效覆盖特征空间中的困难区域，导致模型鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 首先训练基线CNN模型，筛选误分类样本及低置信度正确分类样本；利用这些样本训练变分自编码器（VAE）生成合成图像，再结合原始标注数据进行半监督训练。
AI.result: 在STL10和CIFAR-100数据集上，合成数据显著提升分类准确率，优于仅使用原始数据的全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦困难样本生成合成数据，可有效增强半监督训练的数据多样性，提升模型性能。

ai_content_json.method: 首先训练基线CNN模型，筛选误分类样本及低置信度正确分类样本；利用这些样本训练变分自编码器（VAE）生成合成图像，再结合原始标注数据进行半监督训练。
ai_content_json.result: 在STL10和CIFAR-100数据集上，合成数据显著提升分类准确率，优于仅使用原始数据的全监督方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过聚焦困难样本生成合成数据，可有效增强半监督训练的数据多样性，提升模型性能。

search_text: Confidence-Guided Data Augmentation for Improved Semi-Supervised Training 用于改进半监督训练的置信引导数据增强 We propose a new strategy to improve the accuracy and robustness of image classification. First, we train a baseline CNN model. Then, we identify challenging regions in the feature space by identifying all misclassified samples, and correctly classified samples with low confidence values. These samples are then used to train a Variational AutoEncoder (VAE). Next, the VAE is used to generate synthetic images. Finally, the generated synthetic images are used in conjunction with the original labeled images to train a new model in a semi-supervised fashion. Empirical results on benchmark datasets such as STL10 and CIFAR-100 show that the synthetically generated samples can further diversify the training data, leading to improvement in image classification in comparison with the fully supervised baseline approaches using only the available data. 我们提出了一种新策略来提高图像分类的准确性和鲁棒性。首先，我们训练一个基线 CNN 模型。 Then, we identify challenging regions in the feature space by identifying all misclassified samples, and correctly classified samples with low confidence values.然后使用这些样本来训练变分自动编码器 (VAE)。接下来，VAE 用于生成合成图像。最后，生成的合成图像与原始标记图像结合使用，以半监督方式训练新模型。 STL10 和 CIFAR-100 等基准数据集的实证结果表明，综合生成的样本可以进一步使训练数据多样化，与仅使用可用数据的完全监督基线方法相比，可以改善图像分类。 本文提出一种基于置信度引导的数据增强策略，通过生成合成图像提升半监督图像分类的性能。 Fadoua Khmaissia,Hichem Frigui cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Banafshe Felfeliyan,Abhilash Hareendranathan,Gregor Kuntze,Stephanie Wichuk,Nils D. Forkert,Jacob L. Jaremko,Janet L. Ronsky
title: Weakly Supervised Medical Image Segmentation With Soft Labels and Noise Robust Loss
title_zh: 具有软标签和噪声鲁棒损失的弱监督医学图像分割
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning algorithms have led to significant benefits for solving many medical image analysis problems. Training deep learning models commonly requires large datasets with expert-labeled annotations. However, acquiring expert-labeled annotation is not only expensive but also is subjective, error-prone, and inter-/intra- observer variability introduces noise to labels. This is particularly a problem when using deep learning models for segmenting medical images due to the ambiguous anatomical boundaries. Image-based medical diagnosis tools using deep learning models trained with incorrect segmentation labels can lead to false diagnoses and treatment suggestions. Multi-rater annotations might be better suited to train deep learning models with small training sets compared to single-rater annotations. The aim of this paper was to develop and evaluate a method to generate probabilistic labels based on multi-rater annotations and anatomical knowledge of the lesion features in MRI and a method to train segmentation models using probabilistic labels using normalized active-passive loss as a "noise-tolerant loss" function. The model was evaluated by comparing it to binary ground truth for 17 knees MRI scans for clinical segmentation and detection of bone marrow lesions (BML). The proposed method successfully improved precision 14, recall 22, and Dice score 8 percent compared to a binary cross-entropy loss function. Overall, the results of this work suggest that the proposed normalized active-passive loss using soft labels successfully mitigated the effects of noisy labels.

Training deep learning models commonly requires large datasets with expert-labeled annotations. However, acquiring expert-labeled annotation is not only expensive but also is subjective, error-prone, and inter-/intra- observer variability introduces noise to labels. This is particularly a problem when using deep learning models for segmenting medical images due to the ambiguous anatomical boundaries. Image-based medical diagnosis tools using deep learning models trained with incorrect segmentation labels can lead to false diagnoses and treatment suggestions. Multi-rater annotations might be better suited to train deep learning models with small training sets compared to single-rater annotations. The aim of this paper was to develop and evaluate a method to generate probabilistic labels based on multi-rater annotations and anatomical knowledge of the lesion features in MRI and a method to train segmentation models using probabilistic labels using normalized active-passive loss as a "noise-tolerant loss" function. The model was evaluated by comparing it to binary ground truth for 17 knees MRI scans for clinical segmentation and detection of bone marrow lesions (BML). The proposed method successfully improved precision 14, recall 22, and Dice score 8 percent compared to a binary cross-entropy loss function. Overall, the results of this work suggest that the proposed normalized active-passive loss using soft labels successfully mitigated the effects of noisy labels.
abstract_zh: 深度学习算法的最新进展为解决许多医学图像分析问题带来了显着的好处。训练深度学习模型通常需要带有专家标记注释的大型数据集。然而，获取专家标记的注释不仅成本高昂，而且主观性强、容易出错，并且观察者间/观察者内的变异性会给标签带来噪音。由于解剖边界不明确，当使用深度学习模型分割医学图像时，这尤其是一个问题。基于图像的医疗诊断工具使用经过不正确的分割标签训练的深度学习模型，可能会导致错误的诊断和治疗建议。与单评估者注释相比，多评估者注释可能更适合使用小型训练集训练深度学习模型。本文的目的是开发和评估一种基于多评估者注释和 MRI 中病变特征的解剖知识生成概率标签的方法，以及一种使用概率标签训练分割模型的方法，使用归一化主动-被动损失作为“噪声容忍损失”函数。通过将模型与 17 个膝盖 MRI 扫描的二元真实值进行比较来评估该模型，以进行临床分割和骨髓病变 (BML) 检测。与二元交叉熵损失函数相比，所提出的方法成功地将精度提高了 14，召回率提高了 22，Dice 得分提高了 8%。总的来说，这项工作的结果表明，所提出的使用软标签的归一化主动-被动损失成功地减轻了噪声标签的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督医学图像分割方法，通过软标签和噪声鲁棒损失函数解决标注噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割依赖专家标注数据，但标注成本高且存在主观性与噪声，导致模型训练效果受限。
AI.method: 基于多标注者注释生成概率标签，结合解剖知识设计归一化主动-被动损失函数作为噪声容忍损失。
AI.result: 在17例膝关节MRI扫描中，相比二元交叉熵损失，精度提升14%，召回率提升22%，Dice分数提升8%。
AI.conclusion: 软标签与归一化主动-被动损失有效缓解了噪声标注对分割模型的影响，提升临床分割性能。

title: Deep learning for reconstructing protein structures from cryo-EM density maps: recent advances and future directions
title_zh: 从冷冻电镜密度图重建蛋白质结构的深度学习：最新进展和未来方向
comment: ef:Current Opinion in Structural Biology Volume 79, April 2023, 102536
comments: ef:Current Opinion in Structural Biology Volume 79, April 2023, 102536
abstract: Cryo-Electron Microscopy (cryo-EM) has emerged as a key technology to determine the structure of proteins, particularly large protein complexes and assemblies in recent years. A key challenge in cryo-EM data analysis is to automatically reconstruct accurate protein structures from cryo-EM density maps. In this review, we briefly overview various deep learning methods for building protein structures from cryo-EM density maps, analyze their impact, and discuss the challenges of preparing high-quality data sets for training deep learning models. Looking into the future, more advanced deep learning models of effectively integrating cryo-EM data with other sources of complementary data such as protein sequences and AlphaFold-predicted structures need to be developed to further advance the field.
summary: Cryo-Electron Microscopy (cryo-EM) has emerged as a key technology to determine the structure of proteins, particularly large protein complexes and assemblies in recent years. A key challenge in cryo-EM data analysis is to automatically reconstruct accurate protein structures from cryo-EM density maps. In this review, we briefly overview various deep learning methods for building protein structures from cryo-EM density maps, analyze their impact, and discuss the challenges of preparing high-quality data sets for training deep learning models. Looking into the future, more advanced deep learning models of effectively integrating cryo-EM data with other sources of complementary data such as protein sequences and AlphaFold-predicted structures need to be developed to further advance the field.
abstract_zh: 近年来，冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 已成为确定蛋白质结构，特别是大型蛋白质复合物和组装体的关键技术。冷冻电镜数据分析的一个关键挑战是从冷冻电镜密度图自动重建准确的蛋白质结构。在这篇综述中，我们简要概述了从冷冻电镜密度图构建蛋白质结构的各种深度学习方法，分析了它们的影响，并讨论了准备用于训练深度学习模型的高质量数据集的挑战。展望未来，需要开发更先进的深度学习模型，将冷冻电镜数据与其他补充数据源（例如蛋白质序列和 AlphaFold 预测结构）有效集成，以进一步推动该领域的发展。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习方法在从冷冻电镜密度图重建蛋白质结构中的应用，分析其影响与挑战，并探讨未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 冷冻电镜技术虽能确定蛋白质结构，但如何自动重建高精度结构仍是挑战，需系统梳理深度学习方法并探索改进方向。
AI.method: 系统回顾和分析近年来用于从冷冻电镜密度图构建蛋白质结构的深度学习方法，讨论数据集构建挑战及多源数据整合需求。
AI.result: 总结深度学习在冷冻电镜结构重建中的应用进展，指出数据质量瓶颈，并提出多模态数据融合的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著推动冷冻电镜蛋白质结构重建，但需解决数据质量与多源信息整合问题以实现更高精度。

title: Value Summation: A Novel Scoring Function for MPC-based Model-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 值求和：一种基于 MPC 的基于模型的强化学习的新颖评分函数
abstract: This paper proposes a novel scoring function for the planning module of MPC-based reinforcement learning methods to address the inherent bias of using the reward function to score trajectories. The proposed method enhances the learning efficiency of existing MPC-based MBRL methods using the discounted sum of values. The method utilizes optimal trajectories to guide policy learning and updates its state-action value function based on real-world and augmented onboard data. The learning efficiency of the proposed method is evaluated in selected MuJoCo Gym environments as well as in learning locomotion skills for a simulated model of the Cassie robot. The results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of learning efficiency and average reward return.
summary: This paper proposes a novel scoring function for the planning module of MPC-based reinforcement learning methods to address the inherent bias of using the reward function to score trajectories. The proposed method enhances the learning efficiency of existing MPC-based MBRL methods using the discounted sum of values. The method utilizes optimal trajectories to guide policy learning and updates its state-action value function based on real-world and augmented onboard data. The learning efficiency of the proposed method is evaluated in selected MuJoCo Gym environments as well as in learning locomotion skills for a simulated model of the Cassie robot. The results demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of learning efficiency and average reward return.
abstract_zh: 本文为基于 MPC 的强化学习方法的规划模块提出了一种新颖的评分函数，以解决使用奖励函数对轨迹进行评分的固有偏差。所提出的方法使用折扣值之和提高了现有基于 MPC 的 MBRL 方法的学习效率。该方法利用最优轨迹来指导策略学习，并根据现实世界和增强的机载数据更新其状态动作价值函数。该方法的学习效率在选定的 MuJoCo Gym 环境以及学习 Cassie 机器人模拟模型的运动技能时进行了评估。结果表明，所提出的方法在学习效率和平均奖励回报方面优于当前最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于价值求和的新评分函数，用于改进模型预测控制（MPC）的基于模型的强化学习方法，以提高学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MPC方法依赖奖励函数对轨迹进行评分，存在固有偏差，导致学习效率受限。本文旨在通过引入价值函数来优化轨迹评分机制。
AI.method: 采用折扣价值和的评分函数，利用最优轨迹指导策略学习，并结合真实数据与增强数据更新状态-动作价值函数。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo Gym环境和Cassie机器人模拟任务中，该方法在学习效率和平均奖励回报上优于当前最先进的算法。
AI.conclusion: 价值求和方法通过优化轨迹评分机制，有效提升了MPC-based模型强化学习的性能，为相关领域提供了新思路。

title: The trace reconstruction problem for spider graphs
title_zh: 蜘蛛图的迹线重建问题
abstract: We study the trace reconstruction problem for spider graphs. Let $n$ be the number of nodes of a spider and $d$ be the length of each leg, and suppose that we are given independent traces of the spider from a deletion channel in which each non-root node is deleted with probability $q$. This is a natural generalization of the string trace reconstruction problem in theoretical computer science, which corresponds to the special case where the spider has one leg. In the regime where $d\ge \log_{1/q}(n)$, the problem can be reduced to the vanilla string trace reconstruction problem. We thus study the more interesting regime $d\le \log_{1/q}(n)$, in which entire legs of the spider are deleted with non-negligible probability. We describe an algorithm that reconstructs spiders with high probability using $\exp\left(\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{(nq^d)^{1/3}}{d^{1/3}}(\log n)^{2/3}\right)\right)$ traces. Our algorithm works for all deletion probabilities $q\in(0,1)$.
summary: We study the trace reconstruction problem for spider graphs. Let $n$ be the number of nodes of a spider and $d$ be the length of each leg, and suppose that we are given independent traces of the spider from a deletion channel in which each non-root node is deleted with probability $q$. This is a natural generalization of the string trace reconstruction problem in theoretical computer science, which corresponds to the special case where the spider has one leg. In the regime where $d\ge \log_{1/q}(n)$, the problem can be reduced to the vanilla string trace reconstruction problem. We thus study the more interesting regime $d\le \log_{1/q}(n)$, in which entire legs of the spider are deleted with non-negligible probability. We describe an algorithm that reconstructs spiders with high probability using $\exp\left(\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{(nq^d)^{1/3}}{d^{1/3}}(\log n)^{2/3}\right)\right)$ traces. Our algorithm works for all deletion probabilities $q\in(0,1)$.
abstract_zh: 我们研究蜘蛛图的迹线重建问题。令 $n$ 为蜘蛛的节点数，$d$ 为每条腿的长度，并假设我们从删除通道中获得蜘蛛的独立踪迹，其中每个非根节点以概率 $q$ 被删除。这是理论计算机科学中弦迹重构问题的自然概括，对应于蜘蛛有一条腿的特殊情况。在 $d\ge \log_{1/q}(n)$ 的情况下，问题可以简化为普通的字符串迹重建问题。因此，我们研究了更有趣的机制 $d\le \log_{1/q}(n)$，其中蜘蛛的整条腿都以不可忽略的概率被删除。我们描述了一种使用 $\exp\left(\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{(nq^d)^{1/3}}{d^{1/3}}(\log n)^{2/3}\right)\right)$ 迹线以高概率重建蜘蛛的算法。我们的算法适用于所有删除概率 $q\in(0,1)$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究蜘蛛图的轨迹重建问题，探讨在删除通道中从删除的节点轨迹中重建原始蜘蛛图的算法。
AI.motivation: 轨迹重建问题是理论计算机科学中的经典问题，本文将其扩展到蜘蛛图结构，以更复杂的数据模型推动相关理论发展。
AI.method: 提出一种算法，将问题转化为字符串轨迹重建问题，并针对腿长较短的挑战性场景设计高效恢复策略。
AI.result: 算法在删除概率q∈(0,1)下，以指数级数量级的轨迹实现高概率重建，复杂度为exp(𝒪((nq^d)^{1/3}/d^{1/3}(log n)^{2/3}))。
AI.conclusion: 本文为蜘蛛图轨迹重建提供了理论支持，尤其在腿长较短的场景下，推动了图结构重建领域的研究进展。

title: Belief Revision based Caption Re-ranker with Visual Semantic Information
title_zh: 具有视觉语义信息的基于信念修正的标题重新排序器
abstract: In this work, we focus on improving the captions generated by image-caption generation systems. We propose a novel re-ranking approach that leverages visual-semantic measures to identify the ideal caption that maximally captures the visual information in the image. Our re-ranker utilizes the Belief Revision framework (Blok et al., 2003) to calibrate the original likelihood of the top-n captions by explicitly exploiting the semantic relatedness between the depicted caption and the visual context. Our experiments demonstrate the utility of our approach, where we observe that our re-ranker can enhance the performance of a typical image-captioning system without the necessity of any additional training or fine-tuning.
summary: In this work, we focus on improving the captions generated by image-caption generation systems. We propose a novel re-ranking approach that leverages visual-semantic measures to identify the ideal caption that maximally captures the visual information in the image. Our re-ranker utilizes the Belief Revision framework (Blok et al., 2003) to calibrate the original likelihood of the top-n captions by explicitly exploiting the semantic relatedness between the depicted caption and the visual context. Our experiments demonstrate the utility of our approach, where we observe that our re-ranker can enhance the performance of a typical image-captioning system without the necessity of any additional training or fine-tuning.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于改进图像字幕生成系统生成的字幕。 We propose a novel re-ranking approach that leverages visual-semantic measures to identify the ideal caption that maximally captures the visual information in the image. Our re-ranker utilizes the Belief Revision framework (Blok et al., 2003) to calibrate the original likelihood of the top-n captions by explicitly exploiting the semantic relatedness between the depicted caption and the visual context. Our experiments demonstrate the utility of our approach, where we observe that our re-ranker can enhance the performance of a typical image-captioning system without the necessity of any additional training or fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉语义信息的重排序方法，以优化图像字幕生成系统的输出。
AI.motivation: 现有图像字幕生成系统未能充分结合视觉语义信息，导致生成的字幕与图像内容匹配度不足。
AI.method: 采用信念修订框架，结合视觉语义相关性度量，对候选字幕进行重排序，以提升与图像内容的匹配度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无需额外训练或微调的情况下，有效提升了图像字幕生成系统的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出了一种无需额外训练的重排序方法，通过有效结合视觉语义信息，提升了图像字幕生成系统的性能。

authors_text: Sanbao Su,Yiming Li,Sihong He,Songyang Han,Chen Feng,Caiwen Ding,Fei Miao
title: Uncertainty Quantification of Collaborative Detection for Self-Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶协同检测的不确定性量化
comment: This paper has been accepted by the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: This paper has been accepted by the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: Sharing information between connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) fundamentally improves the performance of collaborative object detection for self-driving. However, CAVs still have uncertainties on object detection due to practical challenges, which will affect the later modules in self-driving such as planning and control. Hence, uncertainty quantification is crucial for safety-critical systems such as CAVs. Our work is the first to estimate the uncertainty of collaborative object detection. We propose a novel uncertainty quantification method, called Double-M Quantification, which tailors a moving block bootstrap (MBB) algorithm with direct modeling of the multivariant Gaussian distribution of each corner of the bounding box. Our method captures both the epistemic uncertainty and aleatoric uncertainty with one inference pass based on the offline Double-M training process. And it can be used with different collaborative object detectors. Through experiments on the comprehensive collaborative perception dataset, we show that our Double-M method achieves more than 4X improvement on uncertainty score and more than 3% accuracy improvement, compared with the state-of-the-art uncertainty quantification methods. Our code is public on https://coperception.github.io/double-m-quantification.
summary: Sharing information between connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) fundamentally improves the performance of collaborative object detection for self-driving. However, CAVs still have uncertainties on object detection due to practical challenges, which will affect the later modules in self-driving such as planning and control. Hence, uncertainty quantification is crucial for safety-critical systems such as CAVs. Our work is the first to estimate the uncertainty of collaborative object detection. We propose a novel uncertainty quantification method, called Double-M Quantification, which tailors a moving block bootstrap (MBB) algorithm with direct modeling of the multivariant Gaussian distribution of each corner of the bounding box. Our method captures both the epistemic uncertainty and aleatoric uncertainty with one inference pass based on the offline Double-M training process. And it can be used with different collaborative object detectors. Through experiments on the comprehensive collaborative perception dataset, we show that our Double-M method achieves more than 4X improvement on uncertainty score and more than 3% accuracy improvement, compared with the state-of-the-art uncertainty quantification methods. Our code is public on https://coperception.github.io/double-m-quantification.
abstract_zh: 联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 之间的信息共享从根本上提高了自动驾驶协作目标检测的性能。然而，由于实际挑战，CAV在物体检测方面仍然存在不确定性，这将影响自动驾驶的后续模块，例如规划和控制。因此，不确定性量化对于 CAV 等安全关键系统至关重要。我们的工作是第一个估计协作对象检测的不确定性的工作。我们提出了一种新颖的不确定性量化方法，称为 Double-M 量化，该方法通过对边界框每个角的多元高斯分布的直接建模来定制移动块引导（MBB）算法。我们的方法基于离线 Double-M 训练过程，通过一次推理过程捕获认知不确定性和任意不确定性。它可以与不同的协作对象检测器一起使用。通过在综合协作感知数据集上的实验，我们表明，与最先进的不确定性量化方法相比，我们的 Double-M 方法在不确定性得分上实现了 4 倍以上的改进，并且精度提高了 3% 以上。我们的代码在 https://coperception.github.io/double-m-quantification 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Double-M Quantification的新方法，用于自动驾驶中协作检测的不确定性量化，以提升系统安全性和检测性能。
AI.motivation: 连接自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）在协作检测中存在因实际挑战导致的不确定性，这些不确定性会影响后续的规划和控制模块，因此需要有效的不确定性量化方法保障安全。
AI.method: 通过结合移动块自举算法（MBB）与边界框角点的多元高斯分布建模，提出Double-M Quantification方法，能够同时捕捉认识不确定性和偶然不确定性，并兼容多种协作检测器。
AI.result: 在综合数据集上的实验表明，该方法在不确定性评分上较现有方法提升超4倍，在检测准确率上提升超3%。
AI.conclusion: Double-M Quantification有效量化了协作检测的不确定性，为自动驾驶系统的安全性提供了可靠支持。

title: Efficient Climate Simulation via Machine Learning Method
title_zh: 通过机器学习方法进行高效的气候模拟
abstract: Hybrid modeling combining data-driven techniques and numerical methods is an emerging and promising research direction for efficient climate simulation. However, previous works lack practical platforms, making developing hybrid modeling a challenging programming problem. Furthermore, the lack of standard data sets and evaluation metrics may hamper researchers from comprehensively comparing various algorithms under a uniform condition. To address these problems, we propose a framework called NeuroClim for hybrid modeling under the real-world scenario, a basic setting to simulate the real climate that we live in. NeuroClim consists of three parts: (1) Platform. We develop a user-friendly platform NeuroGCM for efficiently developing hybrid modeling in climate simulation. (2) Dataset. We provide an open-source dataset for data-driven methods in hybrid modeling. We investigate the characteristics of the data, i.e., heterogeneity and stiffness, which reveals the difficulty of regressing climate simulation data; (3) Metrics. We propose a methodology for quantitatively evaluating hybrid modeling, including the approximation ability of machine learning models and the stability during simulation. We believe that NeuroClim allows researchers to work without high level of climate-related expertise and focus only on machine learning algorithm design, which will accelerate hybrid modeling research in the AI-Climate intersection. The codes and data are released at https://github.com/x-w19/NeuroClim.
summary: Hybrid modeling combining data-driven techniques and numerical methods is an emerging and promising research direction for efficient climate simulation. However, previous works lack practical platforms, making developing hybrid modeling a challenging programming problem. Furthermore, the lack of standard data sets and evaluation metrics may hamper researchers from comprehensively comparing various algorithms under a uniform condition. To address these problems, we propose a framework called NeuroClim for hybrid modeling under the real-world scenario, a basic setting to simulate the real climate that we live in. NeuroClim consists of three parts: (1) Platform. We develop a user-friendly platform NeuroGCM for efficiently developing hybrid modeling in climate simulation. (2) Dataset. We provide an open-source dataset for data-driven methods in hybrid modeling. We investigate the characteristics of the data, i.e., heterogeneity and stiffness, which reveals the difficulty of regressing climate simulation data; (3) Metrics. We believe that NeuroClim allows researchers to work without high level of climate-related expertise and focus only on machine learning algorithm design, which will accelerate hybrid modeling research in the AI-Climate intersection. abstract_zh: 数据驱动技术和数值方法相结合的混合建模是高效气候模拟的一个新兴且有前途的研究方向。然而，以前的工作缺乏实用的平台，使得开发混合建模成为一个具有挑战性的编程问题。此外，缺乏标准数据集和评估指标可能会阻碍研究人员在统一条件下全面比较各种算法。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为 NeuroClim 的框架，用于现实世界场景下的混合建模，这是模拟我们生活的真实气候的基本设置。 NeuroClim 由三个部分组成：（1）平台。我们开发了一个用户友好的平台 NeuroGCM，用于高效开发气候模拟中的混合建模。 (2)数据集。我们为混合建模中的数据驱动方法提供开源数据集。我们研究了数据的特征，即异质性和刚性，这揭示了回归气候模拟数据的难度； (3) 指标。我们提出了一种定量评估混合建模的方法，包括机器学习模型的逼近能力和模拟过程中的稳定性。我们相信，NeuroClim 可以让研究人员在没有高水平气候相关专业知识的情况下开展工作，只专注于机器学习算法设计，这将加速人工智能与气候交叉领域的混合建模研究。代码和数据发布于https://github.com/x-w19/NeuroClim。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NeuroClim的框架，旨在通过结合数据驱动技术和数值方法，解决高效气候模拟中的实际挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏实用平台、标准数据集和评估指标，导致混合建模开发困难且难以公平比较算法性能。
AI.method: NeuroClim包含三个部分：（1）用户友好的混合建模开发平台NeuroGCM；（2）包含异质性和刚性特征的开源数据集；（3）包含模型逼近能力和模拟稳定性的量化评估方法。
AI.result: 该框架降低了气候领域专业知识门槛，使研究者可专注于机器学习算法设计，推动AI与气候研究的交叉领域发展。
AI.conclusion: NeuroClim为混合建模提供了统一的实践基础，通过开源代码和数据促进了气候模拟与人工智能的深度融合。

authors_text: Ben Prystawski,Paul Thibodeau,Christopher Potts,Noah D. Goodman
title: Psychologically-informed chain-of-thought prompts for metaphor understanding in large language models
title_zh: 心理学思维链促进大型语言模型中的隐喻理解
abstract: Probabilistic models of language understanding are valuable tools for investigating human language use. However, they need to be hand-designed for a particular domain. In contrast, large language models (LLMs) are trained on text that spans a wide array of domains, but they lack the structure and interpretability of probabilistic models. In this paper, we use chain-of-thought prompts to introduce structures from probabilistic models into LLMs. We explore this approach in the case of metaphor understanding. Our chain-of-thought prompts lead language models to infer latent variables and reason about their relationships in order to choose appropriate paraphrases for metaphors. The latent variables and relationships chosen are informed by theories of metaphor understanding from cognitive psychology. We apply these prompts to the two largest versions of GPT-3 and show that they can improve performance in a paraphrase selection task.
summary: Probabilistic models of language understanding are valuable tools for investigating human language use. However, they need to be hand-designed for a particular domain. In contrast, large language models (LLMs) are trained on text that spans a wide array of domains, but they lack the structure and interpretability of probabilistic models. In this paper, we use chain-of-thought prompts to introduce structures from probabilistic models into LLMs. We explore this approach in the case of metaphor understanding. Our chain-of-thought prompts lead language models to infer latent variables and reason about their relationships in order to choose appropriate paraphrases for metaphors. The latent variables and relationships chosen are informed by theories of metaphor understanding from cognitive psychology. We apply these prompts to the two largest versions of GPT-3 and show that they can improve performance in a paraphrase selection task.
abstract_zh: 语言理解的概率模型是研究人类语言使用的宝贵工具。然而，它们需要针对特定​​领域进行手工设计。相比之下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 是针对跨多个领域的文本进行训练的，但它们缺乏概率模型的结构和可解释性。在本文中，我们使用思路提示将概率模型的结构引入法学硕士。我们在隐喻理解的情况下探索这种方法。我们的思维链促使主导语言模型推断潜在变量并推理它们的关系，以便为隐喻选择适当的释义。所选择的潜在变量和关系是根据认知心理学的隐喻理解理论来确定的。我们将这些提示应用于 GPT-3 的两个最大版本，并表明它们可以提高释义选择任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合认知心理学理论的思维链提示方法，用于提升大语言模型在隐喻理解任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 概率模型虽具解释性但领域受限，大语言模型虽通用却缺乏结构化推理能力，需融合两者优势以增强隐喻理解。
AI.method: 设计基于认知心理学隐喻理论的思维链提示，引导模型推断潜在变量及关系，选择合适释义。
AI.result: 在GPT-3两个大版本上，该方法显著提升了隐喻释义选择任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结构化心理学提示能有效增强大语言模型的隐喻理解能力，为模型可解释性研究提供新方向。

search_text: Psychologically-informed chain-of-thought prompts for metaphor understanding in large language models 心理学思维链促进大型语言模型中的隐喻理解 Probabilistic models of language understanding are valuable tools for investigating human language use. However, they need to be hand-designed for a particular domain. In contrast, large language models (LLMs) are trained on text that spans a wide array of domains, but they lack the structure and interpretability of probabilistic models. In this paper, we use chain-of-thought prompts to introduce structures from probabilistic models into LLMs. We explore this approach in the case of metaphor understanding. Our chain-of-thought prompts lead language models to infer latent variables and reason about their relationships in order to choose appropriate paraphrases for metaphors. The latent variables and relationships chosen are informed by theories of metaphor understanding from cognitive psychology. We apply these prompts to the two largest versions of GPT-3 and show that they can improve performance in a paraphrase selection task. 语言理解的概率模型是研究人类语言使用的宝贵工具。然而，它们需要针对特定​​领域进行手工设计。相比之下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 是针对跨多个领域的文本进行训练的，但它们缺乏概率模型的结构和可解释性。在本文中，我们使用思路提示将概率模型的结构引入法学硕士。我们在隐喻理解的情况下探索这种方法。我们的思维链促使主导语言模型推断潜在变量并推理它们的关系，以便为隐喻选择适当的释义。所选择的潜在变量和关系是根据认知心理学的隐喻理解理论来确定的。我们将这些提示应用于 GPT-3 的两个最大版本，并表明它们可以提高释义选择任务的性能。 本文提出一种结合认知心理学理论的思维链提示方法，用于提升大语言模型在隐喻理解任务中的表现。 Ben Prystawski,Paul Thibodeau,Christopher Potts,Noah D. Goodman cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Automatic Tooth Segmentation from 3D Dental Model using Deep Learning: A Quantitative Analysis of what can be learnt from a Single 3D Dental Model
title_zh: 使用深度学习从 3D 牙科模型自动进行牙齿分割：对可以从单个 3D 牙科模型中学到的内容进行定量分析
abstract: 3D tooth segmentation is an important task for digital orthodontics. Several Deep Learning methods have been proposed for automatic tooth segmentation from 3D dental models or intraoral scans. These methods require annotated 3D intraoral scans. Manually annotating 3D intraoral scans is a laborious task. One approach is to devise self-supervision methods to reduce the manual labeling effort. Compared to other types of point cloud data like scene point cloud or shape point cloud data, 3D tooth point cloud data has a very regular structure and a strong shape prior. We look at how much representative information can be learnt from a single 3D intraoral scan. We evaluate this quantitatively with the help of ten different methods of which six are generic point cloud segmentation methods whereas the other four are tooth segmentation specific methods. Surprisingly, we find that with a single 3D intraoral scan training, the Dice score can be as high as 0.86 whereas the full training set gives Dice score of 0.94. We conclude that the segmentation methods can learn a great deal of information from a single 3D tooth point cloud scan under suitable conditions e.g. data augmentation. We are the first to quantitatively evaluate and demonstrate the representation learning capability of Deep Learning methods from a single 3D intraoral scan. This can enable building self-supervision methods for tooth segmentation under extreme data limitation scenario by leveraging the available data to the fullest possible extent.
summary: 3D tooth segmentation is an important task for digital orthodontics. Several Deep Learning methods have been proposed for automatic tooth segmentation from 3D dental models or intraoral scans. These methods require annotated 3D intraoral scans. Manually annotating 3D intraoral scans is a laborious task. One approach is to devise self-supervision methods to reduce the manual labeling effort. Compared to other types of point cloud data like scene point cloud or shape point cloud data, 3D tooth point cloud data has a very regular structure and a strong shape prior. We look at how much representative information can be learnt from a single 3D intraoral scan. We evaluate this quantitatively with the help of ten different methods of which six are generic point cloud segmentation methods whereas the other four are tooth segmentation specific methods. Surprisingly, we find that with a single 3D intraoral scan training, the Dice score can be as high as 0.86 whereas the full training set gives Dice score of 0.94. We conclude that the segmentation methods can learn a great deal of information from a single 3D tooth point cloud scan under suitable conditions e.g. data augmentation. We are the first to quantitatively evaluate and demonstrate the representation learning capability of Deep Learning methods from a single 3D intraoral scan. This can enable building self-supervision methods for tooth segmentation under extreme data limitation scenario by leveraging the available data to the fullest possible extent.
abstract_zh: 3D 牙齿分割是数字化正畸的一项重要任务。已经提出了几种深度学习方法，用于根据 3D 牙科模型或口内扫描进行自动牙齿分割。这些方法需要带注释的 3D 口内扫描。手动注释 3D 口内扫描是一项艰巨的任务。一种方法是设计自我监督方法来减少手动标记工作。 Compared to other types of point cloud data like scene point cloud or shape point cloud data, 3D tooth point cloud data has a very regular structure and a strong shape prior.我们研究从一次 3D 口内扫描中可以了解多少代表性信息。 We evaluate this quantitatively with the help of ten different methods of which six are generic point cloud segmentation methods whereas the other four are tooth segmentation specific methods.令人惊讶的是，我们发现通过单次 3D 口内扫描训练，Dice 得分可高达 0.86，而完整训练集的 Dice 得分为 0.94。我们得出的结论是，在适当的条件下，例如，分割方法可以从单个 3D 牙齿点云扫描中学习大量信息。数据增强。 We are the first to quantitatively evaluate and demonstrate the representation learning capability of Deep Learning methods from a single 3D intraoral scan.这可以通过最大程度地利用可用数据，在极端数据限制的情况下构建牙齿分割的自我监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何从单个3D口腔扫描数据中学习足够信息以实现自动牙齿分割。
AI.motivation: 手动标注3D口腔扫描数据耗时费力，而牙齿点云数据具有规则结构和强形状先验，可能通过单次扫描实现有效学习。
AI.method: 采用10种分割方法（6种通用点云分割方法和4种牙齿专用方法），在单个3D扫描数据上进行训练并量化评估其表现。
AI.result: 单扫描训练的Dice系数高达0.86，而全数据集训练为0.94，表明单次扫描在适当条件下（如数据增强）可学习到大量信息。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法可在单次3D扫描下实现有效分割，为数据极度受限场景下的自监督方法提供可行性。

authors_text: Hossein Kashiani,Shoaib Meraj Sami,Sobhan Soleymani,Nasser M. Nasrabadi
title: Robust Ensemble Morph Detection with Domain Generalization
title_zh: 具有域泛化的鲁棒集成变形检测
abstract: Although a substantial amount of studies is dedicated to morph detection, most of them fail to generalize for morph faces outside of their training paradigm. Moreover, recent morph detection methods are highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In this paper, we intend to learn a morph detection model with high generalization to a wide range of morphing attacks and high robustness against different adversarial attacks. To this aim, we develop an ensemble of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Transformer models to benefit from their capabilities simultaneously. To improve the robust accuracy of the ensemble model, we employ multi-perturbation adversarial training and generate adversarial examples with high transferability for several single models. Our exhaustive evaluations demonstrate that the proposed robust ensemble model generalizes to several morphing attacks and face datasets. In addition, we validate that our robust ensemble model gain better robustness against several adversarial attacks while outperforming the state-of-the-art studies.
summary: Although a substantial amount of studies is dedicated to morph detection, most of them fail to generalize for morph faces outside of their training paradigm. Moreover, recent morph detection methods are highly vulnerable to adversarial attacks. In this paper, we intend to learn a morph detection model with high generalization to a wide range of morphing attacks and high robustness against different adversarial attacks. To this aim, we develop an ensemble of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Transformer models to benefit from their capabilities simultaneously. To improve the robust accuracy of the ensemble model, we employ multi-perturbation adversarial training and generate adversarial examples with high transferability for several single models. Our exhaustive evaluations demonstrate that the proposed robust ensemble model generalizes to several morphing attacks and face datasets. In addition, we validate that our robust ensemble model gain better robustness against several adversarial attacks while outperforming the state-of-the-art studies.
abstract_zh: 尽管大量研究致力于变形检测，但大多数研究未能推广到其训练范式之外的变形脸部。此外，最近的变形检测方法非常容易受到对抗性攻击。在本文中，我们打算学习一种对各种变形攻击具有高度泛化性并且对不同对抗性攻击具有高鲁棒性的变形检测模型。为此，我们开发了卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和 Transformer 模型的集合，以同时受益于它们的功能。为了提高集成模型的鲁棒精度，我们采用多扰动对抗训练，并为多个单一模型生成具有高可迁移性的对抗示例。我们详尽的评估表明，所提出的鲁棒集成模型可推广到多种变形攻击和人脸数据集。此外，我们还验证了我们的鲁棒集成模型对多种对抗性攻击具有更好的鲁棒性，同时优于最先进的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有领域泛化能力的鲁棒集成形态检测模型，以应对形态攻击和对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有形态检测方法在训练范式外的形态攻击上泛化能力不足，且易受对抗攻击影响。
AI.method: 融合卷积神经网络（CNN）与Transformer模型，结合多扰动对抗训练生成高可迁移对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在多种形态攻击和人脸数据集上具有更强的泛化能力与对抗鲁棒性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 集成架构与对抗训练有效提升了形态检测的跨领域泛化能力和对抗攻击防御性能。

To improve the robust accuracy of the ensemble model, we employ multi-perturbation adversarial training and generate adversarial examples with high transferability for several single models. Our exhaustive evaluations demonstrate that the proposed robust ensemble model generalizes to several morphing attacks and face datasets. In addition, we validate that our robust ensemble model gain better robustness against several adversarial attacks while outperforming the state-of-the-art studies. 尽管大量研究致力于变形检测，但大多数研究未能推广到其训练范式之外的变形脸部。此外，最近的变形检测方法非常容易受到对抗性攻击。在本文中，我们打算学习一种对各种变形攻击具有高度泛化性并且对不同对抗性攻击具有高鲁棒性的变形检测模型。为此，我们开发了卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和 Transformer 模型的集合，以同时受益于它们的功能。为了提高集成模型的鲁棒精度，我们采用多扰动对抗训练，并为多个单一模型生成具有高可迁移性的对抗示例。我们详尽的评估表明，所提出的鲁棒集成模型可推广到多种变形攻击和人脸数据集。此外，我们还验证了我们的鲁棒集成模型对多种对抗性攻击具有更好的鲁棒性，同时优于最先进的研究。 本文提出一种具有领域泛化能力的鲁棒集成形态检测模型，以应对形态攻击和对抗攻击。 Hossein Kashiani,Shoaib Meraj Sami,Sobhan Soleymani,Nasser M. Nasrabadi cs.CV

title: Evons: A Dataset for Fake and Real News Virality Analysis and Prediction
title_zh: Evons：用于假新闻和真新闻病毒式传播分析和预测的数据集
abstract: We present a novel collection of news articles originating from fake and real news media sources for the analysis and prediction of news virality. Unlike existing fake news datasets which either contain claims or news article headline and body, in this collection each article is supported with a Facebook engagement count which we consider as an indicator of the article virality. In addition we also provide the article description and thumbnail image with which the article was shared on Facebook. These images were automatically annotated with object tags and color attributes. Using cloud based vision analysis tools, thumbnail images were also analyzed for faces and detected faces were annotated with facial attributes. We empirically investigate the use of this collection on an example task of article virality prediction.
summary: We present a novel collection of news articles originating from fake and real news media sources for the analysis and prediction of news virality. Unlike existing fake news datasets which either contain claims or news article headline and body, in this collection each article is supported with a Facebook engagement count which we consider as an indicator of the article virality. In addition we also provide the article description and thumbnail image with which the article was shared on Facebook. These images were automatically annotated with object tags and color attributes. Using cloud based vision analysis tools, thumbnail images were also analyzed for faces and detected faces were annotated with facial attributes. We empirically investigate the use of this collection on an example task of article virality prediction.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了来自虚假和真实新闻媒体来源的新颖的新闻文章集合，用于分析和预测新闻病毒式传播。与包含声明或新闻文章标题和正文的现有假新闻数据集不同，在这个集合中，每篇文章都支持 Facebook 参与计数，我们将其视为文章病毒式传播的指标。此外，我们还提供文章描述和在 Facebook 上分享文章时使用的缩略图。这些图像自动用对象标签和颜色属性进行注释。使用基于云的视觉分析工具，还对缩略图进行面部分析，并用面部属性对检测到的面部进行注释。我们通过实证研究了该集合在文章病毒式传播预测示例任务中的使用。

AI.tldr: 构建包含真假新闻文章的数据集，用于分析和预测新闻传播性。
AI.motivation: 现有假新闻数据集缺乏传播性指标，而Facebook互动数据可作为传播性有效指标。
AI.method: 收集新闻文章并附带Facebook互动数据、描述及缩略图，通过自动标注工具分析图像内容与面部属性。
AI.result: 实证研究表明该数据集可有效用于新闻传播性预测任务。
AI.conclusion: Evons数据集为研究新闻传播性提供了新的多模态数据资源，填补了现有数据集的不足。

title: An Automatic Speech Recognition System for Bengali Language based on Wav2Vec2 and Transfer Learning
title_zh: 基于Wav2Vec2和迁移学习的孟加拉语自动语音识别系统
abstract: An independent, automated method of decoding and transcribing oral speech is known as automatic speech recognition (ASR). A typical ASR system extracts feature from audio recordings or streams and run one or more algorithms to map the features to corresponding texts. Numerous of research has been done in the field of speech signal processing in recent years. When given adequate resources, both conventional ASR and emerging end-to-end (E2E) speech recognition have produced promising results. However, for low-resource languages like Bengali, the current state of ASR lags behind, although the low resource state does not reflect upon the fact that this language is spoken by over 500 million people all over the world. Despite its popularity, there aren't many diverse open-source datasets available, which makes it difficult to conduct research on Bengali speech recognition systems. This paper is a part of the competition named `BUET CSE Fest DL Sprint'. The purpose of this paper is to improve the speech recognition performance of the Bengali language by adopting speech recognition technology on the E2E structure based on the transfer learning framework. The proposed method effectively models the Bengali language and achieves 3.819 score in `Levenshtein Mean Distance' on the test dataset of 7747 samples, when only 1000 samples of train dataset were used to train.

A typical ASR system extracts feature from audio recordings or streams and run one or more algorithms to map the features to corresponding texts. Numerous of research has been done in the field of speech signal processing in recent years. Despite its popularity, there aren't many diverse open-source datasets available, which makes it difficult to conduct research on Bengali speech recognition systems. This paper is a part of the competition named `BUET CSE Fest DL Sprint'. The purpose of this paper is to improve the speech recognition performance of the Bengali language by adopting speech recognition technology on the E2E structure based on the transfer learning framework. The proposed method effectively models the Bengali language and achieves 3.819 score in `Levenshtein Mean Distance' on the test dataset of 7747 samples, when only 1000 samples of train dataset were used to train.
abstract_zh: 一种独立、自动化的解码和转录口头语音的方法称为自动语音识别 (ASR)。典型的 ASR 系统从录音或流中提取特征，并运行一种或多种算法将特征映射到相应的文本。近年来，人们在语音信号处理领域进行了大量的研究。当提供足够的资源时，传统的 ASR 和新兴的端到端 (E2E) 语音识别都产生了有希望的结果。然而，对于像孟加拉语这样的资源匮乏的语言来说，ASR 的现状是落后的，尽管资源匮乏的状态并没有反映出这种语言在全世界有超过 5 亿人使用的事实。尽管它很受欢迎，但可用的各种开源数据集并不多，这使得对孟加拉语语音识别系统进行研究变得困难。本文是“BUET CSE Fest DL Sprint”竞赛的一部分。本文的目的是通过采用基于迁移学习框架的端到端结构上的语音识别技术来提高孟加拉语的语音识别性能。所提出的方法有效地对孟加拉语进行建模，并且在仅使用 1000 个训练数据集样本进行训练的情况下，在 7747 个样本的测试数据集上获得了 3.819 的“Levenshtein Mean Distance”得分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wav2Vec2和迁移学习框架的孟加拉语自动语音识别系统，旨在解决该语言资源匮乏下的识别性能问题。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉语拥有5亿以上使用者，但缺乏多样化开源数据集导致现有ASR系统表现不足，需探索低资源场景下的有效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用端到端结构，基于Wav2Vec2预训练模型结合迁移学习，在仅使用1000个训练样本的情况下优化孟加拉语语音识别模型。
AI.result: 在包含7747个样本的测试集上，系统达到3.819的Levenshtein均距成绩，验证了方法在低资源场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习框架能有效建模孟加拉语语音特征，为低资源语言ASR研究提供可行方案，后续可探索更多数据增强策略。
