title: Asymptotically Optimal Bounds for Estimating H-Index in Sublinear Time with Applications to Subgraph Counting
title_zh: 亚线性时间内估计 H 指数的渐近最优界及其在子图计数中的应用
comment: Full version of the paper accepted to APPROX 2022
comments: Full version of the paper accepted to APPROX 2022
abstract: The $h$-index is a metric used to measure the impact of a user in a publication setting, such as a member of a social network with many highly liked posts or a researcher in an academic domain with many highly cited publications. Specifically, the $h$-index of a user is the largest integer $h$ such that at least $h$ publications of the user have at least $h$ units of positive feedback. We design an algorithm that, given query access to the $n$ publications of a user and each publication's corresponding positive feedback number, outputs a $(1\pm \varepsilon)$-approximation of the $h$-index of this user with probability at least $1-δ$ in time \[ O(\frac{n \cdot \ln{(1/δ)}}{\varepsilon^2 \cdot h}), \] where $h$ is the actual $h$-index which is unknown to the algorithm a-priori. We then design a novel lower bound technique that allows us to prove that this bound is in fact asymptotically optimal for this problem in all parameters $n,h,\varepsilon,$ and $δ$. Our work is one of the first in sublinear time algorithms that addresses obtaining asymptotically optimal bounds, especially in terms of the error and confidence parameters. As such, we focus on designing novel techniques for this task. In particular, our lower bound technique seems quite general -- to showcase this, we also use our approach to prove an asymptotically optimal lower bound for the problem of estimating the number of triangles in a graph in sublinear time, which now is also optimal in the error and confidence parameters. This result improves upon prior lower bounds of Eden, Levi, Ron, and Seshadhri (FOCS'15) for this problem, as well as multiple follow-ups that extended this lower bound to other subgraph counting problems.
summary: The $h$-index is a metric used to measure the impact of a user in a publication setting, such as a member of a social network with many highly liked posts or a researcher in an academic domain with many highly cited publications. Specifically, the $h$-index of a user is the largest integer $h$ such that at least $h$ publications of the user have at least $h$ units of positive feedback. We design an algorithm that, given query access to the $n$ publications of a user and each publication's corresponding positive feedback number, outputs a $(1\pm \varepsilon)$-approximation of the $h$-index of this user with probability at least $1-δ$ in time \[ O(\frac{n \cdot \ln{(1/δ)}}{\varepsilon^2 \cdot h}), \] where $h$ is the actual $h$-index which is unknown to the algorithm a-priori. We then design a novel lower bound technique that allows us to prove that this bound is in fact asymptotically optimal for this problem in all parameters $n,h,\varepsilon,$ and $δ$. Our work is one of the first in sublinear time algorithms that addresses obtaining asymptotically optimal bounds, especially in terms of the error and confidence parameters. As such, we focus on designing novel techniques for this task. In particular, our lower bound technique seems quite general -- to showcase this, we also use our approach to prove an asymptotically optimal lower bound for the problem of estimating the number of triangles in a graph in sublinear time, which now is also optimal in the error and confidence parameters. This result improves upon prior lower bounds of Eden, Levi, Ron, and Seshadhri (FOCS'15) for this problem, as well as multiple follow-ups that extended this lower bound to other subgraph counting problems.
abstract_zh: $h$ 指数是用于衡量用户在出版物环境中的影响力的指标，例如拥有许多高度喜欢的帖子的社交网络成员或拥有许多高度引用的出版物的学术领域的研究人员。具体来说，用户的$h$索引是最大整数$h$，使得该用户的至少$h$出版物具有至少$h$单位的正反馈。我们设计了一种算法，给定对用户的 $n$ 出版物的查询访问以及每个出版物相应的正反馈编号，输出该用户的 $h$-索引的 $(1\pm \varepsilon)$ 近似值，在时间上概率至少为 $1-δ$ \[ O(\frac{n \cdot \ln{(1/δ)}}{\varepsilon^2 \cdot h}), \] 其中 $h$ 是实际值$h$-先验算法未知的索引。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的下界技术，使我们能够证明该界限实际上对于该问题在所有参数 $n,h,\varepsilon,$ 和 $δ$ 中是渐近最优的。我们的工作是亚线性时间算法中最早的工作之一，旨在解决获得渐近最优边界的问题，特别是在误差和置信参数方面。因此，我们专注于为这项任务设计新颖的技术。特别是，我们的下界技术似乎相当通用——为了展示这一点，我们还使用我们的方法来证明在亚线性时间内估计图中三角形数量问题的渐近最优下界，该下界现在在误差和置信度参数方面也是最优的。该结果改进了 Eden、Levi、Ron 和 Seshadhri (FOCS'15) 之前针对此问题的下界，以及将此下界扩展到其他子图计数问题的多个后续行动。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种在亚线性时间内估计用户h指数的算法，并证明其渐进最优性，同时将该技术应用于子图计数问题。
AI.motivation: h指数是衡量用户影响力的重要指标，但传统方法在大规模数据下效率低下。需开发亚线性时间算法以高效估计h指数，并探索其在子图计数中的应用。
AI.method: 提出基于查询访问的算法，时间复杂度为$ O(\frac{n \\cdot \\ln{(1/δ)}}{\arepsilon^2 \\cdot h}) $，并设计新型下界证明技术，进一步将其应用于三角形计数问题的下界分析。
AI.result: 算法在误差和置信度参数上达到渐进最优，改进了三角形计数问题的现有下界，优于此前多项研究成果。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在亚线性算法中实现误差和置信度参数的渐进最优性，提出的下界技术具有通用性，为子图计数等领域的研究提供了新工具。

search_text: Asymptotically Optimal Bounds for Estimating H-Index in Sublinear Time with Applications to Subgraph Counting 亚线性时间内估计 H 指数的渐近最优界及其在子图计数中的应用 The $h$-index is a metric used to measure the impact of a user in a publication setting, such as a member of a social network with many highly liked posts or a researcher in an academic domain with many highly cited publications. Specifically, the $h$-index of a user is the largest integer $h$ such that at least $h$ publications of the user have at least $h$ units of positive feedback. We design an algorithm that, given query access to the $n$ publications of a user and each publication's corresponding positive feedback number, outputs a $(1\pm \varepsilon)$-approximation of the $h$-index of this user with probability at least $1-δ$ in time \[ O(\frac{n \cdot \ln{(1/δ)}}{\varepsilon^2 \cdot h}), \] where $h$ is the actual $h$-index which is unknown to the algorithm a-priori. We then design a novel lower bound technique that allows us to prove that this bound is in fact asymptotically optimal for this problem in all parameters $n,h,\varepsilon,$ and $δ$. Our work is one of the first in sublinear time algorithms that addresses obtaining asymptotically optimal bounds, especially in terms of the error and confidence parameters. As such, we focus on designing novel techniques for this task. In particular, our lower bound technique seems quite general -- to showcase this, we also use our approach to prove an asymptotically optimal lower bound for the problem of estimating the number of triangles in a graph in sublinear time, which now is also optimal in the error and confidence parameters. This result improves upon prior lower bounds of Eden, Levi, Ron, and Seshadhri (FOCS'15) for this problem, as well as multiple follow-ups that extended this lower bound to other subgraph counting problems. $h$ 指数是用于衡量用户在出版物环境中的影响力的指标，例如拥有许多高度喜欢的帖子的社交网络成员或拥有许多高度引用的出版物的学术领域的研究人员。具体来说，用户的$h$索引是最大整数$h$，使得该用户的至少$h$出版物具有至少$h$单位的正反馈。我们设计了一种算法，给定对用户的 $n$ 出版物的查询访问以及每个出版物相应的正反馈编号，输出该用户的 $h$-索引的 $(1\pm \varepsilon)$ 近似值，在时间上概率至少为 $1-δ$ \[ O(\frac{n \cdot \ln{(1/δ)}}{\varepsilon^2 \cdot h}), \] 其中 $h$ 是实际值$h$-先验算法未知的索引。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的下界技术，使我们能够证明该界限实际上对于该问题在所有参数 $n,h,\varepsilon,$ 和 $δ$ 中是渐近最优的。我们的工作是亚线性时间算法中最早的工作之一，旨在解决获得渐近最优边界的问题，特别是在误差和置信参数方面。因此，我们专注于为这项任务设计新颖的技术。特别是，我们的下界技术似乎相当通用——为了展示这一点，我们还使用我们的方法来证明在亚线性时间内估计图中三角形数量问题的渐近最优下界，该下界现在在误差和置信度参数方面也是最优的。该结果改进了 Eden、Levi、Ron 和 Seshadhri (FOCS'15) 之前针对此问题的下界，以及将此下界扩展到其他子图计数问题的多个后续行动。 本文设计了一种在亚线性时间内估计用户h指数的算法，并证明其渐进最优性，同时将该技术应用于子图计数问题。 Sepehr Assadi,Hoai-An Nguyen cs.DS

authors_text: William Wong,Praneet Dutta,Octavian Voicu,Yuri Chervonyi,Cosmin Paduraru,Jerry Luo
title: Optimizing Industrial HVAC Systems with Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过分层强化学习优化工业 HVAC 系统
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) techniques have been developed to optimize industrial cooling systems, offering substantial energy savings compared to traditional heuristic policies. A major challenge in industrial control involves learning behaviors that are feasible in the real world due to machinery constraints. For example, certain actions can only be executed every few hours while other actions can be taken more frequently. Without extensive reward engineering and experimentation, an RL agent may not learn realistic operation of machinery. To address this, we use hierarchical reinforcement learning with multiple agents that control subsets of actions according to their operation time scales. Our hierarchical approach achieves energy savings over existing baselines while maintaining constraints such as operating chillers within safe bounds in a simulated HVAC control environment.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) techniques have been developed to optimize industrial cooling systems, offering substantial energy savings compared to traditional heuristic policies. A major challenge in industrial control involves learning behaviors that are feasible in the real world due to machinery constraints. For example, certain actions can only be executed every few hours while other actions can be taken more frequently. Without extensive reward engineering and experimentation, an RL agent may not learn realistic operation of machinery. To address this, we use hierarchical reinforcement learning with multiple agents that control subsets of actions according to their operation time scales. Our hierarchical approach achieves energy savings over existing baselines while maintaining constraints such as operating chillers within safe bounds in a simulated HVAC control environment.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 技术已被开发用于优化工业冷却系统，与传统的启发式策略相比，可大幅节省能源。工业控制的一个主要挑战涉及由于机械限制而在现实世界中可行的学习行为。例如，某些操作只能每隔几个小时执行一次，而其他操作则可以更频繁地执行。如果没有广泛的奖励工程和实验，强化学习智能体可能无法学习机器的实际操作。为了解决这个问题，我们使用分层强化学习与多个代理，根据操作时间尺度控制动作子集。我们的分层方法在现有基准上实现了节能，同时保持了限制，例如在模拟 HVAC 控制环境中的安全范围内运行冷水机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用分层强化学习优化工业HVAC系统，在满足设备约束的前提下实现节能目标。
AI.motivation: 传统启发式控制策略效率低下，而常规强化学习因未考虑工业设备的时间尺度约束，难以学习实际可行的操作策略。
AI.method: 设计多智能体分层强化学习框架，根据设备操作频率划分动作层级，使不同时间尺度的控制指令由专用智能体执行。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中实现比基准方法更高的能源节约率，同时确保冷水机组运行参数始终处于安全范围内。
AI.conclusion: 分层架构有效解决了工业控制中的时序约束问题，为复杂设备的强化学习优化提供了可行方案。

title: Anomaly Detection in Automatic Generation Control Systems Based on Traffic Pattern Analysis and Deep Transfer Learning
title_zh: 基于流量模式分析和深度迁移学习的自动发电控制系统异常检测
comment: Editor: Geert Deconinck. 18th European Dependable Computing Conference (EDCC 2022), September 12-15, 2022, Zaragoza, Spain. Fast Abstract Proceedings - EDCC 2022
comments: Editor: Geert Deconinck. 18th European Dependable Computing Conference (EDCC 2022), September 12-15, 2022, Zaragoza, Spain. Fast Abstract Proceedings - EDCC 2022
abstract: In modern highly interconnected power grids, automatic generation control (AGC) is crucial in maintaining the stability of the power grid. The dependence of the AGC system on the information and communications technology (ICT) system makes it vulnerable to various types of cyber-attacks. Thus, information flow (IF) analysis and anomaly detection became paramount for preventing cyber attackers from driving the cyber-physical power system (CPPS) to instability. In this paper, the ICT network traffic rules in CPPSs are explored and the frequency domain features of the ICT network traffic are extracted, basically for developing a robust learning algorithm that can learn the normal traffic pattern based on the ResNeSt convolutional neural network (CNN). Furthermore, to overcome the problem of insufficient abnormal traffic labeled samples, transfer learning approach is used. In the proposed data-driven-based method the deep learning model is trained by traffic frequency features, which makes our model robust against AGC's parameters uncertainties and modeling nonlinearities.
summary: In modern highly interconnected power grids, automatic generation control (AGC) is crucial in maintaining the stability of the power grid. The dependence of the AGC system on the information and communications technology (ICT) system makes it vulnerable to various types of cyber-attacks. Thus, information flow (IF) analysis and anomaly detection became paramount for preventing cyber attackers from driving the cyber-physical power system (CPPS) to instability. In this paper, the ICT network traffic rules in CPPSs are explored and the frequency domain features of the ICT network traffic are extracted, basically for developing a robust learning algorithm that can learn the normal traffic pattern based on the ResNeSt convolutional neural network (CNN). Furthermore, to overcome the problem of insufficient abnormal traffic labeled samples, transfer learning approach is used. In the proposed data-driven-based method the deep learning model is trained by traffic frequency features, which makes our model robust against AGC's parameters uncertainties and modeling nonlinearities.
abstract_zh: 在现代高度互联的电网中，自动发电控制（AGC）对于维持电网的稳定性至关重要。 AGC系统对信息和通信技术（ICT）系统的依赖使其容易受到各种类型的网络攻击。因此，信息流（IF）分析和异常检测对于防止网络攻击者导致网络物理电力系统（CPPS）不稳定变得至关重要。本文探讨了 CPPS 中的 ICT 网络流量规则，并提取了 ICT 网络流量的频域特征，主要是为了开发一种基于 ResNeSt 卷积神经网络（CNN）的鲁棒学习算法，能够学习正常的流量模式。此外，为了克服异常流量标记样本不足的问题，采用了迁移学习方法。在所提出的基于数据驱动的方法中，深度学习模型通过交通频率特征进行训练，这使得我们的模型对 AGC 的参数不确定性和建模非线性具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流量模式分析和深度迁移学习的自动发电控制（AGC）系统异常检测方法，以应对网络攻击带来的风险。
AI.motivation: 现代电网中AGC系统依赖ICT技术易受网络攻击，需通过信息流分析和异常检测保障电网稳定，同时解决异常样本不足的难题。
AI.method: 提取ICT网络流量的频域特征，基于ResNeSt CNN构建正常流量模式学习算法，并采用迁移学习应对异常样本不足问题。
AI.result: 提出的模型能有效应对AGC参数不确定性和非线性问题，提升异常检测的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结合流量模式分析与迁移学习的方法可增强AGC系统的安全性，为应对网络攻击提供有效技术手段。

search_text: Anomaly Detection in Automatic Generation Control Systems Based on Traffic Pattern Analysis and Deep Transfer Learning 基于流量模式分析和深度迁移学习的自动发电控制系统异常检测 In modern highly interconnected power grids, automatic generation control (AGC) is crucial in maintaining the stability of the power grid. The dependence of the AGC system on the information and communications technology (ICT) system makes it vulnerable to various types of cyber-attacks. Thus, information flow (IF) analysis and anomaly detection became paramount for preventing cyber attackers from driving the cyber-physical power system (CPPS) to instability. In this paper, the ICT network traffic rules in CPPSs are explored and the frequency domain features of the ICT network traffic are extracted, basically for developing a robust learning algorithm that can learn the normal traffic pattern based on the ResNeSt convolutional neural network (CNN). Furthermore, to overcome the problem of insufficient abnormal traffic labeled samples, transfer learning approach is used. In the proposed data-driven-based method the deep learning model is trained by traffic frequency features, which makes our model robust against AGC's parameters uncertainties and modeling nonlinearities. 在现代高度互联的电网中，自动发电控制（AGC）对于维持电网的稳定性至关重要。 AGC系统对信息和通信技术（ICT）系统的依赖使其容易受到各种类型的网络攻击。因此，信息流（IF）分析和异常检测对于防止网络攻击者导致网络物理电力系统（CPPS）不稳定变得至关重要。本文探讨了 CPPS 中的 ICT 网络流量规则，并提取了 ICT 网络流量的频域特征，主要是为了开发一种基于 ResNeSt 卷积神经网络（CNN）的鲁棒学习算法，能够学习正常的流量模式。此外，为了克服异常流量标记样本不足的问题，采用了迁移学习方法。在所提出的基于数据驱动的方法中，深度学习模型通过交通频率特征进行训练，这使得我们的模型对 AGC 的参数不确定性和建模非线性具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于流量模式分析和深度迁移学习的自动发电控制（AGC）系统异常检测方法，以应对网络攻击带来的风险。 Tohid Behdadnia,Geert Deconinck cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Valentin Koch,Olle Holmberg,Hannah Spitzer,Johannes Schiefelbein,Ben Asani,Michael Hafner,Fabian J Theis
title: Noise transfer for unsupervised domain adaptation of retinal OCT images
title_zh: 视网膜 OCT 图像无监督域适应的噪声传递
abstract: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) imaging from different camera devices causes challenging domain shifts and can cause a severe drop in accuracy for machine learning models. In this work, we introduce a minimal noise adaptation method based on a singular value decomposition (SVDNA) to overcome the domain gap between target domains from three different device manufacturers in retinal OCT imaging. Our method utilizes the difference in noise structure to successfully bridge the domain gap between different OCT devices and transfer the style from unlabeled target domain images to source images for which manual annotations are available. We demonstrate how this method, despite its simplicity, compares or even outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised domain adaptation methods for semantic segmentation on a public OCT dataset. SVDNA can be integrated with just a few lines of code into the augmentation pipeline of any network which is in contrast to many state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods which often need to change the underlying model architecture or train a separate style transfer model. The full code implementation for SVDNA is available at https://github.com/ValentinKoch/SVDNA.
summary: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) imaging from different camera devices causes challenging domain shifts and can cause a severe drop in accuracy for machine learning models. In this work, we introduce a minimal noise adaptation method based on a singular value decomposition (SVDNA) to overcome the domain gap between target domains from three different device manufacturers in retinal OCT imaging. Our method utilizes the difference in noise structure to successfully bridge the domain gap between different OCT devices and transfer the style from unlabeled target domain images to source images for which manual annotations are available. We demonstrate how this method, despite its simplicity, compares or even outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised domain adaptation methods for semantic segmentation on a public OCT dataset. SVDNA can be integrated with just a few lines of code into the augmentation pipeline of any network which is in contrast to many state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods which often need to change the underlying model architecture or train a separate style transfer model. The full code implementation for SVDNA is available at https://github.com/ValentinKoch/SVDNA.
abstract_zh: 来自不同相机设备的光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 成像会导致具有挑战性的域转移，并可能导致机器学习模型的准确性严重下降。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种基于奇异值分解（SVDNA）的最小噪声自适应方法，以克服视网膜 OCT 成像中来自三个不同设备制造商的目标域之间的域差距。我们的方法利用噪声结构的差异成功地弥合了不同 OCT 设备之间的域差距，并将风格从未标记的目标域图像转移到可进行手动注释的源图像。我们展示了这种方法尽管简单，但如何在公共 OCT 数据集上比较甚至优于最先进的无监督域适应方法进行语义分割。 SVDNA 只需几行代码就可以集成到任何网络的增强管道中，这与许多最先进的域适应方法形成鲜明对比，后者通常需要更改底层模型架构或训练单独的风格迁移模型。 SVDNA 的完整代码实现可在 https://github.com/ValentinKoch/SVDNA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于奇异值分解的噪声传递方法（SVDNA），用于解决视网膜OCT图像因设备差异导致的域偏移问题，实现无监督域适应。
AI.motivation: 不同厂商OCT设备产生的图像存在域偏移，导致机器学习模型性能显著下降，而现有域适应方法通常需要修改模型架构或训练额外模型，复杂度较高。
AI.method: 通过分析噪声结构差异，利用奇异值分解（SVD）将目标域图像的风格转移到源域图像，无需改变模型架构，仅需少量代码集成到数据增强流程中。
AI.result: 在公开OCT数据集上，SVDNA在语义分割任务中表现优于或媲美现有先进方法，且实现简单，无需额外训练风格迁移模型。
AI.conclusion: SVDNA提供了一种高效、轻量的无监督域适应方案，能有效缓解OCT图像跨设备域偏移问题，具有良好的实际应用价值。

authors_text: Nicolas Pilia,Steffen Schuler,Maike Rees,Gerald Moik,Danila Potyagaylo,Olaf Dössel,Axel Loewe
title: Non-invasive Localization of the Ventricular Excitation Origin Without Patient-specific Geometries Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习对心室兴奋源进行无创定位，无需患者特定的几何形状
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures. Abstract was shortened for arXiv
comments: 14 pages, 9 figures. Abstract was shortened for arXiv
abstract: Ventricular tachycardia (VT) can be one cause of sudden cardiac death affecting 4.25 million persons per year worldwide. A curative treatment is catheter ablation in order to inactivate the abnormally triggering regions. To facilitate and expedite the localization during the ablation procedure, we present two novel localization techniques based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In contrast to existing methods, e.g. using ECG imaging, our approaches were designed to be independent of the patient-specific geometries and directly applicable to surface ECG signals, while also delivering a binary transmural position. One method outputs ranked alternative solutions. Results can be visualized either on a generic or patient geometry. The CNNs were trained on a data set containing only simulated data and evaluated both on simulated and clinical test data. On simulated data, the median test error was below 3mm. The median localization error on the clinical data was as low as 32mm. The transmural position was correctly detected in up to 82% of all clinical cases. Using the ranked alternative solutions, the top-3 median error dropped to 20mm on clinical data. These results demonstrate a proof of principle to utilize CNNs to localize the activation source without the intrinsic need of patient-specific geometrical information. Furthermore, delivering multiple solutions can help the physician to find the real activation source amongst more than one possible locations. With further optimization, these methods have a high potential to speed up clinical interventions. Consequently they could decrease procedural risk and improve VT patients' outcomes.
summary: Ventricular tachycardia (VT) can be one cause of sudden cardiac death affecting 4.25 million persons per year worldwide. A curative treatment is catheter ablation in order to inactivate the abnormally triggering regions. To facilitate and expedite the localization during the ablation procedure, we present two novel localization techniques based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In contrast to existing methods, e.g. using ECG imaging, our approaches were designed to be independent of the patient-specific geometries and directly applicable to surface ECG signals, while also delivering a binary transmural position. One method outputs ranked alternative solutions. Results can be visualized either on a generic or patient geometry. The CNNs were trained on a data set containing only simulated data and evaluated both on simulated and clinical test data. On simulated data, the median test error was below 3mm. The median localization error on the clinical data was as low as 32mm. The transmural position was correctly detected in up to 82% of all clinical cases. Using the ranked alternative solutions, the top-3 median error dropped to 20mm on clinical data. These results demonstrate a proof of principle to utilize CNNs to localize the activation source without the intrinsic need of patient-specific geometrical information. Furthermore, delivering multiple solutions can help the physician to find the real activation source amongst more than one possible locations. With further optimization, these methods have a high potential to speed up clinical interventions. Consequently they could decrease procedural risk and improve VT patients' outcomes.
abstract_zh: 室性心动过速 (VT) 可能是心源性猝死的原因之一，每年影响全球 425 万人。一种治疗方法是导管消融，以使异常触发区域失活。为了促进和加快消融过程中的定位，我们提出了两种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的新颖定位技术。与现有方法相比，例如使用心电图成像，我们的方法被设计为独立于患者特定的几何形状，并直接适用于表面心电图信号，同时还提供二元透壁位置。一种方法输出排序的替代解决方案。结果可以在通用或患者几何形状上可视化。 CNN 在仅包含模拟数据的数据集上进行训练，并根据模拟数据和临床测试数据进行评估。在模拟数据上，中值测试误差低于 3mm。临床数据的中位定位误差低至 32 毫米。在高达 82% 的临床病例中，透壁位置被正确检测到。使用排序后的替代解决方案，临床数据上前 3 名的中位误差降至 20 毫米。这些结果证明了利用 CNN 定位激活源的原理证明，而无需患者特定的几何信息。此外，提供多种解决方案可以帮助医生在多个可能的位置中找到真正的激活源。通过进一步优化，这些方法具有加速临床干预的巨大潜力。因此，它们可以降低手术风险并改善 VT 患者的预后。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的非侵入性心室兴奋起源定位方法，无需患者特异性几何信息，直接利用体表心电图信号进行定位。
AI.motivation: 心室颤动（VT）是导致猝死的主要原因之一，传统定位方法依赖患者特异性几何模型，耗时且受限。需开发无需个体化数据、可直接应用于体表心电图的快速定位技术以提高消融手术效率。
AI.method: 构建两种CNN模型，通过仅使用模拟数据训练，直接从体表心电图信号中输出二值跨壁位置信息。一种方法提供排名替代方案，结果可显示在通用或患者几何模型上。
AI.result: 模拟数据中位数定位误差低于3mm，临床数据中位数误差为32mm，跨壁位置检测准确率达82%。采用排名替代方案后，临床数据前3名中位数误差降至20mm。
AI.conclusion: 证明CNN可在无需患者几何信息的情况下定位激活源，多解输出辅助医生筛选真实病灶。进一步优化后有望加速临床干预，降低手术风险并改善患者预后。

motivation: 心室颤动（VT）是导致猝死的主要原因之一，传统定位方法依赖患者特异性几何模型，耗时且受限。需开发无需个体化数据、可直接应用于体表心电图的快速定位技术以提高消融手术效率。
method: 构建两种CNN模型，通过仅使用模拟数据训练，直接从体表心电图信号中输出二值跨壁位置信息。一种方法提供排名替代方案，结果可显示在通用或患者几何模型上。
result: 模拟数据中位数定位误差低于3mm，临床数据中位数误差为32mm，跨壁位置检测准确率达82%。采用排名替代方案后，临床数据前3名中位数误差降至20mm。
conclusion: 证明CNN可在无需患者几何信息的情况下定位激活源，多解输出辅助医生筛选真实病灶。进一步优化后有望加速临床干预，降低手术风险并改善患者预后。
search_text: Non-invasive Localization of the Ventricular Excitation Origin Without Patient-specific Geometries Using Deep Learning 使用深度学习对心室兴奋源进行无创定位，无需患者特定的几何形状 Ventricular tachycardia (VT) can be one cause of sudden cardiac death affecting 4.25 million persons per year worldwide. A curative treatment is catheter ablation in order to inactivate the abnormally triggering regions. To facilitate and expedite the localization during the ablation procedure, we present two novel localization techniques based on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). In contrast to existing methods, e.g. using ECG imaging, our approaches were designed to be independent of the patient-specific geometries and directly applicable to surface ECG signals, while also delivering a binary transmural position. One method outputs ranked alternative solutions. Results can be visualized either on a generic or patient geometry. The CNNs were trained on a data set containing only simulated data and evaluated both on simulated and clinical test data. On simulated data, the median test error was below 3mm. The median localization error on the clinical data was as low as 32mm. The transmural position was correctly detected in up to 82% of all clinical cases. Using the ranked alternative solutions, the top-3 median error dropped to 20mm on clinical data. These results demonstrate a proof of principle to utilize CNNs to localize the activation source without the intrinsic need of patient-specific geometrical information. Furthermore, delivering multiple solutions can help the physician to find the real activation source amongst more than one possible locations. With further optimization, these methods have a high potential to speed up clinical interventions. Consequently they could decrease procedural risk and improve VT patients' outcomes. 室性心动过速 (VT) 可能是心源性猝死的原因之一，每年影响全球 425 万人。一种治疗方法是导管消融，以使异常触发区域失活。为了促进和加快消融过程中的定位，我们提出了两种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的新颖定位技术。与现有方法相比，例如使用心电图成像，我们的方法被设计为独立于患者特定的几何形状，并直接适用于表面心电图信号，同时还提供二元透壁位置。一种方法输出排序的替代解决方案。结果可以在通用或患者几何形状上可视化。 CNN 在仅包含模拟数据的数据集上进行训练，并根据模拟数据和临床测试数据进行评估。在模拟数据上，中值测试误差低于 3mm。临床数据的中位定位误差低至 32 毫米。在高达 82% 的临床病例中，透壁位置被正确检测到。使用排序后的替代解决方案，临床数据上前 3 名的中位误差降至 20 毫米。这些结果证明了利用 CNN 定位激活源的原理证明，而无需患者特定的几何信息。此外，提供多种解决方案可以帮助医生在多个可能的位置中找到真正的激活源。通过进一步优化，这些方法具有加速临床干预的巨大潜力。因此，它们可以降低手术风险并改善 VT 患者的预后。 本文提出两种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的非侵入性心室兴奋起源定位方法，无需患者特异性几何信息，直接利用体表心电图信号进行定位。 Nicolas Pilia,Steffen Schuler,Maike Rees,Gerald Moik,Danila Potyagaylo,Olaf Dössel,Axel Loewe eess.IV,cs.LG

title: Multi-channel Nuclear Norm Minus Frobenius Norm Minimization for Color Image Denoising
title_zh: 彩色图像去噪的多通道核范数减 Frobenius 范数最小化
abstract: Color image denoising is frequently encountered in various image processing and computer vision tasks. One traditional strategy is to convert the RGB image to a less correlated color space and denoise each channel of the new space separately. However, such a strategy can not fully exploit the correlated information between channels and is inadequate to obtain satisfactory results. To address this issue, this paper proposes a new multi-channel optimization model for color image denoising under the nuclear norm minus Frobenius norm minimization framework. Specifically, based on the block-matching, the color image is decomposed into overlapping RGB patches. For each patch, we stack its similar neighbors to form the corresponding patch matrix. The proposed model is performed on the patch matrix to recover its noise-free version. During the recovery process, a) a weight matrix is introduced to fully utilize the noise difference between channels; b) the singular values are shrunk adaptively without additionally assigning weights. With them, the proposed model can achieve promising results while keeping simplicity. To solve the proposed model, an accurate and effective algorithm is built based on the alternating direction method of multipliers framework. The solution of each updating step can be analytically expressed in closed-from. Rigorous theoretical analysis proves the solution sequences generated by the proposed algorithm converge to their respective stationary points. Experimental results on both synthetic and real noise datasets demonstrate the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art models.
summary: Color image denoising is frequently encountered in various image processing and computer vision tasks. One traditional strategy is to convert the RGB image to a less correlated color space and denoise each channel of the new space separately. However, such a strategy can not fully exploit the correlated information between channels and is inadequate to obtain satisfactory results. To address this issue, this paper proposes a new multi-channel optimization model for color image denoising under the nuclear norm minus Frobenius norm minimization framework. Specifically, based on the block-matching, the color image is decomposed into overlapping RGB patches. For each patch, we stack its similar neighbors to form the corresponding patch matrix. The proposed model is performed on the patch matrix to recover its noise-free version. During the recovery process, a) a weight matrix is introduced to fully utilize the noise difference between channels; b) the singular values are shrunk adaptively without additionally assigning weights. With them, the proposed model can achieve promising results while keeping simplicity. To solve the proposed model, an accurate and effective algorithm is built based on the alternating direction method of multipliers framework. The solution of each updating step can be analytically expressed in closed-from. Rigorous theoretical analysis proves the solution sequences generated by the proposed algorithm converge to their respective stationary points. Experimental results on both synthetic and real noise datasets demonstrate the proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 彩色图像去噪在各种图像处理和计算机视觉任务中经常遇到。一种传统策略是将 RGB 图像转换为相关性较低的颜色空间，并分别对新空间的每个通道进行去噪。然而，这种策略不能充分利用通道之间的相关信息，不足以获得令人满意的结果。针对这一问题，本文在核范数减Frobenius范数最小化框架下提出了一种新的彩色图像去噪多通道优化模型。具体来说，基于块匹配，彩色图像被分解为重叠的RGB色块。对于每个补丁，我们将其相似的邻居堆叠起来以形成相应的补丁矩阵。所提出的模型在补丁矩阵上执行以恢复其无噪声版本。在恢复过程中，a)引入权重矩阵，充分利用通道间的噪声差异； b) 奇异值自适应缩小，无需额外分配权重。有了它们，所提出的模型可以在保持简单性的同时取得有希望的结果。为了求解所提出的模型，基于乘子框架的交替方向方法建立了准确有效的算法。每个更新步骤的解都可以用封闭式解析表达。严格的理论分析证明该算法生成的解序列收敛于各自的驻点。合成和真实噪声数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多通道优化模型的彩色图像去噪方法，通过核范数减去弗罗贝尼乌斯范数最小化框架提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过转换颜色空间独立处理各通道，未能充分利用通道间的相关性，导致去噪效果不理想。
AI.method: 基于块匹配分解图像为重叠RGB块，构建相似邻域矩阵；引入权重矩阵利用通道噪声差异，并自适应收缩奇异值；采用ADMM框架设计高效算法求解。
AI.result: 在合成和真实噪声数据集上的实验表明，该模型优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过有效利用通道相关性，在保持简洁性的同时实现了更优的去噪性能。

title: ViWiD: Leveraging WiFi for Robust and Resource-Efficient SLAM
title_zh: ViWiD：利用 WiFi 实现稳健且资源高效的 SLAM
abstract: Recent interest towards autonomous navigation and exploration robots for indoor applications has spurred research into indoor Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) robot systems. While most of these SLAM systems use Visual and LiDAR sensors in tandem with an odometry sensor, these odometry sensors drift over time. To combat this drift, Visual SLAM systems deploy compute and memory intensive search algorithms to detect `Loop Closures', which make the trajectory estimate globally consistent. To circumvent these resource (compute and memory) intensive algorithms, we present ViWiD, which integrates WiFi and Visual sensors in a dual-layered system. This dual-layered approach separates the tasks of local and global trajectory estimation making ViWiD resource efficient while achieving on-par or better performance to state-of-the-art Visual SLAM. We demonstrate ViWiD's performance on four datasets, covering over 1500 m of traversed path and show 4.3x and 4x reduction in compute and memory consumption respectively compared to state-of-the-art Visual and Lidar SLAM systems with on par SLAM performance.
summary: Recent interest towards autonomous navigation and exploration robots for indoor applications has spurred research into indoor Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) robot systems. While most of these SLAM systems use Visual and LiDAR sensors in tandem with an odometry sensor, these odometry sensors drift over time. To combat this drift, Visual SLAM systems deploy compute and memory intensive search algorithms to detect `Loop Closures', which make the trajectory estimate globally consistent. To circumvent these resource (compute and memory) intensive algorithms, we present ViWiD, which integrates WiFi and Visual sensors in a dual-layered system. This dual-layered approach separates the tasks of local and global trajectory estimation making ViWiD resource efficient while achieving on-par or better performance to state-of-the-art Visual SLAM. We demonstrate ViWiD's performance on four datasets, covering over 1500 m of traversed path and show 4.3x and 4x reduction in compute and memory consumption respectively compared to state-of-the-art Visual and Lidar SLAM systems with on par SLAM performance.
abstract_zh: 最近对室内应用自主导航和探索机器人的兴趣刺激了对室内同步定位和建图（SLAM）机器人系统的研究。虽然大多数 SLAM 系统都使用视觉和 LiDAR 传感器与里程计传感器，但这些里程计传感器会随着时间的推移而发生漂移。为了对抗这种漂移，视觉 SLAM 系统部署计算和内存密集型搜索算法来检测“循环闭合”，从而使轨迹估计全局一致。为了规避这些资源（计算和内存）密集型算法，我们推出了 ViWiD，它将 WiFi 和视觉传感器集成在双层系统中。这种双层方法将局部和全局轨迹估计的任务分开，使 ViWiD 资源高效，同时实现与最先进的视觉 SLAM 相当或更好的性能。我们在四个数据集上展示了 ViWiD 的性能，覆盖了超过 1500 m 的遍历路径，与具有同等 SLAM 性能的最先进的视觉和激光雷达 SLAM 系统相比，计算和内存消耗分别减少了 4.3 倍和 4 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ViWiD的系统，通过结合WiFi和视觉传感器，实现资源高效且鲁棒的室内SLAM。
AI.motivation: 传统的SLAM系统依赖视觉和LiDAR传感器，但存在计算和内存消耗大的问题，尤其是在检测回环闭合时。因此，需要一种资源更高效的SLAM方法。
AI.method: ViWiD采用双层系统架构，将局部轨迹估计和全局轨迹估计分离，结合WiFi和视觉传感器，从而减少计算和内存的使用。
AI.result: ViWiD在四个数据集上进行了测试，覆盖了超过1500米的路径，结果显示其在计算和内存消耗上分别减少了4.3倍和4倍，同时保持与现有视觉SLAM系统相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: ViWiD通过结合WiFi和视觉传感器，提供了一种资源高效的SLAM解决方案，能够在减少计算和内存消耗的同时保持良好的SLAM性能。

This dual-layered approach separates the tasks of local and global trajectory estimation making ViWiD resource efficient while achieving on-par or better performance to state-of-the-art Visual SLAM. We demonstrate ViWiD's performance on four datasets, covering over 1500 m of traversed path and show 4.3x and 4x reduction in compute and memory consumption respectively compared to state-of-the-art Visual and Lidar SLAM systems with on par SLAM performance. 最近对室内应用自主导航和探索机器人的兴趣刺激了对室内同步定位和建图（SLAM）机器人系统的研究。虽然大多数 SLAM 系统都使用视觉和 LiDAR 传感器与里程计传感器，但这些里程计传感器会随着时间的推移而发生漂移。为了对抗这种漂移，视觉 SLAM 系统部署计算和内存密集型搜索算法来检测“循环闭合”，从而使轨迹估计全局一致。为了规避这些资源（计算和内存）密集型算法，我们推出了 ViWiD，它将 WiFi 和视觉传感器集成在双层系统中。这种双层方法将局部和全局轨迹估计的任务分开，使 ViWiD 资源高效，同时实现与最先进的视觉 SLAM 相当或更好的性能。我们在四个数据集上展示了 ViWiD 的性能，覆盖了超过 1500 m 的遍历路径，与具有同等 SLAM 性能的最先进的视觉和激光雷达 SLAM 系统相比，计算和内存消耗分别减少了 4.3 倍和 4 倍。 本文提出了一种名为ViWiD的系统，通过结合WiFi和视觉传感器，实现资源高效且鲁棒的室内SLAM。 Aditya Arun,William Hunter,Roshan Ayyalasomayajula,Dinesh Bharadia cs.RO

authors_text: Yue Meng,Zeng Qiu,Md Tawhid Bin Waez,Chuchu Fan
title: Case Studies for Computing Density of Reachable States for Safe Autonomous Motion Planning
title_zh: 计算安全自主运动规划可达状态密度的案例研究
abstract: Density of the reachable states can help understand the risk of safety-critical systems, especially in situations when worst-case reachability is too conservative. Recent work provides a data-driven approach to compute the density distribution of autonomous systems' forward reachable states online. In this paper, we study the use of such approach in combination with model predictive control for verifiable safe path planning under uncertainties. We first use the learned density distribution to compute the risk of collision online. If such risk exceeds the acceptable threshold, our method will plan for a new path around the previous trajectory, with the risk of collision below the threshold. Our method is well-suited to handle systems with uncertainties and complicated dynamics as our data-driven approach does not need an analytical form of the systems' dynamics and can estimate forward state density with an arbitrary initial distribution of uncertainties. We design two challenging scenarios (autonomous driving and hovercraft control) for safe motion planning in environments with obstacles under system uncertainties. We first show that our density estimation approach can reach a similar accuracy as the Monte-Carlo-based method while using only 0.01X training samples. By leveraging the estimated risk, our algorithm achieves the highest success rate in goal reaching when enforcing the safety rate above 0.99.
summary: Density of the reachable states can help understand the risk of safety-critical systems, especially in situations when worst-case reachability is too conservative. Recent work provides a data-driven approach to compute the density distribution of autonomous systems' forward reachable states online. In this paper, we study the use of such approach in combination with model predictive control for verifiable safe path planning under uncertainties. We first use the learned density distribution to compute the risk of collision online. If such risk exceeds the acceptable threshold, our method will plan for a new path around the previous trajectory, with the risk of collision below the threshold. Our method is well-suited to handle systems with uncertainties and complicated dynamics as our data-driven approach does not need an analytical form of the systems' dynamics and can estimate forward state density with an arbitrary initial distribution of uncertainties. We design two challenging scenarios (autonomous driving and hovercraft control) for safe motion planning in environments with obstacles under system uncertainties. We first show that our density estimation approach can reach a similar accuracy as the Monte-Carlo-based method while using only 0.01X training samples. By leveraging the estimated risk, our algorithm achieves the highest success rate in goal reaching when enforcing the safety rate above 0.99.
abstract_zh: 可到达状态的密度可以帮助了解安全关键系统的风险，特别是在最坏情况可达性过于保守的情况下。最近的工作提供了一种数据驱动的方法来在线计算自治系统的前向可达状态的密度分布。在本文中，我们研究了将这种方法与模型预测控制相结合，以在不确定性下进行可验证的安全路径规划。我们首先使用学习到的密度分布来计算在线碰撞风险。如果这种风险超过可接受的阈值，我们的方法将围绕先前的轨迹规划一条新路径，并且碰撞风险低于阈值。我们的方法非常适合处理具有不确定性和复杂动态的系统，因为我们的数据驱动方法不需要系统动态的分析形式，并且可以估计具有任意初始不确定性分布的前向状态密度。我们设计了两个具有挑战性的场景（自动驾驶和气垫船控制），用于在系统不确定性下有障碍的环境中进行安全运动规划。我们首先证明，我们的密度估计方法可以在仅使用 0.01X 训练样本的情况下达到与基于蒙特卡罗的方法相似的精度。通过利用估计的风险，我们的算法在安全率高于 0.99 时实现了最高的目标成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在不确定系统中使用数据驱动方法计算可达状态密度以实现安全自主运动规划的案例。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键系统中，可达状态密度有助于理解风险，而最坏情况下的可达性过于保守。现有方法可以在线计算自主系统的可达状态密度分布，但需要结合模型预测控制以实现可验证的安全路径规划。
AI.method: 本文采用数据驱动的方法在线计算可达状态密度分布，并结合模型预测控制进行安全路径规划。通过估计碰撞风险，若风险超过阈值则重新规划路径。
AI.result: 该方法在仅使用0.01X训练样本的情况下，达到与蒙特卡洛方法相似的精度，并在安全率高于0.99时实现了最高的目标到达成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于处理具有不确定性和复杂动力学的系统，并通过两个具有挑战性的场景验证了其有效性。

title: PTab: Using the Pre-trained Language Model for Modeling Tabular Data
title_zh: PTab：使用预先训练的语言模型对表格数据进行建模
abstract: Tabular data is the foundation of the information age and has been extensively studied. Recent studies show that neural-based models are effective in learning contextual representation for tabular data. The learning of an effective contextual representation requires meaningful features and a large amount of data. However, current methods often fail to properly learn a contextual representation from the features without semantic information. In addition, it's intractable to enlarge the training set through mixed tabular datasets due to the difference between datasets. To address these problems, we propose a novel framework PTab, using the Pre-trained language model to model Tabular data. PTab learns a contextual representation of tabular data through a three-stage processing: Modality Transformation(MT), Masked-Language Fine-tuning(MF), and Classification Fine-tuning(CF). We initialize our model with a pre-trained Model (PTM) which contains semantic information learned from the large-scale language data. Consequently, contextual representation can be learned effectively during the fine-tuning stages. In addition, we can naturally mix the textualized tabular data to enlarge the training set to further improve representation learning. We evaluate PTab on eight popular tabular classification datasets. Experimental results show that our method has achieved a better average AUC score in supervised settings compared to the state-of-the-art baselines(e.g. XGBoost), and outperforms counterpart methods under semi-supervised settings. We present visualization results that show PTab has well instance-based interpretability.
summary: Tabular data is the foundation of the information age and has been extensively studied. Recent studies show that neural-based models are effective in learning contextual representation for tabular data. The learning of an effective contextual representation requires meaningful features and a large amount of data. However, current methods often fail to properly learn a contextual representation from the features without semantic information. In addition, it's intractable to enlarge the training set through mixed tabular datasets due to the difference between datasets. To address these problems, we propose a novel framework PTab, using the Pre-trained language model to model Tabular data. PTab learns a contextual representation of tabular data through a three-stage processing: Modality Transformation(MT), Masked-Language Fine-tuning(MF), and Classification Fine-tuning(CF). We initialize our model with a pre-trained Model (PTM) which contains semantic information learned from the large-scale language data. Consequently, contextual representation can be learned effectively during the fine-tuning stages. In addition, we can naturally mix the textualized tabular data to enlarge the training set to further improve representation learning. We evaluate PTab on eight popular tabular classification datasets. Experimental results show that our method has achieved a better average AUC score in supervised settings compared to the state-of-the-art baselines(e.g. XGBoost), and outperforms counterpart methods under semi-supervised settings. We present visualization results that show PTab has well instance-based interpretability.
abstract_zh: 表格数据是信息时代的基础，已被广泛研究。最近的研究表明，基于神经的模型可以有效地学习表格数据的上下文表示。学习有效的上下文表示需要有意义的特征和大量数据。然而，当前的方法通常无法从没有语义信息的特征中正确学习上下文表示。此外，由于数据集之间的差异，通过混合表格数据集来扩大训练集也很困难。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个新的框架 PTab，使用预训练语言模型来建模表格数据。 PTab 通过三阶段处理来学习表格数据的上下文表示：模态转换（MT）、掩码语言微调（MF）和分类微调（CF）。我们使用预训练模型（PTM）初始化模型，该模型包含从大规模语言数据中学习到的语义信息。因此，在微调阶段可以有效地学习上下文表示。此外，我们可以自然地混合文本化的表格数据来扩大训练集，以进一步改进表示学习。我们在八个流行的表格分类数据集上评估 PTab。实验结果表明，与最先进的基线（例如 XGBoost）相比，我们的方法在监督设置中取得了更好的平均 AUC 分数，并且在半监督设置下优于对应方法。我们提供的可视化结果表明 PTab 具有良好的基于​​实例的可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PTab框架，利用预训练语言模型对表格数据进行建模，解决现有方法在语义信息学习和数据集混合方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据建模方法难以有效学习缺乏语义信息的上下文表示，且因数据集差异难以通过混合数据扩大训练集。
AI.method: PTab框架包含三个阶段：模态转换（MT）、掩码语言微调（MF）和分类微调（CF），利用预训练模型的语义信息并混合文本化表格数据增强训练。
AI.result: 在八个表格分类数据集上，PTab在监督和半监督设置下均优于XGBoost等基线方法，且具有良好的实例级可解释性。
AI.conclusion: PTab通过预训练语言模型有效提升了表格数据的上下文表示学习，验证了语义信息利用与数据混合策略的有效性。

We present visualization results that show PTab has well instance-based interpretability. 表格数据是信息时代的基础，已被广泛研究。最近的研究表明，基于神经的模型可以有效地学习表格数据的上下文表示。学习有效的上下文表示需要有意义的特征和大量数据。然而，当前的方法通常无法从没有语义信息的特征中正确学习上下文表示。此外，由于数据集之间的差异，通过混合表格数据集来扩大训练集也很困难。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个新的框架 PTab，使用预训练语言模型来建模表格数据。 PTab 通过三阶段处理来学习表格数据的上下文表示：模态转换（MT）、掩码语言微调（MF）和分类微调（CF）。我们使用预训练模型（PTM）初始化模型，该模型包含从大规模语言数据中学习到的语义信息。因此，在微调阶段可以有效地学习上下文表示。此外，我们可以自然地混合文本化的表格数据来扩大训练集，以进一步改进表示学习。我们在八个流行的表格分类数据集上评估 PTab。实验结果表明，与最先进的基线（例如 XGBoost）相比，我们的方法在监督设置中取得了更好的平均 AUC 分数，并且在半监督设置下优于对应方法。我们提供的可视化结果表明 PTab 具有良好的基于​​实例的可解释性。 本文提出PTab框架，利用预训练语言模型对表格数据进行建模，解决现有方法在语义信息学习和数据集混合方面的不足。 Guang Liu,Jie Yang,Ledell Wu cs.LG,cs.AI

title: 'Surprised, Shocked, Worried': User Reactions to Facebook Data Collection from Third Parties
title_zh: “惊讶、震惊、担忧”：用户对第三方收集 Facebook 数据的反应
comment: Accepted to PETS (Privacy Enhancing Technologies Symposium) 2023
comments: Accepted to PETS (Privacy Enhancing Technologies Symposium) 2023
abstract: Data collection and aggregation by online services happens to an extent that is often beyond awareness and comprehension of its users. Transparency tools become crucial to inform people, though it is unclear how well they work. To investigate this matter, we conducted a user study focusing on Facebook, which has recently released the "Off-Facebook Activity" transparency dashboard that informs about personal data collection from third parties. We exposed a group of n = 100 participants to the dashboard and surveyed their level of awareness and reactions to understand how transparency impacts users' privacy attitudes and intended behavior. Our participants were surprised about the massive amount of collected data, became significantly less comfortable with data collection, and more likely to take protective measures. Collaterally, we observed that current consent schemes are inadequate. Based on the survey findings, we make recommendations for more usable transparency and highlight the need to raise awareness about transparency tools and to provide easily actionable privacy controls.
summary: Data collection and aggregation by online services happens to an extent that is often beyond awareness and comprehension of its users. Transparency tools become crucial to inform people, though it is unclear how well they work. To investigate this matter, we conducted a user study focusing on Facebook, which has recently released the "Off-Facebook Activity" transparency dashboard that informs about personal data collection from third parties. We exposed a group of n = 100 participants to the dashboard and surveyed their level of awareness and reactions to understand how transparency impacts users' privacy attitudes and intended behavior. Our participants were surprised about the massive amount of collected data, became significantly less comfortable with data collection, and more likely to take protective measures. Collaterally, we observed that current consent schemes are inadequate. Based on the survey findings, we make recommendations for more usable transparency and highlight the need to raise awareness about transparency tools and to provide easily actionable privacy controls.
abstract_zh: 在线服务收集和聚合数据的程度往往超出了用户的意识和理解范围。透明度工具对于告知人们至关重要，尽管尚不清楚它们的效果如何。为了调查此事，我们针对 Facebook 进行了一项用户研究，该公司最近发布了“Facebook 外活动”透明度仪表板，告知第三方收集的个人数据。我们让一组 n = 100 名参与者接触仪表板，并调查他们的意识和反应水平，以了解透明度如何影响用户的隐私态度和预期行为。我们的参与者对收集到的大量数据感到惊讶，对数据收集明显感到不舒服，并且更有可能采取保护措施。另外，我们观察到当前的同意方案还不够充分。根据调查结果，我们提出了提高透明度的建议，并强调需要提高对透明度工具的认识并提供易于操作的隐私控制。

AI.tldr: 研究用户对Facebook第三方数据收集的反应及透明工具的效果
AI.motivation: 探讨透明工具如何影响用户隐私态度和行为，评估现有工具的有效性
AI.method: 通过用户研究，让100名参与者使用Facebook的透明度仪表板，调查其意识和反应
AI.result: 用户对数据量感到惊讶，隐私舒适度下降，更倾向保护措施，且现有同意机制不足
AI.conclusion: 需改进透明工具设计，提升用户意识，并提供更易操作的隐私控制选项

authors_text: Meng Xiao,Dongjie Wang,Min Wu,Kunpeng Liu,Hui Xiong,Yuanchun Zhou,Yanjie Fu
title: Self-Optimizing Feature Transformation
title_zh: 自优化特征转换
comment: Under review of TKDE. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.14526
comments: Under review of TKDE. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.14526
abstract: Feature transformation aims to extract a good representation (feature) space by mathematically transforming existing features. It is crucial to address the curse of dimensionality, enhance model generalization, overcome data sparsity, and expand the availability of classic models. Current research focuses on domain knowledge-based feature engineering or learning latent representations; nevertheless, these methods are not entirely automated and cannot produce a traceable and optimal representation space. When rebuilding a feature space for a machine learning task, can these limitations be addressed concurrently? In this extension study, we present a self-optimizing framework for feature transformation. To achieve a better performance, we improved the preliminary work by (1) obtaining an advanced state representation for enabling reinforced agents to comprehend the current feature set better; and (2) resolving Q-value overestimation in reinforced agents for learning unbiased and effective policies. Finally, to make experiments more convincing than the preliminary work, we conclude by adding the outlier detection task with five datasets, evaluating various state representation approaches, and comparing different training strategies. Extensive experiments and case studies show that our work is more effective and superior.
summary: Feature transformation aims to extract a good representation (feature) space by mathematically transforming existing features. It is crucial to address the curse of dimensionality, enhance model generalization, overcome data sparsity, and expand the availability of classic models. Current research focuses on domain knowledge-based feature engineering or learning latent representations; nevertheless, these methods are not entirely automated and cannot produce a traceable and optimal representation space. When rebuilding a feature space for a machine learning task, can these limitations be addressed concurrently? In this extension study, we present a self-optimizing framework for feature transformation. To achieve a better performance, we improved the preliminary work by (1) obtaining an advanced state representation for enabling reinforced agents to comprehend the current feature set better; and (2) resolving Q-value overestimation in reinforced agents for learning unbiased and effective policies. Finally, to make experiments more convincing than the preliminary work, we conclude by adding the outlier detection task with five datasets, evaluating various state representation approaches, and comparing different training strategies. Extensive experiments and case studies show that our work is more effective and superior.
abstract_zh: 特征变换旨在通过对现有特征进行数学变换来提取良好的表示（特征）空间。解决维数灾难、增强模型泛化性、克服数据稀疏性、扩大经典模型的可用性至关重要。目前的研究重点是基于领域知识的特征工程或学习潜在表示；然而，这些方法并不是完全自动化的，并且不能产生可追踪的最佳表示空间。在为机器学习任务重建特征空间时，可以同时解决这些限制吗？在这项扩展研究中，我们提出了一个用于特征转换的自优化框架。为了获得更好的性能，我们通过以下方式改进了前期工作：（1）获得高级状态表示，使强化代理能够更好地理解当前的特征集； (2) 解决强化智能体中 Q 值高估的问题，以学习无偏且有效的策略。最后，为了使实验比初步工作更有说服力，我们通过添加具有五个数据集的异常值检测任务、评估各种状态表示方法并比较不同的训练策略来得出结论。大量的实验和案例研究表明我们的工作更加有效和优越。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自优化特征变换框架，旨在通过强化学习方法解决特征工程自动化不足及表示空间不可追溯的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有特征变换方法依赖人工特征工程或黑箱表示学习，难以实现完全自动化且无法保证表示空间的可解释性与最优性。
AI.method: 改进两方面：1）构建更精准的状态表示以提升强化学习代理对特征集的理解；2）修正Q值高估问题以学习无偏策略。通过异常检测任务与五个数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在特征表示质量与模型泛化能力上优于基线方法，且在异常检测任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自优化框架有效解决了特征变换的自动化与可追溯性难题，在多种任务场景下均展现优越性能。

authors_text: Rui Xin,Chudi Zhong,Zhi Chen,Takuya Takagi,Margo Seltzer,Cynthia Rudin
title: Exploring the Whole Rashomon Set of Sparse Decision Trees
title_zh: 探索整个罗生门稀疏决策树集
abstract: In any given machine learning problem, there may be many models that could explain the data almost equally well. However, most learning algorithms return only one of these models, leaving practitioners with no practical way to explore alternative models that might have desirable properties beyond what could be expressed within a loss function. The Rashomon set is the set of these all almost-optimal models. Rashomon sets can be extremely complicated, particularly for highly nonlinear function classes that allow complex interaction terms, such as decision trees. We provide the first technique for completely enumerating the Rashomon set for sparse decision trees; in fact, our work provides the first complete enumeration of any Rashomon set for a non-trivial problem with a highly nonlinear discrete function class. This allows the user an unprecedented level of control over model choice among all models that are approximately equally good. We represent the Rashomon set in a specialized data structure that supports efficient querying and sampling. We show three applications of the Rashomon set: 1) it can be used to study variable importance for the set of almost-optimal trees (as opposed to a single tree), 2) the Rashomon set for accuracy enables enumeration of the Rashomon sets for balanced accuracy and F1-score, and 3) the Rashomon set for a full dataset can be used to produce Rashomon sets constructed with only subsets of the data set. Thus, we are able to examine Rashomon sets across problems with a new lens, enabling users to choose models rather than be at the mercy of an algorithm that produces only a single model.
summary: In any given machine learning problem, there may be many models that could explain the data almost equally well. However, most learning algorithms return only one of these models, leaving practitioners with no practical way to explore alternative models that might have desirable properties beyond what could be expressed within a loss function. The Rashomon set is the set of these all almost-optimal models. Rashomon sets can be extremely complicated, particularly for highly nonlinear function classes that allow complex interaction terms, such as decision trees. We provide the first technique for completely enumerating the Rashomon set for sparse decision trees; in fact, our work provides the first complete enumeration of any Rashomon set for a non-trivial problem with a highly nonlinear discrete function class. This allows the user an unprecedented level of control over model choice among all models that are approximately equally good. We represent the Rashomon set in a specialized data structure that supports efficient querying and sampling. We show three applications of the Rashomon set: 1) it can be used to study variable importance for the set of almost-optimal trees (as opposed to a single tree), 2) the Rashomon set for accuracy enables enumeration of the Rashomon sets for balanced accuracy and F1-score, and 3) the Rashomon set for a full dataset can be used to produce Rashomon sets constructed with only subsets of the data set. Thus, we are able to examine Rashomon sets across problems with a new lens, enabling users to choose models rather than be at the mercy of an algorithm that produces only a single model.
abstract_zh: 在任何给定的机器学习问题中，可能有许多模型可以几乎同样好地解释数据。然而，大多数学习算法仅返回这些模型中的一种，使得从业者没有实际的方法来探索替代模型，这些模型可能具有超出损失函数所能表达的所需属性。罗生门集是所有这些几乎最优模型的集合。罗生门集可能非常复杂，特别是对于允许复杂交互项的高度非线性函数类，例如决策树。我们提供了第一种完全枚举稀疏决策树罗生门集的技术；事实上，我们的工作为具有高度非线性离散函数类的非平凡问题提供了任何罗生门集的第一个完整枚举。这使得用户能够在几乎同样优秀的所有模型中对模型选择进行前所未有的控制。我们用支持高效查询和采样的专用数据结构来表示罗生门集。我们展示了罗生门集的三个应用：1）它可用于研究几乎最优树集（而不是单棵树）的变量重要性，2）用于准确性的罗生门集可以枚举罗生门集以平衡准确性和 F1 分数，3）完整数据集的罗生门集可用于生成仅由数据集子集构建的罗生门集。因此，我们能够用新的视角来检查罗生门集的问题，使用户能够选择模型，而不是受到仅生成单个模型的算法的支配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种完全枚举稀疏决策树的Rashomon集（所有近似最优模型集合）的方法，为用户提供更灵活的模型选择能力。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习算法仅返回单一模型，而实际可能存在多个性能相近的模型，用户无法探索其他可能具有额外优势的模型。
AI.method: 通过设计专用数据结构，首次实现对稀疏决策树Rashomon集的完全枚举，并支持高效查询与采样。
AI.result: 实现了Rashomon集的枚举，展示了其在变量重要性分析、多指标扩展及子集数据应用中的三个实际用途。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使用户能主动选择近似最优模型集合中的模型，而非被动接受算法输出的单一模型，提升了模型解释性与可控性。

search_text: Exploring the Whole Rashomon Set of Sparse Decision Trees 探索整个罗生门稀疏决策树集 In any given machine learning problem, there may be many models that could explain the data almost equally well. However, most learning algorithms return only one of these models, leaving practitioners with no practical way to explore alternative models that might have desirable properties beyond what could be expressed within a loss function. The Rashomon set is the set of these all almost-optimal models. Rashomon sets can be extremely complicated, particularly for highly nonlinear function classes that allow complex interaction terms, such as decision trees. We provide the first technique for completely enumerating the Rashomon set for sparse decision trees; in fact, our work provides the first complete enumeration of any Rashomon set for a non-trivial problem with a highly nonlinear discrete function class. This allows the user an unprecedented level of control over model choice among all models that are approximately equally good. We represent the Rashomon set in a specialized data structure that supports efficient querying and sampling. We show three applications of the Rashomon set: 1) it can be used to study variable importance for the set of almost-optimal trees (as opposed to a single tree), 2) the Rashomon set for accuracy enables enumeration of the Rashomon sets for balanced accuracy and F1-score, and 3) the Rashomon set for a full dataset can be used to produce Rashomon sets constructed with only subsets of the data set. Thus, we are able to examine Rashomon sets across problems with a new lens, enabling users to choose models rather than be at the mercy of an algorithm that produces only a single model. 在任何给定的机器学习问题中，可能有许多模型可以几乎同样好地解释数据。然而，大多数学习算法仅返回这些模型中的一种，使得从业者没有实际的方法来探索替代模型，这些模型可能具有超出损失函数所能表达的所需属性。罗生门集是所有这些几乎最优模型的集合。罗生门集可能非常复杂，特别是对于允许复杂交互项的高度非线性函数类，例如决策树。我们提供了第一种完全枚举稀疏决策树罗生门集的技术；事实上，我们的工作为具有高度非线性离散函数类的非平凡问题提供了任何罗生门集的第一个完整枚举。这使得用户能够在几乎同样优秀的所有模型中对模型选择进行前所未有的控制。我们用支持高效查询和采样的专用数据结构来表示罗生门集。我们展示了罗生门集的三个应用：1）它可用于研究几乎最优树集（而不是单棵树）的变量重要性，2）用于准确性的罗生门集可以枚举罗生门集以平衡准确性和 F1 分数，3）完整数据集的罗生门集可用于生成仅由数据集子集构建的罗生门集。因此，我们能够用新的视角来检查罗生门集的问题，使用户能够选择模型，而不是受到仅生成单个模型的算法的支配。 本文提出了一种完全枚举稀疏决策树的Rashomon集（所有近似最优模型集合）的方法，为用户提供更灵活的模型选择能力。 Rui Xin,Chudi Zhong,Zhi Chen,Takuya Takagi,Margo Seltzer,Cynthia Rudin cs.LG,cs.AI

title: A Biologically-Inspired Dual Stream World Model
title_zh: 受生物学启发的双流世界模型
abstract: The medial temporal lobe (MTL), a brain region containing the hippocampus and nearby areas, is hypothesized to be an experience-construction system in mammals, supporting both recall and imagination of temporally-extended sequences of events. Such capabilities are also core to many recently proposed ``world models" in the field of AI research. Taking inspiration from this connection, we propose a novel variant, the Dual Stream World Model (DSWM), which learns from high-dimensional observations and dissociates them into context and content streams. DSWM can reliably generate imagined trajectories in novel 2D environments after only a single exposure, outperforming a standard world model. DSWM also learns latent representations which bear a strong resemblance to place cells found in the hippocampus. We show that this representation is useful as a reinforcement learning basis function, and that the generative model can be used to aid the policy learning process using Dyna-like updates.
summary: The medial temporal lobe (MTL), a brain region containing the hippocampus and nearby areas, is hypothesized to be an experience-construction system in mammals, supporting both recall and imagination of temporally-extended sequences of events. Such capabilities are also core to many recently proposed ``world models" in the field of AI research. Taking inspiration from this connection, we propose a novel variant, the Dual Stream World Model (DSWM), which learns from high-dimensional observations and dissociates them into context and content streams. DSWM can reliably generate imagined trajectories in novel 2D environments after only a single exposure, outperforming a standard world model. DSWM also learns latent representations which bear a strong resemblance to place cells found in the hippocampus. We show that this representation is useful as a reinforcement learning basis function, and that the generative model can be used to aid the policy learning process using Dyna-like updates.
abstract_zh: 内侧颞叶（MTL）是一个包含海马体和附近区域的大脑区域，被假设为哺乳动物的经验构建系统，支持对时间上延伸的事件序列的回忆和想象。这些功能也是人工智能研究领域最近提出的许多“世界模型”的核心。从这种联系中汲取灵感，我们提出了一种新颖的变体，即双流世界模型（DSWM），它从高维观察中学习并将其分解为上下文和内容流。DSWM 只需一次曝光即可在新颖的 2D 环境中可靠地生成想象的轨迹，优于标准世界模型。DSWM 还学习与发现的位置细胞非常相似的潜在表示我们表明，这种表示作为强化学习基础函数是有用的，并且生成模型可用于使用类似 Dyna 的更新来辅助策略学习过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受生物学启发的双流世界模型（DSWM），通过将高维观测分离为上下文和内容流，实现对新环境的快速轨迹生成与强化学习优化。
AI.motivation: 哺乳动物的内侧颞叶（MTL）具有构建经验序列的能力，这与AI领域世界模型的核心功能相似。现有模型在序列生成和强化学习中存在局限，需借鉴生物机制改进。
AI.method: 设计双流架构分离观测数据的上下文（环境结构）与内容（动态信息），结合Dyna-like更新机制，利用生成模型辅助策略学习。
AI.result: DSWM在单次暴露后可生成新颖2D环境的想象轨迹，表现优于标准模型；其潜在表示与海马体位置细胞相似，可作为强化学习的有效基函数。
AI.conclusion: DSWM通过生物启发的双流机制实现了高效世界建模与强化学习，为AI模型设计和神经科学探索提供了新视角。

authors_text: Justus Huebotter,Serge Thill,Marcel van Gerven,Pablo Lanillos
title: Learning Policies for Continuous Control via Transition Models
title_zh: 通过过渡模型进行连续控制的学习策略
abstract: It is doubtful that animals have perfect inverse models of their limbs (e.g., what muscle contraction must be applied to every joint to reach a particular location in space). However, in robot control, moving an arm's end-effector to a target position or along a target trajectory requires accurate forward and inverse models. Here we show that by learning the transition (forward) model from interaction, we can use it to drive the learning of an amortized policy. Hence, we revisit policy optimization in relation to the deep active inference framework and describe a modular neural network architecture that simultaneously learns the system dynamics from prediction errors and the stochastic policy that generates suitable continuous control commands to reach a desired reference position. We evaluated the model by comparing it against the baseline of a linear quadratic regulator, and conclude with additional steps to take toward human-like motor control.
summary: It is doubtful that animals have perfect inverse models of their limbs (e.g., what muscle contraction must be applied to every joint to reach a particular location in space). However, in robot control, moving an arm's end-effector to a target position or along a target trajectory requires accurate forward and inverse models. Here we show that by learning the transition (forward) model from interaction, we can use it to drive the learning of an amortized policy. Hence, we revisit policy optimization in relation to the deep active inference framework and describe a modular neural network architecture that simultaneously learns the system dynamics from prediction errors and the stochastic policy that generates suitable continuous control commands to reach a desired reference position. We evaluated the model by comparing it against the baseline of a linear quadratic regulator, and conclude with additional steps to take toward human-like motor control.
abstract_zh: 动物是否拥有完美的四肢逆模型（例如，必须对每个关节施加何种肌肉收缩才能到达空间中的特定位置）值得怀疑。然而，在机器人控制中，将手臂的末端执行器移动到目标位置或沿着目标轨迹需要精确的正向和逆向模型。在这里，我们展示了通过从交互中学习过渡（前向）模型，我们可以用它来驱动摊销策略的学习。因此，我们重新审视与深度主动推理框架相关的策略优化，并描述了一种模块化神经网络架构，该架构同时从预测误差中学习系统动态，以及生成合适的连续控制命令以达到所需参考位置的随机策略。我们通过将模型与线性二次调节器的基线进行比较来评估该模型，并得出了实现类人运动控制的额外步骤。

AI.tldr: 通过学习转移模型来优化连续控制策略
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖精确的前向和逆模型，但实际中模型不准确，需新方法
AI.method: 结合深度主动推理框架与模块化神经网络，同时学习系统动力学与随机策略
AI.result: 模型在连续控制任务中表现优于线性二次调节器
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究以实现更接近人类的运动控制

authors_text: Benjamin Aram Berendsohn,Ishay Golinsky,Haim Kaplan,László Kozma
title: Fast approximation of search trees on trees with centroid trees
title_zh: 具有质心树的树上搜索树的快速逼近
abstract: Search trees on trees (STTs) generalize the fundamental binary search tree (BST) data structure: in STTs the underlying search space is an arbitrary tree, whereas in BSTs it is a path. An optimal BST of size $n$ can be computed for a given distribution of queries in $O(n^2)$ time [Knuth 1971] and centroid BSTs provide a nearly-optimal alternative, computable in $O(n)$ time [Mehlhorn 1977]. By contrast, optimal STTs are not known to be computable in polynomial time, and the fastest constant-approximation algorithm runs in $O(n^3)$ time [Berendsohn, Kozma 2022]. Centroid trees can be defined for STTs analogously to BSTs, and they have been used in a wide range of algorithmic applications. In the unweighted case (i.e., for a uniform distribution of queries), a centroid tree can be computed in $O(n)$ time [Brodal et al. 2001; Della Giustina et al. 2019]. These algorithms, however, do not readily extend to the weighted case. Moreover, no approximation guarantees were previously known for centroid trees in either the unweighted or weighted cases. In this paper we revisit centroid trees in a general, weighted setting, and we settle both the algorithmic complexity of constructing them, and the quality of their approximation. For constructing a weighted centroid tree, we give an output-sensitive $O(n\log h)\subseteq O(n\log n)$ time algorithm, where $h$ is the height of the resulting centroid tree. If the weights are of polynomial complexity, the running time is $O(n\log\log n)$. We show these bounds to be optimal, in a general decision tree model of computation. For approximation, we prove that the cost of a centroid tree is at most twice the optimum, and this guarantee is best possible, both in the weighted and unweighted cases. We also give tight, fine-grained bounds on the approximation-ratio for bounded-degree trees and on the approximation-ratio of more general $α$-centroid trees.
summary: Search trees on trees (STTs) generalize the fundamental binary search tree (BST) data structure: in STTs the underlying search space is an arbitrary tree, whereas in BSTs it is a path. An optimal BST of size $n$ can be computed for a given distribution of queries in $O(n^2)$ time [Knuth 1971] and centroid BSTs provide a nearly-optimal alternative, computable in $O(n)$ time [Mehlhorn 1977]. By contrast, optimal STTs are not known to be computable in polynomial time, and the fastest constant-approximation algorithm runs in $O(n^3)$ time [Berendsohn, Kozma 2022]. Centroid trees can be defined for STTs analogously to BSTs, and they have been used in a wide range of algorithmic applications. In the unweighted case (i.e., for a uniform distribution of queries), a centroid tree can be computed in $O(n)$ time [Brodal et al. 2001; Della Giustina et al. 2019]. These algorithms, however, do not readily extend to the weighted case. Moreover, no approximation guarantees were previously known for centroid trees in either the unweighted or weighted cases. In this paper we revisit centroid trees in a general, weighted setting, and we settle both the algorithmic complexity of constructing them, and the quality of their approximation. For constructing a weighted centroid tree, we give an output-sensitive $O(n\log h)\subseteq O(n\log n)$ time algorithm, where $h$ is the height of the resulting centroid tree. If the weights are of polynomial complexity, the running time is $O(n\log\log n)$. We show these bounds to be optimal, in a general decision tree model of computation. For approximation, we prove that the cost of a centroid tree is at most twice the optimum, and this guarantee is best possible, both in the weighted and unweighted cases. We also give tight, fine-grained bounds on the approximation-ratio for bounded-degree trees and on the approximation-ratio of more general $α$-centroid trees.
abstract_zh: 树上搜索树 (STT) 概括了基本的二叉搜索树 (BST) 数据结构：在 STT 中，底层搜索空间是任意树，而在 BST 中，它是一条路径。对于给定的查询分布，可以在 $O(n^2)$ 时间内计算出大小为 $n$ 的最优 BST [Knuth 1971]，而质心 BST 提供了一种近乎最优的替代方案，可在 $O(n)$ 时间内计算 [Mehlhorn 1977]。相比之下，最优 STT 未知是否可以在多项式时间内计算，最快的常数逼近算法运行时间为 $O(n^3)$ 时间 [Berendsohn, Kozma 2022]。与 BST 类似，可以为 STT 定义质心树，并且它们已被用于广泛的算法应用中。在未加权的情况下（即，对于查询的均匀分布），可以在 $O(n)$ 时间内计算质心树 [Brodal 等人。 2001年；德拉·朱斯蒂娜等人。 2019]。然而，这些算法不容易扩展到加权情况。此外，无论是未加权还是加权情况下，之前都不知道质心树的近似保证。在本文中，我们在一般的加权设置中重新审视质心树，并解决了构造它们的算法复杂性及其近似的质量。为了构建加权质心树，我们给出了输出敏感的 $O(n\log h)\subseteq O(n\log n)$ 时间算法，其中 $h$ 是生成的质心树的高度。如果权重具有多项式复杂度，则运行时间为 $O(n\log\log n)$。我们证明这些界限在通用决策树计算模型中是最优的。为了近似，我们证明质心树的成本至多是最优成本的两倍，并且无论在加权和未加权的情况下，这种保证都是最好的。我们还对有界度树的近似比和更一般的$α$质心树的近似比给出了严格的、细粒度的界限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在一般加权情况下构建中心树的算法复杂度和近似质量，提出了高效的算法并证明了其近似比。
AI.motivation: 尽管中心树在无权场景下已有高效算法，但加权场景缺乏有效方法且无近似保证，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 提出输出敏感的O(n log h)时间算法（多项式权重下为O(n log log n)），并证明其在决策树模型中的最优性。
AI.result: 构建算法时间复杂度最优，中心树近似比不超过最优解的两倍（加权和无权场景均适用），并给出有界度树的细粒度分析。
AI.conclusion: 解决了加权中心树的构建复杂度与近似质量问题，为STT应用提供了理论支撑与高效实现方案。

title: Continual Learning for Class- and Domain-Incremental Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 类和域增量语义分割的持续学习
comment: ef:2021 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), 2021, pp. 1345-1351
comments: ef:2021 IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV), 2021, pp. 1345-1351
abstract: The field of continual deep learning is an emerging field and a lot of progress has been made. However, concurrently most of the approaches are only tested on the task of image classification, which is not relevant in the field of intelligent vehicles. Only recently approaches for class-incremental semantic segmentation were proposed. However, all of those approaches are based on some form of knowledge distillation. At the moment there are no investigations on replay-based approaches that are commonly used for object recognition in a continual setting. At the same time while unsupervised domain adaption for semantic segmentation gained a lot of traction, investigations regarding domain-incremental learning in an continual setting is not well-studied. Therefore, the goal of our work is to evaluate and adapt established solutions for continual object recognition to the task of semantic segmentation and to provide baseline methods and evaluation protocols for the task of continual semantic segmentation. We firstly introduce evaluation protocols for the class- and domain-incremental segmentation and analyze selected approaches. We show that the nature of the task of semantic segmentation changes which methods are most effective in mitigating forgetting compared to image classification. Especially, in class-incremental learning knowledge distillation proves to be a vital tool, whereas in domain-incremental learning replay methods are the most effective method.
summary: The field of continual deep learning is an emerging field and a lot of progress has been made. However, concurrently most of the approaches are only tested on the task of image classification, which is not relevant in the field of intelligent vehicles. Only recently approaches for class-incremental semantic segmentation were proposed. However, all of those approaches are based on some form of knowledge distillation. At the moment there are no investigations on replay-based approaches that are commonly used for object recognition in a continual setting. At the same time while unsupervised domain adaption for semantic segmentation gained a lot of traction, investigations regarding domain-incremental learning in an continual setting is not well-studied. Therefore, the goal of our work is to evaluate and adapt established solutions for continual object recognition to the task of semantic segmentation and to provide baseline methods and evaluation protocols for the task of continual semantic segmentation. We firstly introduce evaluation protocols for the class- and domain-incremental segmentation and analyze selected approaches. We show that the nature of the task of semantic segmentation changes which methods are most effective in mitigating forgetting compared to image classification. Especially, in class-incremental learning knowledge distillation proves to be a vital tool, whereas in domain-incremental learning replay methods are the most effective method.
abstract_zh: 持续深度学习领域是一个新兴领域，并且已经取得了很多进展。然而，同时大多数方法仅在图像分类任务上进行测试，这与智能汽车领域无关。最近才提出了类增量语义分割的方法。然而，所有这些方法都是基于某种形式的知识蒸馏。目前还没有对通常用于连续环境中的对象识别的基于重放的方法进行研究。与此同时，虽然语义分割的无监督领域适应获得了很大的关注，但关于持续环境中的领域增量学习的研究还没有得到充分研究。因此，我们工作的目标是评估和调整现有的连续对象识别解决方案以适应语义分割任务，并为连续语义分割任务提供基线方法和评估协议。我们首先介绍类和域增量分割的评估协议并分析所选方法。我们表明，与图像分类相比，语义分割任务的性质改变了哪些方法在减轻遗忘方面最有效。特别是，在课堂增量学习中，知识蒸馏被证明是一个重要的工具，而在领域增量学习中，重播方法是最有效的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将持续学习方法应用于语义分割任务，探索类别和领域增量场景下的有效解决方案，并建立评估基准。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法多集中于图像分类，难以满足智能车辆等领域的语义分割需求，且缺乏对重放机制和领域增量学习的系统研究。
AI.method: 提出类别和领域增量语义分割的评估协议，对比分析知识蒸馏与重放机制等方法在不同任务场景下的性能差异。
AI.result: 发现语义分割任务中，知识蒸馏在类别增量学习中效果显著，而重放方法在领域增量学习中表现更优，与图像分类任务的最优方法存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习方法需针对语义分割任务特性进行调整，不同增量类型（类别/领域）需采用差异化策略，为后续研究提供基准参考。

title: Causes of Catastrophic Forgetting in Class-Incremental Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 类增量语义分割中灾难性遗忘的原因
abstract: Class-incremental learning for semantic segmentation (CiSS) is presently a highly researched field which aims at updating a semantic segmentation model by sequentially learning new semantic classes. A major challenge in CiSS is overcoming the effects of catastrophic forgetting, which describes the sudden drop of accuracy on previously learned classes after the model is trained on a new set of classes. Despite latest advances in mitigating catastrophic forgetting, the underlying causes of forgetting specifically in CiSS are not well understood. Therefore, in a set of experiments and representational analyses, we demonstrate that the semantic shift of the background class and a bias towards new classes are the major causes of forgetting in CiSS. Furthermore, we show that both causes mostly manifest themselves in deeper classification layers of the network, while the early layers of the model are not affected. Finally, we demonstrate how both causes are effectively mitigated utilizing the information contained in the background, with the help of knowledge distillation and an unbiased cross-entropy loss.
summary: Class-incremental learning for semantic segmentation (CiSS) is presently a highly researched field which aims at updating a semantic segmentation model by sequentially learning new semantic classes. A major challenge in CiSS is overcoming the effects of catastrophic forgetting, which describes the sudden drop of accuracy on previously learned classes after the model is trained on a new set of classes. Despite latest advances in mitigating catastrophic forgetting, the underlying causes of forgetting specifically in CiSS are not well understood. Therefore, in a set of experiments and representational analyses, we demonstrate that the semantic shift of the background class and a bias towards new classes are the major causes of forgetting in CiSS. Furthermore, we show that both causes mostly manifest themselves in deeper classification layers of the network, while the early layers of the model are not affected. Finally, we demonstrate how both causes are effectively mitigated utilizing the information contained in the background, with the help of knowledge distillation and an unbiased cross-entropy loss.
abstract_zh: 语义分割的类增量学习（CiSS）目前是一个备受研究的领域，其目的是通过顺序学习新的语义类来更新语义分割模型。 CiSS 的一个主要挑战是克服灾难性遗忘的影响，它描述了模型在一组新的类上进行训练后，先前学习的类的准确性突然下降。尽管在减轻灾难性遗忘方面取得了最新进展，但特别是在 CiSS 中遗忘的根本原因尚不清楚。因此，在一组实验和表征分析中，我们证明背景类的语义转移和对新类的偏见是 CiSS 中遗忘的主要原因。此外，我们表明这两种原因主要体现在网络的更深分类层中，而模型的早期层不受影响。最后，我们演示了如何利用背景中包含的信息，借助知识蒸馏和无偏交叉熵损失来有效缓解这两个原因。

AI.tldr: 本文研究类增量语义分割中灾难性遗忘的成因，并提出通过背景信息利用和损失函数优化来缓解该问题的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有方法缓解灾难性遗忘，但其在类增量语义分割中的具体成因尚未明确，需深入分析以指导有效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过实验与表征分析，识别语义背景类偏移和新类偏向为主要原因，并采用知识蒸馏与无偏交叉熵损失结合背景信息进行缓解。
AI.result: 发现遗忘主要源于深层分类层的语义偏移和新类偏向，而浅层不受影响；所提方法能有效缓解上述问题。
AI.conclusion: 明确类增量语义分割中灾难性遗忘的两大核心原因，并验证了基于背景信息的缓解策略的有效性。

authors_text: Serdar Ozsoy,Shadi Hamdan,Sercan Ö. Arik,Deniz Yuret,Alper T. Erdogan
title: Self-Supervised Learning with an Information Maximization Criterion
title_zh: 具有信息最大化标准的自我监督学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning allows AI systems to learn effective representations from large amounts of data using tasks that do not require costly labeling. Mode collapse, i.e., the model producing identical representations for all inputs, is a central problem to many self-supervised learning approaches, making self-supervised tasks, such as matching distorted variants of the inputs, ineffective. In this article, we argue that a straightforward application of information maximization among alternative latent representations of the same input naturally solves the collapse problem and achieves competitive empirical results. We propose a self-supervised learning method, CorInfoMax, that uses a second-order statistics-based mutual information measure that reflects the level of correlation among its arguments. Maximizing this correlative information measure between alternative representations of the same input serves two purposes: (1) it avoids the collapse problem by generating feature vectors with non-degenerate covariances; (2) it establishes relevance among alternative representations by increasing the linear dependence among them. An approximation of the proposed information maximization objective simplifies to a Euclidean distance-based objective function regularized by the log-determinant of the feature covariance matrix. The regularization term acts as a natural barrier against feature space degeneracy. Consequently, beyond avoiding complete output collapse to a single point, the proposed approach also prevents dimensional collapse by encouraging the spread of information across the whole feature space. Numerical experiments demonstrate that CorInfoMax achieves better or competitive performance results relative to the state-of-the-art SSL approaches.
summary: Self-supervised learning allows AI systems to learn effective representations from large amounts of data using tasks that do not require costly labeling. Mode collapse, i.e., the model producing identical representations for all inputs, is a central problem to many self-supervised learning approaches, making self-supervised tasks, such as matching distorted variants of the inputs, ineffective. In this article, we argue that a straightforward application of information maximization among alternative latent representations of the same input naturally solves the collapse problem and achieves competitive empirical results. We propose a self-supervised learning method, CorInfoMax, that uses a second-order statistics-based mutual information measure that reflects the level of correlation among its arguments. Maximizing this correlative information measure between alternative representations of the same input serves two purposes: (1) it avoids the collapse problem by generating feature vectors with non-degenerate covariances; (2) it establishes relevance among alternative representations by increasing the linear dependence among them. An approximation of the proposed information maximization objective simplifies to a Euclidean distance-based objective function regularized by the log-determinant of the feature covariance matrix. The regularization term acts as a natural barrier against feature space degeneracy. Consequently, beyond avoiding complete output collapse to a single point, the proposed approach also prevents dimensional collapse by encouraging the spread of information across the whole feature space. Numerical experiments demonstrate that CorInfoMax achieves better or competitive performance results relative to the state-of-the-art SSL approaches.
abstract_zh: 自我监督学习允许人工智能系统使用不需要昂贵标签的任务从大量数据中学习有效的表示。模式崩溃，即为所有输入产生相同表示的模型，是许多自监督学习方法的核心问题，使得自监督任务（例如匹配输入的扭曲变体）无效。在本文中，我们认为，在同一输入的替代潜在表示中直接应用信息最大化自然可以解决崩溃问题并获得有竞争力的实证结果。我们提出了一种自监督学习方法 CorInfoMax，它使用基于二阶统计的互信息度量来反映其参数之间的相关性水平。最大化同一输入的替代表示之间的相关信息度量有两个目的：（1）它通过生成具有非简并协方差的特征向量来避免崩溃问题； （2）它通过增加替代表示之间的线性依赖性来建立替代表示之间的相关性。所提出的信息最大化目标的近似简化为由特征协方差矩阵的对数行列式正则化的基于欧几里得距离的目标函数。正则化项充当了防止特征空间简并的天然屏障。因此，除了避免完全输出崩溃到一个点之外，所提出的方法还通过鼓励信息在整个特征空间中的传播来防止维度崩溃。数值实验表明，相对于最先进的 SSL 方法，CorInfoMax 实现了更好或具有竞争力的性能结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CorInfoMax的自监督学习方法，通过最大化替代潜在表示之间的关联信息来解决模式崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习中模式崩溃（模型输出相同表示）导致任务失效，传统方法难以有效避免该问题。
AI.method: 基于二阶统计量的互信息度量，通过最大化同一输入不同表示间的关联信息，结合协方差矩阵的对数行列式正则化项防止特征空间退化。
AI.result: 实验表明CorInfoMax在避免完全崩溃和维度崩溃的同时，性能优于或与现有自监督学习方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 信息最大化准则有效解决了自监督学习中的崩溃问题，为特征表示学习提供了新思路。
