title: SoLo T-DIRL: Socially-Aware Dynamic Local Planner based on Trajectory-Ranked Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: SoLo T-DIRL：基于轨迹排序深度逆强化学习的社交感知动态局部规划器
abstract: This work proposes a new framework for a socially-aware dynamic local planner in crowded environments by building on the recently proposed Trajectory-ranked Maximum Entropy Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning (T-MEDIRL). To address the social navigation problem, our multi-modal learning planner explicitly considers social interaction factors, as well as social-awareness factors into T-MEDIRL pipeline to learn a reward function from human demonstrations. Moreover, we propose a novel trajectory ranking score using the sudden velocity change of pedestrians around the robot to address the sub-optimality in human demonstrations. Our evaluation shows that this method can successfully make a robot navigate in a crowded social environment and outperforms the state-of-art social navigation methods in terms of the success rate, navigation time, and invasion rate.
summary: This work proposes a new framework for a socially-aware dynamic local planner in crowded environments by building on the recently proposed Trajectory-ranked Maximum Entropy Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning (T-MEDIRL). To address the social navigation problem, our multi-modal learning planner explicitly considers social interaction factors, as well as social-awareness factors into T-MEDIRL pipeline to learn a reward function from human demonstrations. Moreover, we propose a novel trajectory ranking score using the sudden velocity change of pedestrians around the robot to address the sub-optimality in human demonstrations. Our evaluation shows that this method can successfully make a robot navigate in a crowded social environment and outperforms the state-of-art social navigation methods in terms of the success rate, navigation time, and invasion rate.
abstract_zh: 这项工作基于最近提出的轨迹排序最大熵深度逆强化学习（T-MEDIRL），为拥挤环境中具有社会意识的动态局部规划器提出了一个新框架。为了解决社交导航问题，我们的多模式学习规划器将社交互动因素以及社交意识因素明确考虑到 T-MEDIRL 管道中，以从人类演示中学习奖励函数。此外，我们利用机器人周围行人的突然速度变化提出了一种新颖的轨迹排名分数，以解决人类演示中的次优问题。我们的评估表明，该方法可以成功地使机器人在拥挤的社交环境中导航，并且在成功率、导航时间和入侵率方面优于最先进的社交导航方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轨迹排序深度逆强化学习的社交感知动态局部规划框架SoLo T-DIRL，用于解决拥挤环境中的机器人社交导航问题。
AI.motivation: 现有社交导航方法在处理人类演示数据时存在次优路径规划问题，且未能充分考虑社交交互与社交感知因素，导致导航成功率、时间效率和空间入侵率不足。
AI.method: 将多模态学习与社交交互因素整合到T-MEDIRL框架中，通过分析周围行人突然速度变化设计新型轨迹排序评分机制，优化奖励函数学习过程。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在拥挤环境中导航成功率提升，导航时间缩短，空间入侵率降低，优于当前最先进的社交导航方法。
AI.conclusion: SoLo T-DIRL通过融合社交感知与轨迹排序机制，有效解决了机器人在复杂社交场景中的动态路径规划问题，为社交机器人研究提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轨迹排序深度逆强化学习的社交感知动态局部规划框架SoLo T-DIRL，用于解决拥挤环境中的机器人社交导航问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有社交导航方法在处理人类演示数据时存在次优路径规划问题，且未能充分考虑社交交互与社交感知因素，导致导航成功率、时间效率和空间入侵率不足。
ai_content.method: 将多模态学习与社交交互因素整合到T-MEDIRL框架中，通过分析周围行人突然速度变化设计新型轨迹排序评分机制，优化奖励函数学习过程。
ai_content.result: 实验表明该方法在拥挤环境中导航成功率提升，导航时间缩短，空间入侵率降低，优于当前最先进的社交导航方法。
ai_content.conclusion: SoLo T-DIRL通过融合社交感知与轨迹排序机制，有效解决了机器人在复杂社交场景中的动态路径规划问题，为社交机器人研究提供了新思路。

search_text: SoLo T-DIRL: Socially-Aware Dynamic Local Planner based on Trajectory-Ranked Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning SoLo T-DIRL：基于轨迹排序深度逆强化学习的社交感知动态局部规划器 This work proposes a new framework for a socially-aware dynamic local planner in crowded environments by building on the recently proposed Trajectory-ranked Maximum Entropy Deep Inverse Reinforcement Learning (T-MEDIRL). To address the social navigation problem, our multi-modal learning planner explicitly considers social interaction factors, as well as social-awareness factors into T-MEDIRL pipeline to learn a reward function from human demonstrations. Moreover, we propose a novel trajectory ranking score using the sudden velocity change of pedestrians around the robot to address the sub-optimality in human demonstrations. Our evaluation shows that this method can successfully make a robot navigate in a crowded social environment and outperforms the state-of-art social navigation methods in terms of the success rate, navigation time, and invasion rate. 这项工作基于最近提出的轨迹排序最大熵深度逆强化学习（T-MEDIRL），为拥挤环境中具有社会意识的动态局部规划器提出了一个新框架。为了解决社交导航问题，我们的多模式学习规划器将社交互动因素以及社交意识因素明确考虑到 T-MEDIRL 管道中，以从人类演示中学习奖励函数。此外，我们利用机器人周围行人的突然速度变化提出了一种新颖的轨迹排名分数，以解决人类演示中的次优问题。我们的评估表明，该方法可以成功地使机器人在拥挤的社交环境中导航，并且在成功率、导航时间和入侵率方面优于最先进的社交导航方法。 本文提出了一种基于轨迹排序深度逆强化学习的社交感知动态局部规划框架SoLo T-DIRL，用于解决拥挤环境中的机器人社交导航问题。 Yifan Xu,Theodor Chakhachiro,Tribhi Kathuria,Maani Ghaffari cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Yifeng Bai,Zhirong Chen,Zhangjie Fu,Lang Peng,Pengpeng Liang,Erkang Cheng
title: CurveFormer: 3D Lane Detection by Curve Propagation with Curve Queries and Attention
title_zh: CurveFormer：通过曲线传播、曲线查询和注意力进行 3D 车道检测
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation, ICRA 2023
comments: Accepted at the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation, ICRA 2023
abstract: 3D lane detection is an integral part of autonomous driving systems. Previous CNN and Transformer-based methods usually first generate a bird's-eye-view (BEV) feature map from the front view image, and then use a sub-network with BEV feature map as input to predict 3D lanes. Such approaches require an explicit view transformation between BEV and front view, which itself is still a challenging problem. In this paper, we propose CurveFormer, a single-stage Transformer-based method that directly calculates 3D lane parameters and can circumvent the difficult view transformation step. Specifically, we formulate 3D lane detection as a curve propagation problem by using curve queries. A 3D lane query is represented by a dynamic and ordered anchor point set. In this way, queries with curve representation in Transformer decoder iteratively refine the 3D lane detection results. Moreover, a curve cross-attention module is introduced to compute the similarities between curve queries and image features. Additionally, a context sampling module that can capture more relative image features of a curve query is provided to further boost the 3D lane detection performance. We evaluate our method for 3D lane detection on both synthetic and real-world datasets, and the experimental results show that our method achieves promising performance compared with the state-of-the-art approaches. The effectiveness of each component is validated via ablation studies as well.

In this paper, we propose CurveFormer, a single-stage Transformer-based method that directly calculates 3D lane parameters and can circumvent the difficult view transformation step. Specifically, we formulate 3D lane detection as a curve propagation problem by using curve queries. A 3D lane query is represented by a dynamic and ordered anchor point set. In this way, queries with curve representation in Transformer decoder iteratively refine the 3D lane detection results. Moreover, a curve cross-attention module is introduced to compute the similarities between curve queries and image features. Additionally, a context sampling module that can capture more relative image features of a curve query is provided to further boost the 3D lane detection performance. We evaluate our method for 3D lane detection on both synthetic and real-world datasets, and the experimental results show that our method achieves promising performance compared with the state-of-the-art approaches. The effectiveness of each component is validated via ablation studies as well.
abstract_zh: 3D 车道检测是自动驾驶系统不可或缺的一部分。以前基于 CNN 和 Transformer 的方法通常首先从前视图图像生成鸟瞰图 (BEV) 特征图，然后使用以 BEV 特征图作为输入的子网络来预测 3D 车道。这种方法需要 BEV 和前视图之间的显式视图转换，这本身仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了 CurveFormer，这是一种基于 Transformer 的单阶段方法，可以直接计算 3D 车道参数，并且可以绕过困难的视图变换步骤。具体来说，我们通过使用曲线查询将 3D 车道检测制定为曲线传播问题。 3D 车道查询由动态且有序的锚点集表示。通过这种方式，Transformer 解码器中具有曲线表示的查询迭代地细化 3D 车道检测结果。此外，引入了曲线交叉注意模块来计算曲线查询和图像特征之间的相似度。此外，还提供了上下文采样模块，可以捕获曲线查询的更多相关图像特征，以进一步提高 3D 车道检测性能。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集上评估了我们的 3D 车道检测方法，实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法取得了令人鼓舞的性能。每个组件的有效性也通过消融研究得到验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于曲线传播的单阶段Transformer方法CurveFormer，直接计算3D车道参数以避免视角转换步骤。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需通过显式视角转换生成BEV特征图，该步骤具有挑战性且影响检测性能。
AI.method: 将3D车道检测建模为曲线传播问题，使用动态有序锚点集表示车道查询，并引入曲线交叉注意力模块和上下文采样模块优化检测结果。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有方法，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: CurveFormer通过直接参数计算和曲线表示机制，提升了3D车道检测的准确性与效率。

title: Prophet Inequalities for Cost Minimization
title_zh: 预言成本最小化的不平等
abstract: Prophet inequalities for rewards maximization are fundamental to optimal stopping theory with extensive applications to mechanism design and online optimization. We study the \emph{cost minimization} counterpart of the classical prophet inequality: a decision maker is facing a sequence of costs $X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n$ drawn from known distributions in an online manner and \emph{must} ``stop'' at some point and take the last cost seen. The goal is to compete with a ``prophet'' who can see the realizations of all $X_i$'s upfront and always select the minimum, obtaining a cost of $\mathbb{E}[\min_i X_i]$. If the $X_i$'s are not identically distributed, no strategy can achieve a bounded approximation, even for random arrival order and $n = 2$. This leads us to consider the case where the $X_i$'s are independent and identically distributed (I.I.D.). For the I.I.D. case, we show that if the distribution satisfies a mild condition, the optimal stopping strategy achieves a (distribution-dependent) constant-factor approximation to the prophet's cost. Moreover, for MHR distributions, this constant is at most $2$. All our results are tight. We also demonstrate an example distribution that does not satisfy the condition and for which the competitive ratio of any algorithm is infinite. Turning our attention to single-threshold strategies, we design a threshold that achieves a $O\left(polylog{n}\right)$-factor approximation, where the exponent in the logarithmic factor is a distribution-dependent constant, and we show a matching lower bound. Finally, we note that our results can be used to design approximately optimal posted price-style mechanisms for procurement auctions which may be of independent interest. Our techniques utilize the \emph{hazard rate} of the distribution in a novel way, allowing for a fine-grained analysis which could find further applications in prophet inequalities.
summary: Prophet inequalities for rewards maximization are fundamental to optimal stopping theory with extensive applications to mechanism design and online optimization. We study the \emph{cost minimization} counterpart of the classical prophet inequality: a decision maker is facing a sequence of costs $X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n$ drawn from known distributions in an online manner and \emph{must} ``stop'' at some point and take the last cost seen. The goal is to compete with a ``prophet'' who can see the realizations of all $X_i$'s upfront and always select the minimum, obtaining a cost of $\mathbb{E}[\min_i X_i]$. If the $X_i$'s are not identically distributed, no strategy can achieve a bounded approximation, even for random arrival order and $n = 2$. This leads us to consider the case where the $X_i$'s are independent and identically distributed (I.I.D.). For the I.I.D. case, we show that if the distribution satisfies a mild condition, the optimal stopping strategy achieves a (distribution-dependent) constant-factor approximation to the prophet's cost. Moreover, for MHR distributions, this constant is at most $2$. All our results are tight. We also demonstrate an example distribution that does not satisfy the condition and for which the competitive ratio of any algorithm is infinite. Turning our attention to single-threshold strategies, we design a threshold that achieves a $O\left(polylog{n}\right)$-factor approximation, where the exponent in the logarithmic factor is a distribution-dependent constant, and we show a matching lower bound. Finally, we note that our results can be used to design approximately optimal posted price-style mechanisms for procurement auctions which may be of independent interest. Our techniques utilize the \emph{hazard rate} of the distribution in a novel way, allowing for a fine-grained analysis which could find further applications in prophet inequalities.
abstract_zh: 奖励最大化的预言不等式是最优停止理论的基础，广泛应用于机制设计和在线优化。我们研究经典预言不等式的\emph{成本最小化}对应物：决策者面临着一系列以在线方式从已知分布中提取的成本$X_1，X_2，\dots，X_n$，并且\emph{必须}在某个时刻“停止”并采用最后看到的成本。我们的目标是与一个“先知”竞争，他可以预先看到所有 $X_i$ 的实现，并始终选择最小值，获得 $\mathbb{E}[\min_i X_i]$ 的成本。如果 $X_i$ 不是同分布的，则任何策略都无法实现有界近似，即使对于随机到达顺序和 $n = 2$ 也是如此。这导致我们考虑 $X_i$ 独立且同分布 (I.I.D.) 的情况。对于 I.I.D.在这种情况下，我们表明，如果分布满足温和条件，则最佳停止策略可以实现对预言者成本的（依赖于分布的）常数因子近似。此外，对于 MHR 分布，该常数最多为 $2$。我们所有的结果都很紧张。我们还演示了一个不满足条件且任何算法的竞争比都是无限的示例分布。将我们的注意力转向单阈值策略，我们设计了一个实现 $O\left(polylog{n}\right)$ 因子近似的阈值，其中对数因子中的指数是依赖于分布的常数，并且我们显示了匹配的下界。最后，我们注意到，我们的结果可用于为可能具有独立利益的采购拍卖设计近似最佳的发布价格风格机制。我们的技术以一种新颖的方式利用分布的\emph{危险率}，允许进行细粒度的分析，这可以在预言不等式中找到进一步的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究成本最小化场景下的先知不等式，针对独立同分布（I.I.D.）情况设计最优停止策略，并分析其近似比。
AI.motivation: 传统先知不等式聚焦收益最大化，而成本最小化问题在机制设计和在线优化中同样重要。当分布非同分布时无法保证近似比，因此需限定在I.I.D.条件下进行研究。
AI.method: 利用分布的危险率（hazard rate）进行精细分析，提出最优停止策略和单阈值策略，并通过构造反例验证条件必要性。
AI.result: 对满足轻量条件的I.I.D.分布，最优停止策略可实现常数因子近似（MHR分布下上限为2）；单阈值策略达到polylog(n)近似。同时证明条件不满足时任何算法的竞争力为无限。
AI.conclusion: 结果可应用于采购拍卖的近似最优定价机制，且危险率分析方法为先知不等式研究提供了新视角。

search_text: Prophet Inequalities for Cost Minimization 预言成本最小化的不平等 Prophet inequalities for rewards maximization are fundamental to optimal stopping theory with extensive applications to mechanism design and online optimization. We study the \emph{cost minimization} counterpart of the classical prophet inequality: a decision maker is facing a sequence of costs $X_1, X_2, \dots, X_n$ drawn from known distributions in an online manner and \emph{must} ``stop'' at some point and take the last cost seen. The goal is to compete with a ``prophet'' who can see the realizations of all $X_i$'s upfront and always select the minimum, obtaining a cost of $\mathbb{E}[\min_i X_i]$. If the $X_i$'s are not identically distributed, no strategy can achieve a bounded approximation, even for random arrival order and $n = 2$. This leads us to consider the case where the $X_i$'s are independent and identically distributed (I.I.D.). For the I.I.D. case, we show that if the distribution satisfies a mild condition, the optimal stopping strategy achieves a (distribution-dependent) constant-factor approximation to the prophet's cost. Moreover, for MHR distributions, this constant is at most $2$. All our results are tight. We also demonstrate an example distribution that does not satisfy the condition and for which the competitive ratio of any algorithm is infinite. Turning our attention to single-threshold strategies, we design a threshold that achieves a $O\left(polylog{n}\right)$-factor approximation, where the exponent in the logarithmic factor is a distribution-dependent constant, and we show a matching lower bound. Finally, we note that our results can be used to design approximately optimal posted price-style mechanisms for procurement auctions which may be of independent interest. Our techniques utilize the \emph{hazard rate} of the distribution in a novel way, allowing for a fine-grained analysis which could find further applications in prophet inequalities. 奖励最大化的预言不等式是最优停止理论的基础，广泛应用于机制设计和在线优化。我们研究经典预言不等式的\emph{成本最小化}对应物：决策者面临着一系列以在线方式从已知分布中提取的成本$X_1，X_2，\dots，X_n$，并且\emph{必须}在某个时刻“停止”并采用最后看到的成本。我们的目标是与一个“先知”竞争，他可以预先看到所有 $X_i$ 的实现，并始终选择最小值，获得 $\mathbb{E}[\min_i X_i]$ 的成本。如果 $X_i$ 不是同分布的，则任何策略都无法实现有界近似，即使对于随机到达顺序和 $n = 2$ 也是如此。这导致我们考虑 $X_i$ 独立且同分布 (I.I.D.) 的情况。对于 I.I.D.在这种情况下，我们表明，如果分布满足温和条件，则最佳停止策略可以实现对预言者成本的（依赖于分布的）常数因子近似。此外，对于 MHR 分布，该常数最多为 $2$。我们所有的结果都很紧张。我们还演示了一个不满足条件且任何算法的竞争比都是无限的示例分布。将我们的注意力转向单阈值策略，我们设计了一个实现 $O\left(polylog{n}\right)$ 因子近似的阈值，其中对数因子中的指数是依赖于分布的常数，并且我们显示了匹配的下界。最后，我们注意到，我们的结果可用于为可能具有独立利益的采购拍卖设计近似最佳的发布价格风格机制。我们的技术以一种新颖的方式利用分布的\emph{危险率}，允许进行细粒度的分析，这可以在预言不等式中找到进一步的应用。 本文研究成本最小化场景下的先知不等式，针对独立同分布（I.I.D.）情况设计最优停止策略，并分析其近似比。 Vasilis Livanos,Ruta Mehta cs.GT,cs.DS

authors_text: Jiri Sedlar,Karla Stepanova,Radoslav Skoviera,Jan K. Behrens,Matus Tuna,Gabriela Sejnova,Josef Sivic,Robert Babuska
title: Imitrob: Imitation Learning Dataset for Training and Evaluating 6D Object Pose Estimators
title_zh: Imitrob：用于训练和评估 6D 物体姿态估计器的模仿学习数据集
comment: The dataset and code are publicly available at http://imitrob.ciirc.cvut.cz/imitrobdataset.php
comments: The dataset and code are publicly available at http://imitrob.ciirc.cvut.cz/imitrobdataset.php
abstract: This paper introduces a dataset for training and evaluating methods for 6D pose estimation of hand-held tools in task demonstrations captured by a standard RGB camera. Despite the significant progress of 6D pose estimation methods, their performance is usually limited for heavily occluded objects, which is a common case in imitation learning, where the object is typically partially occluded by the manipulating hand. Currently, there is a lack of datasets that would enable the development of robust 6D pose estimation methods for these conditions. To overcome this problem, we collect a new dataset (Imitrob) aimed at 6D pose estimation in imitation learning and other applications where a human holds a tool and performs a task. The dataset contains image sequences of nine different tools and twelve manipulation tasks with two camera viewpoints, four human subjects, and left/right hand. Each image is accompanied by an accurate ground truth measurement of the 6D object pose obtained by the HTC Vive motion tracking device. The use of the dataset is demonstrated by training and evaluating a recent 6D object pose estimation method (DOPE) in various setups.
summary: This paper introduces a dataset for training and evaluating methods for 6D pose estimation of hand-held tools in task demonstrations captured by a standard RGB camera. Despite the significant progress of 6D pose estimation methods, their performance is usually limited for heavily occluded objects, which is a common case in imitation learning, where the object is typically partially occluded by the manipulating hand. Currently, there is a lack of datasets that would enable the development of robust 6D pose estimation methods for these conditions. To overcome this problem, we collect a new dataset (Imitrob) aimed at 6D pose estimation in imitation learning and other applications where a human holds a tool and performs a task. The dataset contains image sequences of nine different tools and twelve manipulation tasks with two camera viewpoints, four human subjects, and left/right hand. Each image is accompanied by an accurate ground truth measurement of the 6D object pose obtained by the HTC Vive motion tracking device. The use of the dataset is demonstrated by training and evaluating a recent 6D object pose estimation method (DOPE) in various setups.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一个数据集，用于训练和评估标准 RGB 相机捕获的任务演示中手持工具的 6D 姿态估计方法。尽管 6D 姿态估计方法取得了重大进展，但它们的性能通常仅限于严重遮挡的物体，这是模仿学习中的常见情况，其中物体通常被操纵的手部分遮挡。目前，缺乏能够针对这些条件开发稳健的 6D 姿态估计方法的数据集。为了克服这个问题，我们收集了一个新的数据集（Imitrob），旨在模仿学习和人类持有工具并执行任务的其他应用中的 6D 姿态估计。该数据集包含九种不同工具的图像序列和十二个操作任务，具有两个相机视点、四个人类主体和左/右手。每张图像都附有由 HTC Vive 运动跟踪设备获得的 6D 物体姿态的准确地面实况测量结果。通过在各种设置中训练和评估最新的 6D 物体姿态估计方法 (DOPE) 来演示该数据集的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个用于训练和评估6D物体位姿估计方法的数据集Imitrob，专注于模仿学习中手持工具被遮挡的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有6D位姿估计方法在严重遮挡情况下表现有限，而模仿学习中物体常被手部分遮挡，缺乏针对性数据集阻碍了相关方法的发展。
AI.method: 采集包含9种工具、12种任务、双视角、4名受试者及左右手操作的图像序列，并通过HTC Vive设备提供精确的6D位姿标注。
AI.result: 通过训练和评估最新位姿估计方法DOPE，验证了数据集在多种设置下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Imitrob数据集填补了遮挡场景下6D位姿估计数据的空白，为开发鲁棒算法及其它手持工具任务应用提供了基础。

title: musicaiz: A Python Library for Symbolic Music Generation, Analysis and Visualization
title_zh: musicaiz：用于符号音乐生成、分析和可视化的 Python 库
abstract: In this article, we present musicaiz, an object-oriented library for analyzing, generating and evaluating symbolic music. The submodules of the package allow the user to create symbolic music data from scratch, build algorithms to analyze symbolic music, encode MIDI data as tokens to train deep learning sequence models, modify existing music data and evaluate music generation systems. The evaluation submodule builds on previous work to objectively measure music generation systems and to be able to reproduce the results of music generation models. The library is publicly available online. We encourage the community to contribute and provide feedback.
summary: In this article, we present musicaiz, an object-oriented library for analyzing, generating and evaluating symbolic music. The submodules of the package allow the user to create symbolic music data from scratch, build algorithms to analyze symbolic music, encode MIDI data as tokens to train deep learning sequence models, modify existing music data and evaluate music generation systems. The evaluation submodule builds on previous work to objectively measure music generation systems and to be able to reproduce the results of music generation models. The library is publicly available online. We encourage the community to contribute and provide feedback.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 musicaiz，一个用于分析、生成和评估符号音乐的面向对象的库。该包的子模块允许用户从头开始创建符号音乐数据，构建算法来分析符号音乐，将 MIDI 数据编码为令牌来训练深度学习序列模型，修改现有音乐数据并评估音乐生成系统。评估子模块建立在之前的工作基础上，以客观地测量音乐生成系统并能够重现音乐生成模型的结果。该图书馆可在线公开使用。我们鼓励社区做出贡献并提供反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为musicaiz的Python库，用于符号音乐的生成、分析和可视化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏一个集成化的工具来支持符号音乐的创建、分析和评估，需开发统一库以促进相关研究。
AI.method: 采用面向对象设计，包含数据生成、分析算法、MIDI编码、数据修改及评估模块，评估部分基于已有方法实现客观测量。
AI.result: 库已开源并提供完整功能，社区可参与改进与反馈。
AI.conclusion: musicaiz为音乐生成研究提供了有效工具，开源模式有助于推动领域发展。

title: A Multi-turn Machine Reading Comprehension Framework with Rethink Mechanism for Emotion-Cause Pair Extraction
title_zh: 一种具有重新思考机制的多轮机器阅读理解框架，用于情感-原因对提取
abstract: Emotion-cause pair extraction (ECPE) is an emerging task in emotion cause analysis, which extracts potential emotion-cause pairs from an emotional document. Most recent studies use end-to-end methods to tackle the ECPE task. However, these methods either suffer from a label sparsity problem or fail to model complicated relations between emotions and causes. Furthermore, they all do not consider explicit semantic information of clauses. To this end, we transform the ECPE task into a document-level machine reading comprehension (MRC) task and propose a Multi-turn MRC framework with Rethink mechanism (MM-R). Our framework can model complicated relations between emotions and causes while avoiding generating the pairing matrix (the leading cause of the label sparsity problem). Besides, the multi-turn structure can fuse explicit semantic information flow between emotions and causes. Extensive experiments on the benchmark emotion cause corpus demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Emotion-cause pair extraction (ECPE) is an emerging task in emotion cause analysis, which extracts potential emotion-cause pairs from an emotional document. Most recent studies use end-to-end methods to tackle the ECPE task. However, these methods either suffer from a label sparsity problem or fail to model complicated relations between emotions and causes. Furthermore, they all do not consider explicit semantic information of clauses. To this end, we transform the ECPE task into a document-level machine reading comprehension (MRC) task and propose a Multi-turn MRC framework with Rethink mechanism (MM-R). Our framework can model complicated relations between emotions and causes while avoiding generating the pairing matrix (the leading cause of the label sparsity problem). Besides, the multi-turn structure can fuse explicit semantic information flow between emotions and causes. Extensive experiments on the benchmark emotion cause corpus demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: Emotion-cause pair extraction (ECPE) is an emerging task in emotion cause analysis, which extracts potential emotion-cause pairs from an emotional document.最近的大多数研究都使用端到端方法来解决 ECPE 任务。然而，这些方法要么面临标签稀疏问题，要么无法模拟情感和原因之间的复杂关系。此外，它们都没有考虑子句的显式语义信息。 To this end, we transform the ECPE task into a document-level machine reading comprehension (MRC) task and propose a Multi-turn MRC framework with Rethink mechanism (MM-R). Our framework can model complicated relations between emotions and causes while avoiding generating the pairing matrix (the leading cause of the label sparsity problem).此外，多轮结构可以融合情感和原因之间的显式语义信息流。 Extensive experiments on the benchmark emotion cause corpus demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多轮机器阅读理解框架MM-R，通过重思机制解决情感-原因对提取任务中的标签稀疏和复杂关系建模问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ECPE方法存在标签稀疏问题，难以建模情感与原因的复杂关系，且忽略从句显式语义信息。
AI.method: 将ECPE转化为文档级MRC任务，设计多轮结构融合语义信息流，引入重思机制避免生成配对矩阵。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，MM-R框架效果优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MM-R框架有效解决了ECPE任务中的关键问题，为情感-原因对提取提供了新思路。

title: Towards Bridging the Performance Gaps of Joint Energy-based Models
title_zh: 弥合基于联合能量的模型的性能差距
abstract: Can we train a hybrid discriminative-generative model within a single network? This question has recently been answered in the affirmative, introducing the field of Joint Energy-based Model (JEM), which achieves high classification accuracy and image generation quality simultaneously. Despite recent advances, there remain two performance gaps: the accuracy gap to the standard softmax classifier, and the generation quality gap to state-of-the-art generative models. In this paper, we introduce a variety of training techniques to bridge the accuracy gap and the generation quality gap of JEM. 1) We incorporate a recently proposed sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) framework to train JEM, which promotes the energy landscape smoothness and the generalizability of JEM. 2) We exclude data augmentation from the maximum likelihood estimate pipeline of JEM, and mitigate the negative impact of data augmentation to image generation quality. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our SADA-JEM achieves state-of-the-art performances and outperforms JEM in image classification, image generation, calibration, out-of-distribution detection and adversarial robustness by a notable margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/sndnyang/SADAJEM.
summary: Can we train a hybrid discriminative-generative model within a single network? This question has recently been answered in the affirmative, introducing the field of Joint Energy-based Model (JEM), which achieves high classification accuracy and image generation quality simultaneously. Despite recent advances, there remain two performance gaps: the accuracy gap to the standard softmax classifier, and the generation quality gap to state-of-the-art generative models. In this paper, we introduce a variety of training techniques to bridge the accuracy gap and the generation quality gap of JEM. 1) We incorporate a recently proposed sharpness-aware minimization (SAM) framework to train JEM, which promotes the energy landscape smoothness and the generalizability of JEM. 2) We exclude data augmentation from the maximum likelihood estimate pipeline of JEM, and mitigate the negative impact of data augmentation to image generation quality. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that our SADA-JEM achieves state-of-the-art performances and outperforms JEM in image classification, image generation, calibration, out-of-distribution detection and adversarial robustness by a notable margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/sndnyang/SADAJEM.
abstract_zh: 我们可以在单个网络中训练混合判别生成模型吗？这个问题最近得到了肯定的回答，引入了基于联合能量的模型（JEM）领域，它同时实现了高分类精度和图像生成质量。尽管最近取得了进展，但仍然存在两个性能差距：与标准 softmax 分类器的准确性差距，以及与最先进的生成模型的生成质量差距。在本文中，我们介绍了多种训练技术来弥补 JEM 的准确性差距和生成质量差距。 1）我们采用了最近提出的锐度感知最小化（SAM）框架来训练JEM，这促进了能源景观的平滑性和JEM的泛化性。 2）我们从JEM的最大似然估计管道中排除数据增强，并减轻数据增强对图像生成质量的负面影响。对多个数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 SADA-JEM 实现了最先进的性能，并且在图像分类、图像生成、校准、分布外检测和对抗鲁棒性方面明显优于 JEM。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/sndnyang/SADAJEM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进训练方法，弥合联合能量模型（JEM）在分类准确率和图像生成质量上的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管联合能量模型（JEM）能同时实现高分类准确率和图像生成质量，但仍存在与标准softmax分类器及先进生成模型的性能差距，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 1) 引入尖锐度感知最小化（SAM）框架提升能量景观平滑性与泛化能力；2) 在最大似然估计中排除数据增强，减少对生成质量的负面影响。
AI.result: 提出的SADA-JEM在多个数据集上达到最先进水平，显著优于原JEM，在分类、生成、校准、分布外检测和对抗鲁棒性任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过SAM框架与数据增强策略调整，有效弥合了JEM的性能差距，提升了模型综合表现，代码已开源。

title: StyleGAN Encoder-Based Attack for Block Scrambled Face Images
title_zh: 基于 StyleGAN 编码器的块扰乱人脸图像攻击
abstract: In this paper, we propose an attack method to block scrambled face images, particularly Encryption-then-Compression (EtC) applied images by utilizing the existing powerful StyleGAN encoder and decoder for the first time. Instead of reconstructing identical images as plain ones from encrypted images, we focus on recovering styles that can reveal identifiable information from the encrypted images. The proposed method trains an encoder by using plain and encrypted image pairs with a particular training strategy. While state-of-the-art attack methods cannot recover any perceptual information from EtC images, the proposed method discloses personally identifiable information such as hair color, skin color, eyeglasses, gender, etc. Experiments were carried out on the CelebA dataset, and results show that reconstructed images have some perceptual similarities compared to plain images.
summary: In this paper, we propose an attack method to block scrambled face images, particularly Encryption-then-Compression (EtC) applied images by utilizing the existing powerful StyleGAN encoder and decoder for the first time. Instead of reconstructing identical images as plain ones from encrypted images, we focus on recovering styles that can reveal identifiable information from the encrypted images. The proposed method trains an encoder by using plain and encrypted image pairs with a particular training strategy. While state-of-the-art attack methods cannot recover any perceptual information from EtC images, the proposed method discloses personally identifiable information such as hair color, skin color, eyeglasses, gender, etc. Experiments were carried out on the CelebA dataset, and results show that reconstructed images have some perceptual similarities compared to plain images.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们首次利用现有强大的 StyleGAN 编码器和解码器提出了一种攻击方法来阻止加扰的人脸图像，特别是加密后压缩（EtC）应用的图像。我们不是从加密图像中将相同的图像重建为普通图像，而是专注于恢复可以从加密图像中揭示可识别信息的样式。所提出的方法通过使用具有特定训练策略的明文和加密图像对来训练编码器。虽然最先进的攻击方法无法从 EtC 图像中恢复任何感知信息，但所提出的方法公开了个人身份信息，如头发颜色、肤色、眼镜、性别等。在 CelebA 数据集上进行了实验，结果表明，重建图像与普通图像相比具有一些感知相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于StyleGAN编码器的攻击方法，针对块加密后的面部图像，恢复可识别的个人信息。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击方法无法从加密后压缩（EtC）图像中恢复感知信息，需新方法揭示关键可识别信息。
AI.method: 利用StyleGAN编码器与解码器，通过明文与加密图像对训练编码器，采用特定策略恢复风格信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，重建图像在感知上与原图有相似性，可揭示如发色、肤色等信息。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效揭示EtC图像中的可识别信息，证明StyleGAN在攻击中的潜力。

title: SeqOT: A Spatial-Temporal Transformer Network for Place Recognition Using Sequential LiDAR Data
title_zh: SeqOT：使用序列 LiDAR 数据进行位置识别的时空变换器网络
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics
abstract: Place recognition is an important component for autonomous vehicles to achieve loop closing or global localization. In this paper, we tackle the problem of place recognition based on sequential 3D LiDAR scans obtained by an onboard LiDAR sensor. We propose a transformer-based network named SeqOT to exploit the temporal and spatial information provided by sequential range images generated from the LiDAR data. It uses multi-scale transformers to generate a global descriptor for each sequence of LiDAR range images in an end-to-end fashion. During online operation, our SeqOT finds similar places by matching such descriptors between the current query sequence and those stored in the map. We evaluate our approach on four datasets collected with different types of LiDAR sensors in different environments. The experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art LiDAR-based place recognition methods and generalizes well across different environments. Furthermore, our method operates online faster than the frame rate of the sensor. The implementation of our method is released as open source at: https://github.com/BIT-MJY/SeqOT.
summary: Place recognition is an important component for autonomous vehicles to achieve loop closing or global localization. In this paper, we tackle the problem of place recognition based on sequential 3D LiDAR scans obtained by an onboard LiDAR sensor. We propose a transformer-based network named SeqOT to exploit the temporal and spatial information provided by sequential range images generated from the LiDAR data. It uses multi-scale transformers to generate a global descriptor for each sequence of LiDAR range images in an end-to-end fashion. During online operation, our SeqOT finds similar places by matching such descriptors between the current query sequence and those stored in the map. We evaluate our approach on four datasets collected with different types of LiDAR sensors in different environments. The experimental results show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art LiDAR-based place recognition methods and generalizes well across different environments. Furthermore, our method operates online faster than the frame rate of the sensor. The implementation of our method is released as open source at: https://github.com/BIT-MJY/SeqOT.
abstract_zh: 地点识别是自动驾驶汽车实现闭环或全局定位的重要组成部分。在本文中，我们解决了基于机载 LiDAR 传感器获得的连续 3D LiDAR 扫描的地点识别问题。我们提出了一种名为 SeqOT 的基于变压器的网络，以利用由 LiDAR 数据生成的序列范围图像提供的时间和空间信息。它使用多尺度转换器以端到端的方式为每个 LiDAR 距离图像序列生成全局描述符。在在线操作期间，我们的 SeqOT 通过匹配当前查询序列和存储在映射中的描述符之间的描述符来找到相似的位置。我们在不同环境中使用不同类型的激光雷达传感器收集的四个数据集上评估了我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于最先进的基于激光雷达的位置识别方法，并且在不同环境中具有良好的泛化能力。此外，我们的方法在线运行速度比传感器的帧速率更快。我们的方法的实现作为开源发布于：https://github.com/BIT-MJY/SeqOT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于序列激光雷达数据的时空Transformer网络SeqOT，用于自动驾驶中的地点识别。
AI.motivation: 地点识别对自动驾驶车辆的闭环检测和全局定位至关重要，但现有方法难以有效利用激光雷达序列数据中的时空信息。
AI.method: 设计了多尺度Transformer网络SeqOT，通过端到端方式从激光雷达点云序列中生成全局描述符，并在在线操作中通过描述符匹配实现地点检索。
AI.result: 在四个不同环境下的激光雷达数据集上，SeqOT方法优于现有最先进算法，且运算速度超过传感器帧率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SeqOT通过时空特征融合实现了高效准确的地点识别，具有良好的环境适应性和实时性，可广泛应用于自动驾驶领域。

title: User Guided Abductive Proof Generation for Answer Set Programming Queries (Extended Version)
title_zh: 用于答案集编程查询的用户引导溯因证明生成（扩展版本）
abstract: We present a method for generating possible proofs of a query with respect to a given Answer Set Programming (ASP) rule set using an abductive process where the space of abducibles is automatically constructed just from the input rules alone. Given a (possibly empty) set of user provided facts, our method infers any additional facts that may be needed for the entailment of a query and then outputs these extra facts, without the user needing to explicitly specify the space of all abducibles. We also present a method to generate a set of directed edges corresponding to the justification graph for the query. Furthermore, through different forms of implicit term substitution, our method can take user provided facts into account and suitably modify the abductive solutions. Past work on abduction has been primarily based on goal directed methods. However these methods can result in solvers that are not truly declarative. Much less work has been done on realizing abduction in a bottom up solver like the Clingo ASP solver. We describe novel ASP programs which can be run directly in Clingo to yield the abductive solutions and directed edge sets without needing to modify the underlying solving engine.
summary: We present a method for generating possible proofs of a query with respect to a given Answer Set Programming (ASP) rule set using an abductive process where the space of abducibles is automatically constructed just from the input rules alone. Given a (possibly empty) set of user provided facts, our method infers any additional facts that may be needed for the entailment of a query and then outputs these extra facts, without the user needing to explicitly specify the space of all abducibles. We also present a method to generate a set of directed edges corresponding to the justification graph for the query. Furthermore, through different forms of implicit term substitution, our method can take user provided facts into account and suitably modify the abductive solutions. Past work on abduction has been primarily based on goal directed methods. However these methods can result in solvers that are not truly declarative. Much less work has been done on realizing abduction in a bottom up solver like the Clingo ASP solver. We describe novel ASP programs which can be run directly in Clingo to yield the abductive solutions and directed edge sets without needing to modify the underlying solving engine.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用溯因过程生成关于给定答案集编程（ASP）规则集的查询的可能证明的方法，其中可溯因的空间仅根据输入规则自动构造。给定一组（可能是空的）用户提供的事实，我们的方法推断出查询的蕴涵可能需要的任何附加事实，然后输出这些额外的事实，而不需要用户显式指定所有可溯因的空间。我们还提出了一种方法来生成与查询的理由图相对应的一组有向边。此外，通过不同形式的隐式术语替换，我们的方法可以考虑用户提供的事实并适当修改溯因解决方案。过去关于绑架的工作主要基于目标导向方法。然而，这些方法可能会导致求解器并非真正的声明性。在像 Clingo ASP 求解器这样的自下而上求解器中实现溯因推理方面所做的工作要少得多。我们描述了新颖的 ASP 程序，这些程序可以直接在 Clingo 中运行，以产生溯因解和有向边集，而无需修改底层求解引擎。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于归纳过程的自动构建假设空间的方法，用于生成答案集编程（ASP）查询的可能证明，并通过用户提供的事实调整归纳解。
AI.motivation: 传统归纳方法多基于目标导向，导致求解器非声明式，且在类似Clingo的自底向上求解器中应用较少。
AI.method: 通过输入规则自动生成假设空间，结合用户事实推断额外事实并生成证明；利用隐式项替换调整归纳解，并设计可在Clingo中直接运行的ASP程序生成归纳解及定向边集。
AI.result: 实现了无需修改求解引擎即可生成归纳解和证明图的ASP程序，支持用户引导的假设生成与调整。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为ASP查询提供了声明式归纳框架，增强了Clingo等求解器的可扩展性与用户交互性。

title: Omni-Dimensional Dynamic Convolution
title_zh: 全维动态卷积
comment: Spotlight paper at ICLR 2022. Code and models are available at https://github.com/OSVAI/ODConv
comments: Spotlight paper at ICLR 2022. Code and models are available at https://github.com/OSVAI/ODConv
abstract: Learning a single static convolutional kernel in each convolutional layer is the common training paradigm of modern Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Instead, recent research in dynamic convolution shows that learning a linear combination of $n$ convolutional kernels weighted with their input-dependent attentions can significantly improve the accuracy of light-weight CNNs, while maintaining efficient inference. However, we observe that existing works endow convolutional kernels with the dynamic property through one dimension (regarding the convolutional kernel number) of the kernel space, but the other three dimensions (regarding the spatial size, the input channel number and the output channel number for each convolutional kernel) are overlooked. Inspired by this, we present Omni-dimensional Dynamic Convolution (ODConv), a more generalized yet elegant dynamic convolution design, to advance this line of research. ODConv leverages a novel multi-dimensional attention mechanism with a parallel strategy to learn complementary attentions for convolutional kernels along all four dimensions of the kernel space at any convolutional layer. As a drop-in replacement of regular convolutions, ODConv can be plugged into many CNN architectures. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet and MS-COCO datasets show that ODConv brings solid accuracy boosts for various prevailing CNN backbones including both light-weight and large ones, e.g., 3.77%~5.71%|1.86%~3.72% absolute top-1 improvements to MobivleNetV2|ResNet family on the ImageNet dataset. Intriguingly, thanks to its improved feature learning ability, ODConv with even one single kernel can compete with or outperform existing dynamic convolution counterparts with multiple kernels, substantially reducing extra parameters. Furthermore, ODConv is also superior to other attention modules for modulating the output features or the convolutional weights.

Intriguingly, thanks to its improved feature learning ability, ODConv with even one single kernel can compete with or outperform existing dynamic convolution counterparts with multiple kernels, substantially reducing extra parameters. Furthermore, ODConv is also superior to other attention modules for modulating the output features or the convolutional weights.
abstract_zh: 在每个卷积层中学习单个静态卷积核是现代卷积神经网络（CNN）的常见训练范例。相反，最新的动态卷积研究表明，学习 $n$ 个卷积核的线性组合及其输入相关注意力的加权可以显着提高轻量级 CNN 的准确性，同时保持高效的推理。然而，我们观察到现有的工作通过核空间的一维（关于卷积核数量）赋予卷积核动态属性，而忽略了其他三个维度（关于每个卷积核的空间大小、输入通道数和输出通道数）。受此启发，我们提出了全维动态卷积（ODConv），一种更通用但更优雅的动态卷积设计，以推进这方面的研究。 ODConv 利用一种新颖的多维注意力机制和并行策略来学习任何卷积层沿内核空间的所有四个维度的卷积核的互补注意力。作为常规卷积的直接替代品，ODConv 可以插入到许多 CNN 架构中。在 ImageNet 和 MS-COCO 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，ODConv 为各种流行的 CNN 主干网（包括轻量级和大型主干网）带来了可靠的准确度提升，例如，在 ImageNet 数据集上 MobivleNetV2|ResNet 系列的绝对 top-1 改进为 3.77%~5.71%|1.86%~3.72%。有趣的是，由于其改进的特征学习能力，即使只有一个内核的 ODConv 也可以与现有的具有多个内核的动态卷积对应物竞争或超越，从而大大减少了额外的参数。此外，ODConv 在调节输出特征或卷积权重方面也优于其他注意力模块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种更通用的动态卷积设计——Omni-Dimensional Dynamic Convolution (ODConv)，通过多维注意力机制提升卷积神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有动态卷积仅在卷积核数量维度实现动态化，忽略了空间尺寸、输入输出通道数等其他三个维度，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: ODConv采用多维注意力机制，通过并行策略在卷积核空间的四个维度（数量、空间尺寸、输入通道、输出通道）学习互补的注意力权重，作为常规卷积的即插即用替代方案。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和MS-COCO数据集上，ODConv使MobileNetV2和ResNet系列模型的top-1准确率分别提升3.77%-5.71%和1.86%-3.72%，且单个卷积核即可减少参数量并超越现有动态卷积方法。
AI.conclusion: ODConv通过全面动态化卷积核空间的四个维度，显著提升了CNN的特征学习能力，在保持高效推理的同时实现参数减少与性能提升。

search_text: Omni-Dimensional Dynamic Convolution 全维动态卷积 Learning a single static convolutional kernel in each convolutional layer is the common training paradigm of modern Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Instead, recent research in dynamic convolution shows that learning a linear combination of $n$ convolutional kernels weighted with their input-dependent attentions can significantly improve the accuracy of light-weight CNNs, while maintaining efficient inference. However, we observe that existing works endow convolutional kernels with the dynamic property through one dimension (regarding the convolutional kernel number) of the kernel space, but the other three dimensions (regarding the spatial size, the input channel number and the output channel number for each convolutional kernel) are overlooked. Inspired by this, we present Omni-dimensional Dynamic Convolution (ODConv), a more generalized yet elegant dynamic convolution design, to advance this line of research. ODConv leverages a novel multi-dimensional attention mechanism with a parallel strategy to learn complementary attentions for convolutional kernels along all four dimensions of the kernel space at any convolutional layer. As a drop-in replacement of regular convolutions, ODConv can be plugged into many CNN architectures. Extensive experiments on the ImageNet and MS-COCO datasets show that ODConv brings solid accuracy boosts for various prevailing CNN backbones including both light-weight and large ones, e.g., 3.77%~5.71%|1.86%~3.72% absolute top-1 improvements to MobivleNetV2|ResNet family on the ImageNet dataset. Intriguingly, thanks to its improved feature learning ability, ODConv with even one single kernel can compete with or outperform existing dynamic convolution counterparts with multiple kernels, substantially reducing extra parameters. Furthermore, ODConv is also superior to other attention modules for modulating the output features or the convolutional weights. 在每个卷积层中学习单个静态卷积核是现代卷积神经网络（CNN）的常见训练范例。相反，最新的动态卷积研究表明，学习 $n$ 个卷积核的线性组合及其输入相关注意力的加权可以显着提高轻量级 CNN 的准确性，同时保持高效的推理。然而，我们观察到现有的工作通过核空间的一维（关于卷积核数量）赋予卷积核动态属性，而忽略了其他三个维度（关于每个卷积核的空间大小、输入通道数和输出通道数）。受此启发，我们提出了全维动态卷积（ODConv），一种更通用但更优雅的动态卷积设计，以推进这方面的研究。 ODConv 利用一种新颖的多维注意力机制和并行策略来学习任何卷积层沿内核空间的所有四个维度的卷积核的互补注意力。作为常规卷积的直接替代品，ODConv 可以插入到许多 CNN 架构中。在 ImageNet 和 MS-COCO 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，ODConv 为各种流行的 CNN 主干网（包括轻量级和大型主干网）带来了可靠的准确度提升，例如，在 ImageNet 数据集上 MobivleNetV2|ResNet 系列的绝对 top-1 改进为 3.77%~5.71%|1.86%~3.72%。有趣的是，由于其改进的特征学习能力，即使只有一个内核的 ODConv 也可以与现有的具有多个内核的动态卷积对应物竞争或超越，从而大大减少了额外的参数。此外，ODConv 在调节输出特征或卷积权重方面也优于其他注意力模块。 本文提出了一种更通用的动态卷积设计——Omni-Dimensional Dynamic Convolution (ODConv)，通过多维注意力机制提升卷积神经网络的性能。 Chao Li,Aojun Zhou,Anbang Yao cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Transport in reservoir computing
title_zh: 储层计算中的传输
abstract: Reservoir computing systems are constructed using a driven dynamical system in which external inputs can alter the evolving states of a system. These paradigms are used in information processing, machine learning, and computation. A fundamental question that needs to be addressed in this framework is the statistical relationship between the input and the system states. This paper provides conditions that guarantee the existence and uniqueness of asymptotically invariant measures for driven systems and shows that their dependence on the input process is continuous when the set of input and output processes are endowed with the Wasserstein distance. The main tool in these developments is the characterization of those invariant measures as fixed points of naturally defined Foias operators that appear in this context and which have been profusely studied in the paper. Those fixed points are obtained by imposing a newly introduced stochastic state contractivity on the driven system that is readily verifiable in examples. Stochastic state contractivity can be satisfied by systems that are not state-contractive, which is a need typically evoked to guarantee the echo state property in reservoir computing. As a result, it may actually be satisfied even if the echo state property is not present.
summary: Reservoir computing systems are constructed using a driven dynamical system in which external inputs can alter the evolving states of a system. These paradigms are used in information processing, machine learning, and computation. A fundamental question that needs to be addressed in this framework is the statistical relationship between the input and the system states. This paper provides conditions that guarantee the existence and uniqueness of asymptotically invariant measures for driven systems and shows that their dependence on the input process is continuous when the set of input and output processes are endowed with the Wasserstein distance. The main tool in these developments is the characterization of those invariant measures as fixed points of naturally defined Foias operators that appear in this context and which have been profusely studied in the paper. Those fixed points are obtained by imposing a newly introduced stochastic state contractivity on the driven system that is readily verifiable in examples. Stochastic state contractivity can be satisfied by systems that are not state-contractive, which is a need typically evoked to guarantee the echo state property in reservoir computing. As a result, it may actually be satisfied even if the echo state property is not present.
abstract_zh: 油藏计算系统是使用驱动动力系统构建的，其中外部输入可以改变系统的演化状态。这些范例用于信息处理、机器学习和计算。该框架需要解决的一个基本问题是输入和系统状态之间的统计关系。本文提供了保证驱动系统渐近不变测度的存在性和唯一性的条件，并证明当输入和输出过程的集合被赋予 Wasserstein 距离时，它们对输入过程的依赖是连续的。这些发展的主要工具是将那些不变测度表征为自然定义的 Foias 算子的固定点，这些算子出现在这种情况下，并在本文中进行了大量研究。这些固定点是通过在驱动系统上施加新引入的随机状态收缩性来获得的，这在示例中很容易验证。随机状态收缩性可以通过非状态收缩性系统来满足，这通常是保证储层计算中的回波状态属性的需要。结果，即使不存在回波状态属性，实际上也可以满足。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了水库计算中驱动系统的输入与系统状态之间的统计关系，提出了保证不变测度存在性和唯一性的条件，并探讨了其连续依赖性。
AI.motivation: 水库计算框架中需要明确输入与系统状态的统计关系，而现有方法对系统状态收缩性要求较高，限制了适用范围。
AI.method: 通过引入Foias算子和随机状态收缩性条件，结合Wasserstein距离分析输入输出过程的连续依赖性。
AI.result: 证明了在驱动系统中存在唯一渐近不变测度，且其对输入过程的依赖性具有连续性，随机状态收缩性可独立于回声状态属性成立。
AI.conclusion: 随机状态收缩性条件放宽了对系统收缩性的要求，为水库计算提供了更广泛的理论支持。

authors_text: Mirza Fuad Adnan,Nadim Ahmed,Imrez Ishraque,Md. Sifath Al Amin,Md. Sumit Hasan
title: Traffic Congestion Prediction using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks: A Color-coding Approach
title_zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络的交通拥堵预测：颜色编码方法
abstract: The traffic video data has become a critical factor in confining the state of traffic congestion due to the recent advancements in computer vision. This work proposes a unique technique for traffic video classification using a color-coding scheme before training the traffic data in a Deep convolutional neural network. At first, the video data is transformed into an imagery data set; then, the vehicle detection is performed using the You Only Look Once algorithm. A color-coded scheme has been adopted to transform the imagery dataset into a binary image dataset. These binary images are fed to a Deep Convolutional Neural Network. Using the UCSD dataset, we have obtained a classification accuracy of 98.2%.
summary: The traffic video data has become a critical factor in confining the state of traffic congestion due to the recent advancements in computer vision. This work proposes a unique technique for traffic video classification using a color-coding scheme before training the traffic data in a Deep convolutional neural network. At first, the video data is transformed into an imagery data set; then, the vehicle detection is performed using the You Only Look Once algorithm. A color-coded scheme has been adopted to transform the imagery dataset into a binary image dataset. These binary images are fed to a Deep Convolutional Neural Network. Using the UCSD dataset, we have obtained a classification accuracy of 98.2%.
abstract_zh: 由于计算机视觉的最新进展，交通视频数据已成为限制交通拥堵状态的关键因素。这项工作提出了一种独特的交通视频分类技术，在深度卷积神经网络中训练交通数据之前，使用颜色编码方案。首先，将视频数据转换为图像数据集；然后，使用 You Only Look Once 算法执行车辆检测。采用颜色编码方案将图像数据集转换为二进制图像数据集。这些二值图像被输入深度卷积神经网络。使用 UCSD 数据集，我们获得了 98.2% 的分类准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合颜色编码与深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的交通拥堵预测方法，通过处理交通视频数据实现高精度分类。
AI.motivation: 传统交通拥堵检测方法存在精度不足的问题，而计算机视觉技术的进步使视频数据成为分析交通状态的关键，需探索更高效的视频分类技术。
AI.method: 将交通视频转换为图像数据集，采用YOLO算法进行车辆检测，利用颜色编码生成二值图像，最终输入DCNN进行分类训练。
AI.result: 基于UCSD数据集的实验表明，该方法在交通拥堵分类任务中达到98.2%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 颜色编码预处理与DCNN的结合显著提升了交通拥堵预测的准确性，为视频分析在智能交通系统中的应用提供了有效方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合颜色编码与深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的交通拥堵预测方法，通过处理交通视频数据实现高精度分类。
ai_content.motivation: 传统交通拥堵检测方法存在精度不足的问题，而计算机视觉技术的进步使视频数据成为分析交通状态的关键，需探索更高效的视频分类技术。
ai_content.method: 将交通视频转换为图像数据集，采用YOLO算法进行车辆检测，利用颜色编码生成二值图像，最终输入DCNN进行分类训练。
ai_content.result: 基于UCSD数据集的实验表明，该方法在交通拥堵分类任务中达到98.2%的准确率。
ai_content.conclusion: 颜色编码预处理与DCNN的结合显著提升了交通拥堵预测的准确性，为视频分析在智能交通系统中的应用提供了有效方案。

search_text: Traffic Congestion Prediction using Deep Convolutional Neural Networks: A Color-coding Approach 使用深度卷积神经网络的交通拥堵预测：颜色编码方法 The traffic video data has become a critical factor in confining the state of traffic congestion due to the recent advancements in computer vision. This work proposes a unique technique for traffic video classification using a color-coding scheme before training the traffic data in a Deep convolutional neural network. At first, the video data is transformed into an imagery data set; then, the vehicle detection is performed using the You Only Look Once algorithm. A color-coded scheme has been adopted to transform the imagery dataset into a binary image dataset. These binary images are fed to a Deep Convolutional Neural Network. Using the UCSD dataset, we have obtained a classification accuracy of 98.2%. 由于计算机视觉的最新进展，交通视频数据已成为限制交通拥堵状态的关键因素。这项工作提出了一种独特的交通视频分类技术，在深度卷积神经网络中训练交通数据之前，使用颜色编码方案。首先，将视频数据转换为图像数据集；然后，使用 You Only Look Once 算法执行车辆检测。采用颜色编码方案将图像数据集转换为二进制图像数据集。这些二值图像被输入深度卷积神经网络。使用 UCSD 数据集，我们获得了 98.2% 的分类准确率。 本文提出了一种结合颜色编码与深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的交通拥堵预测方法，通过处理交通视频数据实现高精度分类。 Mirza Fuad Adnan,Nadim Ahmed,Imrez Ishraque,Md. Sifath Al Amin,Md. Sumit Hasan cs.CV,cs.AI

title: DPFNet: A Dual-branch Dilated Network with Phase-aware Fourier Convolution for Low-light Image Enhancement
title_zh: DPFNet：具有相位感知傅里叶卷积的双分支扩张网络，用于低光图像增强
abstract: Low-light image enhancement is a classical computer vision problem aiming to recover normal-exposure images from low-light images. However, convolutional neural networks commonly used in this field are good at sampling low-frequency local structural features in the spatial domain, which leads to unclear texture details of the reconstructed images. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel module using the Fourier coefficients, which can recover high-quality texture details under the constraint of semantics in the frequency phase and supplement the spatial domain. In addition, we design a simple and efficient module for the image spatial domain using dilated convolutions with different receptive fields to alleviate the loss of detail caused by frequent downsampling. We integrate the above parts into an end-to-end dual branch network and design a novel loss committee and an adaptive fusion module to guide the network to flexibly combine spatial and frequency domain features to generate more pleasing visual effects. Finally, we evaluate the proposed network on public benchmarks. Extensive experimental results show that our method outperforms many existing state-of-the-art ones, showing outstanding performance and potential.
summary: Low-light image enhancement is a classical computer vision problem aiming to recover normal-exposure images from low-light images. However, convolutional neural networks commonly used in this field are good at sampling low-frequency local structural features in the spatial domain, which leads to unclear texture details of the reconstructed images. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel module using the Fourier coefficients, which can recover high-quality texture details under the constraint of semantics in the frequency phase and supplement the spatial domain. In addition, we design a simple and efficient module for the image spatial domain using dilated convolutions with different receptive fields to alleviate the loss of detail caused by frequent downsampling. We integrate the above parts into an end-to-end dual branch network and design a novel loss committee and an adaptive fusion module to guide the network to flexibly combine spatial and frequency domain features to generate more pleasing visual effects. Finally, we evaluate the proposed network on public benchmarks. Extensive experimental results show that our method outperforms many existing state-of-the-art ones, showing outstanding performance and potential.
abstract_zh: 低光图像增强是一个经典的计算机视觉问题，旨在从低光图像中恢复正常曝光的图像。然而，该领域常用的卷积神经网络擅长采样空间域中的低频局部结构特征，这导致重建图像的纹理细节不清晰。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种使用傅立叶系数的新颖模块，它可以在频率相位语义的约束下恢复高质量的纹理细节并补充空间域。此外，我们使用不同感受野的扩张卷积为图像空间域设计了一个简单高效的模块，以减轻频繁下采样造成的细节损失。我们将上述部分集成到端到端的双分支网络中，并设计了新颖的损失委员会和自适应融合模块，以引导网络灵活地结合空间和频域特征，以产生更令人愉悦的视觉效果。最后，我们根据公共基准评估所提出的网络。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法优于许多现有的最先进的方法，显示出出色的性能和潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPFNet，一种结合相位感知傅里叶卷积与双分支网络的低光图像增强方法，旨在提升重建图像的纹理细节质量。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络在空间域擅长提取低频结构特征，但导致重建图像纹理细节模糊，需在频率域补充细节信息。
AI.method: 设计傅里叶系数模块在频率相位恢复纹理细节，结合不同感受野的空洞卷积模块减少下采样损失，并通过双分支网络与自适应融合模块整合空间与频域特征。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中优于多种现有先进方法，展现出卓越性能与应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: DPFNet通过融合空间与频率域信息，有效提升了低光图像增强效果，验证了方法的创新性与实用性。

title: Mining SoC Message Flows with Attention Model
title_zh: 使用注意力模型挖掘 SoC 消息流
abstract: High-quality system-level message flow specifications are necessary for comprehensive validation of system-on-chip (SoC) designs. However, manual development and maintenance of such specifications are daunting tasks. We propose a disruptive method that utilizes deep sequence modeling with the attention mechanism to infer accurate flow specifications from SoC communication traces. The proposed method can overcome the inherent complexity of SoC traces induced by the concurrent executions of SoC designs that existing mining tools often find extremely challenging. We conduct experiments on five highly concurrent traces and find that the proposed approach outperforms several existing state-of-the-art trace mining tools.
summary: High-quality system-level message flow specifications are necessary for comprehensive validation of system-on-chip (SoC) designs. However, manual development and maintenance of such specifications are daunting tasks. We propose a disruptive method that utilizes deep sequence modeling with the attention mechanism to infer accurate flow specifications from SoC communication traces. The proposed method can overcome the inherent complexity of SoC traces induced by the concurrent executions of SoC designs that existing mining tools often find extremely challenging. We conduct experiments on five highly concurrent traces and find that the proposed approach outperforms several existing state-of-the-art trace mining tools.
abstract_zh: 高质量的系统级消息流规范对于片上系统 (SoC) 设计的全面验证是必要的。然而，手动开发和维护此类规范是一项艰巨的任务。我们提出了一种颠覆性方法，利用深度序列建模和注意力机制，从 SoC 通信轨迹中推断出准确的流规范。所提出的方法可以克服由 SoC 设计的并发执行引起的 SoC 跟踪的固有复杂性，而现有的挖掘工具通常认为这非常具有挑战性。我们对五个高度并发的跟踪进行了实验，发现所提出的方法优于几种现有的最先进的跟踪挖掘工具。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力模型的方法，从SoC通信轨迹中自动挖掘高质量的消息流规范。
AI.motivation: 手动创建和维护SoC消息流规范效率低下且困难，现有工具难以处理高并发通信轨迹的复杂性。
AI.method: 采用深度序列模型与注意力机制，从SoC通信轨迹中自动学习并推断消息流规范，解决高并发场景下的复杂性问题。
AI.result: 在五个高并发通信轨迹的实验中，该方法在准确性和鲁棒性上优于现有主流的轨迹挖掘工具。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力机制的深度模型能有效处理SoC通信轨迹的复杂性，为自动化消息流规范生成提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: The BLue Amazon Brain (BLAB): A Modular Architecture of Services about the Brazilian Maritime Territory
title_zh: BLue 亚马逊大脑 (BLAB)：有关巴西海域的模块化服务架构
comment: ef:AI: Modeling Oceans and Climate Change (IJCAI-ECAI), 2022
comments: ef:AI: Modeling Oceans and Climate Change (IJCAI-ECAI), 2022
abstract: We describe the first steps in the development of an artificial agent focused on the Brazilian maritime territory, a large region within the South Atlantic also known as the Blue Amazon. The "BLue Amazon Brain" (BLAB) integrates a number of services aimed at disseminating information about this region and its importance, functioning as a tool for environmental awareness. The main service provided by BLAB is a conversational facility that deals with complex questions about the Blue Amazon, called BLAB-Chat; its central component is a controller that manages several task-oriented natural language processing modules (e.g., question answering and summarizer systems). These modules have access to an internal data lake as well as to third-party databases. A news reporter (BLAB-Reporter) and a purposely-developed wiki (BLAB-Wiki) are also part of the BLAB service architecture. In this paper, we describe our current version of BLAB's architecture (interface, backend, web services, NLP modules, and resources) and comment on the challenges we have faced so far, such as the lack of training data and the scattered state of domain information. Solving these issues presents a considerable challenge in the development of artificial intelligence for technical domains.
summary: We describe the first steps in the development of an artificial agent focused on the Brazilian maritime territory, a large region within the South Atlantic also known as the Blue Amazon. The "BLue Amazon Brain" (BLAB) integrates a number of services aimed at disseminating information about this region and its importance, functioning as a tool for environmental awareness. The main service provided by BLAB is a conversational facility that deals with complex questions about the Blue Amazon, called BLAB-Chat; its central component is a controller that manages several task-oriented natural language processing modules (e.g., question answering and summarizer systems). These modules have access to an internal data lake as well as to third-party databases. A news reporter (BLAB-Reporter) and a purposely-developed wiki (BLAB-Wiki) are also part of the BLAB service architecture. In this paper, we describe our current version of BLAB's architecture (interface, backend, web services, NLP modules, and resources) and comment on the challenges we have faced so far, such as the lack of training data and the scattered state of domain information. Solving these issues presents a considerable challenge in the development of artificial intelligence for technical domains.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了针对巴西海域开发人工智能的第一步，巴西海域是南大西洋内的一大片区域，也被称为蓝色亚马逊。 “蓝色亚马逊大脑”（BLAB）整合了多项服务，旨在传播有关该地区及其重要性的信息，作为提高环境意识的工具。 BLAB 提供的主要服务是一个对话工具，用于处理有关蓝色亚马逊的复杂问题，称为 BLAB-Chat；其核心组件是一个控制器，用于管理多个面向任务的自然语言处理模块（例如，问答和摘要系统）。这些模块可以访问内部数据湖以及第三方数据库。新闻记者（BLAB-Reporter）和专门开发的维基（BLAB-Wiki）也是 BLAB 服务架构的一部分。在本文中，我们描述了当前版本的 BLAB 架构（界面、后端、Web 服务、NLP 模块和资源），并评论了我们迄今为止面临的挑战，例如训练数据的缺乏和领域信息的分散状态。解决这些问题对技术领域的人工智能发展提出了相当大的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了BLAB系统的架构设计，该系统通过整合多个服务模块，旨在提高对巴西海域（蓝亚马逊）的环境信息传播与意识。
AI.motivation: 巴西海域作为重要的生态区域，亟需通过AI工具整合分散的信息资源，促进环境保护与公众认知。
AI.method: 构建模块化服务架构，包括对话系统BLAB-Chat、新闻生成器BLAB-Reporter和知识库BLAB-Wiki，结合NLP模块与多源数据库实现信息处理。
AI.result: 完成了BLAB系统的当前版本架构设计，但面临训练数据不足和领域信息碎片化的技术挑战。
AI.conclusion: 在技术领域开发AI系统需解决数据稀缺性问题，未来需进一步整合资源以提升系统效能。

These modules have access to an internal data lake as well as to third-party databases. A news reporter (BLAB-Reporter) and a purposely-developed wiki (BLAB-Wiki) are also part of the BLAB service architecture. In this paper, we describe our current version of BLAB's architecture (interface, backend, web services, NLP modules, and resources) and comment on the challenges we have faced so far, such as the lack of training data and the scattered state of domain information. title: GNNInterpreter: A Probabilistic Generative Model-Level Explanation for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: GNNInterpreter：图神经网络的概率生成模型级解释
abstract: Recently, Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have significantly advanced the performance of machine learning tasks on graphs. However, this technological breakthrough makes people wonder: how does a GNN make such decisions, and can we trust its prediction with high confidence? When it comes to some critical fields, such as biomedicine, where making wrong decisions can have severe consequences, it is crucial to interpret the inner working mechanisms of GNNs before applying them. In this paper, we propose a model-agnostic model-level explanation method for different GNNs that follow the message passing scheme, GNNInterpreter, to explain the high-level decision-making process of the GNN model. More specifically, GNNInterpreter learns a probabilistic generative graph distribution that produces the most discriminative graph pattern the GNN tries to detect when making a certain prediction by optimizing a novel objective function specifically designed for the model-level explanation for GNNs. Compared to existing works, GNNInterpreter is more flexible and computationally efficient in generating explanation graphs with different types of node and edge features, without introducing another blackbox or requiring manually specified domain-specific rules. In addition, the experimental studies conducted on four different datasets demonstrate that the explanation graphs generated by GNNInterpreter match the desired graph pattern if the model is ideal; otherwise, potential model pitfalls can be revealed by the explanation. The official implementation can be found at https://github.com/yolandalalala/GNNInterpreter.

However, this technological breakthrough makes people wonder: how does a GNN make such decisions, and can we trust its prediction with high confidence? When it comes to some critical fields, such as biomedicine, where making wrong decisions can have severe consequences, it is crucial to interpret the inner working mechanisms of GNNs before applying them. More specifically, GNNInterpreter learns a probabilistic generative graph distribution that produces the most discriminative graph pattern the GNN tries to detect when making a certain prediction by optimizing a novel objective function specifically designed for the model-level explanation for GNNs. Compared to existing works, GNNInterpreter is more flexible and computationally efficient in generating explanation graphs with different types of node and edge features, without introducing another blackbox or requiring manually specified domain-specific rules. In addition, the experimental studies conducted on four different datasets demonstrate that the explanation graphs generated by GNNInterpreter match the desired graph pattern if the model is ideal; otherwise, potential model pitfalls can be revealed by the explanation. The official implementation can be found at https://github.com/yolandalalala/GNNInterpreter.
abstract_zh: 最近，图神经网络（GNN）显着提高了图机器学习任务的性能。然而，这一技术突破让人们想知道：GNN 是如何做出这样的决策的，我们能否高度信任它的预测？当涉及到一些关键领域时，例如生物医学，错误决策可能会产生严重后果，因此在应用 GNN 之前解释其内部工作机制至关重要。在本文中，我们针对遵循消息传递方案的不同 GNN 提出了一种与模型无关的模型级解释方法 GNNInterpreter，以解释 GNN 模型的高层决策过程。更具体地说，GNNInterpreter 学习一种概率生成图分布，通过优化专门为 GNN 模型级解释而设计的新颖目标函数，该分布可生成 GNN 在进行特定预测时尝试检测的最具辨别力的图模式。与现有的工作相比，GNNInterpreter 在生成具有不同类型的节点和边特征的解释图方面更加灵活且计算效率更高，而无需引入另一个黑盒或需要手动指定特定于域的规则。此外，在四个不同数据集上进行的实验研究表明，如果模型理想，GNNInterpreter 生成的解释图与所需的图模式匹配；否则，潜在的模型陷阱可以通过解释揭示出来。官方实现可以在 https://github.com/yolandalalala/GNNInterpreter 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GNNInterpreter的模型无关的图神经网络（GNN）模型级解释方法，用于解释GNN的高层决策过程。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络在关键领域（如生物医学）的应用需要确保其决策可信度，但现有方法难以有效解释GNN的内部机制。
AI.method: 通过学习概率生成图分布，优化特定目标函数，生成能反映GNN检测关键图模式的解释图，无需引入黑箱或领域规则。
AI.result: 实验表明，GNNInterpreter在四种数据集上生成的解释图能匹配理想模型的期望模式，或揭示模型潜在缺陷。
AI.conclusion: GNNInterpreter在灵活性和计算效率上优于现有方法，为GNN的可信应用提供了有效的解释工具。

title: A Deep Moving-camera Background Model
title_zh: 深度移动摄像机背景模型
comment: 26 paged, 5 figures. To be published in ECCV 2022
comments: 26 paged, 5 figures. To be published in ECCV 2022
abstract: In video analysis, background models have many applications such as background/foreground separation, change detection, anomaly detection, tracking, and more. However, while learning such a model in a video captured by a static camera is a fairly-solved task, in the case of a Moving-camera Background Model (MCBM), the success has been far more modest due to algorithmic and scalability challenges that arise due to the camera motion. Thus, existing MCBMs are limited in their scope and their supported camera-motion types. These hurdles also impeded the employment, in this unsupervised task, of end-to-end solutions based on deep learning (DL). Moreover, existing MCBMs usually model the background either on the domain of a typically-large panoramic image or in an online fashion. Unfortunately, the former creates several problems, including poor scalability, while the latter prevents the recognition and leveraging of cases where the camera revisits previously-seen parts of the scene. This paper proposes a new method, called DeepMCBM, that eliminates all the aforementioned issues and achieves state-of-the-art results. Concretely, first we identify the difficulties associated with joint alignment of video frames in general and in a DL setting in particular. Next, we propose a new strategy for joint alignment that lets us use a spatial transformer net with neither a regularization nor any form of specialized (and non-differentiable) initialization. Coupled with an autoencoder conditioned on unwarped robust central moments (obtained from the joint alignment), this yields an end-to-end regularization-free MCBM that supports a broad range of camera motions and scales gracefully. We demonstrate DeepMCBM's utility on a variety of videos, including ones beyond the scope of other methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/BGU-CS-VIL/DeepMCBM .

These hurdles also impeded the employment, in this unsupervised task, of end-to-end solutions based on deep learning (DL). Unfortunately, the former creates several problems, including poor scalability, while the latter prevents the recognition and leveraging of cases where the camera revisits previously-seen parts of the scene. This paper proposes a new method, called DeepMCBM, that eliminates all the aforementioned issues and achieves state-of-the-art results. Coupled with an autoencoder conditioned on unwarped robust central moments (obtained from the joint alignment), this yields an end-to-end regularization-free MCBM that supports a broad range of camera motions and scales gracefully. We demonstrate DeepMCBM's utility on a variety of videos, including ones beyond the scope of other methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/BGU-CS-VIL/DeepMCBM .
abstract_zh: 在视频分析中，背景模型有许多应用，例如背景/前景分离、变化检测、异常检测、跟踪等。然而，虽然在静态相机捕获的视频中学习这样的模型是一项相当容易解决的任务，但在移动相机背景模型 (MCBM) 的情况下，由于相机运动带来的算法和可扩展性挑战，成功率要低得多。因此，现有的 MCBM 的范围及其支持的相机运动类型受到限制。这些障碍也阻碍了基于深度学习 (DL) 的端到端解决方案在这项无监督任务中的应用。此外，现有的 MCBM 通常在典型的大型全景图像域上或以在线方式对背景进行建模。不幸的是，前者会产生一些问题，包括可扩展性差，而后者则无法识别和利用相机重新访问场景中先前看到的部分的情况。本文提出了一种称为 DeepMCBM 的新方法，它消除了上述所有问题并取得了最先进的结果。具体来说，首先我们确定与视频帧联合对齐相关的困难，特别是在深度学习设置中。接下来，我们提出了一种新的联合对齐策略，使我们可以使用既没有正则化也没有任何形式的专门（且不可微分）初始化的空间变换器网络。与以未扭曲的鲁棒中心矩（从关节对齐获得）为条件的自动编码器相结合，产生了端到端的无正则化 MCBM，它支持广泛的相机运动和优雅的缩放。我们在各种视频上展示了 DeepMCBM 的实用性，包括超出其他方法范围的视频。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/BGU-CS-VIL/DeepMCBM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DeepMCBM的新方法，解决移动相机背景建模中的算法和可扩展性挑战，实现端到端的深度学习背景模型。
AI.motivation: 现有移动相机背景模型（MCBM）受限于算法复杂性、可扩展性差及无法支持端到端深度学习，且难以处理相机重访场景区域的情况。
AI.method: 提出联合对齐策略，结合空间变换网络与自编码器，利用未变形鲁棒中心矩实现端到端正则化自由模型，支持多种相机运动类型。
AI.result: DeepMCBM在多种视频数据集上达到最先进效果，解决了现有方法的可扩展性问题，并支持更广泛的相机运动场景。
AI.conclusion: DeepMCBM有效克服移动相机背景建模的难点，为视频分析中的动态场景处理提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: A Deep Moving-camera Background Model 深度移动摄像机背景模型 In video analysis, background models have many applications such as background/foreground separation, change detection, anomaly detection, tracking, and more. However, while learning such a model in a video captured by a static camera is a fairly-solved task, in the case of a Moving-camera Background Model (MCBM), the success has been far more modest due to algorithmic and scalability challenges that arise due to the camera motion. Thus, existing MCBMs are limited in their scope and their supported camera-motion types. These hurdles also impeded the employment, in this unsupervised task, of end-to-end solutions based on deep learning (DL). Moreover, existing MCBMs usually model the background either on the domain of a typically-large panoramic image or in an online fashion. Unfortunately, the former creates several problems, including poor scalability, while the latter prevents the recognition and leveraging of cases where the camera revisits previously-seen parts of the scene. This paper proposes a new method, called DeepMCBM, that eliminates all the aforementioned issues and achieves state-of-the-art results. Concretely, first we identify the difficulties associated with joint alignment of video frames in general and in a DL setting in particular. Next, we propose a new strategy for joint alignment that lets us use a spatial transformer net with neither a regularization nor any form of specialized (and non-differentiable) initialization. Coupled with an autoencoder conditioned on unwarped robust central moments (obtained from the joint alignment), this yields an end-to-end regularization-free MCBM that supports a broad range of camera motions and scales gracefully. We demonstrate DeepMCBM's utility on a variety of videos, including ones beyond the scope of other methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/BGU-CS-VIL/DeepMCBM . 在视频分析中，背景模型有许多应用，例如背景/前景分离、变化检测、异常检测、跟踪等。然而，虽然在静态相机捕获的视频中学习这样的模型是一项相当容易解决的任务，但在移动相机背景模型 (MCBM) 的情况下，由于相机运动带来的算法和可扩展性挑战，成功率要低得多。因此，现有的 MCBM 的范围及其支持的相机运动类型受到限制。这些障碍也阻碍了基于深度学习 (DL) 的端到端解决方案在这项无监督任务中的应用。此外，现有的 MCBM 通常在典型的大型全景图像域上或以在线方式对背景进行建模。不幸的是，前者会产生一些问题，包括可扩展性差，而后者则无法识别和利用相机重新访问场景中先前看到的部分的情况。本文提出了一种称为 DeepMCBM 的新方法，它消除了上述所有问题并取得了最先进的结果。具体来说，首先我们确定与视频帧联合对齐相关的困难，特别是在深度学习设置中。接下来，我们提出了一种新的联合对齐策略，使我们可以使用既没有正则化也没有任何形式的专门（且不可微分）初始化的空间变换器网络。与以未扭曲的鲁棒中心矩（从关节对齐获得）为条件的自动编码器相结合，产生了端到端的无正则化 MCBM，它支持广泛的相机运动和优雅的缩放。我们在各种视频上展示了 DeepMCBM 的实用性，包括超出其他方法范围的视频。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/BGU-CS-VIL/DeepMCBM 获取。 本文提出一种名为DeepMCBM的新方法，解决移动相机背景建模中的算法和可扩展性挑战，实现端到端的深度学习背景模型。 Guy Erez,Ron Shapira Weber,Oren Freifeld cs.CV

title: An Attention-guided Multistream Feature Fusion Network for Localization of Risky Objects in Driving Videos
title_zh: 用于驾驶视频中风险对象定位的注意力引导多流特征融合网络
abstract: Detecting dangerous traffic agents in videos captured by vehicle-mounted dashboard cameras (dashcams) is essential to facilitate safe navigation in a complex environment. Accident-related videos are just a minor portion of the driving video big data, and the transient pre-accident processes are highly dynamic and complex. Besides, risky and non-risky traffic agents can be similar in their appearance. These make risky object localization in the driving video particularly challenging. To this end, this paper proposes an attention-guided multistream feature fusion network (AM-Net) to localize dangerous traffic agents from dashcam videos. Two Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) networks use object bounding box and optical flow features extracted from consecutive video frames to capture spatio-temporal cues for distinguishing dangerous traffic agents. An attention module coupled with the GRUs learns to attend to the traffic agents relevant to an accident. Fusing the two streams of features, AM-Net predicts the riskiness scores of traffic agents in the video. In supporting this study, the paper also introduces a benchmark dataset called Risky Object Localization (ROL). The dataset contains spatial, temporal, and categorical annotations with the accident, object, and scene-level attributes. The proposed AM-Net achieves a promising performance of 85.73% AUC on the ROL dataset. Meanwhile, the AM-Net outperforms current state-of-the-art for video anomaly detection by 6.3% AUC on the DoTA dataset. A thorough ablation study further reveals AM-Net's merits by evaluating the contributions of its different components.
summary: Detecting dangerous traffic agents in videos captured by vehicle-mounted dashboard cameras (dashcams) is essential to facilitate safe navigation in a complex environment. Accident-related videos are just a minor portion of the driving video big data, and the transient pre-accident processes are highly dynamic and complex. Besides, risky and non-risky traffic agents can be similar in their appearance. These make risky object localization in the driving video particularly challenging. To this end, this paper proposes an attention-guided multistream feature fusion network (AM-Net) to localize dangerous traffic agents from dashcam videos. Two Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) networks use object bounding box and optical flow features extracted from consecutive video frames to capture spatio-temporal cues for distinguishing dangerous traffic agents. An attention module coupled with the GRUs learns to attend to the traffic agents relevant to an accident. Fusing the two streams of features, AM-Net predicts the riskiness scores of traffic agents in the video. In supporting this study, the paper also introduces a benchmark dataset called Risky Object Localization (ROL). The dataset contains spatial, temporal, and categorical annotations with the accident, object, and scene-level attributes. The proposed AM-Net achieves a promising performance of 85.73% AUC on the ROL dataset. Meanwhile, the AM-Net outperforms current state-of-the-art for video anomaly detection by 6.3% AUC on the DoTA dataset. A thorough ablation study further reveals AM-Net's merits by evaluating the contributions of its different components.
abstract_zh: Detecting dangerous traffic agents in videos captured by vehicle-mounted dashboard cameras (dashcams) is essential to facilitate safe navigation in a complex environment. Accident-related videos are just a minor portion of the driving video big data, and the transient pre-accident processes are highly dynamic and complex.此外，有风险和无风险的流量代理在外观上可能相似。这些使得驾驶视频中的危险对象定位特别具有挑战性。 To this end, this paper proposes an attention-guided multistream feature fusion network (AM-Net) to localize dangerous traffic agents from dashcam videos. Two Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) networks use object bounding box and optical flow features extracted from consecutive video frames to capture spatio-temporal cues for distinguishing dangerous traffic agents.与 GRU 结合的注意力模块学习关注与事故相关的交通代理。 AM-Net 融合两个特征流，预测视频中流量代理的风险评分。为了支持这项研究，本文还介绍了一个名为 Risky Object Localization (ROL) 的基准数据集。该数据集包含带有事故、对象和场景级属性的空间、时间和分类注释。所提出的 AM-Net 在 ROL 数据集上实现了 85.73% AUC 的良好性能。与此同时，AM-Net 在 DoTA 数据集上的 AUC 比当前最先进的视频异常检测性能高出 6.3%。彻底的消融研究通过评估 AM-Net 不同组件的贡献，进一步揭示了 AM-Net 的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力引导的多流特征融合网络（AM-Net），用于从车载摄像头视频中定位危险交通目标。
AI.motivation: 驾驶视频中危险目标检测面临事故视频占比低、预事故过程动态复杂以及危险与非危险目标外观相似等挑战，现有方法难以有效解决。
AI.method: 设计包含两个GRU网络的多流架构，分别提取目标边界框和光流特征以捕捉时空线索；结合注意力模块聚焦事故相关目标，并通过特征融合预测风险评分。同时构建包含空间、时间及类别标注的ROL数据集。
AI.result: 在ROL数据集上达到85.73%的AUC值，在DoTA数据集上较现有最优方法提升6.3% AUC，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: AM-Net通过时空特征融合与注意力机制有效解决了驾驶视频中危险目标定位难题，所构建的ROL数据集为后续研究提供基准。

authors_text: Lanqing Li,Liang Zeng,Ziqi Gao,Shen Yuan,Yatao Bian,Bingzhe Wu,Hengtong Zhang,Yang Yu,Chan Lu,Zhipeng Zhou,Hongteng Xu,Jia Li,Peilin Zhao,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: ImDrug: A Benchmark for Deep Imbalanced Learning in AI-aided Drug Discovery
title_zh: ImDrug：人工智能辅助药物发现中深度不平衡学习的基准
comment: 29 pages, 7 figures, 8 tables, a machine learning benchmark submission
comments: 29 pages, 7 figures, 8 tables, a machine learning benchmark submission
abstract: The last decade has witnessed a prosperous development of computational methods and dataset curation for AI-aided drug discovery (AIDD). However, real-world pharmaceutical datasets often exhibit highly imbalanced distribution, which is overlooked by the current literature but may severely compromise the fairness and generalization of machine learning applications. Motivated by this observation, we introduce ImDrug, a comprehensive benchmark with an open-source Python library which consists of 4 imbalance settings, 11 AI-ready datasets, 54 learning tasks and 16 baseline algorithms tailored for imbalanced learning. It provides an accessible and customizable testbed for problems and solutions spanning a broad spectrum of the drug discovery pipeline such as molecular modeling, drug-target interaction and retrosynthesis. We conduct extensive empirical studies with novel evaluation metrics, to demonstrate that the existing algorithms fall short of solving medicinal and pharmaceutical challenges in the data imbalance scenario. We believe that ImDrug opens up avenues for future research and development, on real-world challenges at the intersection of AIDD and deep imbalanced learning.
summary: The last decade has witnessed a prosperous development of computational methods and dataset curation for AI-aided drug discovery (AIDD). However, real-world pharmaceutical datasets often exhibit highly imbalanced distribution, which is overlooked by the current literature but may severely compromise the fairness and generalization of machine learning applications. Motivated by this observation, we introduce ImDrug, a comprehensive benchmark with an open-source Python library which consists of 4 imbalance settings, 11 AI-ready datasets, 54 learning tasks and 16 baseline algorithms tailored for imbalanced learning. It provides an accessible and customizable testbed for problems and solutions spanning a broad spectrum of the drug discovery pipeline such as molecular modeling, drug-target interaction and retrosynthesis. We conduct extensive empirical studies with novel evaluation metrics, to demonstrate that the existing algorithms fall short of solving medicinal and pharmaceutical challenges in the data imbalance scenario. We believe that ImDrug opens up avenues for future research and development, on real-world challenges at the intersection of AIDD and deep imbalanced learning.

Motivated by this observation, we introduce ImDrug, a comprehensive benchmark with an open-source Python library which consists of 4 imbalance settings, 11 AI-ready datasets, 54 learning tasks and 16 baseline algorithms tailored for imbalanced learning. It provides an accessible and customizable testbed for problems and solutions spanning a broad spectrum of the drug discovery pipeline such as molecular modeling, drug-target interaction and retrosynthesis. We conduct extensive empirical studies with novel evaluation metrics, to demonstrate that the existing algorithms fall short of solving medicinal and pharmaceutical challenges in the data imbalance scenario. We believe that ImDrug opens up avenues for future research and development, on real-world challenges at the intersection of AIDD and deep imbalanced learning.

AI.motivation: 现实世界制药数据集存在严重不平衡分布，现有研究忽视此问题，导致机器学习应用的公平性和泛化能力受损。
AI.method: 构建包含4种不平衡设置、11个AI就绪数据集、54个学习任务及16种基线算法的开源基准，覆盖分子建模、药物靶点相互作用等药物发现关键环节，并设计新评估指标。
AI.result: 实证研究表明现有算法在处理不平衡数据时表现不足，难以应对医药领域的实际挑战。
AI.conclusion: ImDrug为AI辅助药物发现与深度不平衡学习的交叉研究提供全新平台，推动该领域技术发展。
