title: iDF-SLAM: End-to-End RGB-D SLAM with Neural Implicit Mapping and Deep Feature Tracking
title_zh: iDF-SLAM：具有神经隐式映射和深度特征跟踪的端到端 RGB-D SLAM
abstract: We propose a novel end-to-end RGB-D SLAM, iDF-SLAM, which adopts a feature-based deep neural tracker as the front-end and a NeRF-style neural implicit mapper as the back-end. The neural implicit mapper is trained on-the-fly, while though the neural tracker is pretrained on the ScanNet dataset, it is also finetuned along with the training of the neural implicit mapper. Under such a design, our iDF-SLAM is capable of learning to use scene-specific features for camera tracking, thus enabling lifelong learning of the SLAM system. Both the training for the tracker and the mapper are self-supervised without introducing ground truth poses. We test the performance of our iDF-SLAM on the Replica and ScanNet datasets and compare the results to the two recent NeRF-based neural SLAM systems. The proposed iDF-SLAM demonstrates state-of-the-art results in terms of scene reconstruction and competitive performance in camera tracking.
summary: We propose a novel end-to-end RGB-D SLAM, iDF-SLAM, which adopts a feature-based deep neural tracker as the front-end and a NeRF-style neural implicit mapper as the back-end. The neural implicit mapper is trained on-the-fly, while though the neural tracker is pretrained on the ScanNet dataset, it is also finetuned along with the training of the neural implicit mapper. Under such a design, our iDF-SLAM is capable of learning to use scene-specific features for camera tracking, thus enabling lifelong learning of the SLAM system. Both the training for the tracker and the mapper are self-supervised without introducing ground truth poses. We test the performance of our iDF-SLAM on the Replica and ScanNet datasets and compare the results to the two recent NeRF-based neural SLAM systems. The proposed iDF-SLAM demonstrates state-of-the-art results in terms of scene reconstruction and competitive performance in camera tracking.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的端到端 RGB-D SLAM，即 iDF-SLAM，它采用基于特征的深度神经跟踪器作为前端，采用 NeRF 风格的神经隐式映射器作为后端。神经隐式映射器是动态训练的，虽然神经跟踪器是在 ScanNet 数据集上预训练的，但它也会随着神经隐式映射器的训练进行微调。在这样的设计下，我们的 iDF-SLAM 能够学习使用特定于场景的功能进行相机跟踪，从而实现 SLAM 系统的终身学习。跟踪器和映射器的训练都是自我监督的，无需引入地面真实姿势。我们在 Replica 和 ScanNet 数据集上测试了 iDF-SLAM 的性能，并将结果与​​最近的两个基于 NeRF 的神经 SLAM 系统进行了比较。所提出的 iDF-SLAM 在场景重建和相机跟踪的竞争性能方面展示了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的RGB-D SLAM系统iDF-SLAM，结合神经隐式映射和深度特征跟踪技术，实现场景重建与相机跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM系统依赖手工设计的特征和先验知识，难以适应复杂场景且缺乏终身学习能力，需通过神经网络方法提升鲁棒性与自适应性。
AI.method: 采用预训练的深度特征跟踪器作为前端，结合实时训练的NeRF风格神经隐式映射器作为后端，通过自监督学习联合优化跟踪与建图，无需真实位姿标注。
AI.result: 在Replica和ScanNet数据集上测试表明，iDF-SLAM在场景重建精度上达到SOTA，相机跟踪性能与最新NeRF-SLAM方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: iDF-SLAM通过端到端神经网络架构实现了自监督的终身学习SLAM，为复杂环境下的实时三维重建提供了新思路。

title: On Developing Facial Stress Analysis and Expression Recognition Platform
title_zh: 面部压力分析与表情识别平台的开发
abstract: This work represents the experimental and development process of system facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms for an immersive digital learning platform. The system retrieves from users web camera and evaluates it using artificial neural network (ANN) algorithms. The ANN output signals can be used to score and improve the learning process. Adapting an ANN to a new system can require a significant implementation effort or the need to repeat the ANN training. There are also limitations related to the minimum hardware required to run an ANN. To overpass these constraints, some possible implementations of facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms in real-time systems are presented. The implementation of the new solution has made it possible to improve the accuracy in the recognition of facial expressions and also to increase their response speed. Experimental results showed that using the developed algorithms allow to detect the heart rate with better rate in comparison with social equipment.
summary: This work represents the experimental and development process of system facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms for an immersive digital learning platform. The system retrieves from users web camera and evaluates it using artificial neural network (ANN) algorithms. The ANN output signals can be used to score and improve the learning process. Adapting an ANN to a new system can require a significant implementation effort or the need to repeat the ANN training. There are also limitations related to the minimum hardware required to run an ANN. To overpass these constraints, some possible implementations of facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms in real-time systems are presented. The implementation of the new solution has made it possible to improve the accuracy in the recognition of facial expressions and also to increase their response speed. Experimental results showed that using the developed algorithms allow to detect the heart rate with better rate in comparison with social equipment.
abstract_zh: This work represents the experimental and development process of system facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms for an immersive digital learning platform.该系统从用户网络摄像头检索并使用人工神经网络（ANN）算法对其进行评估。 ANN 输出信号可用于评分和改进学习过程。使 ANN 适应新系统可能需要大量的实施工作或需要重复 ANN 培训。运行人工神经网络所需的最低硬件也存在限制。为了克服这些限制，提出了实时系统中面部表情识别和面部压力分析算法的一些可能实现。新解决方案的实施可以提高面部表情识别的准确性，并提高其响应速度。 Experimental results showed that using the developed algorithms allow to detect the heart rate with better rate in comparison with social equipment.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个用于沉浸式数字学习平台的面部表情识别和压力分析系统，利用人工神经网络（ANN）算法处理用户网络摄像头数据，以提升学习过程的评估与优化。
AI.motivation: 传统ANN在适应新系统时需大量实施工作或重复训练，且对硬件要求较高，限制了实时应用。因此需探索更高效的面部表情识别与压力分析算法实现方案。
AI.method: 通过改进ANN算法，优化其在实时系统中的部署，提升面部表情识别准确率与响应速度，并利用开发的算法实现心率检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，所开发的算法在面部表情识别准确率和响应速度上均有提升，且心率检测效果优于现有设备。
AI.conclusion: 该解决方案有效克服了ANN的硬件与实施限制，为实时面部分析提供了更高效的技术支持。

method: 通过改进ANN算法，优化其在实时系统中的部署，提升面部表情识别准确率与响应速度，并利用开发的算法实现心率检测。
result: 实验表明，所开发的算法在面部表情识别准确率和响应速度上均有提升，且心率检测效果优于现有设备。
conclusion: 该解决方案有效克服了ANN的硬件与实施限制，为实时面部分析提供了更高效的技术支持。
search_text: On Developing Facial Stress Analysis and Expression Recognition Platform 面部压力分析与表情识别平台的开发 This work represents the experimental and development process of system facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms for an immersive digital learning platform. The system retrieves from users web camera and evaluates it using artificial neural network (ANN) algorithms. The ANN output signals can be used to score and improve the learning process. Adapting an ANN to a new system can require a significant implementation effort or the need to repeat the ANN training. There are also limitations related to the minimum hardware required to run an ANN. To overpass these constraints, some possible implementations of facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms in real-time systems are presented. The implementation of the new solution has made it possible to improve the accuracy in the recognition of facial expressions and also to increase their response speed. Experimental results showed that using the developed algorithms allow to detect the heart rate with better rate in comparison with social equipment. This work represents the experimental and development process of system facial expression recognition and facial stress analysis algorithms for an immersive digital learning platform.该系统从用户网络摄像头检索并使用人工神经网络（ANN）算法对其进行评估。 ANN 输出信号可用于评分和改进学习过程。使 ANN 适应新系统可能需要大量的实施工作或需要重复 ANN 培训。运行人工神经网络所需的最低硬件也存在限制。为了克服这些限制，提出了实时系统中面部表情识别和面部压力分析算法的一些可能实现。新解决方案的实施可以提高面部表情识别的准确性，并提高其响应速度。 Experimental results showed that using the developed algorithms allow to detect the heart rate with better rate in comparison with social equipment. 本文开发了一个用于沉浸式数字学习平台的面部表情识别和压力分析系统，利用人工神经网络（ANN）算法处理用户网络摄像头数据，以提升学习过程的评估与优化。 Fabio Cacciatori,Sergei Nikolaev,Dmitrii Grigorev,Anastasiia Archangelskaya cs.CV

title: Algorithmic decision making methods for fair credit scoring
title_zh: 公平信用评分的算法决策方法
abstract: The effectiveness of machine learning in evaluating the creditworthiness of loan applicants has been demonstrated for a long time. However, there is concern that the use of automated decision-making processes may result in unequal treatment of groups or individuals, potentially leading to discriminatory outcomes. This paper seeks to address this issue by evaluating the effectiveness of 12 leading bias mitigation methods across 5 different fairness metrics, as well as assessing their accuracy and potential profitability for financial institutions. Through our analysis, we have identified the challenges associated with achieving fairness while maintaining accuracy and profitabiliy, and have highlighted both the most successful and least successful mitigation methods. Ultimately, our research serves to bridge the gap between experimental machine learning and its practical applications in the finance industry.
summary: The effectiveness of machine learning in evaluating the creditworthiness of loan applicants has been demonstrated for a long time. However, there is concern that the use of automated decision-making processes may result in unequal treatment of groups or individuals, potentially leading to discriminatory outcomes. This paper seeks to address this issue by evaluating the effectiveness of 12 leading bias mitigation methods across 5 different fairness metrics, as well as assessing their accuracy and potential profitability for financial institutions. Through our analysis, we have identified the challenges associated with achieving fairness while maintaining accuracy and profitabiliy, and have highlighted both the most successful and least successful mitigation methods. Ultimately, our research serves to bridge the gap between experimental machine learning and its practical applications in the finance industry.
abstract_zh: 机器学习在评估贷款申请人信用方面的有效性早已得到证明。然而，人们担心使用自动化决策过程可能会导致群体或个人受到不平等待遇，从而可能导致歧视性结果。本文旨在通过评估 12 种领先的偏差缓解方法在 5 个不同公平指标中的有效性，以及评估其准确性和金融机构的潜在盈利能力来解决这个问题。通过我们的分析，我们确定了在保持准确性和盈利能力的同时实现公平性所面临的挑战，并强调了最成功和最不成功的缓解方法。最终，我们的研究旨在弥合实验性机器学习与其在金融行业的实际应用之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了12种主流偏差缓解方法在公平信用评分中的效果，分析其在5种公平性指标、准确性及金融机构盈利能力方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 自动化信用评分可能因算法偏差导致歧视性结果，需在公平性与商业效益间寻求平衡，以推动机器学习在金融领域的负责任应用。
AI.method: 通过实验对比12种偏差缓解方法，结合5种公平性度量标准，综合评估模型准确性及潜在盈利性，分析不同方法的优劣。
AI.result: 发现实现公平性与准确性、盈利性的平衡存在挑战，部分方法在特定指标上表现突出，而其他方法效果欠佳。
AI.conclusion: 需根据实际业务需求选择适配的公平性策略，为机器学习在金融场景的落地提供实践指导与理论支持。

title: Estimation of Optical Aberrations in 3D Microscopic Bioimages
title_zh: 3D 显微生物图像中光学像差的估计
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures, presented at ICFSP on 9 Sept 2022 in Paris, France, to be published in ICFSP conference proceedings in IEEE Xplore digital library
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures, presented at ICFSP on 9 Sept 2022 in Paris, France, to be published in ICFSP conference proceedings in IEEE Xplore digital library
abstract: The quality of microscopy images often suffers from optical aberrations. These aberrations and their associated point spread functions have to be quantitatively estimated to restore aberrated images. The recent state-of-the-art method PhaseNet, based on a convolutional neural network, can quantify aberrations accurately but is limited to images of point light sources, e.g. fluorescent beads. In this research, we describe an extension of PhaseNet enabling its use on 3D images of biological samples. To this end, our method incorporates object-specific information into the simulated images used for training the network. Further, we add a Python-based restoration of images via Richardson-Lucy deconvolution. We demonstrate that the deconvolution with the predicted PSF can not only remove the simulated aberrations but also improve the quality of the real raw microscopic images with unknown residual PSF. We provide code for fast and convenient prediction and correction of aberrations.
summary: The quality of microscopy images often suffers from optical aberrations. These aberrations and their associated point spread functions have to be quantitatively estimated to restore aberrated images. The recent state-of-the-art method PhaseNet, based on a convolutional neural network, can quantify aberrations accurately but is limited to images of point light sources, e.g. fluorescent beads. In this research, we describe an extension of PhaseNet enabling its use on 3D images of biological samples. To this end, our method incorporates object-specific information into the simulated images used for training the network. Further, we add a Python-based restoration of images via Richardson-Lucy deconvolution. We demonstrate that the deconvolution with the predicted PSF can not only remove the simulated aberrations but also improve the quality of the real raw microscopic images with unknown residual PSF. We provide code for fast and convenient prediction and correction of aberrations.
abstract_zh: 显微镜图像的质量经常受到光学像差的影响。必须定量估计这些像差及其相关的点扩散函数才能恢复像差图像。最近最先进的方法 PhaseNet 基于卷积神经网络，可以准确地量化像差，但仅限于点光源的图像，例如点光源的图像。荧光珠。在这项研究中，我们描述了 PhaseNet 的扩展，使其能够在生物样本的 3D 图像上使用。为此，我们的方法将特定于对象的信息合并到用于训练网络的模拟图像中。此外，我们通过 Richardson-Lucy 反卷积添加了基于 Python 的图像恢复。我们证明，使用预测 PSF 进行反卷积不仅可以消除模拟像差，还可以提高具有未知残余 PSF 的真实原始显微图像的质量。我们提供用于快速方便地预测和校正像差的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展PhaseNet方法，用于估计3D显微生物图像中的光学像差，并结合Richardson-Lucy去卷积技术提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如PhaseNet仅适用于点光源图像，无法处理复杂生物样本的3D图像，需开发适用于真实生物样本的像差估计与校正技术。
AI.method: 通过将样本特异性信息融入训练数据扩展PhaseNet，并引入基于Python的Richardson-Lucy去卷积算法进行图像恢复。
AI.result: 该方法成功消除模拟像差，显著提升真实显微图像质量，即使存在未知残余点扩展函数（PSF）仍有效。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为3D生物显微图像的像差校正提供了高效解决方案，代码开源便于实际应用。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Georges El Fakhri,Jonghye Woo
title: Memory Consistent Unsupervised Off-the-Shelf Model Adaptation for Source-Relaxed Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于源松弛医学图像分割的内存一致无监督现成模型适应
comment: Published in Medical Image Analysis (extension of MICCAI paper)
comments: Published in Medical Image Analysis (extension of MICCAI paper)
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been a vital protocol for migrating information learned from a labeled source domain to facilitate the implementation in an unlabeled heterogeneous target domain. Although UDA is typically jointly trained on data from both domains, accessing the labeled source domain data is often restricted, due to concerns over patient data privacy or intellectual property. To sidestep this, we propose "off-the-shelf (OS)" UDA (OSUDA), aimed at image segmentation, by adapting an OS segmentor trained in a source domain to a target domain, in the absence of source domain data in adaptation. Toward this goal, we aim to develop a novel batch-wise normalization (BN) statistics adaptation framework. In particular, we gradually adapt the domain-specific low-order BN statistics, e.g., mean and variance, through an exponential momentum decay strategy, while explicitly enforcing the consistency of the domain shareable high-order BN statistics, e.g., scaling and shifting factors, via our optimization objective. We also adaptively quantify the channel-wise transferability to gauge the importance of each channel, via both low-order statistics divergence and a scaling factor.~Furthermore, we incorporate unsupervised self-entropy minimization into our framework to boost performance alongside a novel queued, memory-consistent self-training strategy to utilize the reliable pseudo label for stable and efficient unsupervised adaptation. We evaluated our OSUDA-based framework on both cross-modality and cross-subtype brain tumor segmentation and cardiac MR to CT segmentation tasks. Our experimental results showed that our memory consistent OSUDA performs better than existing source-relaxed UDA methods and yields similar performance to UDA methods with source data.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been a vital protocol for migrating information learned from a labeled source domain to facilitate the implementation in an unlabeled heterogeneous target domain. Although UDA is typically jointly trained on data from both domains, accessing the labeled source domain data is often restricted, due to concerns over patient data privacy or intellectual property. To sidestep this, we propose "off-the-shelf (OS)" UDA (OSUDA), aimed at image segmentation, by adapting an OS segmentor trained in a source domain to a target domain, in the absence of source domain data in adaptation. Toward this goal, we aim to develop a novel batch-wise normalization (BN) statistics adaptation framework. In particular, we gradually adapt the domain-specific low-order BN statistics, e.g., mean and variance, through an exponential momentum decay strategy, while explicitly enforcing the consistency of the domain shareable high-order BN statistics, e.g., scaling and shifting factors, via our optimization objective. We also adaptively quantify the channel-wise transferability to gauge the importance of each channel, via both low-order statistics divergence and a scaling factor.~Furthermore, we incorporate unsupervised self-entropy minimization into our framework to boost performance alongside a novel queued, memory-consistent self-training strategy to utilize the reliable pseudo label for stable and efficient unsupervised adaptation. We evaluated our OSUDA-based framework on both cross-modality and cross-subtype brain tumor segmentation and cardiac MR to CT segmentation tasks. Our experimental results showed that our memory consistent OSUDA performs better than existing source-relaxed UDA methods and yields similar performance to UDA methods with source data.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）一直是迁移从标记源域学习的信息以促进在未标记异构目标域中实现的重要协议。尽管 UDA 通常对来自两个域的数据进行联合训练，但出于对患者数据隐私或知识产权的担忧，访问标记的源域数据通常受到限制。为了避免这个问题，我们提出了“现成的（OS）”UDA（OSUDA），旨在进行图像分割，在没有源域数据的情况下，将源域中训练的操作系统分割器调整到目标域。为了实现这一目标，我们的目标是开发一种新颖的批量归一化（BN）统计适应框架。特别是，我们通过指数动量衰减策略逐渐适应特定领域的低阶 BN 统计数据，例如均值和方差，同时通过我们的优化目标明确强制域可共享的高阶 BN 统计数据的一致性，例如缩放和移位因子。我们还通过低阶统计散度和比例因子自适应地量化通道方式的可转移性，以衡量每个通道的重要性。~此外，我们将无监督自熵最小化纳入我们的框架中，以提高性能，同时采用新颖的排队、内存一致的自训练策略，利用可靠的伪标签实现稳定和高效的无监督适应。我们在跨模态和跨亚型脑肿瘤分割以及心脏 MR 到 CT 分割任务上评估了基于 OSUDA 的框架。我们的实验结果表明，我们的内存一致 OSUDA 比现有的源宽松 UDA 方法表现更好，并且与使用源数据的 UDA 方法产生相似的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需源域数据的医学图像分割领域自适应方法OSUDA，通过优化批量归一化统计量和伪标签策略实现模型迁移。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分割中源域标注数据常因隐私或产权问题无法获取，现有领域自适应方法通常依赖源域数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计批量归一化统计量分层适应框架：1）通过指数动量衰减策略渐进调整域特异性低阶统计量（均值/方差）；2）通过优化目标强制共享高阶统计量（缩放/平移因子）一致性；3）结合通道级可迁移性评估与记忆一致性的伪标签自训练策略。
AI.result: 在跨模态脑肿瘤分割和心脏MRI到CT分割任务中，OSUDA性能优于现有无源域数据方法，且接近使用源域数据的领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: OSUDA通过统计量分层适应和记忆一致伪标签机制，有效解决了医疗图像分割中源域数据受限的领域自适应问题。

search_text: Memory Consistent Unsupervised Off-the-Shelf Model Adaptation for Source-Relaxed Medical Image Segmentation 用于源松弛医学图像分割的内存一致无监督现成模型适应 Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been a vital protocol for migrating information learned from a labeled source domain to facilitate the implementation in an unlabeled heterogeneous target domain. Although UDA is typically jointly trained on data from both domains, accessing the labeled source domain data is often restricted, due to concerns over patient data privacy or intellectual property. To sidestep this, we propose "off-the-shelf (OS)" UDA (OSUDA), aimed at image segmentation, by adapting an OS segmentor trained in a source domain to a target domain, in the absence of source domain data in adaptation. Toward this goal, we aim to develop a novel batch-wise normalization (BN) statistics adaptation framework. In particular, we gradually adapt the domain-specific low-order BN statistics, e.g., mean and variance, through an exponential momentum decay strategy, while explicitly enforcing the consistency of the domain shareable high-order BN statistics, e.g., scaling and shifting factors, via our optimization objective. We also adaptively quantify the channel-wise transferability to gauge the importance of each channel, via both low-order statistics divergence and a scaling factor.~Furthermore, we incorporate unsupervised self-entropy minimization into our framework to boost performance alongside a novel queued, memory-consistent self-training strategy to utilize the reliable pseudo label for stable and efficient unsupervised adaptation. We evaluated our OSUDA-based framework on both cross-modality and cross-subtype brain tumor segmentation and cardiac MR to CT segmentation tasks. Our experimental results showed that our memory consistent OSUDA performs better than existing source-relaxed UDA methods and yields similar performance to UDA methods with source data. 无监督域适应（UDA）一直是迁移从标记源域学习的信息以促进在未标记异构目标域中实现的重要协议。尽管 UDA 通常对来自两个域的数据进行联合训练，但出于对患者数据隐私或知识产权的担忧，访问标记的源域数据通常受到限制。为了避免这个问题，我们提出了“现成的（OS）”UDA（OSUDA），旨在进行图像分割，在没有源域数据的情况下，将源域中训练的操作系统分割器调整到目标域。为了实现这一目标，我们的目标是开发一种新颖的批量归一化（BN）统计适应框架。特别是，我们通过指数动量衰减策略逐渐适应特定领域的低阶 BN 统计数据，例如均值和方差，同时通过我们的优化目标明确强制域可共享的高阶 BN 统计数据的一致性，例如缩放和移位因子。我们还通过低阶统计散度和比例因子自适应地量化通道方式的可转移性，以衡量每个通道的重要性。~此外，我们将无监督自熵最小化纳入我们的框架中，以提高性能，同时采用新颖的排队、内存一致的自训练策略，利用可靠的伪标签实现稳定和高效的无监督适应。我们在跨模态和跨亚型脑肿瘤分割以及心脏 MR 到 CT 分割任务上评估了基于 OSUDA 的框架。我们的实验结果表明，我们的内存一致 OSUDA 比现有的源宽松 UDA 方法表现更好，并且与使用源数据的 UDA 方法产生相似的性能。 本文提出了一种无需源域数据的医学图像分割领域自适应方法OSUDA，通过优化批量归一化统计量和伪标签策略实现模型迁移。 Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Georges El Fakhri,Jonghye Woo cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jiangmeng Li,Wenwen Qiang,Yanan Zhang,Wenyi Mo,Changwen Zheng,Bing Su,Hui Xiong
title: MetaMask: Revisiting Dimensional Confounder for Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: MetaMask：重新审视自我监督学习的维度混杂因素
abstract: As a successful approach to self-supervised learning, contrastive learning aims to learn invariant information shared among distortions of the input sample. While contrastive learning has yielded continuous advancements in sampling strategy and architecture design, it still remains two persistent defects: the interference of task-irrelevant information and sample inefficiency, which are related to the recurring existence of trivial constant solutions. From the perspective of dimensional analysis, we find out that the dimensional redundancy and dimensional confounder are the intrinsic issues behind the phenomena, and provide experimental evidence to support our viewpoint. We further propose a simple yet effective approach MetaMask, short for the dimensional Mask learned by Meta-learning, to learn representations against dimensional redundancy and confounder. MetaMask adopts the redundancy-reduction technique to tackle the dimensional redundancy issue and innovatively introduces a dimensional mask to reduce the gradient effects of specific dimensions containing the confounder, which is trained by employing a meta-learning paradigm with the objective of improving the performance of masked representations on a typical self-supervised task. We provide solid theoretical analyses to prove MetaMask can obtain tighter risk bounds for downstream classification compared to typical contrastive methods. Empirically, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks.
summary: As a successful approach to self-supervised learning, contrastive learning aims to learn invariant information shared among distortions of the input sample. While contrastive learning has yielded continuous advancements in sampling strategy and architecture design, it still remains two persistent defects: the interference of task-irrelevant information and sample inefficiency, which are related to the recurring existence of trivial constant solutions. From the perspective of dimensional analysis, we find out that the dimensional redundancy and dimensional confounder are the intrinsic issues behind the phenomena, and provide experimental evidence to support our viewpoint. We further propose a simple yet effective approach MetaMask, short for the dimensional Mask learned by Meta-learning, to learn representations against dimensional redundancy and confounder. MetaMask adopts the redundancy-reduction technique to tackle the dimensional redundancy issue and innovatively introduces a dimensional mask to reduce the gradient effects of specific dimensions containing the confounder, which is trained by employing a meta-learning paradigm with the objective of improving the performance of masked representations on a typical self-supervised task. We provide solid theoretical analyses to prove MetaMask can obtain tighter risk bounds for downstream classification compared to typical contrastive methods. Empirically, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 作为一种成功的自监督学习方法，对比学习旨在学习在输入样本的扭曲之间共享的不变信息。虽然对比学习在采样策略和架构设计方面取得了持续进步，但它仍然存在两个长期存在的缺陷：任务无关信息的干扰和样本效率低下，这与琐碎常数解的反复存在有关。从维度分析的角度，我们发现维度冗余和维度混杂是现象背后的内在问题，并提供实验证据来支持我们的观点。我们进一步提出了一种简单而有效的方法 MetaMask（元学习学习的维度 Mask 的缩写），用于学习针对维度冗余和混杂因素的表示。 MetaMask采用冗余减少技术来解决维度冗余问题，并创新性地引入维度掩模来减少包含混杂因素的特定维度的梯度效应，通过采用元学习范式进行训练，目的是提高掩模表示在典型自监督任务上的性能。我们提供了可靠的理论分析来证明与典型的对比方法相比，MetaMask 可以获得更严格的下游分类风险界限。根据经验，我们的方法在各种基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaMask方法，通过解决自监督学习中的维度冗余和维度混淆问题，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 对比学习存在任务无关信息干扰和样本效率低的问题，根源在于维度冗余和维度混淆，需从维度分析角度解决。
AI.method: MetaMask结合冗余消除技术与元学习训练的维度掩码，通过抑制包含混淆信息的维度梯度，优化表征学习。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能，并通过理论分析证明其下游分类风险界更优。
AI.conclusion: MetaMask有效解决了自监督学习中的维度混淆问题，兼具理论保证与实际效果。

authors_text: Chenhao Li,Sebastian Blaes,Pavel Kolev,Marin Vlastelica,Jonas Frey,Georg Martius
title: Versatile Skill Control via Self-supervised Adversarial Imitation of Unlabeled Mixed Motions
title_zh: 通过未标记混合动作的自监督对抗性模仿实现多功能技能控制
abstract: Learning diverse skills is one of the main challenges in robotics. To this end, imitation learning approaches have achieved impressive results. These methods require explicitly labeled datasets or assume consistent skill execution to enable learning and active control of individual behaviors, which limits their applicability. In this work, we propose a cooperative adversarial method for obtaining single versatile policies with controllable skill sets from unlabeled datasets containing diverse state transition patterns by maximizing their discriminability. Moreover, we show that by utilizing unsupervised skill discovery in the generative adversarial imitation learning framework, novel and useful skills emerge with successful task fulfillment. Finally, the obtained versatile policies are tested on an agile quadruped robot called Solo 8 and present faithful replications of diverse skills encoded in the demonstrations.
summary: Learning diverse skills is one of the main challenges in robotics. To this end, imitation learning approaches have achieved impressive results. These methods require explicitly labeled datasets or assume consistent skill execution to enable learning and active control of individual behaviors, which limits their applicability. In this work, we propose a cooperative adversarial method for obtaining single versatile policies with controllable skill sets from unlabeled datasets containing diverse state transition patterns by maximizing their discriminability. Moreover, we show that by utilizing unsupervised skill discovery in the generative adversarial imitation learning framework, novel and useful skills emerge with successful task fulfillment. Finally, the obtained versatile policies are tested on an agile quadruped robot called Solo 8 and present faithful replications of diverse skills encoded in the demonstrations.
abstract_zh: 学习多样化的技能是机器人技术的主要挑战之一。为此，模仿学习方法取得了令人瞩目的成果。这些方法需要明确标记的数据集或假设一致的技能执行才能实现对个体行为的学习和主动控制，这限制了它们的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种合作对抗方法，通过最大化其可区分性，从包含不同状态转换模式的未标记数据集中获得具有可控技能集的单一通用策略。此外，我们表明，通过在生成对抗性模仿学习框架中利用无监督技能发现，随着任务的成功完成，新颖且有用的技能就会出现。最后，所获得的多功能策略在名为 Solo 8 的敏捷四足机器人上进行了测试，并忠实地复制了演示中编码的各种技能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督对抗模仿学习的方法，从未标记的混合运动数据中学习可控制的多样化技能，应用于机器人控制。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法依赖标注数据或假设技能执行一致性，限制了其在复杂场景中的适用性，需开发无需标注数据的多样化技能学习方法。
AI.method: 设计协作对抗框架，通过最大化状态转移模式的判别性，在生成对抗模仿学习中实现无监督技能发现，生成可控制的多功能策略。
AI.result: 在四足机器人Solo 8上验证了方法有效性，成功复现了演示数据中编码的多样化技能，展现了策略的适应性与可控性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需标注数据即可学习多样化技能，为机器人自主适应复杂任务提供了新思路，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: Versatile Skill Control via Self-supervised Adversarial Imitation of Unlabeled Mixed Motions 通过未标记混合动作的自监督对抗性模仿实现多功能技能控制 Learning diverse skills is one of the main challenges in robotics. To this end, imitation learning approaches have achieved impressive results. These methods require explicitly labeled datasets or assume consistent skill execution to enable learning and active control of individual behaviors, which limits their applicability. In this work, we propose a cooperative adversarial method for obtaining single versatile policies with controllable skill sets from unlabeled datasets containing diverse state transition patterns by maximizing their discriminability. Moreover, we show that by utilizing unsupervised skill discovery in the generative adversarial imitation learning framework, novel and useful skills emerge with successful task fulfillment. Finally, the obtained versatile policies are tested on an agile quadruped robot called Solo 8 and present faithful replications of diverse skills encoded in the demonstrations. 学习多样化的技能是机器人技术的主要挑战之一。为此，模仿学习方法取得了令人瞩目的成果。这些方法需要明确标记的数据集或假设一致的技能执行才能实现对个体行为的学习和主动控制，这限制了它们的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种合作对抗方法，通过最大化其可区分性，从包含不同状态转换模式的未标记数据集中获得具有可控技能集的单一通用策略。此外，我们表明，通过在生成对抗性模仿学习框架中利用无监督技能发现，随着任务的成功完成，新颖且有用的技能就会出现。最后，所获得的多功能策略在名为 Solo 8 的敏捷四足机器人上进行了测试，并忠实地复制了演示中编码的各种技能。 本文提出一种基于自监督对抗模仿学习的方法，从未标记的混合运动数据中学习可控制的多样化技能，应用于机器人控制。 Chenhao Li,Sebastian Blaes,Pavel Kolev,Marin Vlastelica,Jonas Frey,Georg Martius cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chuanqing Wang,Chaoming Fang,Yong Zou,Jie Yang,Mohamad Sawan
title: SpikeSEE: An Energy-Efficient Dynamic Scenes Processing Framework for Retinal Prostheses
title_zh: SpikeSEE：用于视网膜假体的节能动态场景处理框架
abstract: Intelligent and low-power retinal prostheses are highly demanded in this era, where wearable and implantable devices are used for numerous healthcare applications. In this paper, we propose an energy-efficient dynamic scenes processing framework (SpikeSEE) that combines a spike representation encoding technique and a bio-inspired spiking recurrent neural network (SRNN) model to achieve intelligent processing and extreme low-power computation for retinal prostheses. The spike representation encoding technique could interpret dynamic scenes with sparse spike trains, decreasing the data volume. The SRNN model, inspired by the human retina special structure and spike processing method, is adopted to predict the response of ganglion cells to dynamic scenes. Experimental results show that the Pearson correlation coefficient of the proposed SRNN model achieves 0.93, which outperforms the state of the art processing framework for retinal prostheses. Thanks to the spike representation and SRNN processing, the model can extract visual features in a multiplication-free fashion. The framework achieves 12 times power reduction compared with the convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) processing-based framework. Our proposed SpikeSEE predicts the response of ganglion cells more accurately with lower energy consumption, which alleviates the precision and power issues of retinal prostheses and provides a potential solution for wearable or implantable prostheses.
summary: Intelligent and low-power retinal prostheses are highly demanded in this era, where wearable and implantable devices are used for numerous healthcare applications. In this paper, we propose an energy-efficient dynamic scenes processing framework (SpikeSEE) that combines a spike representation encoding technique and a bio-inspired spiking recurrent neural network (SRNN) model to achieve intelligent processing and extreme low-power computation for retinal prostheses. The spike representation encoding technique could interpret dynamic scenes with sparse spike trains, decreasing the data volume. The SRNN model, inspired by the human retina special structure and spike processing method, is adopted to predict the response of ganglion cells to dynamic scenes. Experimental results show that the Pearson correlation coefficient of the proposed SRNN model achieves 0.93, which outperforms the state of the art processing framework for retinal prostheses. Thanks to the spike representation and SRNN processing, the model can extract visual features in a multiplication-free fashion. The framework achieves 12 times power reduction compared with the convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) processing-based framework. Our proposed SpikeSEE predicts the response of ganglion cells more accurately with lower energy consumption, which alleviates the precision and power issues of retinal prostheses and provides a potential solution for wearable or implantable prostheses.
abstract_zh: 在这个时代，智能和低功耗的视网膜假体的需求量很大，可穿戴和可植入设备被用于众多医疗保健应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种节能的动态场景处理框架（SpikeSEE），该框架结合了尖峰表示编码技术和仿生尖峰递归神经网络（SRNN）模型，以实现视网膜假体的智能处理和极低功耗计算。尖峰表示编码技术可以用稀疏的尖峰序列解释动态场景，从而减少数据量。 SRNN模型受人类视网膜特殊结构和尖峰处理方法的启发，采用预测神经节细胞对动态场景的反应。实验结果表明，所提出的 SRNN 模型的皮尔逊相关系数达到 0.93，优于最先进的视网膜假体处理框架。得益于尖峰表示和 SRNN 处理，该模型可以以无乘法的方式提取视觉特征。与基于卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）处理的框架相比，该框架实现了 12 倍的功耗降低。我们提出的 SpikeSEE 以更低的能耗更准确地预测神经节细胞的反应，这缓解了视网膜假体的精度和功率问题，并为可穿戴或植入式假体提供了潜在的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SpikeSEE的高效动态场景处理框架，结合脉冲编码技术和生物启发的脉冲循环神经网络（SRNN），用于视网膜假体的低功耗智能处理。
AI.motivation: 当前视网膜假体面临精度不足和功耗过高的问题，亟需开发低功耗且能准确预测视网膜神经反应的智能处理框架以满足可穿戴和植入式医疗设备的需求。
AI.method: 通过脉冲表示编码技术将动态场景转化为稀疏脉冲序列以减少数据量，并设计仿生SRNN模型模拟视网膜神经元对场景的响应机制，实现乘法运算-free的视觉特征提取。
AI.result: SRNN模型达到0.93的皮尔逊相关系数（优于现有方法），整体功耗较传统卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）降低12倍，同时显著提升视网膜神经反应预测精度。
AI.conclusion: SpikeSEE框架通过脉冲编码与SRNN的结合，有效解决了视网膜假体的精度与功耗矛盾，为低功耗可穿戴/植入式视觉假体提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Samuel Looper,Javier Rodriguez-Puigvert,Roland Siegwart,Cesar Cadena,Lukas Schmid
title: 3D VSG: Long-term Semantic Scene Change Prediction through 3D Variable Scene Graphs
title_zh: 3D VSG：通过 3D 可变场景图进行长期语义场景变化预测
comment: Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. 8 pages, 4 figures, code released at https://github.com/ethz-asl/3d_vsg
comments: Accepted for IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. 8 pages, 4 figures, code released at https://github.com/ethz-asl/3d_vsg
abstract: Numerous applications require robots to operate in environments shared with other agents, such as humans or other robots. However, such shared scenes are typically subject to different kinds of long-term semantic scene changes. The ability to model and predict such changes is thus crucial for robot autonomy. In this work, we formalize the task of semantic scene variability estimation and identify three main varieties of semantic scene change: changes in the position of an object, its semantic state, or the composition of a scene as a whole. To represent this variability, we propose the Variable Scene Graph (VSG), which augments existing 3D Scene Graph (SG) representations with the variability attribute, representing the likelihood of discrete long-term change events. We present a novel method, DeltaVSG, to estimate the variability of VSGs in a supervised fashion. We evaluate our method on the 3RScan long-term dataset, showing notable improvements in this novel task over existing approaches. Our method DeltaVSG achieves an accuracy of 77.1% and a recall of 72.3%, often mimicking human intuition about how indoor scenes change over time. We further show the utility of VSG prediction in the task of active robotic change detection, speeding up task completion by 66.0% compared to a scene-change-unaware planner. We make our code available as open-source.
summary: Numerous applications require robots to operate in environments shared with other agents, such as humans or other robots. However, such shared scenes are typically subject to different kinds of long-term semantic scene changes. The ability to model and predict such changes is thus crucial for robot autonomy. In this work, we formalize the task of semantic scene variability estimation and identify three main varieties of semantic scene change: changes in the position of an object, its semantic state, or the composition of a scene as a whole. To represent this variability, we propose the Variable Scene Graph (VSG), which augments existing 3D Scene Graph (SG) representations with the variability attribute, representing the likelihood of discrete long-term change events. We present a novel method, DeltaVSG, to estimate the variability of VSGs in a supervised fashion. We evaluate our method on the 3RScan long-term dataset, showing notable improvements in this novel task over existing approaches. Our method DeltaVSG achieves an accuracy of 77.1% and a recall of 72.3%, often mimicking human intuition about how indoor scenes change over time. We further show the utility of VSG prediction in the task of active robotic change detection, speeding up task completion by 66.0% compared to a scene-change-unaware planner. We make our code available as open-source.
abstract_zh: 许多应用要求机器人在与其他代理（例如人类或其他机器人）共享的环境中运行。然而，此类共享场景通常会受到不同类型的长期语义场景变化的影响。因此，建模和预测此类变化的能力对于机器人自主性至关重要。在这项工作中，我们形式化了语义场景可变性估计的任务，并识别了语义场景变化的三种主要类型：对象位置的变化、其语义状态或整个场景的组成。为了表示这种可变性，我们提出了可变场景图（VSG），它用可变性属性增强了现有的 3D 场景图（SG）表示，表示离散长期变化事件的可能性。我们提出了一种新方法 DeltaVSG，以监督方式估计 VSG 的变异性。我们在 3RScan 长期数据集上评估了我们的方法，表明这项新任务相对于现有方法有显着改进。我们的方法 DeltaVSG 的准确率达到 77.1%，召回率达到 72.3%，通常模仿人类对室内场景如何随时间变化的直觉。我们进一步展示了 VSG 预测在主动机器人变化检测任务中的实用性，与场景变化无感知的规划器相比，将任务完成速度加快了 66.0%。我们将我们的代码作为开源提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D可变场景图（VSG）的长期语义场景变化预测方法，用于建模和预测共享环境中物体位置、语义状态及场景组成的长期变化。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要在与人类或其他机器人共享的动态环境中运行，而现有方法难以有效预测长期语义场景变化，影响机器人自主性。
AI.method: 提出可变场景图（VSG）以表示场景变化可能性，并设计监督学习方法DeltaVSG估计VSG的可变性，结合3RScan数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 在3RScan数据集上，DeltaVSG达到77.1%的准确率和72.3%的召回率，且在主动机器人变化检测任务中比无变化感知规划器快66.0%。

search_text: 3D VSG: Long-term Semantic Scene Change Prediction through 3D Variable Scene Graphs 3D VSG：通过 3D 可变场景图进行长期语义场景变化预测 Numerous applications require robots to operate in environments shared with other agents, such as humans or other robots. However, such shared scenes are typically subject to different kinds of long-term semantic scene changes. The ability to model and predict such changes is thus crucial for robot autonomy. In this work, we formalize the task of semantic scene variability estimation and identify three main varieties of semantic scene change: changes in the position of an object, its semantic state, or the composition of a scene as a whole. To represent this variability, we propose the Variable Scene Graph (VSG), which augments existing 3D Scene Graph (SG) representations with the variability attribute, representing the likelihood of discrete long-term change events. We present a novel method, DeltaVSG, to estimate the variability of VSGs in a supervised fashion. We evaluate our method on the 3RScan long-term dataset, showing notable improvements in this novel task over existing approaches. Our method DeltaVSG achieves an accuracy of 77.1% and a recall of 72.3%, often mimicking human intuition about how indoor scenes change over time. We further show the utility of VSG prediction in the task of active robotic change detection, speeding up task completion by 66.0% compared to a scene-change-unaware planner. We make our code available as open-source. 许多应用要求机器人在与其他代理（例如人类或其他机器人）共享的环境中运行。然而，此类共享场景通常会受到不同类型的长期语义场景变化的影响。因此，建模和预测此类变化的能力对于机器人自主性至关重要。在这项工作中，我们形式化了语义场景可变性估计的任务，并识别了语义场景变化的三种主要类型：对象位置的变化、其语义状态或整个场景的组成。为了表示这种可变性，我们提出了可变场景图（VSG），它用可变性属性增强了现有的 3D 场景图（SG）表示，表示离散长期变化事件的可能性。我们提出了一种新方法 DeltaVSG，以监督方式估计 VSG 的变异性。我们在 3RScan 长期数据集上评估了我们的方法，表明这项新任务相对于现有方法有显着改进。我们的方法 DeltaVSG 的准确率达到 77.1%，召回率达到 72.3%，通常模仿人类对室内场景如何随时间变化的直觉。我们进一步展示了 VSG 预测在主动机器人变化检测任务中的实用性，与场景变化无感知的规划器相比，将任务完成速度加快了 66.0%。我们将我们的代码作为开源提供。 本文提出了一种基于3D可变场景图（VSG）的长期语义场景变化预测方法，用于建模和预测共享环境中物体位置、语义状态及场景组成的长期变化。 Samuel Looper,Javier Rodriguez-Puigvert,Roland Siegwart,Cesar Cadena,Lukas Schmid cs.RO,cs.CV

title: TwistSLAM++: Fusing multiple modalities for accurate dynamic semantic SLAM
title_zh: TwistSLAM++：融合多种模态以实现准确的动态语义 SLAM
abstract: Most classical SLAM systems rely on the static scene assumption, which limits their applicability in real world scenarios. Recent SLAM frameworks have been proposed to simultaneously track the camera and moving objects. However they are often unable to estimate the canonical pose of the objects and exhibit a low object tracking accuracy. To solve this problem we propose TwistSLAM++, a semantic, dynamic, SLAM system that fuses stereo images and LiDAR information. Using semantic information, we track potentially moving objects and associate them to 3D object detections in LiDAR scans to obtain their pose and size. Then, we perform registration on consecutive object scans to refine object pose estimation. Finally, object scans are used to estimate the shape of the object and constrain map points to lie on the estimated surface within the BA. We show on classical benchmarks that this fusion approach based on multimodal information improves the accuracy of object tracking.
summary: Most classical SLAM systems rely on the static scene assumption, which limits their applicability in real world scenarios. Recent SLAM frameworks have been proposed to simultaneously track the camera and moving objects. However they are often unable to estimate the canonical pose of the objects and exhibit a low object tracking accuracy. To solve this problem we propose TwistSLAM++, a semantic, dynamic, SLAM system that fuses stereo images and LiDAR information. Using semantic information, we track potentially moving objects and associate them to 3D object detections in LiDAR scans to obtain their pose and size. Then, we perform registration on consecutive object scans to refine object pose estimation. Finally, object scans are used to estimate the shape of the object and constrain map points to lie on the estimated surface within the BA. We show on classical benchmarks that this fusion approach based on multimodal information improves the accuracy of object tracking.
abstract_zh: 大多数经典 SLAM 系统依赖于静态场景假设，这限制了它们在现实场景中的适用性。最近提出了 SLAM 框架来同时跟踪相机和移动物体。然而，它们通常无法估计物体的规范姿态，并且物体跟踪精度较低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TwistSLAM++，这是一种融合立体图像和 LiDAR 信息的语义动态 SLAM 系统。使用语义信息，我们跟踪潜在移动的物体，并将它们与 LiDAR 扫描中的 3D 物体检测相关联，以获得它们的姿态和大小。然后，我们对连续的对象扫描进行配准以改进对象姿态估计。最后，对象扫描用于估计对象的形状并将地图点限制在 BA 内的估计表面上。我们在经典基准测试中表明，这种基于多模态信息的融合方法提高了对象跟踪的准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出TwistSLAM++系统，融合多模态数据实现动态语义SLAM，提升移动物体跟踪精度。
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM依赖静态场景假设，现有动态SLAM框架无法准确估计物体规范姿态且跟踪精度不足。
AI.method: 融合立体视觉与LiDAR数据，利用语义信息关联3D物体检测，通过连续扫描优化姿态估计并约束地图点。
AI.result: 在经典基准测试中验证了多模态融合方法有效提升物体跟踪准确性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据融合显著改善动态场景下的SLAM性能，解决物体姿态估计与跟踪精度问题。

title: Model Predictive Robustness of Signal Temporal Logic Predicates
title_zh: 信号时态逻辑谓词的模型预测鲁棒性
comment: @2023 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. comments: @2023 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works
abstract: The robustness of signal temporal logic not only assesses whether a signal adheres to a specification but also provides a measure of how much a formula is fulfilled or violated. The calculation of robustness is based on evaluating the robustness of underlying predicates. However, the robustness of predicates is usually defined in a model-free way, i.e., without including the system dynamics. Moreover, it is often nontrivial to define the robustness of complicated predicates precisely. To address these issues, we propose a notion of model predictive robustness, which provides a more systematic way of evaluating robustness compared to previous approaches by considering model-based predictions. In particular, we use Gaussian process regression to learn the robustness based on precomputed predictions so that robustness values can be efficiently computed online. We evaluate our approach for the use case of autonomous driving with predicates used in formalized traffic rules on a recorded dataset, which highlights the advantage of our approach compared to traditional approaches in terms of precision. By incorporating our robustness definitions into a trajectory planner, autonomous vehicles obey traffic rules more robustly than human drivers in the dataset.
summary: The robustness of signal temporal logic not only assesses whether a signal adheres to a specification but also provides a measure of how much a formula is fulfilled or violated. The calculation of robustness is based on evaluating the robustness of underlying predicates. However, the robustness of predicates is usually defined in a model-free way, i.e., without including the system dynamics. Moreover, it is often nontrivial to define the robustness of complicated predicates precisely. To address these issues, we propose a notion of model predictive robustness, which provides a more systematic way of evaluating robustness compared to previous approaches by considering model-based predictions. In particular, we use Gaussian process regression to learn the robustness based on precomputed predictions so that robustness values can be efficiently computed online. We evaluate our approach for the use case of autonomous driving with predicates used in formalized traffic rules on a recorded dataset, which highlights the advantage of our approach compared to traditional approaches in terms of precision. By incorporating our robustness definitions into a trajectory planner, autonomous vehicles obey traffic rules more robustly than human drivers in the dataset.
abstract_zh: 信号时序逻辑的鲁棒性不仅可以评估信号是否符合规范，还可以衡量公式满足或违反的程度。鲁棒性的计算基于评估底层谓词的鲁棒性。然而，谓词的鲁棒性通常以无模型的方式定义，即不包括系统动力学。此外，精确定义复杂谓词的鲁棒性通常并不简单。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了模型预测稳健性的概念，与以前的方法相比，通过考虑基于模型的预测，它提供了一种更系统的评估稳健性的方法。特别是，我们使用高斯过程回归来学习基于预先计算的预测的鲁棒性，以便可以有效地在线计算鲁棒性值。我们使用记录数据集上的正式交通规则中使用的谓词来评估我们的自动驾驶用例方法，这凸显了我们的方法与传统方法相比在精度方面的优势。通过将我们的鲁棒性定义纳入轨迹规划器中，自动驾驶车辆比数据集中的人类驾驶员更能遵守交通规则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型预测的信号时序逻辑谓词鲁棒性评估方法，通过结合系统动态和高斯过程回归提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统信号时序逻辑谓词鲁棒性定义缺乏系统性，难以精确处理复杂谓词且未考虑系统动态，导致评估精度不足。
AI.method: 采用高斯过程回归学习预计算预测结果，基于模型预测构建鲁棒性评估框架，实现在线高效计算。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶场景中，使用形式化交通规则谓词进行验证，相比传统方法在精度上显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为鲁棒性评估提供了系统化解决方案，使自动驾驶车辆在遵循交通规则时比人类驾驶员更具鲁棒性。

However, the robustness of predicates is usually defined in a model-free way, i.e., without including the system dynamics. To address these issues, we propose a notion of model predictive robustness, which provides a more systematic way of evaluating robustness compared to previous approaches by considering model-based predictions. In particular, we use Gaussian process regression to learn the robustness based on precomputed predictions so that robustness values can be efficiently computed online. We evaluate our approach for the use case of autonomous driving with predicates used in formalized traffic rules on a recorded dataset, which highlights the advantage of our approach compared to traditional approaches in terms of precision. By incorporating our robustness definitions into a trajectory planner, autonomous vehicles obey traffic rules more robustly than human drivers in the dataset. 信号时序逻辑的鲁棒性不仅可以评估信号是否符合规范，还可以衡量公式满足或违反的程度。鲁棒性的计算基于评估底层谓词的鲁棒性。然而，谓词的鲁棒性通常以无模型的方式定义，即不包括系统动力学。此外，精确定义复杂谓词的鲁棒性通常并不简单。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了模型预测稳健性的概念，与以前的方法相比，通过考虑基于模型的预测，它提供了一种更系统的评估稳健性的方法。特别是，我们使用高斯过程回归来学习基于预先计算的预测的鲁棒性，以便可以有效地在线计算鲁棒性值。我们使用记录数据集上的正式交通规则中使用的谓词来评估我们的自动驾驶用例方法，这凸显了我们的方法与传统方法相比在精度方面的优势。通过将我们的鲁棒性定义纳入轨迹规划器中，自动驾驶车辆比数据集中的人类驾驶员更能遵守交通规则。 本文提出了一种基于模型预测的信号时序逻辑谓词鲁棒性评估方法，通过结合系统动态和高斯过程回归提升计算效率。 Yuanfei Lin,Haoxuan Li,Matthias Althoff cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

title: Less is Better: Recovering Intended-Feature Subspace to Robustify NLU Models
title_zh: 越少越好：恢复预期特征子空间以增强 NLU 模型
abstract: Datasets with significant proportions of bias present threats for training a trustworthy model on NLU tasks. Despite yielding great progress, current debiasing methods impose excessive reliance on the knowledge of bias attributes. Definition of the attributes, however, is elusive and varies across different datasets. Furthermore, leveraging these attributes at input level to bias mitigation may leave a gap between intrinsic properties and the underlying decision rule. To narrow down this gap and liberate the supervision on bias, we suggest extending bias mitigation into feature space. Therefore, a novel model, Recovering Intended-Feature Subspace with Knowledge-Free (RISK) is developed. Assuming that shortcut features caused by various biases are unintended for prediction, RISK views them as redundant features. When delving into a lower manifold to remove redundancies, RISK reveals that an extremely low-dimensional subspace with intended features can robustly represent the highly biased dataset. Empirical results demonstrate our model can consistently improve model generalization to out-of-distribution set, and achieves a new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Datasets with significant proportions of bias present threats for training a trustworthy model on NLU tasks. Despite yielding great progress, current debiasing methods impose excessive reliance on the knowledge of bias attributes. Definition of the attributes, however, is elusive and varies across different datasets. Furthermore, leveraging these attributes at input level to bias mitigation may leave a gap between intrinsic properties and the underlying decision rule. To narrow down this gap and liberate the supervision on bias, we suggest extending bias mitigation into feature space. Therefore, a novel model, Recovering Intended-Feature Subspace with Knowledge-Free (RISK) is developed. Assuming that shortcut features caused by various biases are unintended for prediction, RISK views them as redundant features. When delving into a lower manifold to remove redundancies, RISK reveals that an extremely low-dimensional subspace with intended features can robustly represent the highly biased dataset. Empirical results demonstrate our model can consistently improve model generalization to out-of-distribution set, and achieves a new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 具有显着比例偏差的数据集对训练 NLU 任务的可信模型构成威胁。尽管取得了巨大进展，但当前的去偏差方法过度依赖偏差属性的知识。然而，属性的定义是难以捉摸的，并且在不同的数据集中各不相同。此外，在输入级别利用这些属性来减轻偏差可能会在内在属性和底层决策规则之间留下差距。为了缩小这一差距并解放对偏差的监督，我们建议将偏差缓解扩展到特征空间。因此，开发了一种新颖的模型，即无知识恢复预期特征子空间（RISK）。假设由各种偏差引起的快捷特征不适合预测，RISK 将它们视为冗余特征。当深入研究较低的流形以消除冗余时，RISK 揭示了具有预期特征的极低维子空间可以稳健地表示高度偏差的数据集。实证结果表明，我们的模型可以持续改进模型对分布外集的泛化，并实现新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RISK的新方法，通过恢复意图特征子空间来增强自然语言理解（NLU）模型的鲁棒性，以应对数据集中的偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法过度依赖对偏见属性的先验知识，而这些属性的定义模糊且因数据集而异，导致模型在输入层处理偏见时可能无法准确捕捉内在特性与决策规则之间的关联。
AI.method: RISK方法通过特征空间扩展偏见缓解，将由偏见引起的快捷特征视为冗余特征，并通过降维揭示一个极低维的意图特征子空间，从而去除冗余并保留关键信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，RISK在分布外数据集上显著提升模型泛化能力，并在相关任务中达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦意图特征子空间，RISK无需显式偏见属性即可有效缓解偏见影响，为构建鲁棒的NLU模型提供了新思路。

title: Adaptive Natural Language Generation for Task-oriented Dialogue via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习实现面向任务的对话的自适应自然语言生成
abstract: When a natural language generation (NLG) component is implemented in a real-world task-oriented dialogue system, it is necessary to generate not only natural utterances as learned on training data but also utterances adapted to the dialogue environment (e.g., noise from environmental sounds) and the user (e.g., users with low levels of understanding ability). Inspired by recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) for language generation tasks, we propose ANTOR, a method for Adaptive Natural language generation for Task-Oriented dialogue via Reinforcement learning. In ANTOR, a natural language understanding (NLU) module, which corresponds to the user's understanding of system utterances, is incorporated into the objective function of RL. If the NLG's intentions are correctly conveyed to the NLU, which understands a system's utterances, the NLG is given a positive reward. We conducted experiments on the MultiWOZ dataset, and we confirmed that ANTOR could generate adaptive utterances against speech recognition errors and the different vocabulary levels of users.
summary: When a natural language generation (NLG) component is implemented in a real-world task-oriented dialogue system, it is necessary to generate not only natural utterances as learned on training data but also utterances adapted to the dialogue environment (e.g., noise from environmental sounds) and the user (e.g., users with low levels of understanding ability). Inspired by recent advances in reinforcement learning (RL) for language generation tasks, we propose ANTOR, a method for Adaptive Natural language generation for Task-Oriented dialogue via Reinforcement learning. In ANTOR, a natural language understanding (NLU) module, which corresponds to the user's understanding of system utterances, is incorporated into the objective function of RL. If the NLG's intentions are correctly conveyed to the NLU, which understands a system's utterances, the NLG is given a positive reward. We conducted experiments on the MultiWOZ dataset, and we confirmed that ANTOR could generate adaptive utterances against speech recognition errors and the different vocabulary levels of users.
abstract_zh: 当在现实世界的面向任务的对话系统中实现自然语言生成（NLG）组件时，不仅需要生成在训练数据上学习到的自然话语，还需要生成适应对话环境（例如，环境声音中的噪声）和用户（例如，理解能力水平较低的用户）的话语。受语言生成任务强化学习（RL）最新进展的启发，我们提出了 ANTOR，一种通过强化学习生成面向任务对话的自适应自然语言的方法。在 ANTOR 中，对应于用户对系统话语的理解的自然语言理解（NLU）模块被纳入 RL 的目标函数中。如果 NLG 的意图被正确传达给 NLU（NLU 能够理解系统的话语），NLG 就会得到积极的奖励。我们在 MultiWOZ 数据集上进行了实验，证实 ANTOR 可以针对语音识别错误和用户不同词汇水平生成自适应话语。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ANTOR方法，通过强化学习实现任务导向对话中自适应自然语言生成，以应对环境噪声和用户理解差异。
AI.motivation: 传统NLG在真实对话场景中难以适应环境噪声及用户理解能力差异，需生成更灵活的适应性语句。
AI.method: 将NLU模块纳入强化学习目标函数，根据NLU对系统语句的理解准确性给予奖励，优化生成策略。
AI.result: 在MultiWOZ数据集实验中，ANTOR有效提升了对抗语音识别错误及用户词汇水平差异的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: ANTOR通过结合NLU与强化学习，为任务导向对话系统提供了更鲁棒的自然语言生成解决方案。

title: A regularization-patching dual quaternion optimization method for solving the hand-eye calibration problem
title_zh: 求解手眼标定问题的正则化修补双四元数优化方法
abstract: The hand-eye calibration problem is an important application problem in robot research. Based on the 2-norm of dual quaternion vectors, we propose a new dual quaternion optimization method for the hand-eye calibration problem. The dual quaternion optimization problem is decomposed to two quaternion optimization subproblems. The first quaternion optimization subproblem governs the rotation of the robot hand. It can be solved efficiently by the eigenvalue decomposition or singular value decomposition. If the optimal value of the first quaternion optimization subproblem is zero, then the system is rotationwise noiseless, i.e., there exists a ``perfect'' robot hand motion which meets all the testing poses rotationwise exactly. In this case, we apply the regularization technique for solving the second subproblem to minimize the distance of the translation. Otherwise we apply the patching technique to solve the second quaternion optimization subproblem. Then solving the second quaternion optimization subproblem turns out to be solving a quadratically constrained quadratic program. In this way, we give a complete description for the solution set of hand-eye calibration problems. This is new in the hand-eye calibration literature. The numerical results are also presented to show the efficiency of the proposed method.
summary: The hand-eye calibration problem is an important application problem in robot research. Based on the 2-norm of dual quaternion vectors, we propose a new dual quaternion optimization method for the hand-eye calibration problem. The dual quaternion optimization problem is decomposed to two quaternion optimization subproblems. The first quaternion optimization subproblem governs the rotation of the robot hand. It can be solved efficiently by the eigenvalue decomposition or singular value decomposition. If the optimal value of the first quaternion optimization subproblem is zero, then the system is rotationwise noiseless, i.e., there exists a ``perfect'' robot hand motion which meets all the testing poses rotationwise exactly. In this case, we apply the regularization technique for solving the second subproblem to minimize the distance of the translation. Otherwise we apply the patching technique to solve the second quaternion optimization subproblem. Then solving the second quaternion optimization subproblem turns out to be solving a quadratically constrained quadratic program. In this way, we give a complete description for the solution set of hand-eye calibration problems. This is new in the hand-eye calibration literature. The numerical results are also presented to show the efficiency of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 手眼标定问题是机器人研究中的一个重要应用问题。基于对偶四元数向量的2-范数，我们针对手眼校准问题提出了一种新的对偶四元数优化方法。对偶四元数优化问题分解为两个四元数优化子问题。第一个四元数优化子问题控制机器人手的旋转。它可以通过特征值分解或奇异值分解有效地求解。如果第一个四元数优化子问题的最优值为零，则系统是旋转无噪声的，即存在完全满足所有旋转测试姿势的“完美”机器人手运动。在这种情况下，我们应用正则化技术来解决第二个子问题，以最小化平移距离。否则，我们应用修补技术来解决第二个四元数优化子问题。那么求解第二个四元数优化子问题就是求解二次约束二次规划。这样，我们就给出了手眼标定问题的解集的完整描述。这是手眼校准文献中的新内容。数值结果也显示了所提出方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双重四元数优化的手眼标定问题求解方法。
AI.motivation: 手眼标定是机器人研究中的关键问题，传统方法在处理旋转和平移耦合时存在局限性，需更高效准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于双重四元数向量2范数构建优化模型，将问题分解为两个四元数子问题：通过特征值分解或奇异值分解求解旋转子问题，根据解是否为零选择正则化或修补技术处理平移子问题，最终转化为二次约束二次规划问题。
AI.result: 数值实验验证了该方法在求解效率和精度上的优势，并首次给出了手眼标定问题解集的完整描述。
AI.conclusion: 提出的正则化-修补双重四元数优化方法为手眼标定提供了新的数学框架和求解范式，属于该领域的创新性贡献。

search_text: A regularization-patching dual quaternion optimization method for solving the hand-eye calibration problem 求解手眼标定问题的正则化修补双四元数优化方法 The hand-eye calibration problem is an important application problem in robot research. Based on the 2-norm of dual quaternion vectors, we propose a new dual quaternion optimization method for the hand-eye calibration problem. The dual quaternion optimization problem is decomposed to two quaternion optimization subproblems. The first quaternion optimization subproblem governs the rotation of the robot hand. It can be solved efficiently by the eigenvalue decomposition or singular value decomposition. If the optimal value of the first quaternion optimization subproblem is zero, then the system is rotationwise noiseless, i.e., there exists a ``perfect'' robot hand motion which meets all the testing poses rotationwise exactly. In this case, we apply the regularization technique for solving the second subproblem to minimize the distance of the translation. Otherwise we apply the patching technique to solve the second quaternion optimization subproblem. Then solving the second quaternion optimization subproblem turns out to be solving a quadratically constrained quadratic program. In this way, we give a complete description for the solution set of hand-eye calibration problems. This is new in the hand-eye calibration literature. The numerical results are also presented to show the efficiency of the proposed method. 手眼标定问题是机器人研究中的一个重要应用问题。基于对偶四元数向量的2-范数，我们针对手眼校准问题提出了一种新的对偶四元数优化方法。对偶四元数优化问题分解为两个四元数优化子问题。第一个四元数优化子问题控制机器人手的旋转。它可以通过特征值分解或奇异值分解有效地求解。如果第一个四元数优化子问题的最优值为零，则系统是旋转无噪声的，即存在完全满足所有旋转测试姿势的“完美”机器人手运动。在这种情况下，我们应用正则化技术来解决第二个子问题，以最小化平移距离。否则，我们应用修补技术来解决第二个四元数优化子问题。那么求解第二个四元数优化子问题就是求解二次约束二次规划。这样，我们就给出了手眼标定问题的解集的完整描述。这是手眼校准文献中的新内容。数值结果也显示了所提出方法的效率。 本文提出一种基于双重四元数优化的手眼标定问题求解方法。 Zhongming Chen,Chen Ling,Liqun Qi,Hong Yan cs.RO,math.OC

title: Expanding continual few-shot learning benchmarks to include recognition of specific instances
title_zh: 扩展持续的小样本学习基准，以包括对特定实例的识别
abstract: Continual learning and few-shot learning are important frontiers in progress toward broader Machine Learning (ML) capabilities. Recently, there has been intense interest in combining both. One of the first examples to do so was the Continual few-shot Learning (CFSL) framework of Antoniou et al. arXiv:2004.11967. In this study, we extend CFSL in two ways that capture a broader range of challenges, important for intelligent agent behaviour in real-world conditions. First, we increased the number of classes by an order of magnitude, making the results more comparable to standard continual learning experiments. Second, we introduced an 'instance test' which requires recognition of specific instances of classes -- a capability of animal cognition that is usually neglected in ML. For an initial exploration of ML model performance under these conditions, we selected representative baseline models from the original CFSL work and added a model variant with replay. As expected, learning more classes is more difficult than the original CFSL experiments, and interestingly, the way in which image instances and classes are presented affects classification performance. Surprisingly, accuracy in the baseline instance test is comparable to other classification tasks, but poor given significant occlusion and noise. The use of replay for consolidation substantially improves performance for both types of tasks, but particularly for the instance test.
summary: Continual learning and few-shot learning are important frontiers in progress toward broader Machine Learning (ML) capabilities. Recently, there has been intense interest in combining both. One of the first examples to do so was the Continual few-shot Learning (CFSL) framework of Antoniou et al. arXiv:2004.11967. In this study, we extend CFSL in two ways that capture a broader range of challenges, important for intelligent agent behaviour in real-world conditions. First, we increased the number of classes by an order of magnitude, making the results more comparable to standard continual learning experiments. Second, we introduced an 'instance test' which requires recognition of specific instances of classes -- a capability of animal cognition that is usually neglected in ML. For an initial exploration of ML model performance under these conditions, we selected representative baseline models from the original CFSL work and added a model variant with replay. As expected, learning more classes is more difficult than the original CFSL experiments, and interestingly, the way in which image instances and classes are presented affects classification performance. Surprisingly, accuracy in the baseline instance test is comparable to other classification tasks, but poor given significant occlusion and noise. The use of replay for consolidation substantially improves performance for both types of tasks, but particularly for the instance test.
abstract_zh: 持续学习和小样本学习是实现更广泛的机器学习 (ML) 功能的重要前沿。最近，人们对将两者结合起来产生了浓厚的兴趣。这样做的第一个例子是 Antoniou 等人的持续小样本学习（CFSL）框架。 arXiv：2004.11967。在这项研究中，我们以两种方式扩展 CFSL，以应对更广泛的挑战，这对于现实世界条件下的智能代理行为非常重要。首先，我们将班级数量增加了一个数量级，使结果与标准持续学习实验更具可比性。其次，我们引入了“实例测试”，它需要识别类的特定实例——这是一种在机器学习中通常被忽视的动物认知能力。为了对这些条件下的 ML 模型性能进行初步探索，我们从原始 CFSL 工作中选择了具有代表性的基线模型，并添加了具有回放功能的模型变体。正如预期的那样，学习更多的类比原始 CFSL 实验更困难，有趣的是，图像实例和类的呈现方式会影响分类性能。令人惊讶的是，基线实例测试的准确性与其他分类任务相当，但考虑到明显的遮挡和噪声，准确性较差。使用重放进行整合可以显着提高两种类型任务的性能，尤其是实例测试的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了持续少样本学习基准，以包含对特定实例的识别。
AI.motivation: 持续学习和少样本学习是实现更广泛机器学习能力的重要方向。本文旨在扩展现有的持续少样本学习框架，以涵盖更广泛的实际挑战，特别是对特定实例的识别。
AI.method: 作者通过增加类别数量并引入'实例测试'来扩展CFSL框架。他们选择了原始CFSL工作的代表性基线模型，并添加了一个带有重放机制的模型变体进行实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，学习更多类别比原始CFSL实验更困难，图像实例和类别的呈现方式影响分类性能。基线实例测试的准确率与其他分类任务相当，但在存在显著遮挡和噪声的情况下表现较差。使用重放机制显著提高了两种任务的性能，尤其是实例测试。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了持续少样本学习基准，展示了重放机制在提升模型对特定实例识别能力方面的重要性。

authors_text: Jessica Van Brummelen,Maura Kelleher,Mingyan Claire Tian,Nghi Hoang Nguyen
title: What Do Children and Parents Want and Perceive in Conversational Agents? Towards Transparent, Trustworthy, Democratized Agents
title_zh: 孩子和家长对对话代理的期望和看法是什么？走向透明、值得信赖、民主化的代理人
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures, submitted to IDC 2023, for associated appendix: https://gist.github.com/jessvb/fa1d4c75910106d730d194ffd4d725d3
comments: 18 pages, 9 figures, submitted to IDC 2023, for associated appendix: https://gist.github.com/jessvb/fa1d4c75910106d730d194ffd4d725d3
abstract: Historically, researchers have focused on analyzing WEIRD, adult perspectives on technology. This means we may not have technology developed appropriately for children and those from non-WEIRD countries. In this paper, we analyze children and parents from various countries' perspectives on an emerging technology: conversational agents. We aim to better understand participants' trust of agents, partner models, and their ideas of "ideal future agents" such that researchers can better design for these users. Additionally, we empower children and parents to program their own agents through educational workshops, and present changes in perceptions as participants create and learn about agents. Results from the study (n=49) included how children felt agents were significantly more human-like, warm, and dependable than parents did, how participants trusted agents more than parents or friends for correct information, how children described their ideal agents as being more artificial than human-like than parents did, and how children tended to focus more on fun features, approachable/friendly features and addressing concerns through agent design than parents did, among other results. We also discuss potential agent design implications of the results, including how designers may be able to best foster appropriate levels of trust towards agents by focusing on designing agents' competence and predictability indicators, as well as increasing transparency in terms of agents' information sources.
summary: Historically, researchers have focused on analyzing WEIRD, adult perspectives on technology. This means we may not have technology developed appropriately for children and those from non-WEIRD countries. In this paper, we analyze children and parents from various countries' perspectives on an emerging technology: conversational agents. We aim to better understand participants' trust of agents, partner models, and their ideas of "ideal future agents" such that researchers can better design for these users. Additionally, we empower children and parents to program their own agents through educational workshops, and present changes in perceptions as participants create and learn about agents. Results from the study (n=49) included how children felt agents were significantly more human-like, warm, and dependable than parents did, how participants trusted agents more than parents or friends for correct information, how children described their ideal agents as being more artificial than human-like than parents did, and how children tended to focus more on fun features, approachable/friendly features and addressing concerns through agent design than parents did, among other results. We also discuss potential agent design implications of the results, including how designers may be able to best foster appropriate levels of trust towards agents by focusing on designing agents' competence and predictability indicators, as well as increasing transparency in terms of agents' information sources.
abstract_zh: 从历史上看，研究人员一直专注于分析成人对技术的怪异观点。这意味着我们可能没有为儿童和非怪异国家的儿童开发适当的技术。在本文中，我们从不同国家的儿童和家长的角度分析了一项新兴技术：对话代理。我们的目标是更好地了解参与者对代理的信任、合作伙伴模型以及他们对“理想的未来代理”的想法，以便研究人员更好地为这些用户进行设计。此外，我们还让儿童和家长通过教育研讨会对自己的代理进行编程，并在参与者创建和了解代理时呈现观念的变化。研究结果（n = 49）包括儿童如何感觉代理比父母更人性化、温暖和可靠，参与者如何比父母或朋友更信任代理提供正确的信息，孩子如何描述他们的理想代理比父母更人造而不像人类，以及孩子如何比父母更倾向于关注有趣的功能、平易近人/友好的功能以及通过代理设计解决问题等。我们还讨论了结果对代理设计的潜在影响，包括设计者如何通过关注设计代理的能力和可预测性指标，以及提高代理信息来源的透明度，最好地培养对代理的适当水平的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文研究儿童和父母对对话代理人的需求与认知，旨在设计更透明、可信且民主化的代理技术。
AI.motivation: 传统研究多关注WEIRD成人视角，忽视儿童及非WEIRD国家用户需求，需重新审视技术设计方向以满足多样化群体。
AI.method: 通过跨国家的儿童与家长调研及教育工作坊，分析参与者对代理人的信任度、理想设计特征，并观察其编程过程中的认知变化。
AI.result: 儿童认为代理人更人性化、温暖且可靠，更信任代理人提供准确信息；儿童理想代理人偏向人工化，注重趣味性和友好性，而家长更关注功能实用性。
AI.conclusion: 设计需通过提升代理人能力与可预测性指标、增强信息来源透明度来建立适当信任，同时需兼顾不同用户群体的差异化需求。

search_text: What Do Children and Parents Want and Perceive in Conversational Agents? Towards Transparent, Trustworthy, Democratized Agents 孩子和家长对对话代理的期望和看法是什么？走向透明、值得信赖、民主化的代理人 Historically, researchers have focused on analyzing WEIRD, adult perspectives on technology. This means we may not have technology developed appropriately for children and those from non-WEIRD countries. In this paper, we analyze children and parents from various countries' perspectives on an emerging technology: conversational agents. We aim to better understand participants' trust of agents, partner models, and their ideas of "ideal future agents" such that researchers can better design for these users. Additionally, we empower children and parents to program their own agents through educational workshops, and present changes in perceptions as participants create and learn about agents. Results from the study (n=49) included how children felt agents were significantly more human-like, warm, and dependable than parents did, how participants trusted agents more than parents or friends for correct information, how children described their ideal agents as being more artificial than human-like than parents did, and how children tended to focus more on fun features, approachable/friendly features and addressing concerns through agent design than parents did, among other results. We also discuss potential agent design implications of the results, including how designers may be able to best foster appropriate levels of trust towards agents by focusing on designing agents' competence and predictability indicators, as well as increasing transparency in terms of agents' information sources. 从历史上看，研究人员一直专注于分析成人对技术的怪异观点。这意味着我们可能没有为儿童和非怪异国家的儿童开发适当的技术。在本文中，我们从不同国家的儿童和家长的角度分析了一项新兴技术：对话代理。我们的目标是更好地了解参与者对代理的信任、合作伙伴模型以及他们对“理想的未来代理”的想法，以便研究人员更好地为这些用户进行设计。此外，我们还让儿童和家长通过教育研讨会对自己的代理进行编程，并在参与者创建和了解代理时呈现观念的变化。研究结果（n = 49）包括儿童如何感觉代理比父母更人性化、温暖和可靠，参与者如何比父母或朋友更信任代理提供正确的信息，孩子如何描述他们的理想代理比父母更人造而不像人类，以及孩子如何比父母更倾向于关注有趣的功能、平易近人/友好的功能以及通过代理设计解决问题等。我们还讨论了结果对代理设计的潜在影响，包括设计者如何通过关注设计代理的能力和可预测性指标，以及提高代理信息来源的透明度，最好地培养对代理的适当水平的信任。 本文研究儿童和父母对对话代理人的需求与认知，旨在设计更透明、可信且民主化的代理技术。 Jessica Van Brummelen,Maura Kelleher,Mingyan Claire Tian,Nghi Hoang Nguyen cs.HC

title: A $(1.5+ε)$-Approximation Algorithm for Weighted Connectivity Augmentation
title_zh: 用于加权连接增强的 $(1.5+ε)$-近似算法
abstract: Connectivity augmentation problems are among the most elementary questions in Network Design. Many of these problems admit natural $2$-approximation algorithms, often through various classic techniques, whereas it remains open whether approximation factors below $2$ can be achieved. One of the most basic examples thereof is the Weighted Connectivity Augmentation Problem (WCAP). In WCAP, one is given an undirected graph together with a set of additional weighted candidate edges, and the task is to find a cheapest set of candidate edges whose addition to the graph increases its edge-connectivity. We present a $(1.5+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm for WCAP, showing for the first time that factors below $2$ are achievable. On a high level, we design a well-chosen local search algorithm, inspired by recent advances for Weighted Tree Augmentation. To measure progress, we consider a directed weakening of WCAP and show that it has highly structured planar solutions. Interpreting a solution of the original problem as one of this directed weakening allows us to describe local exchange steps in a clean and algorithmically amenable way. Leveraging these insights, we show that we can efficiently search for good exchange steps within a component class for link sets that is closely related to bounded treewidth subgraphs of circle graphs. Moreover, we prove that an optimum solution can be decomposed into smaller components, at least one of which leads to a good local search step as long as we did not yet achieve the claimed approximation guarantee.
summary: Connectivity augmentation problems are among the most elementary questions in Network Design. Many of these problems admit natural $2$-approximation algorithms, often through various classic techniques, whereas it remains open whether approximation factors below $2$ can be achieved. One of the most basic examples thereof is the Weighted Connectivity Augmentation Problem (WCAP). In WCAP, one is given an undirected graph together with a set of additional weighted candidate edges, and the task is to find a cheapest set of candidate edges whose addition to the graph increases its edge-connectivity. We present a $(1.5+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithm for WCAP, showing for the first time that factors below $2$ are achievable. On a high level, we design a well-chosen local search algorithm, inspired by recent advances for Weighted Tree Augmentation. To measure progress, we consider a directed weakening of WCAP and show that it has highly structured planar solutions. Interpreting a solution of the original problem as one of this directed weakening allows us to describe local exchange steps in a clean and algorithmically amenable way. Leveraging these insights, we show that we can efficiently search for good exchange steps within a component class for link sets that is closely related to bounded treewidth subgraphs of circle graphs. Moreover, we prove that an optimum solution can be decomposed into smaller components, at least one of which leads to a good local search step as long as we did not yet achieve the claimed approximation guarantee.
abstract_zh: 连接增强问题是网络设计中最基本的问题之一。其中许多问题都承认自然的 2 美元近似算法，通常通过各种经典技术，但是否可以实现低于 2 美元的近似因子仍然悬而未决。其中最基本的示例之一是加权连接增强问题（WCAP）。在 WCAP 中，给定一个无向图以及一组附加加权候选边，任务是找到一组最便宜的候选边，将其添加到图中会增加其边连通性。我们提出了 WCAP 的 $(1.5+\varepsilon)$ 近似算法，首次表明低于 $2$ 的因子是可以实现的。在较高的层面上，我们设计了一种精心挑选的本地搜索算法，其灵感来自加权树增强的最新进展。为了衡量进展，我们考虑对 WCAP 进行定向削弱，并表明它具有高度结构化的平面解决方案。将原始问题的解决方案解释为这种定向弱化之一，使我们能够以干净且算法上可行的方式描述本地交换步骤。利用这些见解，我们表明我们可以在组件类中有效地搜索与圆形图的有界树宽子图密切相关的链接集的良好交换步骤。此外，我们证明了最佳解决方案可以分解为更小的组件，只要我们尚未实现所要求的近似保证，至少其中一个组件会导致良好的局部搜索步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对加权连通性增强问题（WCAP）的（1.5+ε）近似算法，首次实现了低于2的近似比。
AI.motivation: 尽管许多连通性增强问题已有2-近似算法，但能否实现低于2的近似比仍是一个开放问题。本文旨在解决这一挑战，特别是针对WCAP问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种受加权树增强问题最新进展启发的局部搜索算法，通过定向弱化WCAP问题并利用平面解的结构特性，结合局部交换步骤和与环状图子图相关联的组件类进行高效搜索。
AI.result: 首次为WCAP问题实现了（1.5+ε）近似比，证明了低于2的近似比可行性，并展示了最优解的分解方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，通过定向弱化和局部搜索策略，可有效解决WCAP问题，为未来研究提供了新思路和方法论支持。

authors_text: Zonghai Yao,Yi Cao,Zhichao Yang,Vijeta Deshpande,Hong Yu
title: Extracting Biomedical Factual Knowledge Using Pretrained Language Model and Electronic Health Record Context
title_zh: 使用预训练语言模型和电子健康记录上下文提取生物医学事实知识
comment: Presented at the AMIA 2022 Annual Symposium as an oral paper. Revised some content in Introduction and Related Work section
comments: Presented at the AMIA 2022 Annual Symposium as an oral paper. Revised some content in Introduction and Related Work section
abstract: Language Models (LMs) have performed well on biomedical natural language processing applications. In this study, we conducted some experiments to use prompt methods to extract knowledge from LMs as new knowledge Bases (LMs as KBs). However, prompting can only be used as a low bound for knowledge extraction, and perform particularly poorly on biomedical domain KBs. In order to make LMs as KBs more in line with the actual application scenarios of the biomedical domain, we specifically add EHR notes as context to the prompt to improve the low bound in the biomedical domain. We design and validate a series of experiments for our Dynamic-Context-BioLAMA task. Our experiments show that the knowledge possessed by those language models can distinguish the correct knowledge from the noise knowledge in the EHR notes, and such distinguishing ability can also be used as a new metric to evaluate the amount of knowledge possessed by the model.
summary: Language Models (LMs) have performed well on biomedical natural language processing applications. In this study, we conducted some experiments to use prompt methods to extract knowledge from LMs as new knowledge Bases (LMs as KBs). However, prompting can only be used as a low bound for knowledge extraction, and perform particularly poorly on biomedical domain KBs. In order to make LMs as KBs more in line with the actual application scenarios of the biomedical domain, we specifically add EHR notes as context to the prompt to improve the low bound in the biomedical domain. We design and validate a series of experiments for our Dynamic-Context-BioLAMA task. Our experiments show that the knowledge possessed by those language models can distinguish the correct knowledge from the noise knowledge in the EHR notes, and such distinguishing ability can also be used as a new metric to evaluate the amount of knowledge possessed by the model.
abstract_zh: 语言模型（LM）在生物医学自然语言处理应用中表现良好。在本研究中，我们进行了一些实验，使用提示方法从 LM 中提取知识作为新的知识库（LM 作为 KB）。然而，提示只能用作知识提取的下限，并且在生物医学领域知识库上表现尤其差。为了使作为知识库的LM更符合生物医学领域的实际应用场景，我们特意在提示中添加了EHR注释作为上下文，以提高生物医学领域的下界。我们为 Dynamic-Context-BioLAMA 任务设计并验证了一系列实验。我们的实验表明，这些语言模型所拥有的知识可以区分EHR笔记中的正确知识和噪音知识，这种区分能力也可以作为评估模型所拥有知识量的新指标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过结合预训练语言模型与电子健康记录（EHR）上下文，提升生物医学领域知识提取的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统提示方法在生物医学知识提取中表现有限，难以区分EHR中的有效知识与噪声，需改进模型适应实际应用场景。
AI.method: 在提示中引入EHR文本作为上下文，设计Dynamic-Context-BioLAMA任务，通过实验验证模型区分知识能力。
AI.result: 模型能有效识别EHR中的正确知识，且该能力可作为评估模型知识量的新指标。
AI.conclusion: 结合EHR上下文可提升生物医学知识提取效果，为模型评估提供新方法。

tldr: 本文研究如何通过结合预训练语言模型与电子健康记录（EHR）上下文，提升生物医学领域知识提取的准确性。
motivation: 传统提示方法在生物医学知识提取中表现有限，难以区分EHR中的有效知识与噪声，需改进模型适应实际应用场景。
method: 在提示中引入EHR文本作为上下文，设计Dynamic-Context-BioLAMA任务，通过实验验证模型区分知识能力。
result: 模型能有效识别EHR中的正确知识，且该能力可作为评估模型知识量的新指标。

search_text: Extracting Biomedical Factual Knowledge Using Pretrained Language Model and Electronic Health Record Context 使用预训练语言模型和电子健康记录上下文提取生物医学事实知识 Language Models (LMs) have performed well on biomedical natural language processing applications. In this study, we conducted some experiments to use prompt methods to extract knowledge from LMs as new knowledge Bases (LMs as KBs). However, prompting can only be used as a low bound for knowledge extraction, and perform particularly poorly on biomedical domain KBs. In order to make LMs as KBs more in line with the actual application scenarios of the biomedical domain, we specifically add EHR notes as context to the prompt to improve the low bound in the biomedical domain. We design and validate a series of experiments for our Dynamic-Context-BioLAMA task. Our experiments show that the knowledge possessed by those language models can distinguish the correct knowledge from the noise knowledge in the EHR notes, and such distinguishing ability can also be used as a new metric to evaluate the amount of knowledge possessed by the model. 语言模型（LM）在生物医学自然语言处理应用中表现良好。在本研究中，我们进行了一些实验，使用提示方法从 LM 中提取知识作为新的知识库（LM 作为 KB）。然而，提示只能用作知识提取的下限，并且在生物医学领域知识库上表现尤其差。为了使作为知识库的LM更符合生物医学领域的实际应用场景，我们特意在提示中添加了EHR注释作为上下文，以提高生物医学领域的下界。我们为 Dynamic-Context-BioLAMA 任务设计并验证了一系列实验。我们的实验表明，这些语言模型所拥有的知识可以区分EHR笔记中的正确知识和噪音知识，这种区分能力也可以作为评估模型所拥有知识量的新指标。 本文研究如何通过结合预训练语言模型与电子健康记录（EHR）上下文，提升生物医学领域知识提取的准确性。 Zonghai Yao,Yi Cao,Zhichao Yang,Vijeta Deshpande,Hong Yu cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG
