title: Red Teaming Language Models to Reduce Harms: Methods, Scaling Behaviors, and Lessons Learned
title_zh: 减少危害的红队语言模型：方法、扩展行为和经验教训
abstract: We describe our early efforts to red team language models in order to simultaneously discover, measure, and attempt to reduce their potentially harmful outputs. We make three main contributions. First, we investigate scaling behaviors for red teaming across 3 model sizes (2.7B, 13B, and 52B parameters) and 4 model types: a plain language model (LM); an LM prompted to be helpful, honest, and harmless; an LM with rejection sampling; and a model trained to be helpful and harmless using reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). We find that the RLHF models are increasingly difficult to red team as they scale, and we find a flat trend with scale for the other model types. Second, we release our dataset of 38,961 red team attacks for others to analyze and learn from. We provide our own analysis of the data and find a variety of harmful outputs, which range from offensive language to more subtly harmful non-violent unethical outputs. Third, we exhaustively describe our instructions, processes, statistical methodologies, and uncertainty about red teaming. We hope that this transparency accelerates our ability to work together as a community in order to develop shared norms, practices, and technical standards for how to red team language models.
summary: We describe our early efforts to red team language models in order to simultaneously discover, measure, and attempt to reduce their potentially harmful outputs. We make three main contributions. First, we investigate scaling behaviors for red teaming across 3 model sizes (2.7B, 13B, and 52B parameters) and 4 model types: a plain language model (LM); an LM prompted to be helpful, honest, and harmless; an LM with rejection sampling; and a model trained to be helpful and harmless using reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). We find that the RLHF models are increasingly difficult to red team as they scale, and we find a flat trend with scale for the other model types. Second, we release our dataset of 38,961 red team attacks for others to analyze and learn from. We provide our own analysis of the data and find a variety of harmful outputs, which range from offensive language to more subtly harmful non-violent unethical outputs. Third, we exhaustively describe our instructions, processes, statistical methodologies, and uncertainty about red teaming. We hope that this transparency accelerates our ability to work together as a community in order to develop shared norms, practices, and technical standards for how to red team language models.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了我们对红队语言模型的早期努力，以便同时发现、测量和尝试减少其潜在的有害输出。我们做出了三项主要贡献。首先，我们研究了红队在 3 种模型大小（2.7B、13B 和 52B 参数）和 4 种模型类型中的扩展行为：简单语言模型 (LM)； LM 被提示要乐于助人、诚实且无害；带有拒绝采样的 LM；以及一个使用人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）训练成有益无害的模型。我们发现 RLHF 模型随着规模的扩大越来越难以红队，并且我们发现其他模型类型的规模呈平坦趋势。其次，我们发布了包含 38,961 次红队攻击的数据集，供其他人分析和学习。我们提供自己的数据分析，并发现各种有害的输出，从攻击性语言到更微妙的有害非暴力不道德输出。第三，我们详尽地描述了我们的指示、流程、统计方法以及红队的不确定性。我们希望这种透明度能够加快我们作为一个社区的合作能力，以便为如何红队语言模型制定共享规范、实践和技术标准。

AI.tldr: 本文通过红队测试方法发现、衡量并减少语言模型的潜在有害输出，研究不同模型规模和类型对红队测试的影响，并发布相关数据集与分析。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型规模扩大，其潜在有害输出风险增加，需系统性红队测试以识别风险并推动社区建立红队测试标准与规范。
AI.method: 跨3种模型规模（2.7B/13B/52B）和4类模型（普通LM、提示型、拒绝采样、RLHF）进行红队测试，发布38,961个攻击样本数据集，并分析有害输出类型及红队方法论。
AI.result: RLHF模型随规模增大更难被红队测试，其他模型类型无显著变化；数据集显示有害输出涵盖攻击性语言及隐蔽的不道德内容。
AI.conclusion: 透明化红队流程与数据有助于社区协作制定红队测试技术标准，推动语言模型安全性的集体改进。

authors_text: Hao Cheng,Mengmeng Liu,Lin Chen,Hellward Broszio,Monika Sester,Michael Ying Yang
title: GATraj: A Graph- and Attention-based Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction Model
title_zh: GATraj：基于图和注意力的多智能体轨迹预测模型
abstract: Trajectory prediction has been a long-standing problem in intelligent systems like autonomous driving and robot navigation. Models trained on large-scale benchmarks have made significant progress in improving prediction accuracy. However, the importance on efficiency for real-time applications has been less emphasized. This paper proposes an attention-based graph model, named GATraj, which achieves a good balance of prediction accuracy and inference speed. We use attention mechanisms to model the spatial-temporal dynamics of agents, such as pedestrians or vehicles, and a graph convolutional network to model their interactions. Additionally, a Laplacian mixture decoder is implemented to mitigate mode collapse and generate diverse multimodal predictions for each agent. GATraj achieves state-of-the-art prediction performance at a much higher speed when tested on the ETH/UCY datasets for pedestrian trajectories, and good performance at about 100 Hz inference speed when tested on the nuScenes dataset for autonomous driving. We conduct extensive experiments to analyze the probability estimation of the Laplacian mixture decoder and compare it with a Gaussian mixture decoder for predicting different multimodalities. Furthermore, comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each proposed module in GATraj. The code is released at https://github.com/mengmengliu1998/GATraj.
summary: Trajectory prediction has been a long-standing problem in intelligent systems like autonomous driving and robot navigation. Models trained on large-scale benchmarks have made significant progress in improving prediction accuracy. However, the importance on efficiency for real-time applications has been less emphasized. This paper proposes an attention-based graph model, named GATraj, which achieves a good balance of prediction accuracy and inference speed. We use attention mechanisms to model the spatial-temporal dynamics of agents, such as pedestrians or vehicles, and a graph convolutional network to model their interactions. Additionally, a Laplacian mixture decoder is implemented to mitigate mode collapse and generate diverse multimodal predictions for each agent. GATraj achieves state-of-the-art prediction performance at a much higher speed when tested on the ETH/UCY datasets for pedestrian trajectories, and good performance at about 100 Hz inference speed when tested on the nuScenes dataset for autonomous driving. We conduct extensive experiments to analyze the probability estimation of the Laplacian mixture decoder and compare it with a Gaussian mixture decoder for predicting different multimodalities. Furthermore, comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each proposed module in GATraj. The code is released at https://github.com/mengmengliu1998/GATraj.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测一直是自动驾驶和机器人导航等智能系统中长期存在的问题。在大规模基准上训练的模型在提高预测准确性方面取得了重大进展。然而，实时应用程序效率的重要性却很少被强调。本文提出了一种基于注意力的图模型，名为 GATraj，它实现了预测精度和推理速度的良好平衡。我们使用注意力机制来建模代理（例如行人或车辆）的时空动态，并使用图卷积网络来建模它们的交互。此外，还实现了拉普拉斯混合解码器来减轻模式崩溃并为每个代理生成不同的多模态预测。在行人轨迹的 ETH/UCY 数据集上测试时，GATraj 以更高的速度实现了最先进的预测性能，在自动驾驶的 nuScenes 数据集上测试时，以约 100 Hz 的推理速度实现了良好的性能。我们进行了大量的实验来分析拉普拉斯混合解码器的概率估计，并将其与高斯混合解码器进行比较以预测不同的多模态。此外，全面的消融研究证明了 GATraj 中每个提议模块的有效性。代码发布于https://github.com/mengmengliu1998/GATraj。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图和注意力机制的多智能体轨迹预测模型GATraj，旨在平衡预测精度与实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测模型在大型基准测试中精度提升显著，但忽略了实时应用中对效率的要求，亟需兼顾准确性与推理速度的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用注意力机制建模智能体时空动态，结合图卷积网络捕捉交互关系，并引入拉普拉斯混合解码器生成多模态预测以缓解模式崩溃问题。
AI.result: 在ETH/UCY数据集上达到最先进的预测性能，在nuScenes数据集上以约100Hz的推理速度实现良好效果，且模块有效性通过消融实验验证。
AI.conclusion: GATraj通过注意力机制、图网络与拉普拉斯混合解码器的协同设计，有效平衡了轨迹预测的精度与效率需求。

We use attention mechanisms to model the spatial-temporal dynamics of agents, such as pedestrians or vehicles, and a graph convolutional network to model their interactions. GATraj achieves state-of-the-art prediction performance at a much higher speed when tested on the ETH/UCY datasets for pedestrian trajectories, and good performance at about 100 Hz inference speed when tested on the nuScenes dataset for autonomous driving. We conduct extensive experiments to analyze the probability estimation of the Laplacian mixture decoder and compare it with a Gaussian mixture decoder for predicting different multimodalities. Furthermore, comprehensive ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each proposed module in GATraj. The code is released at https://github.com/mengmengliu1998/GATraj. 轨迹预测一直是自动驾驶和机器人导航等智能系统中长期存在的问题。在大规模基准上训练的模型在提高预测准确性方面取得了重大进展。然而，实时应用程序效率的重要性却很少被强调。本文提出了一种基于注意力的图模型，名为 GATraj，它实现了预测精度和推理速度的良好平衡。我们使用注意力机制来建模代理（例如行人或车辆）的时空动态，并使用图卷积网络来建模它们的交互。此外，还实现了拉普拉斯混合解码器来减轻模式崩溃并为每个代理生成不同的多模态预测。在行人轨迹的 ETH/UCY 数据集上测试时，GATraj 以更高的速度实现了最先进的预测性能，在自动驾驶的 nuScenes 数据集上测试时，以约 100 Hz 的推理速度实现了良好的性能。我们进行了大量的实验来分析拉普拉斯混合解码器的概率估计，并将其与高斯混合解码器进行比较以预测不同的多模态。此外，全面的消融研究证明了 GATraj 中每个提议模块的有效性。代码发布于https://github.com/mengmengliu1998/GATraj。 本文提出了一种基于图和注意力机制的多智能体轨迹预测模型GATraj，旨在平衡预测精度与实时性。 Hao Cheng,Mengmeng Liu,Lin Chen,Hellward Broszio,Monika Sester,Michael Ying Yang cs.RO,cs.CV

title: Whole-Body Lesion Segmentation in 18F-FDG PET/CT
title_zh: 18F-FDG PET/CT 中的全身病变分割
abstract: There has been growing research interest in using deep learning based method to achieve fully automated segmentation of lesion in Positron emission tomography computed tomography(PET CT) scans for the prognosis of various cancers. Recent advances in the medical image segmentation shows the nnUNET is feasible for diverse tasks. However, lesion segmentation in the PET images is not straightforward, because lesion and physiological uptake has similar distribution patterns. The Distinction of them requires extra structural information in the CT images. The present paper introduces a nnUNet based method for the lesion segmentation task. The proposed model is designed on the basis of the joint 2D and 3D nnUNET architecture to predict lesions across the whole body. It allows for automated segmentation of potential lesions. We evaluate the proposed method in the context of AutoPet Challenge, which measures the lesion segmentation performance in the metrics of dice score, false-positive volume and false-negative volume.
summary: There has been growing research interest in using deep learning based method to achieve fully automated segmentation of lesion in Positron emission tomography computed tomography(PET CT) scans for the prognosis of various cancers. Recent advances in the medical image segmentation shows the nnUNET is feasible for diverse tasks. However, lesion segmentation in the PET images is not straightforward, because lesion and physiological uptake has similar distribution patterns. The Distinction of them requires extra structural information in the CT images. The present paper introduces a nnUNet based method for the lesion segmentation task. The proposed model is designed on the basis of the joint 2D and 3D nnUNET architecture to predict lesions across the whole body. It allows for automated segmentation of potential lesions. We evaluate the proposed method in the context of AutoPet Challenge, which measures the lesion segmentation performance in the metrics of dice score, false-positive volume and false-negative volume.
abstract_zh: 人们对使用基于深度学习的方法在正电子发射断层扫描计算机断层扫描（PET CT）扫描中实现病变的全自动分割以预测各种癌症的兴趣越来越感兴趣。医学图像分割的最新进展表明 nnUNET 对于不同的任务是可行的。然而，PET 图像中的病灶分割并不简单，因为病灶和生理摄取具有相似的分布模式。区分它们需要 CT 图像中额外的结构信息。本文介绍了一种基于 n​​nUNet 的病灶分割任务方法。该模型是基于联合 2D 和 3D nnUNET 架构设计的，用于预测全身病变。它允许自动分割潜在病变。我们在 AutoPet Challenge 的背景下评估所提出的方法，该方法通过骰子得分、假阳性量和假阴性量等指标来衡量病变分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于nnUNET的全身病变分割方法，用于18F-FDG PET/CT扫描中的自动化病灶检测。
AI.motivation: PET图像中病变与生理性摄取分布相似，需结合CT结构信息进行区分，现有方法难以实现准确分割。
AI.method: 设计融合2D和3D nnUNET架构的联合模型，利用PET和CT多模态信息进行全身病灶分割。
AI.result: 在AutoPet挑战赛中验证了方法有效性，通过Dice分数、假阳性/假阴性体积等指标评估分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合PET-CT多模态数据的nnUNET方法可有效提升全身病变分割的自动化水平。

authors_text: André F Cruz,Catarina Belém,Sérgio Jesus,João Bravo,Pedro Saleiro,Pedro Bizarro
title: FairGBM: Gradient Boosting with Fairness Constraints
title_zh: FairGBM：具有公平性约束的梯度提升
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2023
abstract: Tabular data is prevalent in many high-stakes domains, such as financial services or public policy. Gradient Boosted Decision Trees (GBDT) are popular in these settings due to their scalability, performance, and low training cost. While fairness in these domains is a foremost concern, existing in-processing Fair ML methods are either incompatible with GBDT, or incur in significant performance losses while taking considerably longer to train. We present FairGBM, a dual ascent learning framework for training GBDT under fairness constraints, with little to no impact on predictive performance when compared to unconstrained GBDT. Since observational fairness metrics are non-differentiable, we propose smooth convex error rate proxies for common fairness criteria, enabling gradient-based optimization using a ``proxy-Lagrangian'' formulation. Our implementation shows an order of magnitude speedup in training time relative to related work, a pivotal aspect to foster the widespread adoption of FairGBM by real-world practitioners.
summary: Tabular data is prevalent in many high-stakes domains, such as financial services or public policy. Gradient Boosted Decision Trees (GBDT) are popular in these settings due to their scalability, performance, and low training cost. While fairness in these domains is a foremost concern, existing in-processing Fair ML methods are either incompatible with GBDT, or incur in significant performance losses while taking considerably longer to train. We present FairGBM, a dual ascent learning framework for training GBDT under fairness constraints, with little to no impact on predictive performance when compared to unconstrained GBDT. Since observational fairness metrics are non-differentiable, we propose smooth convex error rate proxies for common fairness criteria, enabling gradient-based optimization using a ``proxy-Lagrangian'' formulation. Our implementation shows an order of magnitude speedup in training time relative to related work, a pivotal aspect to foster the widespread adoption of FairGBM by real-world practitioners.
abstract_zh: 表格数据在许多高风险领域很普遍，例如金融服务或公共政策。梯度提升决策树 (GBDT) 由于其可扩展性、性能和低训练成本而在这些环境中很受欢迎。虽然这些领域的公平性是最重要的问题，但现有的处理中 Fair ML 方法要么与 GBDT 不兼容，要么会导致显着的性能损失，同时需要相当长的训练时间。我们提出了 FairGBM，这是一种双上升学习框架，用于在公平约束下训练 GBDT，与无约束 GBDT 相比，对预测性能几乎没有影响。由于观察公平性指标是不可微分的，因此我们为常见公平性标准提出了平滑凸错误率代理，从而使用“代理拉格朗日”公式实现基于梯度的优化。我们的实施表明，相对于相关工作，训练时间加快了一个数量级，这是促进现实世界从业者广泛采用 FairGBM 的关键方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FairGBM，一种在梯度提升决策树（GBDT）中集成公平性约束的学习框架，以解决高风险领域中模型公平性与性能难以兼顾的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公平机器学习方法与GBDT兼容性差或导致显著性能损失，而高风险领域（如金融、公共政策）亟需兼顾模型性能与公平性的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计双重上升优化框架，通过平滑凸误差率代理函数替代非微分公平性指标，并采用代理拉格朗日乘子法实现梯度优化。
AI.result: 实验显示FairGBM训练速度较现有方法提升10倍，同时保持与无约束GBDT相当的预测性能，显著降低公平性约束带来的性能损失。
AI.conclusion: FairGBM有效平衡了模型公平性与性能，其高效性为高风险领域的实际应用提供了可行的公平学习方案。

title: Neuromuscular Reinforcement Learning to Actuate Human Limbs through FES
title_zh: 通过 FES 进行神经肌肉强化学习来驱动人体肢体
abstract: Functional Electrical Stimulation (FES) is a technique to evoke muscle contraction through low-energy electrical signals. FES can animate paralysed limbs. Yet, an open challenge remains on how to apply FES to achieve desired movements. This challenge is accentuated by the complexities of human bodies and the non-stationarities of the muscles' responses. The former causes difficulties in performing inverse dynamics, and the latter causes control performance to degrade over extended periods of use. Here, we engage the challenge via a data-driven approach. Specifically, we learn to control FES through Reinforcement Learning (RL) which can automatically customise the stimulation for the patients. However, RL typically has Markovian assumptions while FES control systems are non-Markovian because of the non-stationarities. To deal with this problem, we use a recurrent neural network to create Markovian state representations. We cast FES controls into RL problems and train RL agents to control FES in different settings in both simulations and the real world. The results show that our RL controllers can maintain control performances over long periods and have better stimulation characteristics than PID controllers.
summary: Functional Electrical Stimulation (FES) is a technique to evoke muscle contraction through low-energy electrical signals. FES can animate paralysed limbs. Yet, an open challenge remains on how to apply FES to achieve desired movements. This challenge is accentuated by the complexities of human bodies and the non-stationarities of the muscles' responses. The former causes difficulties in performing inverse dynamics, and the latter causes control performance to degrade over extended periods of use. Here, we engage the challenge via a data-driven approach. Specifically, we learn to control FES through Reinforcement Learning (RL) which can automatically customise the stimulation for the patients. However, RL typically has Markovian assumptions while FES control systems are non-Markovian because of the non-stationarities. To deal with this problem, we use a recurrent neural network to create Markovian state representations. We cast FES controls into RL problems and train RL agents to control FES in different settings in both simulations and the real world. The results show that our RL controllers can maintain control performances over long periods and have better stimulation characteristics than PID controllers.
abstract_zh: 功能性电刺激（FES）是一种通过低能量电信号引起肌肉收缩的技术。 FES 可以激活瘫痪的肢体。然而，如何应用 FES 来实现所需的运动仍然是一个公开的挑战。人体的复杂性和肌肉反应的非平稳性加剧了这一挑战。前者导致执行逆动力学方面的困难，后者导致控制性能在长时间使用后下降。在这里，我们通过数据驱动的方法应对挑战。具体来说，我们学习通过强化学习（RL）来控制 FES，它可以自动为患者定制刺激。然而，RL 通常具有马尔可夫假设，而 FES 控制系统由于非平稳性而为非马尔可夫假设。为了解决这个问题，我们使用循环神经网络来创建马尔可夫状态表示。我们将 FES 控制融入 RL 问题中，并训练 RL 代理在模拟和现实世界的不同设置中控制 FES。结果表明，我们的 RL 控制器可以长期保持控制性能，并且比 PID 控制器具有更好的激励特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过强化学习（RL）结合循环神经网络控制功能性电刺激（FES），以实现对瘫痪肢体的长期有效运动控制。
AI.motivation: 传统FES控制方法（如PID）难以应对人体肌肉响应的非平稳性和复杂性，导致控制性能随时间下降，需开发自适应数据驱动方案。
AI.method: 将FES控制建模为RL问题，利用循环神经网络处理非马尔可夫性，训练智能体在仿真和真实环境中适应不同场景的FES控制策略。
AI.result: RL控制器在长时间任务中保持稳定性能，且刺激模式优于PID控制器，验证了方法在模拟和实际应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于RL的FES控制框架能有效解决肌肉非平稳性问题，为瘫痪肢体康复提供更智能、自适应的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出通过强化学习（RL）结合循环神经网络控制功能性电刺激（FES），以实现对瘫痪肢体的长期有效运动控制。

search_text: Neuromuscular Reinforcement Learning to Actuate Human Limbs through FES 通过 FES 进行神经肌肉强化学习来驱动人体肢体 Functional Electrical Stimulation (FES) is a technique to evoke muscle contraction through low-energy electrical signals. FES can animate paralysed limbs. Yet, an open challenge remains on how to apply FES to achieve desired movements. This challenge is accentuated by the complexities of human bodies and the non-stationarities of the muscles' responses. The former causes difficulties in performing inverse dynamics, and the latter causes control performance to degrade over extended periods of use. Here, we engage the challenge via a data-driven approach. Specifically, we learn to control FES through Reinforcement Learning (RL) which can automatically customise the stimulation for the patients. However, RL typically has Markovian assumptions while FES control systems are non-Markovian because of the non-stationarities. To deal with this problem, we use a recurrent neural network to create Markovian state representations. We cast FES controls into RL problems and train RL agents to control FES in different settings in both simulations and the real world. The results show that our RL controllers can maintain control performances over long periods and have better stimulation characteristics than PID controllers. 功能性电刺激（FES）是一种通过低能量电信号引起肌肉收缩的技术。 FES 可以激活瘫痪的肢体。然而，如何应用 FES 来实现所需的运动仍然是一个公开的挑战。人体的复杂性和肌肉反应的非平稳性加剧了这一挑战。前者导致执行逆动力学方面的困难，后者导致控制性能在长时间使用后下降。在这里，我们通过数据驱动的方法应对挑战。具体来说，我们学习通过强化学习（RL）来控制 FES，它可以自动为患者定制刺激。然而，RL 通常具有马尔可夫假设，而 FES 控制系统由于非平稳性而为非马尔可夫假设。为了解决这个问题，我们使用循环神经网络来创建马尔可夫状态表示。我们将 FES 控制融入 RL 问题中，并训练 RL 代理在模拟和现实世界的不同设置中控制 FES。结果表明，我们的 RL 控制器可以长期保持控制性能，并且比 PID 控制器具有更好的激励特性。 本文提出通过强化学习（RL）结合循环神经网络控制功能性电刺激（FES），以实现对瘫痪肢体的长期有效运动控制。 Nat Wannawas,Ali Shafti,A. Aldo Faisal cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Lin Wang,Xiufen Ye,Donghao Zhang,Wanji He,Lie Ju,Xin Wang,Wei Feng,Kaimin Song,Xin Zhao,Zongyuan Ge
title: 3D Matting: A Soft Segmentation Method Applied in Computed Tomography
title_zh: 3D Matting：一种应用于计算机断层扫描的软分割方法
abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) images, such as CT, MRI, and PET, are common in medical imaging applications and important in clinical diagnosis. Semantic ambiguity is a typical feature of many medical image labels. It can be caused by many factors, such as the imaging properties, pathological anatomy, and the weak representation of the binary masks, which brings challenges to accurate 3D segmentation. In 2D medical images, using soft masks instead of binary masks generated by image matting to characterize lesions can provide rich semantic information, describe the structural characteristics of lesions more comprehensively, and thus benefit the subsequent diagnoses and analyses. In this work, we introduce image matting into the 3D scenes to describe the lesions in 3D medical images. The study of image matting in 3D modality is limited, and there is no high-quality annotated dataset related to 3D matting, therefore slowing down the development of data-driven deep-learning-based methods. To address this issue, we constructed the first 3D medical matting dataset and convincingly verified the validity of the dataset through quality control and downstream experiments in lung nodules classification. We then adapt the four selected state-of-the-art 2D image matting algorithms to 3D scenes and further customize the methods for CT images. Also, we propose the first end-to-end deep 3D matting network and implement a solid 3D medical image matting benchmark, which will be released to encourage further research.
summary: Three-dimensional (3D) images, such as CT, MRI, and PET, are common in medical imaging applications and important in clinical diagnosis. Semantic ambiguity is a typical feature of many medical image labels. It can be caused by many factors, such as the imaging properties, pathological anatomy, and the weak representation of the binary masks, which brings challenges to accurate 3D segmentation. In 2D medical images, using soft masks instead of binary masks generated by image matting to characterize lesions can provide rich semantic information, describe the structural characteristics of lesions more comprehensively, and thus benefit the subsequent diagnoses and analyses. In this work, we introduce image matting into the 3D scenes to describe the lesions in 3D medical images. The study of image matting in 3D modality is limited, and there is no high-quality annotated dataset related to 3D matting, therefore slowing down the development of data-driven deep-learning-based methods. To address this issue, we constructed the first 3D medical matting dataset and convincingly verified the validity of the dataset through quality control and downstream experiments in lung nodules classification. We then adapt the four selected state-of-the-art 2D image matting algorithms to 3D scenes and further customize the methods for CT images. Also, we propose the first end-to-end deep 3D matting network and implement a solid 3D medical image matting benchmark, which will be released to encourage further research.
abstract_zh: 三维 (3D) 图像，例如 CT、MRI 和 PET，在医学成像应用中很常见，在临床诊断中也很重要。语义歧义是许多医学图像标签的典型特征。它可能是由多种因素引起的，例如成像特性、病理解剖、二值掩模的弱表示等，这给精确的3D分割带来了挑战。在二维医学图像中，使用软掩模代替图像抠图生成的二值掩模来表征病变可以提供丰富的语义信息，更全面地描述病变的结构特征，从而有利于后续的诊断和分析。在这项工作中，我们将图像抠图引入到 3D 场景中来描述 3D 医学图像中的病变。 3D模态图像抠图的研究有限，并且没有与3D抠图相关的高质量注释数据集，因此减缓了数据驱动的基于深度学习的方法的发展。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了第一个 3D 医学抠图数据集，并通过质量控制和肺结节分类的下游实验令人信服地验证了数据集的有效性。然后，我们将选定的四种最先进的 2D 图像抠图算法应用于 3D 场景，并进一步定制 CT 图像的方法。此外，我们提出了第一个端到端深度 3D 抠图网络，并实现了可靠的 3D 医学图像抠图基准，该基准将被发布以鼓励进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种应用于CT影像的3D图像磨皮方法，通过软分割替代传统二值分割以提升医学图像中病灶区域的语义描述精度。
AI.motivation: 医学影像标签存在语义模糊性，传统二值分割无法充分描述病灶结构特征，而3D磨皮方法在医学影像领域研究不足且缺乏高质量标注数据集。
AI.method: 构建首个3D医学磨皮数据集，适配4种先进2D磨皮算法至3D场景并定制CT专用方法，提出首个端到端3D磨皮深度网络并建立基准测试框架。
AI.result: 通过质量控制与肺结节分类实验验证数据集有效性，实现3D医学图像磨皮基准，推动相关算法研究。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为3D医学图像分割提供了新方法和基准，有望提升临床诊断中病灶特征的精确描述能力。

In 2D medical images, using soft masks instead of binary masks generated by image matting to characterize lesions can provide rich semantic information, describe the structural characteristics of lesions more comprehensively, and thus benefit the subsequent diagnoses and analyses. In this work, we introduce image matting into the 3D scenes to describe the lesions in 3D medical images. The study of image matting in 3D modality is limited, and there is no high-quality annotated dataset related to 3D matting, therefore slowing down the development of data-driven deep-learning-based methods. title: Topological Structure Learning for Weakly-Supervised Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督分布外检测的拓扑结构学习
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is the key to deploying models safely in the open world. For OOD detection, collecting sufficient in-distribution (ID) labeled data is usually more time-consuming and costly than unlabeled data. When ID labeled data is limited, the previous OOD detection methods are no longer superior due to their high dependence on the amount of ID labeled data. Based on limited ID labeled data and sufficient unlabeled data, we define a new setting called Weakly-Supervised Out-of-Distribution Detection (WSOOD). To solve the new problem, we propose an effective method called Topological Structure Learning (TSL). Firstly, TSL uses a contrastive learning method to build the initial topological structure space for ID and OOD data. Secondly, TSL mines effective topological connections in the initial topological space. Finally, based on limited ID labeled data and mined topological connections, TSL reconstructs the topological structure in a new topological space to increase the separability of ID and OOD instances. Extensive studies on several representative datasets show that TSL remarkably outperforms the state-of-the-art, verifying the validity and robustness of our method in the new setting of WSOOD.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is the key to deploying models safely in the open world. For OOD detection, collecting sufficient in-distribution (ID) labeled data is usually more time-consuming and costly than unlabeled data. When ID labeled data is limited, the previous OOD detection methods are no longer superior due to their high dependence on the amount of ID labeled data. Based on limited ID labeled data and sufficient unlabeled data, we define a new setting called Weakly-Supervised Out-of-Distribution Detection (WSOOD). To solve the new problem, we propose an effective method called Topological Structure Learning (TSL). Firstly, TSL uses a contrastive learning method to build the initial topological structure space for ID and OOD data. Secondly, TSL mines effective topological connections in the initial topological space. Finally, based on limited ID labeled data and mined topological connections, TSL reconstructs the topological structure in a new topological space to increase the separability of ID and OOD instances. Extensive studies on several representative datasets show that TSL remarkably outperforms the state-of-the-art, verifying the validity and robustness of our method in the new setting of WSOOD.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OOD) 检测是在开放世界中安全部署模型的关键。对于 OOD 检测，收集足够的分布内 (ID) 标记数据通常比未标记数据更耗时且成本更高。当ID标记数据有限时，以前的OOD检测方法由于高度依赖ID标记数据量而不再优越。基于有限的ID标记数据和足够的未标记数据，我们定义了一种称为弱监督分布外检测（WSOOD）的新设置。为了解决新问题，我们提出了一种有效的方法，称为拓扑结构学习（TSL）。首先，TSL采用对比学习方法为ID和OOD数据构建初始拓扑结构空间。其次，TSL在初始拓扑空间中挖掘有效的拓扑连接。最后，基于有限的ID标记数据和挖掘的拓扑连接，TSL在新的拓扑空间中重建拓扑结构，以增加ID和OOD实例的可分离性。对几个代表性数据集的广泛研究表明，TSL 明显优于最先进的技术，验证了我们的方法在 WSOOD 新环境中的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Topological Structure Learning (TSL)的方法，用于解决在有限的分布内（ID）标记数据和大量未标记数据下的弱监督分布外（OOD）检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有OOD检测方法高度依赖大量ID标记数据，而实际场景中获取ID标记数据成本高昂且耗时，导致方法在数据有限时表现不佳。
AI.method: TSL通过对比学习构建ID与OOD数据的初始拓扑结构空间，挖掘有效拓扑连接，并基于有限ID标签与拓扑连接重构新拓扑空间以增强ID与OOD样本的可分离性。
AI.result: 在多个代表性数据集上的实验表明，TSL显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在WSOOD新设置下的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TSL通过拓扑结构学习有效解决了弱监督场景下的OOD检测问题，为数据有限情况下的模型安全部署提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: TSL通过对比学习构建ID与OOD数据的初始拓扑结构空间，挖掘有效拓扑连接，并基于有限ID标签与拓扑连接重构新拓扑空间以增强ID与OOD样本的可分离性。
ai_content_json.result: 在多个代表性数据集上的实验表明，TSL显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其在WSOOD新设置下的有效性与鲁棒性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: TSL通过拓扑结构学习有效解决了弱监督场景下的OOD检测问题，为数据有限情况下的模型安全部署提供了新思路。

search_text: Topological Structure Learning for Weakly-Supervised Out-of-Distribution Detection 用于弱监督分布外检测的拓扑结构学习 Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is the key to deploying models safely in the open world. For OOD detection, collecting sufficient in-distribution (ID) labeled data is usually more time-consuming and costly than unlabeled data. When ID labeled data is limited, the previous OOD detection methods are no longer superior due to their high dependence on the amount of ID labeled data. Based on limited ID labeled data and sufficient unlabeled data, we define a new setting called Weakly-Supervised Out-of-Distribution Detection (WSOOD). To solve the new problem, we propose an effective method called Topological Structure Learning (TSL). Firstly, TSL uses a contrastive learning method to build the initial topological structure space for ID and OOD data. Secondly, TSL mines effective topological connections in the initial topological space. Finally, based on limited ID labeled data and mined topological connections, TSL reconstructs the topological structure in a new topological space to increase the separability of ID and OOD instances. Extensive studies on several representative datasets show that TSL remarkably outperforms the state-of-the-art, verifying the validity and robustness of our method in the new setting of WSOOD. 分布外 (OOD) 检测是在开放世界中安全部署模型的关键。对于 OOD 检测，收集足够的分布内 (ID) 标记数据通常比未标记数据更耗时且成本更高。当ID标记数据有限时，以前的OOD检测方法由于高度依赖ID标记数据量而不再优越。基于有限的ID标记数据和足够的未标记数据，我们定义了一种称为弱监督分布外检测（WSOOD）的新设置。为了解决新问题，我们提出了一种有效的方法，称为拓扑结构学习（TSL）。首先，TSL采用对比学习方法为ID和OOD数据构建初始拓扑结构空间。其次，TSL在初始拓扑空间中挖掘有效的拓扑连接。最后，基于有限的ID标记数据和挖掘的拓扑连接，TSL在新的拓扑空间中重建拓扑结构，以增加ID和OOD实例的可分离性。对几个代表性数据集的广泛研究表明，TSL 明显优于最先进的技术，验证了我们的方法在 WSOOD 新环境中的有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种名为Topological Structure Learning (TSL)的方法，用于解决在有限的分布内（ID）标记数据和大量未标记数据下的弱监督分布外（OOD）检测问题。 Rundong He,Rongxue Li,Zhongyi Han,Yilong Yin cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Negation, Coordination, and Quantifiers in Contextualized Language Models
title_zh: 语境化语言模型中的否定、协调和量词
abstract: With the success of contextualized language models, much research explores what these models really learn and in which cases they still fail. Most of this work focuses on specific NLP tasks and on the learning outcome. Little research has attempted to decouple the models' weaknesses from specific tasks and focus on the embeddings per se and their mode of learning. In this paper, we take up this research opportunity: based on theoretical linguistic insights, we explore whether the semantic constraints of function words are learned and how the surrounding context impacts their embeddings. We create suitable datasets, provide new insights into the inner workings of LMs vis-a-vis function words and implement an assisting visual web interface for qualitative analysis.
summary: With the success of contextualized language models, much research explores what these models really learn and in which cases they still fail. Most of this work focuses on specific NLP tasks and on the learning outcome. Little research has attempted to decouple the models' weaknesses from specific tasks and focus on the embeddings per se and their mode of learning. In this paper, we take up this research opportunity: based on theoretical linguistic insights, we explore whether the semantic constraints of function words are learned and how the surrounding context impacts their embeddings. We create suitable datasets, provide new insights into the inner workings of LMs vis-a-vis function words and implement an assisting visual web interface for qualitative analysis.
abstract_zh: 随着情境化语言模型的成功，许多研究探讨了这些模型真正学到了什么以及在哪些情况下它们仍然会失败。这项工作的大部分重点是特定的 NLP 任务和学习成果。很少有研究试图将模型的弱点与特定任务脱钩，并将重点放在嵌入本身及其学习模式上。在本文中，我们抓住了这个研究机会：基于理论语言学见解，我们探索功能词的语义约束是否被学习以及周围的上下文如何影响它们的嵌入。我们创建合适的数据集，提供有关 LM 相对于功能词的内部运作的新见解，并实现用于定性分析的辅助可视化 Web 界面。

AI.tldr: 本文研究上下文语言模型在处理否定、协调和量词等功能词时的学习情况及上下文对其嵌入的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注特定任务，缺乏对模型弱点与任务分离的分析，尤其在功能词的语义约束学习方面存在不足。
AI.method: 基于理论语言学构建数据集，分析功能词嵌入，并开发可视化工具辅助定性分析。
AI.result: 发现功能词的语义约束部分被学习，上下文显著影响其嵌入，并通过可视化工具揭示了模型内部工作机制。
AI.conclusion: 模型对功能词的语义约束学习不完全，需结合上下文分析，未来研究应关注此方向。

authors_text: Jinlong Li,Zequn Jie,Xu Wang,Yu Zhou,Xiaolin Wei,Lin Ma
title: Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation via Progressive Patch Learning
title_zh: 通过渐进式补丁学习进行弱监督语义分割
abstract: Most of the existing semantic segmentation approaches with image-level class labels as supervision, highly rely on the initial class activation map (CAM) generated from the standard classification network. In this paper, a novel "Progressive Patch Learning" approach is proposed to improve the local details extraction of the classification, producing the CAM better covering the whole object rather than only the most discriminative regions as in CAMs obtained in conventional classification models. "Patch Learning" destructs the feature maps into patches and independently processes each local patch in parallel before the final aggregation. Such a mechanism enforces the network to find weak information from the scattered discriminative local parts, achieving enhanced local details sensitivity. "Progressive Patch Learning" further extends the feature destruction and patch learning to multi-level granularities in a progressive manner. Cooperating with a multi-stage optimization strategy, such a "Progressive Patch Learning" mechanism implicitly provides the model with the feature extraction ability across different locality-granularities. As an alternative to the implicit multi-granularity progressive fusion approach, we additionally propose an explicit method to simultaneously fuse features from different granularities in a single model, further enhancing the CAM quality on the full object coverage. Our proposed method achieves outstanding performance on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset e.g., with 69.6$% mIoU on the test set), which surpasses most existing weakly supervised semantic segmentation methods. Code will be made publicly available here https://github.com/TyroneLi/PPL_WSSS.
summary: Most of the existing semantic segmentation approaches with image-level class labels as supervision, highly rely on the initial class activation map (CAM) generated from the standard classification network. In this paper, a novel "Progressive Patch Learning" approach is proposed to improve the local details extraction of the classification, producing the CAM better covering the whole object rather than only the most discriminative regions as in CAMs obtained in conventional classification models. "Patch Learning" destructs the feature maps into patches and independently processes each local patch in parallel before the final aggregation. Such a mechanism enforces the network to find weak information from the scattered discriminative local parts, achieving enhanced local details sensitivity. "Progressive Patch Learning" further extends the feature destruction and patch learning to multi-level granularities in a progressive manner. Cooperating with a multi-stage optimization strategy, such a "Progressive Patch Learning" mechanism implicitly provides the model with the feature extraction ability across different locality-granularities. As an alternative to the implicit multi-granularity progressive fusion approach, we additionally propose an explicit method to simultaneously fuse features from different granularities in a single model, further enhancing the CAM quality on the full object coverage. Our proposed method achieves outstanding performance on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset e.g., with 69.6$% mIoU on the test set), which surpasses most existing weakly supervised semantic segmentation methods. Code will be made publicly available here https://github.com/TyroneLi/PPL_WSSS.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的语义分割方法以图像级类标签作为监督，高度依赖于标准分类网络生成的初始类激活图（CAM）。本文提出了一种新颖的“渐进式补丁学习”方法来改进分类的局部细节提取，使 CAM 更好地覆盖整个对象，而不是像传统分类模型中获得的 CAM 那样仅覆盖最具辨别力的区域。 “补丁学习”将特征映射分解为补丁，并在最终聚合之前并行独立处理每个局部补丁。这种机制强制网络从分散的有判别性的局部部分中寻找弱信息，从而增强局部细节的敏感性。 “渐进式补丁学习”进一步将特征破坏和补丁学习以渐进的方式扩展到多级粒度。这种“渐进式补丁学习”机制与多阶段优化策略配合，隐式地为模型提供了跨不同局部粒度的特征提取能力。作为隐式多粒度渐进融合方法的替代方案，我们还提出了一种显式方法，可以在单个模型中同时融合不同粒度的特征，进一步提高全对象覆盖的 CAM 质量。我们提出的方法在 PASCAL VOC 2012 数据集上实现了出色的性能，例如，测试集上的 mIoU 为 69.6$%，超越了大多数现有的弱监督语义分割方法。代码将在此处公开发布：https://github.com/TyroneLi/PPL_WSSS。

AI.tldr: 提出渐进式块学习方法用于弱监督语义分割
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的类别激活图(CAM)仅覆盖物体显著区域，无法完整覆盖目标物体
AI.method: 通过块学习机制分解特征图并行处理局部区域，结合多粒度渐进学习和显式特征融合策略
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上达到69.6% mIoU，优于多数现有弱监督分割方法
AI.conclusion: 渐进式块学习与多粒度特征融合有效提升了弱监督语义分割的完整性和精度

title: Model-based gym environments for limit order book trading
title_zh: 用于限价订单簿交易的基于模型的健身房环境
abstract: Within the mathematical finance literature there is a rich catalogue of mathematical models for studying algorithmic trading problems -- such as market-making and optimal execution -- in limit order books. This paper introduces \mbtgym, a Python module that provides a suite of gym environments for training reinforcement learning (RL) agents to solve such model-based trading problems. The module is set up in an extensible way to allow the combination of different aspects of different models. It supports highly efficient implementations of vectorized environments to allow faster training of RL agents. In this paper, we motivate the challenge of using RL to solve such model-based limit order book problems in mathematical finance, we explain the design of our gym environment, and then demonstrate its use in solving standard and non-standard problems from the literature. Finally, we lay out a roadmap for further development of our module, which we provide as an open source repository on GitHub so that it can serve as a focal point for RL research in model-based algorithmic trading.
summary: Within the mathematical finance literature there is a rich catalogue of mathematical models for studying algorithmic trading problems -- such as market-making and optimal execution -- in limit order books. This paper introduces \mbtgym, a Python module that provides a suite of gym environments for training reinforcement learning (RL) agents to solve such model-based trading problems. The module is set up in an extensible way to allow the combination of different aspects of different models. It supports highly efficient implementations of vectorized environments to allow faster training of RL agents. In this paper, we motivate the challenge of using RL to solve such model-based limit order book problems in mathematical finance, we explain the design of our gym environment, and then demonstrate its use in solving standard and non-standard problems from the literature. Finally, we lay out a roadmap for further development of our module, which we provide as an open source repository on GitHub so that it can serve as a focal point for RL research in model-based algorithmic trading.
abstract_zh: 在数学金融文献中，有丰富的数学模型用于研究限价订单簿中的算法交易问题，例如做市和最优执行。本文介绍了 \mbtgym，这是一个 Python 模块，它提供了一套 Gym 环境，用于训练强化学习（RL）代理来解决此类基于模型的交易问题。该模块以可扩展的方式设置，以允许不同模型的不同方面的组合。它支持向量化环境的高效实现，以允许更快地训练 RL 代理。在本文中，我们激发了使用强化学习来解决数学金融中基于模型的限价订单簿问题的挑战，我们解释了健身房环境的设计，然后演示了它在解决文献中的标准和非标准问题中的用途。最后，我们为进一步开发我们的模块制定了路线图，我们将其作为 GitHub 上的开源存储库提供，以便它可以作为基于模型的算法交易中的强化学习研究的焦点。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了mbtgym，一个用于训练强化学习代理解决基于模型的限价单簿交易问题的Python模块。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在大量数学模型用于研究算法交易问题，但将强化学习应用于这些基于模型的限价单簿问题仍面临挑战，需要专门的环境支持。
AI.method: 设计了一个可扩展的gym环境模块，支持向量化环境以提高训练效率，并结合不同模型的要素。
AI.result: 展示了该模块在解决文献中标准及非标准问题中的应用，并提供了开源代码库以促进进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: mbtgym作为开源工具，为基于模型的算法交易中的强化学习研究提供了基础，并规划了未来开发方向。

search_text: Model-based gym environments for limit order book trading 用于限价订单簿交易的基于模型的健身房环境 Within the mathematical finance literature there is a rich catalogue of mathematical models for studying algorithmic trading problems -- such as market-making and optimal execution -- in limit order books. This paper introduces \mbtgym, a Python module that provides a suite of gym environments for training reinforcement learning (RL) agents to solve such model-based trading problems. The module is set up in an extensible way to allow the combination of different aspects of different models. It supports highly efficient implementations of vectorized environments to allow faster training of RL agents. In this paper, we motivate the challenge of using RL to solve such model-based limit order book problems in mathematical finance, we explain the design of our gym environment, and then demonstrate its use in solving standard and non-standard problems from the literature. Finally, we lay out a roadmap for further development of our module, which we provide as an open source repository on GitHub so that it can serve as a focal point for RL research in model-based algorithmic trading. 在数学金融文献中，有丰富的数学模型用于研究限价订单簿中的算法交易问题，例如做市和最优执行。本文介绍了 \mbtgym，这是一个 Python 模块，它提供了一套 Gym 环境，用于训练强化学习（RL）代理来解决此类基于模型的交易问题。该模块以可扩展的方式设置，以允许不同模型的不同方面的组合。它支持向量化环境的高效实现，以允许更快地训练 RL 代理。在本文中，我们激发了使用强化学习来解决数学金融中基于模型的限价订单簿问题的挑战，我们解释了健身房环境的设计，然后演示了它在解决文献中的标准和非标准问题中的用途。最后，我们为进一步开发我们的模块制定了路线图，我们将其作为 GitHub 上的开源存储库提供，以便它可以作为基于模型的算法交易中的强化学习研究的焦点。 本文介绍了mbtgym，一个用于训练强化学习代理解决基于模型的限价单簿交易问题的Python模块。 Joseph Jerome,Leandro Sanchez-Betancourt,Rahul Savani,Martin Herdegen q-fin.TR,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-fin.CP,q-fin.MF

authors_text: Jan Oscar Cross-Zamirski,Guy Williams,Elizabeth Mouchet,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Riku Turkki,Yinhai Wang
title: Self-Supervised Learning of Phenotypic Representations from Cell Images with Weak Labels
title_zh: 从具有弱标签的细胞图像中进行表型表征的自监督学习
abstract: We propose WS-DINO as a novel framework to use weak label information in learning phenotypic representations from high-content fluorescent images of cells. Our model is based on a knowledge distillation approach with a vision transformer backbone (DINO), and we use this as a benchmark model for our study. Using WS-DINO, we fine-tuned with weak label information available in high-content microscopy screens (treatment and compound) and achieve state-of-the-art performance in not-same-compound mechanism of action prediction on the BBBC021 dataset (98%), and not-same-compound-and-batch performance (96%) using the compound as the weak label. Our method bypasses single cell cropping as a pre-processing step, and using self-attention maps we show that the model learns structurally meaningful phenotypic profiles.
summary: We propose WS-DINO as a novel framework to use weak label information in learning phenotypic representations from high-content fluorescent images of cells. Our model is based on a knowledge distillation approach with a vision transformer backbone (DINO), and we use this as a benchmark model for our study. Using WS-DINO, we fine-tuned with weak label information available in high-content microscopy screens (treatment and compound) and achieve state-of-the-art performance in not-same-compound mechanism of action prediction on the BBBC021 dataset (98%), and not-same-compound-and-batch performance (96%) using the compound as the weak label. Our method bypasses single cell cropping as a pre-processing step, and using self-attention maps we show that the model learns structurally meaningful phenotypic profiles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 WS-DINO 作为一种新颖的框架，利用弱标签信息从细胞的高内涵荧光图像中学习表型表征。我们的模型基于具有视觉变压器骨干（DINO）的知识蒸馏方法，我们将其用作我们研究的基准模型。使用 WS-DINO，我们利用高内涵显微镜屏幕（处理和化合物）中可用的弱标签信息进行微调，并在 BBBC021 数据集上的不同化合物作用机制预测中实现了最先进的性能 (98%)，以及使用化合物作为弱标签的不同化合物和批次性能 (96%)。我们的方法绕过单细胞裁剪作为预处理步骤，并使用自注意力图，我们表明该模型学习具有结构意义的表型特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WS-DINO框架，利用弱标签信息（如化合物处理）从细胞图像中学习表型表示，用于预测药物作用机制。
AI.motivation: 传统表型分析依赖大量标注数据，而弱标签（如化合物信息）更易获取但利用率低，需新方法有效利用此类信息。
AI.method: 基于知识蒸馏的视觉Transformer（DINO）框架，利用弱标签（化合物）微调模型，无需单细胞裁剪，并通过自注意力图验证结构特征学习。
AI.result: 在BBBC021数据集上，not-same-compound机制预测准确率达98%，not-same-compound-and-batch达96%，且简化预处理流程。
AI.conclusion: WS-DINO有效利用弱标签提升表型表示学习，显著优于现有方法，并验证了结构特征学习的可靠性。

title: Mobile-Based COVID-19 Vaccination Registration Application Prototype
title_zh: 基于移动设备的 COVID-19 疫苗接种注册应用程序原型
abstract: Information technology-based applications have entered the era of mobile phones or smartphones such as those using the Android or iOS operating system. Mobile-based application development has become a trend for today's society. Especially during the global COVID-19 pandemic, almost all activities are carried out remotely through mobile-based applications. To prevent the spread of COVID-19, mass vaccines are given to the public. So that the process of administering the vaccine does not cause crowds, it is necessary to create a mobile-based application. So that the application can be further developed properly, it is necessary to make a prototype. The prototype consists of 5 (steps): 1) Quick plan, 2) Modeling Quick Design, 3) Construction of prototype, 4) Deployment Delivery & feedback, and 5) Communication. In this research, the InVision design tool is used which can help design prototypes for both mobile and web versions. InVision has been widely used in making prototypes and is used by many digital companies in the world. The results obtained are in the form of a prototype application for the registration of vaccine participants via mobile phones and also the web. The programmers will easily translate the prototype results into a mobile-based application for the benefit of mobile phone-based online vaccine registration.
summary: Information technology-based applications have entered the era of mobile phones or smartphones such as those using the Android or iOS operating system. Mobile-based application development has become a trend for today's society. Especially during the global COVID-19 pandemic, almost all activities are carried out remotely through mobile-based applications. The programmers will easily translate the prototype results into a mobile-based application for the benefit of mobile phone-based online vaccine registration.
abstract_zh: 基于信息技术的应用程序已经进入移动电话或智能手机时代，例如使用Android或iOS操作系统的手机或智能手机。基于移动设备的应用程序开发已成为当今社会的趋势。特别是在全球 COVID-19 大流行期间，几乎所有活动都是通过基于移动的应用程序远程进行的。为了防止 COVID-19 的传播，向公众提供了大规模疫苗。为了避免注射疫苗的过程造成人群拥挤，有必要创建一个基于移动设备的应用程序。为了使应用程序能够进一步正确开发，有必要制作原型。原型由 5 个（步骤）组成：1）快速计划，2）建模快速设计，3）原型构建，4）部署交付和反馈，以及 5）沟通。在这项研究中，使用了 InVision 设计工具，它可以帮助设计移动和网页版本的原型。 InVision已广泛用于制作原型，并被世界上许多数字公司所使用。获得的结果以原型应用程序的形式出现，用于通过手机和网络注册疫苗参与者。程序员可以轻松地将原型结果转化为基于移动设备的应用程序，以实现基于移动电话的在线疫苗注册。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于移动设备的新冠疫苗登记应用程序原型，以提高疫苗接种过程的效率并减少人群聚集。
AI.motivation: 全球新冠疫情促使远程活动成为常态，疫苗接种需避免人群聚集，因此需要开发移动应用程序实现高效登记。
AI.method: 采用InVision设计工具，按照五个步骤（快速规划、模型设计、原型构建、部署反馈、沟通）开发移动和网页版原型。
AI.result: 成功创建了移动和网页版疫苗登记原型应用，便于程序员后续开发实际应用。
AI.conclusion: 该原型为移动设备在线疫苗登记提供了可行方案，有助于提升公共卫生管理效率。

The results obtained are in the form of a prototype application for the registration of vaccine participants via mobile phones and also the web. The programmers will easily translate the prototype results into a mobile-based application for the benefit of mobile phone-based online vaccine registration. 基于信息技术的应用程序已经进入移动电话或智能手机时代，例如使用Android或iOS操作系统的手机或智能手机。基于移动设备的应用程序开发已成为当今社会的趋势。特别是在全球 COVID-19 大流行期间，几乎所有活动都是通过基于移动的应用程序远程进行的。为了防止 COVID-19 的传播，向公众提供了大规模疫苗。为了避免注射疫苗的过程造成人群拥挤，有必要创建一个基于移动设备的应用程序。为了使应用程序能够进一步正确开发，有必要制作原型。原型由 5 个（步骤）组成：1）快速计划，2）建模快速设计，3）原型构建，4）部署交付和反馈，以及 5）沟通。在这项研究中，使用了 InVision 设计工具，它可以帮助设计移动和网页版本的原型。 InVision已广泛用于制作原型，并被世界上许多数字公司所使用。获得的结果以原型应用程序的形式出现，用于通过手机和网络注册疫苗参与者。程序员可以轻松地将原型结果转化为基于移动设备的应用程序，以实现基于移动电话的在线疫苗注册。 本文设计了一个基于移动设备的新冠疫苗登记应用程序原型，以提高疫苗接种过程的效率并减少人群聚集。 Leon A. Abdillah,Azka Kurniasti cs.HC

authors_text: Jiangmeng Li,Wenwen Qiang,Changwen Zheng,Bing Su,Farid Razzak,Ji-Rong Wen,Hui Xiong
title: Modeling Multiple Views via Implicitly Preserving Global Consistency and Local Complementarity
title_zh: 通过隐式保留全局一致性和局部互补性对多个视图进行建模
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE) 2022; Refer to https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9857632
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE) 2022; Refer to https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9857632
abstract: While self-supervised learning techniques are often used to mining implicit knowledge from unlabeled data via modeling multiple views, it is unclear how to perform effective representation learning in a complex and inconsistent context. To this end, we propose a methodology, specifically consistency and complementarity network (CoCoNet), which avails of strict global inter-view consistency and local cross-view complementarity preserving regularization to comprehensively learn representations from multiple views. On the global stage, we reckon that the crucial knowledge is implicitly shared among views, and enhancing the encoder to capture such knowledge from data can improve the discriminability of the learned representations. Hence, preserving the global consistency of multiple views ensures the acquisition of common knowledge. CoCoNet aligns the probabilistic distribution of views by utilizing an efficient discrepancy metric measurement based on the generalized sliced Wasserstein distance. Lastly on the local stage, we propose a heuristic complementarity-factor, which joints cross-view discriminative knowledge, and it guides the encoders to learn not only view-wise discriminability but also cross-view complementary information. Theoretically, we provide the information-theoretical-based analyses of our proposed CoCoNet. Empirically, to investigate the improvement gains of our approach, we conduct adequate experimental validations, which demonstrate that CoCoNet outperforms the state-of-the-art self-supervised methods by a significant margin proves that such implicit consistency and complementarity preserving regularization can enhance the discriminability of latent representations.
summary: While self-supervised learning techniques are often used to mining implicit knowledge from unlabeled data via modeling multiple views, it is unclear how to perform effective representation learning in a complex and inconsistent context. To this end, we propose a methodology, specifically consistency and complementarity network (CoCoNet), which avails of strict global inter-view consistency and local cross-view complementarity preserving regularization to comprehensively learn representations from multiple views. On the global stage, we reckon that the crucial knowledge is implicitly shared among views, and enhancing the encoder to capture such knowledge from data can improve the discriminability of the learned representations. Hence, preserving the global consistency of multiple views ensures the acquisition of common knowledge. CoCoNet aligns the probabilistic distribution of views by utilizing an efficient discrepancy metric measurement based on the generalized sliced Wasserstein distance. Lastly on the local stage, we propose a heuristic complementarity-factor, which joints cross-view discriminative knowledge, and it guides the encoders to learn not only view-wise discriminability but also cross-view complementary information. Theoretically, we provide the information-theoretical-based analyses of our proposed CoCoNet. Empirically, to investigate the improvement gains of our approach, we conduct adequate experimental validations, which demonstrate that CoCoNet outperforms the state-of-the-art self-supervised methods by a significant margin proves that such implicit consistency and complementarity preserving regularization can enhance the discriminability of latent representations.
abstract_zh: 虽然自监督学习技术通常用于通过对多个视图进行建模来从未标记的数据中挖掘隐式知识，但目前尚不清楚如何在复杂且不一致的环境中执行有效的表示学习。为此，我们提出了一种方法，特别是一致性和互补网络（CoCoNet），它利用严格的全局视图间一致性和局部跨视图互补性保持正则化来全面学习多个视图的表示。在全局阶段，我们认为关键知识在视图之间隐式共享，增强编码器从数据中捕获这些知识可以提高学习表示的可辨别性。因此，保持多种观点的全局一致性可以确保获得共同知识。 CoCoNet 通过利用基于广义切片 Wasserstein 距离的有效差异度量测量来对齐视图的概率分布。最后，在本地阶段，我们提出了一种启发式互补因子，它结合了跨视图判别知识，它引导编码器不仅学习视图方面的判别性，而且还学习跨视图互补信息。理论上，我们对我们提出的 CoCoNet 进行了基于信息论的分析。根据经验，为了研究我们方法的改进收益，我们进行了充分的实验验证，这表明 CoCoNet 明显优于最先进的自监督方法，证明这种隐式一致性和互补性保持正则化可以增强潜在表示的可辨别性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法CoCoNet，通过隐式保持多视图数据的全局一致性和局部互补性来提升表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习在复杂不一致场景下难以有效挖掘多视图数据的隐含知识，需同时利用全局共享知识和局部互补信息增强表示判别性。
AI.method: 设计CoCoNet网络，结合全局视图间一致性（基于广义切片Wasserstein距离对齐分布）与局部跨视图互补性（互补因子引导判别信息学习），并提供信息论分析。
AI.result: 实验验证CoCoNet在多个基准任务上显著优于现有自监督方法，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 隐式保持全局一致性和局部互补性的正则化方法能有效提升多视图表示的判别能力，CoCoNet为复杂场景下的自监督学习提供了新思路。

title: M$^2$DQN: A Robust Method for Accelerating Deep Q-learning Network
title_zh: M$^2$DQN：一种加速深度 Q 学习网络的鲁棒方法
abstract: Deep Q-learning Network (DQN) is a successful way which combines reinforcement learning with deep neural networks and leads to a widespread application of reinforcement learning. One challenging problem when applying DQN or other reinforcement learning algorithms to real world problem is data collection. Therefore, how to improve data efficiency is one of the most important problems in the research of reinforcement learning. In this paper, we propose a framework which uses the Max-Mean loss in Deep Q-Network (M$^2$DQN). Instead of sampling one batch of experiences in the training step, we sample several batches from the experience replay and update the parameters such that the maximum TD-error of these batches is minimized. The proposed method can be combined with most of existing techniques of DQN algorithm by replacing the loss function. We verify the effectiveness of this framework with one of the most widely used techniques, Double DQN (DDQN), in several gym games. The results show that our method leads to a substantial improvement in both the learning speed and performance.
summary: Deep Q-learning Network (DQN) is a successful way which combines reinforcement learning with deep neural networks and leads to a widespread application of reinforcement learning. One challenging problem when applying DQN or other reinforcement learning algorithms to real world problem is data collection. Therefore, how to improve data efficiency is one of the most important problems in the research of reinforcement learning. In this paper, we propose a framework which uses the Max-Mean loss in Deep Q-Network (M$^2$DQN). Instead of sampling one batch of experiences in the training step, we sample several batches from the experience replay and update the parameters such that the maximum TD-error of these batches is minimized. The proposed method can be combined with most of existing techniques of DQN algorithm by replacing the loss function. We verify the effectiveness of this framework with one of the most widely used techniques, Double DQN (DDQN), in several gym games. The results show that our method leads to a substantial improvement in both the learning speed and performance.
abstract_zh: 深度Q学习网络（DQN）是将强化学习与深度神经网络相结合的成功方式，导致了强化学习的广泛应用。将 DQN 或其他强化学习算法应用于现实世界问题时的一个具有挑战性的问题是数据收集。因此，如何提高数据效率是强化学习研究中最重要的问题之一。在本文中，我们提出了一个在深度 Q 网络 (M$^2$DQN) 中使用最大均值损失的框架。我们不是在训练步骤中采样一批经验，而是从经验回放中采样几批经验并更新参数，以使这些批次的最大 TD 误差最小化。通过替换损失函数，该方法可以与DQN算法的大多数现有技术相结合。我们在几款健身游戏中使用最广泛使用的技术之一双 DQN (DDQN) 验证了该框架的有效性。结果表明，我们的方法可以显着提高学习速度和性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为M²DQN的框架，通过改进损失函数来提高深度Q网络的学习效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 在实际应用中，DQN等算法面临数据收集效率低的问题，亟需提升数据效率以增强算法性能。
AI.method: 采用最大-均值损失函数，通过多批次采样并最小化最大TD误差来更新网络参数，该方法可与现有DQN技术结合使用。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个gym游戏中显著提升了学习速度和算法性能。
AI.conclusion: M²DQN框架通过优化损失函数有效提升了DQN的数据效率，验证了其在实际应用中的潜力。

title: Single Image Deraining via Rain-Steaks Aware Deep Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 通过 Rain-Steaks 感知深度卷积神经网络进行单图像除雨
abstract: It is challenging to remove rain-steaks from a single rainy image because the rain steaks are spatially varying in the rainy image. This problem is studied in this paper by combining conventional image processing techniques and deep learning based techniques. An improved weighted guided image filter (iWGIF) is proposed to extract high frequency information from a rainy image. The high frequency information mainly includes rain steaks and noise, and it can guide the rain steaks aware deep convolutional neural network (RSADCNN) to pay more attention to rain steaks. The efficiency and explain-ability of RSADNN are improved. Experiments show that the proposed algorithm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real-world images in terms of both qualitative and quantitative measures. It is useful for autonomous navigation in raining conditions.
summary: It is challenging to remove rain-steaks from a single rainy image because the rain steaks are spatially varying in the rainy image. This problem is studied in this paper by combining conventional image processing techniques and deep learning based techniques. An improved weighted guided image filter (iWGIF) is proposed to extract high frequency information from a rainy image. The high frequency information mainly includes rain steaks and noise, and it can guide the rain steaks aware deep convolutional neural network (RSADCNN) to pay more attention to rain steaks. The efficiency and explain-ability of RSADNN are improved. Experiments show that the proposed algorithm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real-world images in terms of both qualitative and quantitative measures. It is useful for autonomous navigation in raining conditions.
abstract_zh: 从单个雨图像中去除雨牛排是具有挑战性的，因为雨牛排在雨图像中在空间上是变化的。本文结合传统图像处理技术和基于深度学习的技术来研究这个问题。提出了一种改进的加权引导图像滤波器（iWGIF）来从雨天图像中提取高频信息。高频信息主要包括雨排和噪声，它可以引导雨排感知深度卷积神经网络（RSADCNN）更加关注雨排。 RSADNN 的效率和可解释性得到提高。实验表明，在定性和定量测量方面，所提出的算法在合成图像和真实图像上都显着优于最先进的方法。它对于雨天的自主导航很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合传统图像处理与深度学习的单幅图像去雨方法，通过改进的加权引导滤波器和雨条感知卷积神经网络有效去除雨条。
AI.motivation: 雨条在雨天图像中呈空间变化分布，传统方法难以有效去除，且现有深度学习方法存在效率与可解释性不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出改进的加权引导图像滤波器(iWGIF)提取高频信息（含雨条和噪声），引导雨条感知深度卷积神经网络(RSADCNN)聚焦雨条区域，提升网络效率与可解释性。
AI.result: 在合成与真实世界图像上，该算法在定性与定量指标上均显著优于现有最先进方法，有效提升去雨效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为雨天自动驾驶等场景提供了可靠的图像去雨解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Single Image Deraining via Rain-Steaks Aware Deep Convolutional Neural Network 通过 Rain-Steaks 感知深度卷积神经网络进行单图像除雨 It is challenging to remove rain-steaks from a single rainy image because the rain steaks are spatially varying in the rainy image. This problem is studied in this paper by combining conventional image processing techniques and deep learning based techniques. An improved weighted guided image filter (iWGIF) is proposed to extract high frequency information from a rainy image. The high frequency information mainly includes rain steaks and noise, and it can guide the rain steaks aware deep convolutional neural network (RSADCNN) to pay more attention to rain steaks. The efficiency and explain-ability of RSADNN are improved. Experiments show that the proposed algorithm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real-world images in terms of both qualitative and quantitative measures. It is useful for autonomous navigation in raining conditions. 从单个雨图像中去除雨牛排是具有挑战性的，因为雨牛排在雨图像中在空间上是变化的。本文结合传统图像处理技术和基于深度学习的技术来研究这个问题。提出了一种改进的加权引导图像滤波器（iWGIF）来从雨天图像中提取高频信息。高频信息主要包括雨排和噪声，它可以引导雨排感知深度卷积神经网络（RSADCNN）更加关注雨排。 RSADNN 的效率和可解释性得到提高。实验表明，在定性和定量测量方面，所提出的算法在合成图像和真实图像上都显着优于最先进的方法。它对于雨天的自主导航很有用。 本文提出一种结合传统图像处理与深度学习的单幅图像去雨方法，通过改进的加权引导滤波器和雨条感知卷积神经网络有效去除雨条。 Chaobing Zheng,Yuwen Li,Shiqian Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Zaixi Zhang,Qi Liu,Zhenya Huang,Hao Wang,Chee-Kong Lee,Enhong Chen
title: Model Inversion Attacks against Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 针对图神经网络的模型反转攻击
comment: Accepted by TKDE. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.02820
comments: Accepted by TKDE. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.02820
abstract: Many data mining tasks rely on graphs to model relational structures among individuals (nodes). Since relational data are often sensitive, there is an urgent need to evaluate the privacy risks in graph data. One famous privacy attack against data analysis models is the model inversion attack, which aims to infer sensitive data in the training dataset and leads to great privacy concerns. Despite its success in grid-like domains, directly applying model inversion attacks on non-grid domains such as graph leads to poor attack performance. This is mainly due to the failure to consider the unique properties of graphs. To bridge this gap, we conduct a systematic study on model inversion attacks against Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), one of the state-of-the-art graph analysis tools in this paper. Firstly, in the white-box setting where the attacker has full access to the target GNN model, we present GraphMI to infer the private training graph data. Specifically, in GraphMI, a projected gradient module is proposed to tackle the discreteness of graph edges and preserve the sparsity and smoothness of graph features; a graph auto-encoder module is used to efficiently exploit graph topology, node attributes, and target model parameters for edge inference; a random sampling module can finally sample discrete edges. Furthermore, in the hard-label black-box setting where the attacker can only query the GNN API and receive the classification results, we propose two methods based on gradient estimation and reinforcement learning (RL-GraphMI). Our experimental results show that such defenses are not sufficiently effective and call for more advanced defenses against privacy attacks.
summary: Many data mining tasks rely on graphs to model relational structures among individuals (nodes). Since relational data are often sensitive, there is an urgent need to evaluate the privacy risks in graph data. One famous privacy attack against data analysis models is the model inversion attack, which aims to infer sensitive data in the training dataset and leads to great privacy concerns. Despite its success in grid-like domains, directly applying model inversion attacks on non-grid domains such as graph leads to poor attack performance. This is mainly due to the failure to consider the unique properties of graphs. To bridge this gap, we conduct a systematic study on model inversion attacks against Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), one of the state-of-the-art graph analysis tools in this paper. Firstly, in the white-box setting where the attacker has full access to the target GNN model, we present GraphMI to infer the private training graph data. Specifically, in GraphMI, a projected gradient module is proposed to tackle the discreteness of graph edges and preserve the sparsity and smoothness of graph features; a graph auto-encoder module is used to efficiently exploit graph topology, node attributes, and target model parameters for edge inference; a random sampling module can finally sample discrete edges. Furthermore, in the hard-label black-box setting where the attacker can only query the GNN API and receive the classification results, we propose two methods based on gradient estimation and reinforcement learning (RL-GraphMI). Our experimental results show that such defenses are not sufficiently effective and call for more advanced defenses against privacy attacks.
abstract_zh: 许多数据挖掘任务依赖于图来对个体（节点）之间的关系结构进行建模。由于关系数据往往比较敏感，因此迫切需要评估图数据中的隐私风险。针对数据分析模型的一种著名的隐私攻击是模型反转攻击，其目的是推断训练数据集中的敏感数据，并导致极大的隐私问题。尽管在类网格领域取得了成功，但直接将模型反转攻击应用于图等非网格领域会导致攻击性能较差。这主要是由于没有考虑图的独特属性。为了弥补这一差距，我们对图神经网络（GNN）的模型反转攻击进行了系统研究，图神经网络是本文最先进的图分析工具之一。首先，在攻击者可以完全访问目标 GNN 模型的白盒设置中，我们提出 GraphMI 来推断私有训练图数据。具体来说，在GraphMI中，提出了投影梯度模块来解决图边缘的离散性并保持图特征的稀疏性和平滑性；图自动编码器模块用于有效地利用图拓扑、节点属性和目标模型参数进行边缘推理；随机采样模块最终可以对离散边缘进行采样。此外，在攻击者只能查询 GNN API 并接收分类结果的硬标签黑盒设置中，我们提出了两种基于梯度估计和强化学习的方法（RL-GraphMI）。我们的实验结果表明，这种防御措施不够有效，需要更先进的防御措施来应对隐私攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对图神经网络（GNN）的模型反演攻击方法，以推断训练数据中的敏感信息。
AI.motivation: 图数据常包含敏感关系信息，现有模型反演攻击在非网格领域（如图结构）效果不佳，需针对性研究图数据的隐私风险。
AI.method: 提出白盒攻击方法GraphMI（含投影梯度模块、图自编码器模块和随机采样模块）及黑盒攻击方法RL-GraphMI（基于梯度估计和强化学习）。
AI.result: 实验表明现有防御手段对攻击效果有限，凸显隐私保护的迫切性。
AI.conclusion: 需设计更先进的防御机制以应对图神经网络的隐私攻击威胁。

title: SRFeat: Learning Locally Accurate and Globally Consistent Non-Rigid Shape Correspondence
title_zh: SRFeat：学习局部准确且全局一致的非刚性形状对应
abstract: In this work, we present a novel learning-based framework that combines the local accuracy of contrastive learning with the global consistency of geometric approaches, for robust non-rigid matching. We first observe that while contrastive learning can lead to powerful point-wise features, the learned correspondences commonly lack smoothness and consistency, owing to the purely combinatorial nature of the standard contrastive losses. To overcome this limitation we propose to boost contrastive feature learning with two types of smoothness regularization that inject geometric information into correspondence learning. With this novel combination in hand, the resulting features are both highly discriminative across individual points, and, at the same time, lead to robust and consistent correspondences, through simple proximity queries. Our framework is general and is applicable to local feature learning in both the 3D and 2D domains. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach through extensive experiments on a wide range of challenging matching benchmarks, including 3D non-rigid shape correspondence and 2D image keypoint matching.
summary: In this work, we present a novel learning-based framework that combines the local accuracy of contrastive learning with the global consistency of geometric approaches, for robust non-rigid matching. We first observe that while contrastive learning can lead to powerful point-wise features, the learned correspondences commonly lack smoothness and consistency, owing to the purely combinatorial nature of the standard contrastive losses. To overcome this limitation we propose to boost contrastive feature learning with two types of smoothness regularization that inject geometric information into correspondence learning. With this novel combination in hand, the resulting features are both highly discriminative across individual points, and, at the same time, lead to robust and consistent correspondences, through simple proximity queries. Our framework is general and is applicable to local feature learning in both the 3D and 2D domains. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach through extensive experiments on a wide range of challenging matching benchmarks, including 3D non-rigid shape correspondence and 2D image keypoint matching.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的框架，它将对比学习的局部准确性与几何方法的全局一致性相结合，以实现鲁棒的非刚性匹配。我们首先观察到，虽然对比学习可以产生强大的逐点特征，但由于标准对比损失的纯粹组合性质，学习到的对应关系通常缺乏平滑性和一致性。为了克服这一限制，我们建议通过两种类型的平滑正则化来促进对比特征学习，将几何信息注入对应学习中。有了这种新颖的组合，所得到的特征在各个点之间都具有高度区分性，同时通过简单的邻近查询产生强大且一致的对应关系。我们的框架是通用的，适用于 3D 和 2D 领域的局部特征学习。我们通过对各种具有挑战性的匹配基准（包括 3D 非刚性形状对应和 2D 图像关键点匹配）进行大量实验，证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SRFeat框架，结合对比学习的局部准确性和几何方法的全局一致性，解决非刚性形状匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法虽能生成强大的点特征，但因纯组合损失函数导致对应关系缺乏平滑性和一致性，需引入几何正则化提升全局一致性。
AI.method: 通过两种平滑正则化约束注入几何信息，结合对比学习与几何一致性约束，实现高判别性点特征与鲁棒对应关系。
AI.result: 在3D非刚性形状匹配和2D图像关键点匹配的多个基准测试中，方法表现优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: SRFeat框架通用性强，适用于2D/3D领域，通过局部-全局联合优化显著提升非刚性匹配性能。

ai_content_json.method: 通过两种平滑正则化约束注入几何信息，结合对比学习与几何一致性约束，实现高判别性点特征与鲁棒对应关系。

tldr: 本文提出SRFeat框架，结合对比学习的局部准确性和几何方法的全局一致性，解决非刚性形状匹配问题。
motivation: 现有对比学习方法虽能生成强大的点特征，但因纯组合损失函数导致对应关系缺乏平滑性和一致性，需引入几何正则化提升全局一致性。
method: 通过两种平滑正则化约束注入几何信息，结合对比学习与几何一致性约束，实现高判别性点特征与鲁棒对应关系。
result: 在3D非刚性形状匹配和2D图像关键点匹配的多个基准测试中，方法表现优于现有技术。

search_text: SRFeat: Learning Locally Accurate and Globally Consistent Non-Rigid Shape Correspondence SRFeat：学习局部准确且全局一致的非刚性形状对应 In this work, we present a novel learning-based framework that combines the local accuracy of contrastive learning with the global consistency of geometric approaches, for robust non-rigid matching. We first observe that while contrastive learning can lead to powerful point-wise features, the learned correspondences commonly lack smoothness and consistency, owing to the purely combinatorial nature of the standard contrastive losses. To overcome this limitation we propose to boost contrastive feature learning with two types of smoothness regularization that inject geometric information into correspondence learning. With this novel combination in hand, the resulting features are both highly discriminative across individual points, and, at the same time, lead to robust and consistent correspondences, through simple proximity queries. Our framework is general and is applicable to local feature learning in both the 3D and 2D domains. We demonstrate the superiority of our approach through extensive experiments on a wide range of challenging matching benchmarks, including 3D non-rigid shape correspondence and 2D image keypoint matching. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的框架，它将对比学习的局部准确性与几何方法的全局一致性相结合，以实现鲁棒的非刚性匹配。我们首先观察到，虽然对比学习可以产生强大的逐点特征，但由于标准对比损失的纯粹组合性质，学习到的对应关系通常缺乏平滑性和一致性。为了克服这一限制，我们建议通过两种类型的平滑正则化来促进对比特征学习，将几何信息注入对应学习中。有了这种新颖的组合，所得到的特征在各个点之间都具有高度区分性，同时通过简单的邻近查询产生强大且一致的对应关系。我们的框架是通用的，适用于 3D 和 2D 领域的局部特征学习。我们通过对各种具有挑战性的匹配基准（包括 3D 非刚性形状对应和 2D 图像关键点匹配）进行大量实验，证明了我们方法的优越性。 本文提出SRFeat框架，结合对比学习的局部准确性和几何方法的全局一致性，解决非刚性形状匹配问题。 Lei Li,Souhaib Attaiki,Maks Ovsjanikov cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Dynamics-informed deconvolutional neural networks for super-resolution identification of regime changes in epidemiological time series
title_zh: 用于流行病学时间序列中政权变化超分辨率识别的动力学信息反卷积神经网络
abstract: Inferring the timing and amplitude of perturbations in epidemiological systems from their stochastically spread low-resolution outcomes is as relevant as challenging. It is a requirement for current approaches to overcome the need to know the details of the perturbations to proceed with the analyses. However, the general problem of connecting epidemiological curves with the underlying incidence lacks the highly effective methodology present in other inverse problems, such as super-resolution and dehazing from computer vision. Here, we develop an unsupervised physics-informed convolutional neural network approach in reverse to connect death records with incidence that allows the identification of regime changes at single-day resolution. Applied to COVID-19 data with proper regularization and model-selection criteria, the approach can identify the implementation and removal of lockdowns and other nonpharmaceutical interventions with 0.93-day accuracy over the time span of a year.
summary: Inferring the timing and amplitude of perturbations in epidemiological systems from their stochastically spread low-resolution outcomes is as relevant as challenging. It is a requirement for current approaches to overcome the need to know the details of the perturbations to proceed with the analyses. However, the general problem of connecting epidemiological curves with the underlying incidence lacks the highly effective methodology present in other inverse problems, such as super-resolution and dehazing from computer vision. Here, we develop an unsupervised physics-informed convolutional neural network approach in reverse to connect death records with incidence that allows the identification of regime changes at single-day resolution. Applied to COVID-19 data with proper regularization and model-selection criteria, the approach can identify the implementation and removal of lockdowns and other nonpharmaceutical interventions with 0.93-day accuracy over the time span of a year.
abstract_zh: 从流行病学系统随机传播的低分辨率结果来推断流行病学系统扰动的时间和幅度既重要又具有挑战性。当前方法需要克服了解扰动细节以进行分析的需要。然而，将流行病学曲线与潜在发病率联系起来的一般问题缺乏其他反问题中存在的高效方法，例如计算机视觉的超分辨率和去雾。在这里，我们开发了一种无监督的、基于物理学的卷积神经网络方法，将死亡记录与发病率反向联系起来，从而能够以单日分辨率识别政权更迭。该方法应用于具有适当正则化和模型选择标准的 COVID-19 数据，可以在一年的时间范围内以 0.93 天的准确度识别封锁和其他非药物干预措施的实施和取消。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动力学信息的反卷积神经网络方法，用于从低分辨率流行病学时间序列中高分辨率识别制度变化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要预先知道扰动细节才能分析流行病学系统，而缺乏类似计算机视觉中超分辨率等高效逆问题解决方法。
AI.method: 开发了无监督物理信息卷积神经网络，通过死亡记录反推发病率，实现单日分辨率的制度变化识别。
AI.result: 在COVID-19数据上验证，该方法能以0.93天的精度识别封锁措施的实施与解除等非药物干预措施。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无需先验扰动信息的流行病学制度变化识别提供了有效工具，具有重要应用价值。

title: Quantum Transfer Learning for Real-World, Small, and High-Dimensional Datasets
title_zh: 适用于现实世界、小型和高维数据集的量子迁移学习
comment: This article is published in IEEE jstars: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10253962
comments: This article is published in IEEE jstars: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10253962
abstract: Quantum machine learning (QML) networks promise to have some computational (or quantum) advantage for classifying supervised datasets (e.g., satellite images) over some conventional deep learning (DL) techniques due to their expressive power via their local effective dimension. There are, however, two main challenges regardless of the promised quantum advantage: 1) Currently available quantum bits (qubits) are very small in number, while real-world datasets are characterized by hundreds of high-dimensional elements (i.e., features). Additionally, there is not a single unified approach for embedding real-world high-dimensional datasets in a limited number of qubits. 2) Some real-world datasets are too small for training intricate QML networks. Hence, to tackle these two challenges for benchmarking and validating QML networks on real-world, small, and high-dimensional datasets in one-go, we employ quantum transfer learning composed of a multi-qubit QML network, and a very deep convolutional network (a with VGG16 architecture) extracting informative features from any small, high-dimensional dataset. We use real-amplitude and strongly-entangling N-layer QML networks with and without data re-uploading layers as a multi-qubit QML network, and evaluate their expressive power quantified by using their local effective dimension; the lower the local effective dimension of a QML network, the better its performance on unseen data. Our numerical results show that the strongly-entangling N-layer QML network has a lower local effective dimension than the real-amplitude QML network and outperforms it on the hard-to-classify three-class labelling problem. In addition, quantum transfer learning helps tackle the two challenges mentioned above for benchmarking and validating QML networks on real-world, small, and high-dimensional datasets.
summary: Quantum machine learning (QML) networks promise to have some computational (or quantum) advantage for classifying supervised datasets (e.g., satellite images) over some conventional deep learning (DL) techniques due to their expressive power via their local effective dimension. There are, however, two main challenges regardless of the promised quantum advantage: 1) Currently available quantum bits (qubits) are very small in number, while real-world datasets are characterized by hundreds of high-dimensional elements (i.e., features). Additionally, there is not a single unified approach for embedding real-world high-dimensional datasets in a limited number of qubits. 2) Some real-world datasets are too small for training intricate QML networks. Hence, to tackle these two challenges for benchmarking and validating QML networks on real-world, small, and high-dimensional datasets in one-go, we employ quantum transfer learning composed of a multi-qubit QML network, and a very deep convolutional network (a with VGG16 architecture) extracting informative features from any small, high-dimensional dataset. We use real-amplitude and strongly-entangling N-layer QML networks with and without data re-uploading layers as a multi-qubit QML network, and evaluate their expressive power quantified by using their local effective dimension; the lower the local effective dimension of a QML network, the better its performance on unseen data. Our numerical results show that the strongly-entangling N-layer QML network has a lower local effective dimension than the real-amplitude QML network and outperforms it on the hard-to-classify three-class labelling problem. In addition, quantum transfer learning helps tackle the two challenges mentioned above for benchmarking and validating QML networks on real-world, small, and high-dimensional datasets.
abstract_zh: 量子机器学习（QML）网络有望在对监督数据集（例如卫星图像）进行分类时比一些传统的深度学习（DL）技术具有一些计算（或量子）优势，因为它们通过局部有效维度具有表达能力。然而，无论承诺的量子优势如何，仍然存在两个主要挑战：1）当前可用的量子比特（qubit）数量非常少，而现实世界的数据集由数百个高维元素（即特征）来表征。此外，没有一种统一的方法可以将现实世界的高维数据集嵌入到有限数量的量子位中。 2）一些现实世界的数据集对于训练复杂的 QML 网络来说太小。因此，为了一次性解决在现实世界的小型高维数据集上对 QML 网络进行基准测试和验证的两个挑战，我们采用了由多量子位 QML 网络和非常深的卷积网络（具有 VGG16 架构）组成的量子迁移学习，从任何小型高维数据集中提取信息特征。我们使用具有或不具有数据重新上传层的实振幅和强纠缠N层QML网络作为多量子位QML网络，并通过使用其局部有效维度来量化评估其表达能力； QML 网络的局部有效维数越低，其在未见数据上的性能就越好。我们的数值结果表明，强纠缠 N 层 QML 网络比实振幅 QML 网络具有更低的局部有效维数，并且在难以分类的三类标记问题上优于它。此外，量子迁移学习有助于解决上述两个挑战，用于在现实世界的小型高维数据集上对 QML 网络进行基准测试和验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出量子迁移学习方法，用于解决现实世界中小样本、高维数据集在量子机器学习（QML）中的应用挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前量子比特数量有限且现实数据集维度高，同时小样本难以训练复杂QML网络，亟需有效方法验证QML性能。
AI.method: 结合多量子比特QML网络与VGG16卷积网络提取特征，通过局部有效维度量化QML网络表达能力，并比较不同量子电路结构（实振幅与强纠缠）性能。
AI.result: 强纠缠N层QML网络局部有效维度更低，在三分类难题中表现优于实振幅网络，量子迁移学习有效缓解了样本量与维度限制问题。
AI.conclusion: 量子迁移学习通过经典-量子混合架构成功验证了QML在现实场景中的可行性，强纠缠结构更适配小样本高维数据分类任务。
