We use real-amplitude and strongly-entangling N-layer QML networks with and without data re-uploading layers as a multi-qubit QML network, and evaluate their expressive power quantified by using their local effective dimension; the lower the local effective dimension of a QML network, the better its performance on unseen data. Our numerical results show that the strongly-entangling N-layer QML network has a lower local effective dimension than the real-amplitude QML network and outperforms it on the hard-to-classify three-class labelling problem. In addition, quantum transfer learning helps tackle the two challenges mentioned above for benchmarking and validating QML networks on real-world, small, and high-dimensional datasets. 量子机器学习（QML）网络有望在对监督数据集（例如卫星图像）进行分类时比一些传统的深度学习（DL）技术具有一些计算（或量子）优势，因为它们通过局部有效维度具有表达能力。然而，无论承诺的量子优势如何，仍然存在两个主要挑战：1）当前可用的量子比特（qubit）数量非常少，而现实世界的数据集由数百个高维元素（即特征）来表征。此外，没有一种统一的方法可以将现实世界的高维数据集嵌入到有限数量的量子位中。 2）一些现实世界的数据集对于训练复杂的 QML 网络来说太小。因此，为了一次性解决在现实世界的小型高维数据集上对 QML 网络进行基准测试和验证的两个挑战，我们采用了由多量子位 QML 网络和非常深的卷积网络（具有 VGG16 架构）组成的量子迁移学习，从任何小型高维数据集中提取信息特征。我们使用具有或不具有数据重新上传层的实振幅和强纠缠N层QML网络作为多量子位QML网络，并通过使用其局部有效维度来量化评估其表达能力； QML 网络的局部有效维数越低，其在未见数据上的性能就越好。我们的数值结果表明，强纠缠 N 层 QML 网络比实振幅 QML 网络具有更低的局部有效维数，并且在难以分类的三类标记问题上优于它。此外，量子迁移学习有助于解决上述两个挑战，用于在现实世界的小型高维数据集上对 QML 网络进行基准测试和验证。 本文提出量子迁移学习方法，用于解决现实世界中小样本、高维数据集在量子机器学习（QML）中的应用挑战。 Soronzonbold Otgonbaatar,Gottfried Schwarz,Mihai Datcu,Dieter Kranzlmüller quant-ph,cs.ET

title: DBT-DMAE: An Effective Multivariate Time Series Pre-Train Model under Missing Data
title_zh: DBT-DMAE：缺失数据下有效的多元时间序列预训练模型
abstract: Multivariate time series(MTS) is a universal data type related to many practical applications. However, MTS suffers from missing data problems, which leads to degradation or even collapse of the downstream tasks, such as prediction and classification. The concurrent missing data handling procedures could inevitably arouse the biased estimation and redundancy-training problem when encountering multiple downstream tasks. This paper presents a universally applicable MTS pre-train model, DBT-DMAE, to conquer the abovementioned obstacle. First, a missing representation module is designed by introducing dynamic positional embedding and random masking processing to characterize the missing symptom. Second, we proposed an auto-encoder structure to obtain the generalized MTS encoded representation utilizing an ameliorated TCN structure called dynamic-bidirectional-TCN as the basic unit, which integrates the dynamic kernel and time-fliping trick to draw temporal features effectively. Finally, the overall feed-in and loss strategy is established to ensure the adequate training of the whole model. Comparative experiment results manifest that the DBT-DMAE outperforms the other state-of-the-art methods in six real-world datasets and two different downstream tasks. Moreover, ablation and interpretability experiments are delivered to verify the validity of DBT-DMAE's substructures.
summary: Multivariate time series(MTS) is a universal data type related to many practical applications. However, MTS suffers from missing data problems, which leads to degradation or even collapse of the downstream tasks, such as prediction and classification. The concurrent missing data handling procedures could inevitably arouse the biased estimation and redundancy-training problem when encountering multiple downstream tasks. This paper presents a universally applicable MTS pre-train model, DBT-DMAE, to conquer the abovementioned obstacle. First, a missing representation module is designed by introducing dynamic positional embedding and random masking processing to characterize the missing symptom. Second, we proposed an auto-encoder structure to obtain the generalized MTS encoded representation utilizing an ameliorated TCN structure called dynamic-bidirectional-TCN as the basic unit, which integrates the dynamic kernel and time-fliping trick to draw temporal features effectively. Finally, the overall feed-in and loss strategy is established to ensure the adequate training of the whole model. Comparative experiment results manifest that the DBT-DMAE outperforms the other state-of-the-art methods in six real-world datasets and two different downstream tasks. Moreover, ablation and interpretability experiments are delivered to verify the validity of DBT-DMAE's substructures.
abstract_zh: 多元时间序列（MTS）是与许多实际应用相关的通用数据类型。然而，MTS 存在数据缺失的问题，导致下游任务（例如预测和分类）性能下降甚至崩溃。当遇到多个下游任务时，并发的缺失数据处理过程不可避免地会引起偏差估计和冗余训练问题。本文提出了一种普遍适用的 MTS 预训练模型 DBT-DMAE，以克服上述障碍。首先，通过引入动态位置嵌入和随机掩蔽处理来设计缺失表示模块来表征缺失症状。其次，我们提出了一种自动编码器结构，利用称为动态双向TCN的改进TCN结构作为基本单元来获得广义MTS编码表示，该结构集成了动态内核和时间翻转技巧以有效地绘制时间特征。最后，建立整体的馈入和损耗策略，以确保整个模型的充分训练。比较实验结果表明，DBT-DMAE 在六个真实数据集和两个不同的下游任务中优于其他最先进的方法。此外，还进行了消融和可解释性实验来验证 DBT-DMAE 子结构的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DBT-DMAE的多变量时间序列预训练模型，旨在有效处理缺失数据问题，提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 多变量时间序列（MTS）普遍存在缺失数据问题，传统方法在处理多任务时易导致偏差估计和冗余训练，影响预测和分类等下游任务效果。
AI.method: 设计动态位置嵌入与随机掩码模块表征缺失特征，采用改进的动态双向TCN结构构建自编码器，结合整体输入与损失策略进行训练。
AI.result: 在六个真实数据集和两种下游任务中，DBT-DMAE优于现有先进方法，消融实验验证了子模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: DBT-DMAE通过创新模块和结构设计，有效解决了MTS缺失数据问题，为多任务场景提供了通用预训练方案。

title: "For an App Supposed to Make Its Users Feel Better, It Sure is a Joke" -- An Analysis of User Reviews of Mobile Mental Health Applications
title_zh: “对于一款旨在让用户感觉更好的应用程序来说，这确实是一个笑话”——移动心理健康应用程序用户评论分析
abstract: Mobile mental health applications are seen as a promising way to fulfill the growing need for mental health care. Although there are more than ten thousand mental health apps available on app marketplaces, such as Google Play and Apple App Store, many of them are not evidence-based, or have been minimally evaluated or regulated. The real-life experience and concerns of the app users are largely unknown. To address this knowledge gap, we analyzed 2159 user reviews from 117 Android apps and 2764 user reviews from 76 iOS apps. Our findings include the critiques around inconsistent moderation standards and lack of transparency. App-embedded social features and chatbots were criticized for providing little support during crises. We provide research and design implications for future mental health app developers, discuss the necessity of developing a comprehensive and centralized app development guideline, and the opportunities of incorporating existing AI technology in mental health chatbots.
summary: Mobile mental health applications are seen as a promising way to fulfill the growing need for mental health care. Although there are more than ten thousand mental health apps available on app marketplaces, such as Google Play and Apple App Store, many of them are not evidence-based, or have been minimally evaluated or regulated. The real-life experience and concerns of the app users are largely unknown. To address this knowledge gap, we analyzed 2159 user reviews from 117 Android apps and 2764 user reviews from 76 iOS apps. Our findings include the critiques around inconsistent moderation standards and lack of transparency. App-embedded social features and chatbots were criticized for providing little support during crises. We provide research and design implications for future mental health app developers, discuss the necessity of developing a comprehensive and centralized app development guideline, and the opportunities of incorporating existing AI technology in mental health chatbots.
abstract_zh: 移动心理健康应用程序被视为满足日益增长的心理健康保健需求的一种有前途的方式。尽管 Google Play 和 Apple App Store 等应用市场上有超过一万个心理健康应用程序，但其中许多都没有证据基础，或者经过了最低限度的评估或监管。应用程序用户的现实生活体验和担忧很大程度上是未知的。为了弥补这一知识差距，我们分析了来自 117 个 Android 应用程序的 2159 个用户评论和来自 76 个 iOS 应用程序的 2764 个用户评论。我们的调查结果包括对不一致的审核标准和缺乏透明度的批评。应用程序嵌入的社交功能和聊天机器人因在危机期间提供的支持很少而受到批评。我们为未来的心理健康应用程序开发人员提供研究和设计启示，讨论制定全面且集中的应用程序开发指南的必要性，以及将现有人工智能技术融入心理健康聊天机器人的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析移动心理健康应用程序的用户评论，探讨其存在的问题及改进方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管心理健康应用数量众多，但其科学性和用户实际体验缺乏系统研究，需通过用户反馈揭示问题。
AI.method: 收集并分析2159条Android应用和2764条iOS应用的用户评论，归纳用户对应用功能、透明度及支持系统的批评意见。
AI.result: 发现应用存在审核标准不一致、透明度不足、社交功能及聊天机器人危机支持效果差等问题，并提出设计与监管改进建议。
AI.conclusion: 需制定统一开发指南并整合AI技术优化聊天机器人，以提升心理健康应用的有效性与用户信任度。

title: KaliCalib: A Framework for Basketball Court Registration
title_zh: KaliCalib：篮球场注册框架
comment: Accepted at ACM MMSports 2022 (5th International ACM Workshop on Multimedia Content Analysis in Sports)
comments: Accepted at ACM MMSports 2022 (5th International ACM Workshop on Multimedia Content Analysis in Sports)
abstract: Tracking the players and the ball in team sports is key to analyse the performance or to enhance the game watching experience with augmented reality. When the only sources for this data are broadcast videos, sports-field registration systems are required to estimate the homography and re-project the ball or the players from the image space to the field space. This paper describes a new basketball court registration framework in the context of the MMSports 2022 camera calibration challenge. The method is based on the estimation by an encoder-decoder network of the positions of keypoints sampled with perspective-aware constraints. The regression of the basket positions and heavy data augmentation techniques make the model robust to different arenas. Ablation studies show the positive effects of our contributions on the challenge test set. Our method divides the mean squared error by 4.7 compared to the challenge baseline.
summary: Tracking the players and the ball in team sports is key to analyse the performance or to enhance the game watching experience with augmented reality. When the only sources for this data are broadcast videos, sports-field registration systems are required to estimate the homography and re-project the ball or the players from the image space to the field space. This paper describes a new basketball court registration framework in the context of the MMSports 2022 camera calibration challenge. The method is based on the estimation by an encoder-decoder network of the positions of keypoints sampled with perspective-aware constraints. The regression of the basket positions and heavy data augmentation techniques make the model robust to different arenas. Ablation studies show the positive effects of our contributions on the challenge test set. Our method divides the mean squared error by 4.7 compared to the challenge baseline.
abstract_zh: 跟踪团队运动中的球员和球是分析表现或通过增强现实增强比赛观看体验的关键。当该数据的唯一来源是广播视频时，运动场注册系统需要估计单应性并将球或球员从图像空间重新投影到场地空间。本文描述了 MMSports 2022 相机校准挑战背景下的新篮球场注册框架。该方法基于编码器-解码器网络对具有透视感知约束的采样关键点位置的估计。篮子位置的回归和大量数据增强技术使模型对不同的领域具有鲁棒性。消融研究显示了我们对挑战测试集的贡献的积极影响。与挑战基线相比，我们的方法将均方误差除以 4.7。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KaliCalib框架，通过估计篮球场单应性矩阵，将视频中的球员和球的位置映射到实际场地坐标系，以提升体育分析与增强现实体验。
AI.motivation: 广播视频中缺乏场地坐标信息，需通过注册系统估计单应性以实现图像到场地空间的投影，但不同场地和视角导致传统方法鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 基于编码器-解码器网络，结合透视感知约束采样关键点，并通过回归篮筐位置与数据增强技术提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在MMSports 2022挑战中，相比基准方法均方误差降低4.7倍，消融实验证实方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: KaliCalib通过关键点估计与数据增强显著提升篮球场注册精度，为体育视频分析提供可靠工具。

search_text: KaliCalib: A Framework for Basketball Court Registration KaliCalib：篮球场注册框架 Tracking the players and the ball in team sports is key to analyse the performance or to enhance the game watching experience with augmented reality. When the only sources for this data are broadcast videos, sports-field registration systems are required to estimate the homography and re-project the ball or the players from the image space to the field space. This paper describes a new basketball court registration framework in the context of the MMSports 2022 camera calibration challenge. The method is based on the estimation by an encoder-decoder network of the positions of keypoints sampled with perspective-aware constraints. The regression of the basket positions and heavy data augmentation techniques make the model robust to different arenas. Ablation studies show the positive effects of our contributions on the challenge test set. Our method divides the mean squared error by 4.7 compared to the challenge baseline. 跟踪团队运动中的球员和球是分析表现或通过增强现实增强比赛观看体验的关键。当该数据的唯一来源是广播视频时，运动场注册系统需要估计单应性并将球或球员从图像空间重新投影到场地空间。本文描述了 MMSports 2022 相机校准挑战背景下的新篮球场注册框架。该方法基于编码器-解码器网络对具有透视感知约束的采样关键点位置的估计。篮子位置的回归和大量数据增强技术使模型对不同的领域具有鲁棒性。消融研究显示了我们对挑战测试集的贡献的积极影响。与挑战基线相比，我们的方法将均方误差除以 4.7。 本文提出KaliCalib框架，通过估计篮球场单应性矩阵，将视频中的球员和球的位置映射到实际场地坐标系，以提升体育分析与增强现实体验。 Adrien Maglo,Astrid Orcesi,Quoc Cuong Pham cs.CV

title: Data-Driven Risk-sensitive Model Predictive Control for Safe Navigation in Multi-Robot Systems
title_zh: 用于多机器人系统安全导航的数据驱动风险敏感模型预测控制
abstract: Safe navigation is a fundamental challenge in multi-robot systems due to the uncertainty surrounding the future trajectory of the robots that act as obstacles for each other. In this work, we propose a principled data-driven approach where each robot repeatedly solves a finite horizon optimization problem subject to collision avoidance constraints with latter being formulated as distributionally robust conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) of the distance between the agent and a polyhedral obstacle geometry. Specifically, the CVaR constraints are required to hold for all distributions that are close to the empirical distribution constructed from observed samples of prediction error collected during execution. The generality of the approach allows us to robustify against prediction errors that arise under commonly imposed assumptions in both distributed and decentralized settings. We derive tractable finite-dimensional approximations of this class of constraints by leveraging convex and minmax duality results for Wasserstein distributionally robust optimization problems. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is illustrated in a multi-drone navigation setting implemented in Gazebo platform.
summary: Safe navigation is a fundamental challenge in multi-robot systems due to the uncertainty surrounding the future trajectory of the robots that act as obstacles for each other. In this work, we propose a principled data-driven approach where each robot repeatedly solves a finite horizon optimization problem subject to collision avoidance constraints with latter being formulated as distributionally robust conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) of the distance between the agent and a polyhedral obstacle geometry. Specifically, the CVaR constraints are required to hold for all distributions that are close to the empirical distribution constructed from observed samples of prediction error collected during execution. The generality of the approach allows us to robustify against prediction errors that arise under commonly imposed assumptions in both distributed and decentralized settings. We derive tractable finite-dimensional approximations of this class of constraints by leveraging convex and minmax duality results for Wasserstein distributionally robust optimization problems. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is illustrated in a multi-drone navigation setting implemented in Gazebo platform.
abstract_zh: 安全导航是多机器人系统中的一个基本挑战，因为机器人未来轨迹的不确定性会相互阻碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种原则性的数据驱动方法，其中每个机器人重复解决受防撞约束的有限水平优化问题，后者被公式化为代理与多面体障碍物几何形状之间距离的分布稳健条件风险值（CVaR）。具体来说，CVaR 约束需要适用于所有接近根据执行期间收集的预测误差观测样本构建的经验分布的分布。该方法的通用性使我们能够针对分布式和去中心化环境中普遍强加的假设下出现的预测误差进行稳健。我们通过利用 Wasserstein 分布鲁棒优化问题的凸和最小最大对偶结果，得出此类约束的易于处理的有限维近似。在 Gazebo 平台上实现的多无人机导航设置中说明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的风险敏感模型预测控制方法，用于多机器人系统的安全导航，通过分布鲁棒条件风险价值（CVaR）约束处理轨迹预测不确定性。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统中动态障碍物的轨迹预测存在不确定性，传统方法难以有效避免碰撞风险，需鲁棒性更强的控制策略。
AI.method: 将碰撞避免约束转化为分布鲁棒CVaR问题，利用Wasserstein距离的凸对偶性推导有限维近似约束，并通过Gazebo平台验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在多无人机导航实验中，该方法显著降低了因预测误差导致的碰撞风险，验证了其安全性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布鲁棒CVaR约束方法为多机器人系统提供了更安全的导航框架，适用于分布式和去中心化场景下的风险控制。

Specifically, the CVaR constraints are required to hold for all distributions that are close to the empirical distribution constructed from observed samples of prediction error collected during execution. We derive tractable finite-dimensional approximations of this class of constraints by leveraging convex and minmax duality results for Wasserstein distributionally robust optimization problems. authors_text: Siyuan Liang,Longkang Li,Yanbo Fan,Xiaojun Jia,Jingzhi Li,Baoyuan Wu,Xiaochun Cao
title: A Large-scale Multiple-objective Method for Black-box Attack against Object Detection
title_zh: 针对目标检测的大规模多目标黑盒攻击方法
abstract: Recent studies have shown that detectors based on deep models are vulnerable to adversarial examples, even in the black-box scenario where the attacker cannot access the model information. Most existing attack methods aim to minimize the true positive rate, which often shows poor attack performance, as another sub-optimal bounding box may be detected around the attacked bounding box to be the new true positive one. To settle this challenge, we propose to minimize the true positive rate and maximize the false positive rate, which can encourage more false positive objects to block the generation of new true positive bounding boxes. It is modeled as a multi-objective optimization (MOP) problem, of which the generic algorithm can search the Pareto-optimal. However, our task has more than two million decision variables, leading to low searching efficiency. Thus, we extend the standard Genetic Algorithm with Random Subset selection and Divide-and-Conquer, called GARSDC, which significantly improves the efficiency. Moreover, to alleviate the sensitivity to population quality in generic algorithms, we generate a gradient-prior initial population, utilizing the transferability between different detectors with similar backbones. Compared with the state-of-art attack methods, GARSDC decreases by an average 12.0 in the mAP and queries by about 1000 times in extensive experiments. Our codes can be found at https://github.com/LiangSiyuan21/ GARSDC.
summary: Recent studies have shown that detectors based on deep models are vulnerable to adversarial examples, even in the black-box scenario where the attacker cannot access the model information. Most existing attack methods aim to minimize the true positive rate, which often shows poor attack performance, as another sub-optimal bounding box may be detected around the attacked bounding box to be the new true positive one. To settle this challenge, we propose to minimize the true positive rate and maximize the false positive rate, which can encourage more false positive objects to block the generation of new true positive bounding boxes. It is modeled as a multi-objective optimization (MOP) problem, of which the generic algorithm can search the Pareto-optimal. However, our task has more than two million decision variables, leading to low searching efficiency. Thus, we extend the standard Genetic Algorithm with Random Subset selection and Divide-and-Conquer, called GARSDC, which significantly improves the efficiency. Moreover, to alleviate the sensitivity to population quality in generic algorithms, we generate a gradient-prior initial population, utilizing the transferability between different detectors with similar backbones. Compared with the state-of-art attack methods, GARSDC decreases by an average 12.0 in the mAP and queries by about 1000 times in extensive experiments. Our codes can be found at https://github.com/LiangSiyuan21/ GARSDC.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，基于深度模型的检测器很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，即使在攻击者无法访问模型信息的黑盒场景中也是如此。大多数现有的攻击方法旨在最小化真阳性率，这通常表现出较差的攻击性能，因为可能会在被攻击的边界框周围检测到另一个次优边界框作为新的真阳性边界框。为了解决这一挑战，我们建议最小化真阳性率并最大化假阳性率，这可以鼓励更多的假阳性对象阻止新的真阳性边界框的生成。它被建模为多目标优化（MOP）问题，其中通用算法可以搜索帕累托最优。然而，我们的任务有超过两百万个决策变量，导致搜索效率低下。因此，我们通过随机子集选择和分而治之的方法扩展了标准遗传算法，称为 GARSDC，这显着提高了效率。此外，为了减轻通用算法中对群体质量的敏感性，我们利用具有相似主干的不同检测器之间的可转移性生成梯度先验初始群体。与最先进的攻击方法相比，在大量实验中，GARSDC 的 mAP 平均降低了 12.0，查询量降低了约 1000 倍。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/LiangSiyuan21/GARSDC 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对目标检测的黑盒攻击方法，通过多目标优化同时降低真阳性率并提高假阳性率，以提升攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击方法仅关注降低真阳性率，但可能因新真阳性框的生成导致攻击效果不佳，需同时优化多目标以增强攻击能力。
AI.method: 将问题建模为多目标优化问题，设计GARSDC算法（结合随机子集选择与分治策略的遗传算法），并利用梯度先验初始化种群以提升效率与迁移性。
AI.result: 实验表明，GARSDC在mAP上平均降低12.0，查询次数减少约1000倍，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多目标优化与高效算法设计，显著提升了黑盒攻击目标检测模型的效果，为相关领域提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种针对目标检测的黑盒攻击方法，通过多目标优化同时降低真阳性率并提高假阳性率，以提升攻击效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有攻击方法仅关注降低真阳性率，但可能因新真阳性框的生成导致攻击效果不佳，需同时优化多目标以增强攻击能力。
ai_content.method: 将问题建模为多目标优化问题，设计GARSDC算法（结合随机子集选择与分治策略的遗传算法），并利用梯度先验初始化种群以提升效率与迁移性。

search_text: A Large-scale Multiple-objective Method for Black-box Attack against Object Detection 针对目标检测的大规模多目标黑盒攻击方法 Recent studies have shown that detectors based on deep models are vulnerable to adversarial examples, even in the black-box scenario where the attacker cannot access the model information. Most existing attack methods aim to minimize the true positive rate, which often shows poor attack performance, as another sub-optimal bounding box may be detected around the attacked bounding box to be the new true positive one. To settle this challenge, we propose to minimize the true positive rate and maximize the false positive rate, which can encourage more false positive objects to block the generation of new true positive bounding boxes. It is modeled as a multi-objective optimization (MOP) problem, of which the generic algorithm can search the Pareto-optimal. However, our task has more than two million decision variables, leading to low searching efficiency. Thus, we extend the standard Genetic Algorithm with Random Subset selection and Divide-and-Conquer, called GARSDC, which significantly improves the efficiency. Moreover, to alleviate the sensitivity to population quality in generic algorithms, we generate a gradient-prior initial population, utilizing the transferability between different detectors with similar backbones. Compared with the state-of-art attack methods, GARSDC decreases by an average 12.0 in the mAP and queries by about 1000 times in extensive experiments. Our codes can be found at https://github.com/LiangSiyuan21/ GARSDC. 最近的研究表明，基于深度模型的检测器很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，即使在攻击者无法访问模型信息的黑盒场景中也是如此。大多数现有的攻击方法旨在最小化真阳性率，这通常表现出较差的攻击性能，因为可能会在被攻击的边界框周围检测到另一个次优边界框作为新的真阳性边界框。为了解决这一挑战，我们建议最小化真阳性率并最大化假阳性率，这可以鼓励更多的假阳性对象阻止新的真阳性边界框的生成。它被建模为多目标优化（MOP）问题，其中通用算法可以搜索帕累托最优。然而，我们的任务有超过两百万个决策变量，导致搜索效率低下。因此，我们通过随机子集选择和分而治之的方法扩展了标准遗传算法，称为 GARSDC，这显着提高了效率。此外，为了减轻通用算法中对群体质量的敏感性，我们利用具有相似主干的不同检测器之间的可转移性生成梯度先验初始群体。与最先进的攻击方法相比，在大量实验中，GARSDC 的 mAP 平均降低了 12.0，查询量降低了约 1000 倍。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/LiangSiyuan21/GARSDC 找到。 本文提出一种针对目标检测的黑盒攻击方法，通过多目标优化同时降低真阳性率并提高假阳性率，以提升攻击效果。 Siyuan Liang,Longkang Li,Yanbo Fan,Xiaojun Jia,Jingzhi Li,Baoyuan Wu,Xiaochun Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Qidong Huang,Xiaoyi Dong,Dongdong Chen,Hang Zhou,Weiming Zhang,Kui Zhang,Gang Hua,Nenghai Yu
title: PointCAT: Contrastive Adversarial Training for Robust Point Cloud Recognition
title_zh: PointCAT：稳健点云识别的对比对抗训练
abstract: Notwithstanding the prominent performance achieved in various applications, point cloud recognition models have often suffered from natural corruptions and adversarial perturbations. In this paper, we delve into boosting the general robustness of point cloud recognition models and propose Point-Cloud Contrastive Adversarial Training (PointCAT). The main intuition of PointCAT is encouraging the target recognition model to narrow the decision gap between clean point clouds and corrupted point clouds. Specifically, we leverage a supervised contrastive loss to facilitate the alignment and uniformity of the hypersphere features extracted by the recognition model, and design a pair of centralizing losses with the dynamic prototype guidance to avoid these features deviating from their belonging category clusters. To provide the more challenging corrupted point clouds, we adversarially train a noise generator along with the recognition model from the scratch, instead of using gradient-based attack as the inner loop like previous adversarial training methods. Comprehensive experiments show that the proposed PointCAT outperforms the baseline methods and dramatically boosts the robustness of different point cloud recognition models, under a variety of corruptions including isotropic point noises, the LiDAR simulated noises, random point dropping and adversarial perturbations.
summary: Notwithstanding the prominent performance achieved in various applications, point cloud recognition models have often suffered from natural corruptions and adversarial perturbations. In this paper, we delve into boosting the general robustness of point cloud recognition models and propose Point-Cloud Contrastive Adversarial Training (PointCAT). The main intuition of PointCAT is encouraging the target recognition model to narrow the decision gap between clean point clouds and corrupted point clouds. Specifically, we leverage a supervised contrastive loss to facilitate the alignment and uniformity of the hypersphere features extracted by the recognition model, and design a pair of centralizing losses with the dynamic prototype guidance to avoid these features deviating from their belonging category clusters. To provide the more challenging corrupted point clouds, we adversarially train a noise generator along with the recognition model from the scratch, instead of using gradient-based attack as the inner loop like previous adversarial training methods. Comprehensive experiments show that the proposed PointCAT outperforms the baseline methods and dramatically boosts the robustness of different point cloud recognition models, under a variety of corruptions including isotropic point noises, the LiDAR simulated noises, random point dropping and adversarial perturbations.
abstract_zh: 尽管在各种应用中取得了突出的性能，但点云识别模型经常遭受自然损坏和对抗性扰动。在本文中，我们深入研究了提高点云识别模型的总体鲁棒性，并提出了点云对比对抗训练（PointCAT）。 PointCAT 的主要直觉是鼓励目标识别模型缩小干净点云和损坏点云之间的决策差距。具体来说，我们利用监督对比损失来促进识别模型提取的超球面特征的对齐和均匀性，并在动态原型指导下设计一对集中损失，以避免这些特征偏离其所属类别簇。为了提供更具挑战性的损坏点云，我们从头开始对抗性地训练噪声生成器和识别模型，而不是像以前的对抗性训练方法那样使用基于梯度的攻击作为内循环。综合实验表明，在各向同性点噪声、LiDAR 模拟噪声、随机点丢失和对抗性扰动等各种损坏情况下，所提出的 PointCAT 优于基线方法，并显着提高了不同点云识别模型的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointCAT方法，通过对比对抗训练提升点云识别模型在自然损坏和对抗扰动下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有点云识别模型在面对自然噪声、LiDAR模拟噪声及对抗扰动时表现脆弱，需增强模型对各类损坏的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计监督对比损失对齐特征空间，结合动态原型引导的集中损失，从零开始对抗训练噪声生成器生成挑战性损坏样本，替代传统梯度攻击方法。
AI.result: 实验表明PointCAT显著优于基线方法，在多种损坏场景（点噪声、随机删除、对抗扰动等）下提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PointCAT通过对比学习与对抗训练结合，有效增强点云识别模型的抗干扰能力，为鲁棒模型训练提供新思路。

title: Computing Forward Reachable Sets for Nonlinear Adaptive Multirotor Controllers
title_zh: 计算非线性自适应多旋翼控制器的前向可达集
abstract: In multirotor systems, guaranteeing safety while considering unknown disturbances is essential for robust trajectory planning. The Forward reachable set (FRS), the set of feasible states subject to bounded disturbances, can be utilized to identify robust and collision-free trajectories by checking the intersections with obstacles. However, in many cases, the FRS is not calculated in real time and is too conservative to be used in actual applications. In this paper, we address these issues by introducing a nonlinear disturbance observer (NDOB) and an adaptive controller to the multirotor system. We express the FRS of the closed-loop multirotor system with an adaptive controller in augmented state space using Hamilton-Jacobi reachability analysis. Then, we derive a closed-form expression that over-approximates the FRS as an ellipsoid, allowing for real-time computation. By compensating for disturbances with the adaptive controller, our over-approximated FRS can be smaller than other ellipsoidal over-approximations. Numerical examples validate the computational efficiency and the smaller scale of our proposed FRS.
summary: In multirotor systems, guaranteeing safety while considering unknown disturbances is essential for robust trajectory planning. The Forward reachable set (FRS), the set of feasible states subject to bounded disturbances, can be utilized to identify robust and collision-free trajectories by checking the intersections with obstacles. However, in many cases, the FRS is not calculated in real time and is too conservative to be used in actual applications. In this paper, we address these issues by introducing a nonlinear disturbance observer (NDOB) and an adaptive controller to the multirotor system. We express the FRS of the closed-loop multirotor system with an adaptive controller in augmented state space using Hamilton-Jacobi reachability analysis. Then, we derive a closed-form expression that over-approximates the FRS as an ellipsoid, allowing for real-time computation. By compensating for disturbances with the adaptive controller, our over-approximated FRS can be smaller than other ellipsoidal over-approximations. Numerical examples validate the computational efficiency and the smaller scale of our proposed FRS.
abstract_zh: 在多旋翼系统中，在考虑未知干扰的同时保证安全对于稳健的轨迹规划至关重要。前向可达集（FRS）是受有界干扰的可行状态集，可用于通过检查与障碍物的交叉点来识别鲁棒且无碰撞的轨迹。然而，在很多情况下，FRS并不是实时计算的，并且过于保守，无法在实际应用中使用。在本文中，我们通过向多旋翼系统引入非线性扰动观测器（NDOB）和自适应控制器来解决这些问题。我们使用 Hamilton-Jacobi 可达性分析在增强状态空间中表达带有自适应控制器的闭环多旋翼系统的 FRS。然后，我们推导出一个封闭形式的表达式，将 FRS 过度近似为椭球体，从而允许实时计算。通过使用自适应控制器补偿干扰，我们的过近似 FRS 可以小于其他椭球过近似值。数值例子验证了我们提出的 FRS 的计算效率和较小的规模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非线性干扰观测器和自适应控制器的多旋翼系统前向可达集计算方法，以提高轨迹规划的安全性与实时性。
AI.motivation: 传统前向可达集（FRS）计算方法存在保守性强、无法实时计算的问题，限制了其在实际多旋翼系统中的应用。
AI.method: 结合非线性干扰观测器（NDOB）与自适应控制器，利用汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性分析，在扩展状态空间中推导出椭球体形式的FRS闭合表达式。
AI.result: 所提方法实现了FRS的实时计算，且相比其他椭球体近似方法，其覆盖范围更小，数值实验验证了计算效率与精度优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应控制补偿干扰，本文方法有效缩小了FRS范围，在保证安全性的前提下提升了多旋翼系统的轨迹规划效率。

We express the FRS of the closed-loop multirotor system with an adaptive controller in augmented state space using Hamilton-Jacobi reachability analysis. Then, we derive a closed-form expression that over-approximates the FRS as an ellipsoid, allowing for real-time computation. By compensating for disturbances with the adaptive controller, our over-approximated FRS can be smaller than other ellipsoidal over-approximations. Numerical examples validate the computational efficiency and the smaller scale of our proposed FRS. 在多旋翼系统中，在考虑未知干扰的同时保证安全对于稳健的轨迹规划至关重要。前向可达集（FRS）是受有界干扰的可行状态集，可用于通过检查与障碍物的交叉点来识别鲁棒且无碰撞的轨迹。然而，在很多情况下，FRS并不是实时计算的，并且过于保守，无法在实际应用中使用。在本文中，我们通过向多旋翼系统引入非线性扰动观测器（NDOB）和自适应控制器来解决这些问题。我们使用 Hamilton-Jacobi 可达性分析在增强状态空间中表达带有自适应控制器的闭环多旋翼系统的 FRS。然后，我们推导出一个封闭形式的表达式，将 FRS 过度近似为椭球体，从而允许实时计算。通过使用自适应控制器补偿干扰，我们的过近似 FRS 可以小于其他椭球过近似值。数值例子验证了我们提出的 FRS 的计算效率和较小的规模。 本文提出一种基于非线性干扰观测器和自适应控制器的多旋翼系统前向可达集计算方法，以提高轨迹规划的安全性与实时性。 Juyeop Han,Han-Lim Choi eess.SY,cs.RO

title: Spatial-then-Temporal Self-Supervised Learning for Video Correspondence
title_zh: 视频通信的时空自监督学习
comment: CVPR 2023. Code and models are available at https://github.com/qianduoduolr/Spa-then-Temp
comments: CVPR 2023. Code and models are available at https://github.com/qianduoduolr/Spa-then-Temp
abstract: In low-level video analyses, effective representations are important to derive the correspondences between video frames. These representations have been learned in a self-supervised fashion from unlabeled images or videos, using carefully designed pretext tasks in some recent studies. However, the previous work concentrates on either spatial-discriminative features or temporal-repetitive features, with little attention to the synergy between spatial and temporal cues. To address this issue, we propose a spatial-then-temporal self-supervised learning method. Specifically, we firstly extract spatial features from unlabeled images via contrastive learning, and secondly enhance the features by exploiting the temporal cues in unlabeled videos via reconstructive learning. In the second step, we design a global correlation distillation loss to ensure the learning not to forget the spatial cues, and a local correlation distillation loss to combat the temporal discontinuity that harms the reconstruction. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art self-supervised methods, as established by the experimental results on a series of correspondence-based video analysis tasks. Also, we performed ablation studies to verify the effectiveness of the two-step design as well as the distillation losses.
summary: In low-level video analyses, effective representations are important to derive the correspondences between video frames. These representations have been learned in a self-supervised fashion from unlabeled images or videos, using carefully designed pretext tasks in some recent studies. However, the previous work concentrates on either spatial-discriminative features or temporal-repetitive features, with little attention to the synergy between spatial and temporal cues. To address this issue, we propose a spatial-then-temporal self-supervised learning method. Specifically, we firstly extract spatial features from unlabeled images via contrastive learning, and secondly enhance the features by exploiting the temporal cues in unlabeled videos via reconstructive learning. In the second step, we design a global correlation distillation loss to ensure the learning not to forget the spatial cues, and a local correlation distillation loss to combat the temporal discontinuity that harms the reconstruction. The proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art self-supervised methods, as established by the experimental results on a series of correspondence-based video analysis tasks. Also, we performed ablation studies to verify the effectiveness of the two-step design as well as the distillation losses.
abstract_zh: 在低级视频分析中，有效的表示对于导出视频帧之间的对应关系非常重要。在最近的一些研究中，这些表征是通过使用精心设计的借口任务，从未标记的图像或视频中以自我监督的方式学习的。然而，之前的工作要么集中于空间区分特征，要么集中于时间重复特征，而很少关注空间和时间线索之间的协同作用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种时空自监督学习方法。具体来说，我们首先通过对比学习从未标记图像中提取空间特征，然后通过重建学习利用未标记视频中的时间线索来增强特征。在第二步中，我们设计了全局相关性蒸馏损失以确保学习不会忘记空间线索，并设计了局部相关性蒸馏损失以对抗损害重建的时间不连续性。根据一系列基于对应的视频分析任务的实验结果，所提出的方法优于最先进的自监督方法。此外，我们还进行了消融研究，以验证两步设计的有效性以及蒸馏损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种空间-然后-时间的自监督学习方法，用于视频帧之间的对应关系分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的视频分析方法通常只关注空间或时间特征，而忽略了空间与时间线索之间的协同作用。
AI.method: 首先通过对比学习从无标签图像中提取空间特征，然后利用重建学习从无标签视频中利用时间线索增强特征，并设计全局和局部相关性蒸馏损失以确保学习效果。
AI.result: 该方法在一系列基于对应关系的视频分析任务中优于最先进的自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过两步设计和蒸馏损失的有效性得到了验证，为视频对应关系分析提供了新的思路。

title: Jaco: An Offline Running Privacy-aware Voice Assistant
title_zh: Jaco：离线运行的隐私感知语音助手
comment: ef:In Proceedings of the 2022 ACM-IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI 2022). IEEE Press, 618-622
comments: ef:In Proceedings of the 2022 ACM-IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI 2022). IEEE Press, 618-622
abstract: With the recent advance in speech technology, smart voice assistants have been improved and are now used by many people. But often these assistants are running online as a cloud service and are not always known for a good protection of users' privacy. This paper presents the architecture of a novel voice assistant, called Jaco, with the following features: (a) It can run completely offline, even on low resource devices like a RaspberryPi. (b) Through a skill concept it can be easily extended. (c) The architectural focus is on protecting users' privacy, but without restricting capabilities for developers. (d) It supports multiple languages. (e) It is competitive with other voice assistant solutions. In this respect the assistant combines and extends the advantages of other approaches.
summary: With the recent advance in speech technology, smart voice assistants have been improved and are now used by many people. But often these assistants are running online as a cloud service and are not always known for a good protection of users' privacy. This paper presents the architecture of a novel voice assistant, called Jaco, with the following features: (a) It can run completely offline, even on low resource devices like a RaspberryPi. (b) Through a skill concept it can be easily extended. (c) The architectural focus is on protecting users' privacy, but without restricting capabilities for developers. (d) It supports multiple languages. (e) It is competitive with other voice assistant solutions. In this respect the assistant combines and extends the advantages of other approaches.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着语音技术的进步，智能语音助手得到了改进，现在被很多人使用。但这些助手通常作为云服务在线运行，并不总是以很好地保护用户隐私而闻名。本文介绍了一种名为 Jaco 的新型语音助手的架构，具有以下功能：（a）它可以完全离线运行，甚至可以在 RaspberryPi 等低资源设备上运行。 (b) 通过技能概念，它可以很容易地扩展。 (c) 架构重点是保护用户的隐私，但不限制开发人员的能力。 (d) 支持多种语言。 (e) 与其他语音助手解决方案相比具有竞争力。在这方面，助手结合并扩展了其他方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Jaco的离线运行且注重隐私保护的语音助手架构。
AI.motivation: 现有语音助手多依赖云端服务，存在隐私泄露风险，需在保护隐私的同时保持功能扩展性与多语言支持。
AI.method: 通过离线运行架构、技能扩展机制、隐私保护设计及多语言支持模块构建Jaco系统。
AI.result: 实现了可在低资源设备运行的隐私保护语音助手，兼具扩展性、多语言能力及市场竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Jaco通过离线架构与模块化设计有效平衡了隐私保护与功能扩展需求，整合了现有方案的优势。

authors_text: Tianfang Sun,Zhizhong Zhang,Xin Tan,Yanyun Qu,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma
title: Image Understands Point Cloud: Weakly Supervised 3D Semantic Segmentation via Association Learning
title_zh: 图像理解点云：通过关联学习进行弱监督 3D 语义分割
abstract: Weakly supervised point cloud semantic segmentation methods that require 1\% or fewer labels, hoping to realize almost the same performance as fully supervised approaches, which recently, have attracted extensive research attention. A typical solution in this framework is to use self-training or pseudo labeling to mine the supervision from the point cloud itself, but ignore the critical information from images. In fact, cameras widely exist in LiDAR scenarios and this complementary information seems to be greatly important for 3D applications. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-modality weakly supervised method for 3D segmentation, incorporating complementary information from unlabeled images. Basically, we design a dual-branch network equipped with an active labeling strategy, to maximize the power of tiny parts of labels and directly realize 2D-to-3D knowledge transfer. Afterwards, we establish a cross-modal self-training framework in an Expectation-Maximum (EM) perspective, which iterates between pseudo labels estimation and parameters updating. In the M-Step, we propose a cross-modal association learning to mine complementary supervision from images by reinforcing the cycle-consistency between 3D points and 2D superpixels. In the E-step, a pseudo label self-rectification mechanism is derived to filter noise labels thus providing more accurate labels for the networks to get fully trained. The extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method even outperforms the state-of-the-art fully supervised competitors with less than 1\% actively selected annotations.
summary: Weakly supervised point cloud semantic segmentation methods that require 1\% or fewer labels, hoping to realize almost the same performance as fully supervised approaches, which recently, have attracted extensive research attention. A typical solution in this framework is to use self-training or pseudo labeling to mine the supervision from the point cloud itself, but ignore the critical information from images. In fact, cameras widely exist in LiDAR scenarios and this complementary information seems to be greatly important for 3D applications. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-modality weakly supervised method for 3D segmentation, incorporating complementary information from unlabeled images. Basically, we design a dual-branch network equipped with an active labeling strategy, to maximize the power of tiny parts of labels and directly realize 2D-to-3D knowledge transfer. Afterwards, we establish a cross-modal self-training framework in an Expectation-Maximum (EM) perspective, which iterates between pseudo labels estimation and parameters updating. In the M-Step, we propose a cross-modal association learning to mine complementary supervision from images by reinforcing the cycle-consistency between 3D points and 2D superpixels. In the E-step, a pseudo label self-rectification mechanism is derived to filter noise labels thus providing more accurate labels for the networks to get fully trained. The extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method even outperforms the state-of-the-art fully supervised competitors with less than 1\% actively selected annotations.
abstract_zh: 弱监督点云语义分割方法需要1％或更少的标签，希望实现与完全监督方法几乎相同的性能，最近引起了广泛的研究关注。该框架中的典型解决方案是使用自训练或伪标签来挖掘点云本身的监督，但忽略图像中的关键信息。事实上，摄像头广泛存在于 LiDAR 场景中，这种补充信息对于 3D 应用似乎非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的跨模态弱监督 3D 分割方法，结合了未标记图像的补充信息。基本上，我们设计了一个配备主动标签策略的双分支网络，以最大限度地发挥标签微小部分的力量，并直接实现 2D 到 3D 的知识转移。然后，我们从最大期望（EM）的角度建立了跨模态自我训练框架，在伪标签估计和参数更新之间进行迭代。在 M-Step 中，我们提出了一种跨模态关联学习，通过增强 3D 点和 2D 超像素之间的循环一致性来从图像中挖掘互补监督。在E步骤中，推导了伪标签自校正机制来过滤噪声标签，从而为网络得到充分训练提供更准确的标签。广泛的实验结果表明，我们的方法甚至优于最先进的完全监督的竞争对手，其主动选择的注释少于 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督3D点云语义分割方法，通过关联学习结合图像信息提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法依赖点云自身监督，忽略广泛存在的图像信息，而图像与点云具有互补性，可提升3D分割效果。
AI.method: 设计双分支网络与主动标注策略，构建跨模态EM框架，在M步通过循环一致性挖掘图像监督，在E步通过伪标签校正机制过滤噪声。
AI.result: 在少于1%标注数据下，方法性能超越全监督最新算法。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态关联学习能有效利用图像信息，显著提升弱监督3D分割效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督3D点云语义分割方法，通过关联学习结合图像信息提升分割性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有弱监督方法依赖点云自身监督，忽略广泛存在的图像信息，而图像与点云具有互补性，可提升3D分割效果。
ai_content.method: 设计双分支网络与主动标注策略，构建跨模态EM框架，在M步通过循环一致性挖掘图像监督，在E步通过伪标签校正机制过滤噪声。
ai_content.result: 在少于1%标注数据下，方法性能超越全监督最新算法。
ai_content.conclusion: 跨模态关联学习能有效利用图像信息，显著提升弱监督3D分割效果。

search_text: Image Understands Point Cloud: Weakly Supervised 3D Semantic Segmentation via Association Learning 图像理解点云：通过关联学习进行弱监督 3D 语义分割 Weakly supervised point cloud semantic segmentation methods that require 1\% or fewer labels, hoping to realize almost the same performance as fully supervised approaches, which recently, have attracted extensive research attention. A typical solution in this framework is to use self-training or pseudo labeling to mine the supervision from the point cloud itself, but ignore the critical information from images. In fact, cameras widely exist in LiDAR scenarios and this complementary information seems to be greatly important for 3D applications. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-modality weakly supervised method for 3D segmentation, incorporating complementary information from unlabeled images. Basically, we design a dual-branch network equipped with an active labeling strategy, to maximize the power of tiny parts of labels and directly realize 2D-to-3D knowledge transfer. Afterwards, we establish a cross-modal self-training framework in an Expectation-Maximum (EM) perspective, which iterates between pseudo labels estimation and parameters updating. In the M-Step, we propose a cross-modal association learning to mine complementary supervision from images by reinforcing the cycle-consistency between 3D points and 2D superpixels. In the E-step, a pseudo label self-rectification mechanism is derived to filter noise labels thus providing more accurate labels for the networks to get fully trained. The extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method even outperforms the state-of-the-art fully supervised competitors with less than 1\% actively selected annotations. 弱监督点云语义分割方法需要1％或更少的标签，希望实现与完全监督方法几乎相同的性能，最近引起了广泛的研究关注。该框架中的典型解决方案是使用自训练或伪标签来挖掘点云本身的监督，但忽略图像中的关键信息。事实上，摄像头广泛存在于 LiDAR 场景中，这种补充信息对于 3D 应用似乎非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的跨模态弱监督 3D 分割方法，结合了未标记图像的补充信息。基本上，我们设计了一个配备主动标签策略的双分支网络，以最大限度地发挥标签微小部分的力量，并直接实现 2D 到 3D 的知识转移。然后，我们从最大期望（EM）的角度建立了跨模态自我训练框架，在伪标签估计和参数更新之间进行迭代。在 M-Step 中，我们提出了一种跨模态关联学习，通过增强 3D 点和 2D 超像素之间的循环一致性来从图像中挖掘互补监督。在E步骤中，推导了伪标签自校正机制来过滤噪声标签，从而为网络得到充分训练提供更准确的标签。广泛的实验结果表明，我们的方法甚至优于最先进的完全监督的竞争对手，其主动选择的注释少于 1%。 本文提出一种弱监督3D点云语义分割方法，通过关联学习结合图像信息提升分割性能。 Tianfang Sun,Zhizhong Zhang,Xin Tan,Yanyun Qu,Yuan Xie,Lizhuang Ma cs.CV

title: $b$-Coloring Parameterized by Pathwidth is XNLP-complete
title_zh: $b$-由路径宽度参数化的着色是 XNLP 完成的
abstract: We show that the $b$-Coloring problem is complete for the class XNLP when parameterized by the pathwidth of the input graph. Besides determining the precise parameterized complexity of this problem, this implies that b-Coloring parameterized by pathwidth is $W[t]$-hard for all $t$, and resolves the parameterized complexity of $b$-Coloring parameterized by treewidth.
summary: We show that the $b$-Coloring problem is complete for the class XNLP when parameterized by the pathwidth of the input graph. Besides determining the precise parameterized complexity of this problem, this implies that b-Coloring parameterized by pathwidth is $W[t]$-hard for all $t$, and resolves the parameterized complexity of $b$-Coloring parameterized by treewidth.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，当通过输入图的路径宽度进行参数化时，XNLP 类的 $b$ 着色问题是完整的。除了确定该问题的精确参数化复杂度之外，这意味着由路径宽度参数化的 b-Coloring 对于所有 $t$ 来说都是 $W[t]$-hard，并且解决了由树宽参数化的 $b$-Coloring 的参数化复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了$b$-Coloring问题在路径宽度参数化下的计算复杂性，并证明其属于XNLP完全问题。
AI.motivation: 确定$b$-Coloring问题在路径宽度参数化下的精确复杂性，并解决其与树宽参数化相关的开放性问题。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂性分析和归约技术，结合路径宽度的结构性质进行问题分类。
AI.result: 证明$b$-Coloring参数化由路径宽度时是XNLP完全的，且对所有$t$均为$W[t]$-难，解决了树宽参数化下的复杂性问题。
AI.conclusion: 明确了$b$-Coloring问题在路径宽度和树宽参数化下的理论复杂性边界，为相关算法研究提供参考。

authors_text: Juyeop Han,Youngjae Min,Hyeok-Joo Chae,Byeong-Min Jeong,Han-Lim Choi
title: DS-K3DOM: 3-D Dynamic Occupancy Mapping with Kernel Inference and Dempster-Shafer Evidential Theory
title_zh: DS-K3DOM：使用内核推理和 Dempster-Shafer 证据理论的 3-D 动态占用映射
abstract: Occupancy mapping has been widely utilized to represent the surroundings for autonomous robots to perform tasks such as navigation and manipulation. While occupancy mapping in 2-D environments has been well-studied, there have been few approaches suitable for 3-D dynamic occupancy mapping which is essential for aerial robots. This paper presents a novel 3-D dynamic occupancy mapping algorithm called DS-K3DOM. We first establish a Bayesian method to sequentially update occupancy maps for a stream of measurements based on the random finite set theory. Then, we approximate it with particles in the Dempster-Shafer domain to enable real-time computation. Moreover, the algorithm applies kernel-based inference with Dirichlet basic belief assignment to enable dense mapping from sparse measurements. The efficacy of the proposed algorithm is demonstrated through simulations and real experiments.
summary: Occupancy mapping has been widely utilized to represent the surroundings for autonomous robots to perform tasks such as navigation and manipulation. While occupancy mapping in 2-D environments has been well-studied, there have been few approaches suitable for 3-D dynamic occupancy mapping which is essential for aerial robots. This paper presents a novel 3-D dynamic occupancy mapping algorithm called DS-K3DOM. We first establish a Bayesian method to sequentially update occupancy maps for a stream of measurements based on the random finite set theory. Then, we approximate it with particles in the Dempster-Shafer domain to enable real-time computation. Moreover, the algorithm applies kernel-based inference with Dirichlet basic belief assignment to enable dense mapping from sparse measurements. The efficacy of the proposed algorithm is demonstrated through simulations and real experiments.
abstract_zh: 占用地图已被广泛用于表示自主机器人执行导航和操纵等任务的周围环境。虽然 2D 环境中的占用映射已得到充分研究，但很少有适合 3D 动态占用映射的方法，而这对于空中机器人至关重要。本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 动态占用映射算法，称为 DS-K3DOM。我们首先建立一种贝叶斯方法，根据随机有限集理论顺序更新测量流的占用图。然后，我们用 Dempster-Shafer 域中的粒子对其进行近似，以实现实时计算。此外，该算法应用基于内核的推理和狄利克雷基本信念分配，以实现稀疏测量的密集映射。通过仿真和实际实验证明了该算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DS-K3DOM的3-D动态占位映射算法，用于自主飞行器的实时环境建模。
AI.motivation: 现有2-D占位映射方法难以满足飞行机器人对3-D动态环境实时建模的需求，亟需高效算法支持。
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯理论与Dempster-Shafer证据理论，采用粒子近似实现实时计算，并通过核推理与Dirichlet基本信任分配处理稀疏测量数据。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实物实验验证了算法在动态环境下的有效性与实时性。
AI.conclusion: DS-K3DOM算法为飞行机器人提供了高精度、实时的3-D动态环境建模解决方案。

authors_text: Jinlong Li,Zequn Jie,Xu Wang,Xiaolin Wei,Lin Ma
title: Expansion and Shrinkage of Localization for Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督语义分割的本地化扩展和收缩
abstract: Generating precise class-aware pseudo ground-truths, a.k.a, class activation maps (CAMs), is essential for weakly-supervised semantic segmentation. The original CAM method usually produces incomplete and inaccurate localization maps. To tackle with this issue, this paper proposes an Expansion and Shrinkage scheme based on the offset learning in the deformable convolution, to sequentially improve the recall and precision of the located object in the two respective stages. In the Expansion stage, an offset learning branch in a deformable convolution layer, referred as "expansion sampler" seeks for sampling increasingly less discriminative object regions, driven by an inverse supervision signal that maximizes image-level classification loss. The located more complete object in the Expansion stage is then gradually narrowed down to the final object region during the Shrinkage stage. In the Shrinkage stage, the offset learning branch of another deformable convolution layer, referred as "shrinkage sampler", is introduced to exclude the false positive background regions attended in the Expansion stage to improve the precision of the localization maps. We conduct various experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 to well demonstrate the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art methods for weakly-supervised semantic segmentation. Code will be made publicly available here https://github.com/TyroneLi/ESOL_WSSS.
summary: Generating precise class-aware pseudo ground-truths, a.k.a, class activation maps (CAMs), is essential for weakly-supervised semantic segmentation. The original CAM method usually produces incomplete and inaccurate localization maps. To tackle with this issue, this paper proposes an Expansion and Shrinkage scheme based on the offset learning in the deformable convolution, to sequentially improve the recall and precision of the located object in the two respective stages. In the Expansion stage, an offset learning branch in a deformable convolution layer, referred as "expansion sampler" seeks for sampling increasingly less discriminative object regions, driven by an inverse supervision signal that maximizes image-level classification loss. The located more complete object in the Expansion stage is then gradually narrowed down to the final object region during the Shrinkage stage. In the Shrinkage stage, the offset learning branch of another deformable convolution layer, referred as "shrinkage sampler", is introduced to exclude the false positive background regions attended in the Expansion stage to improve the precision of the localization maps. We conduct various experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 to well demonstrate the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art methods for weakly-supervised semantic segmentation. Code will be made publicly available here https://github.com/TyroneLi/ESOL_WSSS.
abstract_zh: 生成精确的类感知伪地面事实，又名类激活图（CAM），对于弱监督语义分割至关重要。原始的 CAM 方法通常会生成不完整且不准确的定位图。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于可变形卷积中的偏移学习的扩展和收缩方案，以依次提高两个阶段中定位对象的召回率和精度。在扩展阶段，可变形卷积层中的偏移学习分支（称为“扩展采样器”）寻求对越来越不具有辨别力的对象区域进行采样，由最大化图像级分类损失的逆监督信号驱动。在扩展阶段找到的更完整的对象然后在收缩阶段逐渐缩小到最终的对象区域。在收缩阶段，引入另一个可变形卷积层的偏移学习分支，称为“收缩采样器”，以排除在扩展阶段出现的假阳性背景区域，以提高定位图的精度。我们在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 MS COCO 2014 上进行了各种实验，以很好地证明我们的方法相对于其他最先进的弱监督语义分割方法的优越性。代码将在此处公开发布：https://github.com/TyroneLi/ESOL_WSSS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可变形卷积的扩张与收缩方案，用于改进弱监督语义分割中的类别激活图（CAM）定位精度。
AI.motivation: 传统CAM方法生成的定位图存在不完整和不准确的问题，需通过分阶段优化提升召回率和精确率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段策略：扩张阶段通过反向监督信号学习更完整的物体区域，收缩阶段剔除误检背景区域，分别由可变形卷积的偏移学习分支实现。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和MS COCO 2014数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，优于现有最先进方法。

search_text: Expansion and Shrinkage of Localization for Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation 弱监督语义分割的本地化扩展和收缩 Generating precise class-aware pseudo ground-truths, a.k.a, class activation maps (CAMs), is essential for weakly-supervised semantic segmentation. The original CAM method usually produces incomplete and inaccurate localization maps. To tackle with this issue, this paper proposes an Expansion and Shrinkage scheme based on the offset learning in the deformable convolution, to sequentially improve the recall and precision of the located object in the two respective stages. In the Expansion stage, an offset learning branch in a deformable convolution layer, referred as "expansion sampler" seeks for sampling increasingly less discriminative object regions, driven by an inverse supervision signal that maximizes image-level classification loss. The located more complete object in the Expansion stage is then gradually narrowed down to the final object region during the Shrinkage stage. In the Shrinkage stage, the offset learning branch of another deformable convolution layer, referred as "shrinkage sampler", is introduced to exclude the false positive background regions attended in the Expansion stage to improve the precision of the localization maps. We conduct various experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012 and MS COCO 2014 to well demonstrate the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art methods for weakly-supervised semantic segmentation. Code will be made publicly available here https://github.com/TyroneLi/ESOL_WSSS. 生成精确的类感知伪地面事实，又名类激活图（CAM），对于弱监督语义分割至关重要。原始的 CAM 方法通常会生成不完整且不准确的定位图。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种基于可变形卷积中的偏移学习的扩展和收缩方案，以依次提高两个阶段中定位对象的召回率和精度。在扩展阶段，可变形卷积层中的偏移学习分支（称为“扩展采样器”）寻求对越来越不具有辨别力的对象区域进行采样，由最大化图像级分类损失的逆监督信号驱动。在扩展阶段找到的更完整的对象然后在收缩阶段逐渐缩小到最终的对象区域。在收缩阶段，引入另一个可变形卷积层的偏移学习分支，称为“收缩采样器”，以排除在扩展阶段出现的假阳性背景区域，以提高定位图的精度。我们在 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 MS COCO 2014 上进行了各种实验，以很好地证明我们的方法相对于其他最先进的弱监督语义分割方法的优越性。代码将在此处公开发布：https://github.com/TyroneLi/ESOL_WSSS。 本文提出一种基于可变形卷积的扩张与收缩方案，用于改进弱监督语义分割中的类别激活图（CAM）定位精度。 Jinlong Li,Zequn Jie,Xu Wang,Xiaolin Wei,Lin Ma cs.CV

title: Possible Stories: Evaluating Situated Commonsense Reasoning under Multiple Possible Scenarios
title_zh: 可能的故事：评估多种可能场景下的情境常识推理
abstract: The possible consequences for the same context may vary depending on the situation we refer to. However, current studies in natural language processing do not focus on situated commonsense reasoning under multiple possible scenarios. This study frames this task by asking multiple questions with the same set of possible endings as candidate answers, given a short story text. Our resulting dataset, Possible Stories, consists of more than 4.5K questions over 1.3K story texts in English. We discover that even current strong pretrained language models struggle to answer the questions consistently, highlighting that the highest accuracy in an unsupervised setting (60.2%) is far behind human accuracy (92.5%). Through a comparison with existing datasets, we observe that the questions in our dataset contain minimal annotation artifacts in the answer options. In addition, our dataset includes examples that require counterfactual reasoning, as well as those requiring readers' reactions and fictional information, suggesting that our dataset can serve as a challenging testbed for future studies on situated commonsense reasoning.
summary: The possible consequences for the same context may vary depending on the situation we refer to. However, current studies in natural language processing do not focus on situated commonsense reasoning under multiple possible scenarios. This study frames this task by asking multiple questions with the same set of possible endings as candidate answers, given a short story text. Our resulting dataset, Possible Stories, consists of more than 4.5K questions over 1.3K story texts in English. We discover that even current strong pretrained language models struggle to answer the questions consistently, highlighting that the highest accuracy in an unsupervised setting (60.2%) is far behind human accuracy (92.5%). Through a comparison with existing datasets, we observe that the questions in our dataset contain minimal annotation artifacts in the answer options. In addition, our dataset includes examples that require counterfactual reasoning, as well as those requiring readers' reactions and fictional information, suggesting that our dataset can serve as a challenging testbed for future studies on situated commonsense reasoning.
abstract_zh: 根据我们所指的情况，同一上下文可能产生的后果可能会有所不同。然而，当前自然语言处理的研究并不关注多种可能场景下的情境常识推理。这项研究通过在给定短篇故事文本的情况下提出多个问题来框架这项任务，这些问题具有与候选答案相同的一组可能结局。我们生成的数据集“可能的故事”包含 1,300 个英文故事文本中的 4,500 多个问题。我们发现，即使是当前强大的预训练语言模型也很难一致地回答问题，这凸显出无监督环境中的最高准确率 (60.2%) 远远落后于人类准确率 (92.5%)。通过与现有数据集的比较，我们观察到数据集中的问题在答案选项中包含最少的注释工件。此外，我们的数据集包括需要反事实推理的示例，以及需要读者反应和虚构信息的示例，这表明我们的数据集可以作为未来情境常识推理研究的具有挑战性的测试平台。

AI.tldr: 构建并评估一个用于多情境常识推理的数据集Possible Stories，通过分析不同情境下的故事结尾来测试模型的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对多情境下常识推理的关注，而实际情境中同一事件可能有多种后果，需构建专门数据集以推动该领域研究。
AI.method: 通过构建包含4.5K个问题和1.3K个故事文本的数据集，每个问题提供多个可能的结尾作为候选答案，评估模型在不同情境下的推理能力。
AI.result: 实验显示，当前最强模型在无监督设置下准确率为60.2%，远低于人类水平（92.5%），且数据集包含反事实推理等复杂例子，减少标注偏差。
AI.conclusion: Possible Stories数据集为未来情境常识推理研究提供了挑战性基准，凸显当前模型在复杂情境理解上的不足。

title: Game-theoretic Objective Space Planning
title_zh: 博弈论目标空间规划
comment: Submitted to 2024 International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS 2024)
comments: Submitted to 2024 International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS 2024)
abstract: Generating competitive strategies and performing continuous motion planning simultaneously in an adversarial setting is a challenging problem. In addition, understanding the intent of other agents is crucial to deploying autonomous systems in adversarial multi-agent environments. Existing approaches either discretize agent action by grouping similar control inputs, sacrificing performance in motion planning, or plan in uninterpretable latent spaces, producing hard-to-understand agent behaviors. Furthermore, the most popular policy optimization frameworks do not recognize the long-term effect of actions and become myopic. This paper proposes an agent action discretization method via abstraction that provides clear intentions of agent actions, an efficient offline pipeline of agent population synthesis, and a planning strategy using counterfactual regret minimization with function approximation. Finally, we experimentally validate our findings on scaled autonomous vehicles in a head-to-head racing setting. We demonstrate that using the proposed framework significantly improves learning, improves the win rate against different opponents, and the improvements can be transferred to unseen opponents in an unseen environment.
summary: Generating competitive strategies and performing continuous motion planning simultaneously in an adversarial setting is a challenging problem. In addition, understanding the intent of other agents is crucial to deploying autonomous systems in adversarial multi-agent environments. Existing approaches either discretize agent action by grouping similar control inputs, sacrificing performance in motion planning, or plan in uninterpretable latent spaces, producing hard-to-understand agent behaviors. Furthermore, the most popular policy optimization frameworks do not recognize the long-term effect of actions and become myopic. This paper proposes an agent action discretization method via abstraction that provides clear intentions of agent actions, an efficient offline pipeline of agent population synthesis, and a planning strategy using counterfactual regret minimization with function approximation. Finally, we experimentally validate our findings on scaled autonomous vehicles in a head-to-head racing setting. We demonstrate that using the proposed framework significantly improves learning, improves the win rate against different opponents, and the improvements can be transferred to unseen opponents in an unseen environment.
abstract_zh: 在对抗性环境中同时生成竞争策略和执行连续运动规划是一个具有挑战性的问题。此外，了解其他代理的意图对于在对抗性多代理环境中部署自治系统至关重要。现有的方法要么通过对相似的控制输入进行分组来离散智能体的行为，从而牺牲运动规划的性能，要么在无法解释的潜在空间中进行规划，从而产生难以理解的智能体行为。此外，最流行的政策优化框架无法认识到行动的长期影响，因而变得短视。本文提出了一种通过抽象的代理行为离散化方法，该方法提供了代理行为的明确意图、代理群体合成的高效离线管道以及使用函数逼近的反事实遗憾最小化的规划策略。最后，我们在面对面的赛车环境中通过实验验证了我们在规模化自动驾驶汽车上的发现。我们证明，使用所提出的框架可以显着改善学习，提高针对不同对手的获胜率，并且可以将改进转移到看不见的环境中看不见的对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论的对抗环境下自主系统策略规划方法，解决运动规划与竞争策略生成的同步问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在离散化动作时牺牲运动规划性能，或使用不可解释的潜在空间，且主流策略优化框架缺乏长期行动效果考量。
AI.method: 通过抽象实现动作离散化以明确意图，构建高效离线群体合成流程，结合反事实遗憾最小化与函数逼近进行规划。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶头对头竞速实验中显著提升学习效率与胜率，且改进效果可迁移至新对手与环境。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡策略可解释性与规划性能，为对抗多智能体环境提供可行解决方案。

This paper proposes an agent action discretization method via abstraction that provides clear intentions of agent actions, an efficient offline pipeline of agent population synthesis, and a planning strategy using counterfactual regret minimization with function approximation. Finally, we experimentally validate our findings on scaled autonomous vehicles in a head-to-head racing setting. We demonstrate that using the proposed framework significantly improves learning, improves the win rate against different opponents, and the improvements can be transferred to unseen opponents in an unseen environment. 在对抗性环境中同时生成竞争策略和执行连续运动规划是一个具有挑战性的问题。此外，了解其他代理的意图对于在对抗性多代理环境中部署自治系统至关重要。现有的方法要么通过对相似的控制输入进行分组来离散智能体的行为，从而牺牲运动规划的性能，要么在无法解释的潜在空间中进行规划，从而产生难以理解的智能体行为。此外，最流行的政策优化框架无法认识到行动的长期影响，因而变得短视。本文提出了一种通过抽象的代理行为离散化方法，该方法提供了代理行为的明确意图、代理群体合成的高效离线管道以及使用函数逼近的反事实遗憾最小化的规划策略。最后，我们在面对面的赛车环境中通过实验验证了我们在规模化自动驾驶汽车上的发现。我们证明，使用所提出的框架可以显着改善学习，提高针对不同对手的获胜率，并且可以将改进转移到看不见的环境中看不见的对手。 本文提出一种基于博弈论的对抗环境下自主系统策略规划方法，解决运动规划与竞争策略生成的同步问题。 Hongrui Zheng,Zhijun Zhuang,Johannes Betz,Rahul Mangharam cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Jacky Liang,Wenlong Huang,Fei Xia,Peng Xu,Karol Hausman,Brian Ichter,Pete Florence,Andy Zeng
title: Code as Policies: Language Model Programs for Embodied Control
title_zh: 代码即策略：用于具体控制的语言模型程序
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) trained on code completion have been shown to be capable of synthesizing simple Python programs from docstrings [1]. We find that these code-writing LLMs can be re-purposed to write robot policy code, given natural language commands. Specifically, policy code can express functions or feedback loops that process perception outputs (e.g.,from object detectors [2], [3]) and parameterize control primitive APIs. When provided as input several example language commands (formatted as comments) followed by corresponding policy code (via few-shot prompting), LLMs can take in new commands and autonomously re-compose API calls to generate new policy code respectively. By chaining classic logic structures and referencing third-party libraries (e.g., NumPy, Shapely) to perform arithmetic, LLMs used in this way can write robot policies that (i) exhibit spatial-geometric reasoning, (ii) generalize to new instructions, and (iii) prescribe precise values (e.g., velocities) to ambiguous descriptions ("faster") depending on context (i.e., behavioral commonsense). This paper presents code as policies: a robot-centric formulation of language model generated programs (LMPs) that can represent reactive policies (e.g., impedance controllers), as well as waypoint-based policies (vision-based pick and place, trajectory-based control), demonstrated across multiple real robot platforms. Central to our approach is prompting hierarchical code-gen (recursively defining undefined functions), which can write more complex code and also improves state-of-the-art to solve 39.8% of problems on the HumanEval [1] benchmark. Code and videos are available at https://code-as-policies.github.io
summary: Large language models (LLMs) trained on code completion have been shown to be capable of synthesizing simple Python programs from docstrings [1]. We find that these code-writing LLMs can be re-purposed to write robot policy code, given natural language commands. Specifically, policy code can express functions or feedback loops that process perception outputs (e.g.,from object detectors [2], [3]) and parameterize control primitive APIs. When provided as input several example language commands (formatted as comments) followed by corresponding policy code (via few-shot prompting), LLMs can take in new commands and autonomously re-compose API calls to generate new policy code respectively. By chaining classic logic structures and referencing third-party libraries (e.g., NumPy, Shapely) to perform arithmetic, LLMs used in this way can write robot policies that (i) exhibit spatial-geometric reasoning, (ii) generalize to new instructions, and (iii) prescribe precise values (e.g., velocities) to ambiguous descriptions ("faster") depending on context (i.e., behavioral commonsense). This paper presents code as policies: a robot-centric formulation of language model generated programs (LMPs) that can represent reactive policies (e.g., impedance controllers), as well as waypoint-based policies (vision-based pick and place, trajectory-based control), demonstrated across multiple real robot platforms. Central to our approach is prompting hierarchical code-gen (recursively defining undefined functions), which can write more complex code and also improves state-of-the-art to solve 39.8% of problems on the HumanEval [1] benchmark. Code and videos are available at https://code-as-policies.github.io
abstract_zh: 经过代码补全训练的大型语言模型 (LLM) 已被证明能够从文档字符串合成简单的 Python 程序 [1]。我们发现，在给定自然语言命令的情况下，这些代码编写法学硕士可以重新用于编写机器人策略代码。具体来说，策略代码可以表达处理感知输出（例如，来自对象检测器 [2]、[3]）并参数化控制原语 API 的函数或反馈循环。当提供几个示例语言命令（格式为注释）作为输入，后跟相应的策略代码（通过几次提示）时，LLM 可以接受新命令并自主重新组合 API 调用以分别生成新的策略代码。通过链接经典逻辑结构并引用第三方库（例如 NumPy、Shapely）来执行算术，以这种方式使用的法学硕士可以编写机器人策略，这些策略（i）表现出空间几何推理，（ii）泛化为新指令，以及（iii）根据上下文（即行为常识）为模糊描述（“更快”）规定精确值（例如速度）。本文提出了代码即策略：以机器人为中心的语言模型生成程序（LMP）的制定，可以表示反应性策略（例如阻抗控制器）以及基于路径点的策略（基于视觉的拾取和放置、基于轨迹的控制），并在多个真实的机器人平台上进行了演示。我们方法的核心是促进分层代码生成（递归定义未定义的函数），它可以编写更复杂的代码，还可以提高最先进的水平，以解决 HumanEval [1] 基准测试中 39.8% 的问题。代码和视频可在 https://code-as-policies.github.io 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过大语言模型（LLM）将自然语言指令转化为机器人控制策略代码，实现具身智能体的自主决策与控制。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人控制策略依赖人工编码，难以灵活适应复杂指令。LLM在代码生成任务中的表现启发了将其用于自动化生成机器人策略代码的可能性。
AI.method: 通过少样本提示（few-shot prompting）向LLM输入自然语言指令与对应策略代码示例，利用递归函数定义和第三方库调用生成可执行的机器人控制代码。
AI.result: LLM生成的策略代码在HumanEval基准测试中解决39.8%的问题，并在多类真实机器人平台上实现了空间几何推理、指令泛化和模糊描述处理等能力。
AI.conclusion: 代码即策略（Code as Policies）框架证明了LLM可直接生成复杂机器人控制逻辑，为具身人工智能提供了新的程序化实现范式。

authors_text: Sedrick Scott Keh,Kevin Lu,Varun Gangal,Steven Y. Feng,Harsh Jhamtani,Malihe Alikhani,Eduard Hovy
title: PINEAPPLE: Personifying INanimate Entities by Acquiring Parallel Personification data for Learning Enhanced generation
title_zh: PINEAPPLE：通过获取并行拟人化数据来拟人化无生命实体以进行学习增强生成
comment: Accepted to COLING 2022; official Github repo at https://github.com/sedrickkeh/PINEAPPLE
comments: Accepted to COLING 2022; official Github repo at https://github.com/sedrickkeh/PINEAPPLE
abstract: A personification is a figure of speech that endows inanimate entities with properties and actions typically seen as requiring animacy. In this paper, we explore the task of personification generation. To this end, we propose PINEAPPLE: Personifying INanimate Entities by Acquiring Parallel Personification data for Learning Enhanced generation. We curate a corpus of personifications called PersonifCorp, together with automatically generated de-personified literalizations of these personifications. We demonstrate the usefulness of this parallel corpus by training a seq2seq model to personify a given literal input. Both automatic and human evaluations show that fine-tuning with PersonifCorp leads to significant gains in personification-related qualities such as animacy and interestingness. A detailed qualitative analysis also highlights key strengths and imperfections of PINEAPPLE over baselines, demonstrating a strong ability to generate diverse and creative personifications that enhance the overall appeal of a sentence.
summary: A personification is a figure of speech that endows inanimate entities with properties and actions typically seen as requiring animacy. In this paper, we explore the task of personification generation. To this end, we propose PINEAPPLE: Personifying INanimate Entities by Acquiring Parallel Personification data for Learning Enhanced generation. We curate a corpus of personifications called PersonifCorp, together with automatically generated de-personified literalizations of these personifications. We demonstrate the usefulness of this parallel corpus by training a seq2seq model to personify a given literal input. Both automatic and human evaluations show that fine-tuning with PersonifCorp leads to significant gains in personification-related qualities such as animacy and interestingness. A detailed qualitative analysis also highlights key strengths and imperfections of PINEAPPLE over baselines, demonstrating a strong ability to generate diverse and creative personifications that enhance the overall appeal of a sentence.
abstract_zh: 拟人化是一种修辞手法，赋予无生命实体通常被视为需要生命的属性和行为。在本文中，我们探讨了拟人化生成的任务。为此，我们提出了 PINEAPPLE：通过获取并行拟人化数据以进行学习增强生成来拟人化无生命实体。我们策划了一个名为 PersonifCorp 的拟人语料库，以及自动生成的这些拟人化的非拟人化字面化。我们通过训练 seq2seq 模型来拟人化给定的文字输入，展示了该并行语料库的有用性。自动评估和人工评估都表明，使用 PersonifCorp 进行微调可以显着提高与拟人化相关的品质，例如活力和趣味性。详细的定性分析还强调了 PINEAPPLE 相对于基线的主要优势和缺陷，展示了生成多样化和创造性拟人化的强大能力，从而增强了句子的整体吸引力。

AI.tldr: 本论文的主要任务是开发一种生成拟人化句子的方法，通过构建平行语料库提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在拟人化生成任务中表现不足，缺乏高质量的平行语料库支持，需通过构建专门数据集提升生成质量。
AI.method: 构建包含拟人化句子及其字面化版本的平行语料库PersonifCorp，并训练seq2seq模型进行微调，以生成更生动的拟人化文本。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用PersonifCorp微调后，模型在拟人化相关指标上显著提升，生成内容更生动有趣。
AI.conclusion: PINEAPPLE方法在生成多样且有创意的拟人化句子方面表现优异，但仍有改进空间。

title: Computing Abductive Explanations for Boosted Trees
title_zh: 计算提升树的归纳解释
abstract: Boosted trees is a dominant ML model, exhibiting high accuracy. However, boosted trees are hardly intelligible, and this is a problem whenever they are used in safety-critical applications. Indeed, in such a context, rigorous explanations of the predictions made are expected. Recent work have shown how subset-minimal abductive explanations can be derived for boosted trees, using automated reasoning techniques. However, the generation of such well-founded explanations is intractable in the general case. To improve the scalability of their generation, we introduce the notion of tree-specific explanation for a boosted tree. We show that tree-specific explanations are abductive explanations that can be computed in polynomial time. We also explain how to derive a subset-minimal abductive explanation from a tree-specific explanation. Experiments on various datasets show the computational benefits of leveraging tree-specific explanations for deriving subset-minimal abductive explanations.
summary: Boosted trees is a dominant ML model, exhibiting high accuracy. However, boosted trees are hardly intelligible, and this is a problem whenever they are used in safety-critical applications. Indeed, in such a context, rigorous explanations of the predictions made are expected. Recent work have shown how subset-minimal abductive explanations can be derived for boosted trees, using automated reasoning techniques. However, the generation of such well-founded explanations is intractable in the general case. To improve the scalability of their generation, we introduce the notion of tree-specific explanation for a boosted tree. We show that tree-specific explanations are abductive explanations that can be computed in polynomial time. We also explain how to derive a subset-minimal abductive explanation from a tree-specific explanation. Experiments on various datasets show the computational benefits of leveraging tree-specific explanations for deriving subset-minimal abductive explanations.
abstract_zh: 提升树是主要的机器学习模型，具有很高的准确性。然而，提升树很难理解，每当它们用于安全关键的应用程序时，这都是一个问题。事实上，在这样的背景下，人们期望对所做的预测进行严格的解释。最近的工作表明，如何使用自动推理技术为提升树导出子集最小溯因解释。然而，在一般情况下，产生这种有根据的解释是很困难的。为了提高其生成的可扩展性，我们引入了提升树的树特定解释的概念。我们证明，特定于树的解释是可以在多项式时间内计算的溯因解释。我们还解释了如何从特定于树的解释导出子集最小溯因解释。对各种数据集的实验表明，利用特定于树的解释来导出子集最小溯因解释的计算优势。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为提升树模型生成可解释的归纳解释，解决其在安全关键应用中可解释性差的问题，并提高解释生成的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 提升树模型虽准确率高，但缺乏可解释性，难以满足安全关键场景对预测解释的严格要求。现有子集极小归纳解释方法计算复杂度高，需更高效方案。
AI.method: 提出树特定解释概念，通过多项式时间算法计算该解释，并进一步推导出子集极小归纳解释。
AI.result: 实验表明，利用树特定解释生成子集极小解释的计算效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 树特定解释为提升树模型提供了高效且严谨的解释方法，在保证解释质量的同时降低了计算复杂度。

authors_text: Zimian Wei,Hengyue Pan,Lujun Li,Menglong Lu,Xin Niu,Peijie Dong,Dongsheng Li
title: DMFormer: Closing the Gap Between CNN and Vision Transformers
title_zh: DMFormer：缩小 CNN 和 Vision Transformer 之间的差距
abstract: Vision transformers have shown excellent performance in computer vision tasks. As the computation cost of their self-attention mechanism is expensive, recent works tried to replace the self-attention mechanism in vision transformers with convolutional operations, which is more efficient with built-in inductive bias. However, these efforts either ignore multi-level features or lack dynamic prosperity, leading to sub-optimal performance. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Multi-level Attention mechanism (DMA), which captures different patterns of input images by multiple kernel sizes and enables input-adaptive weights with a gating mechanism. Based on DMA, we present an efficient backbone network named DMFormer. DMFormer adopts the overall architecture of vision transformers, while replacing the self-attention mechanism with our proposed DMA. Extensive experimental results on ImageNet-1K and ADE20K datasets demonstrated that DMFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance, which outperforms similar-sized vision transformers(ViTs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs).
summary: Vision transformers have shown excellent performance in computer vision tasks. As the computation cost of their self-attention mechanism is expensive, recent works tried to replace the self-attention mechanism in vision transformers with convolutional operations, which is more efficient with built-in inductive bias. However, these efforts either ignore multi-level features or lack dynamic prosperity, leading to sub-optimal performance. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Multi-level Attention mechanism (DMA), which captures different patterns of input images by multiple kernel sizes and enables input-adaptive weights with a gating mechanism. Based on DMA, we present an efficient backbone network named DMFormer. DMFormer adopts the overall architecture of vision transformers, while replacing the self-attention mechanism with our proposed DMA. Extensive experimental results on ImageNet-1K and ADE20K datasets demonstrated that DMFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance, which outperforms similar-sized vision transformers(ViTs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs).
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器在计算机视觉任务中表现出了出色的性能。由于自注意力机制的计算成本昂贵，最近的工作尝试用卷积运算取代视觉变换器中的自注意力机制，这在内置归纳偏置的情况下效率更高。然而，这些努力要么忽视了多层次特征，要么缺乏动态繁荣，导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种动态多级注意力机制（DMA），它通过多个内核大小捕获输入图像的不同模式，并通过门控机制实现输入自适应权重。基于DMA，我们提出了一个高效的骨干网络，名为DMFormer。 DMFormer 采用视觉 Transformer 的整体架构，同时用我们提出的 DMA 取代自注意力机制。 ImageNet-1K 和 ADE20K 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，DMFormer 实现了最先进的性能，优于类似大小的视觉变换器 (ViT) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMFormer，通过动态多级注意力机制（DMA）替代视觉Transformer中的自注意力机制，以提升效率并弥补CNN与视觉Transformer之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在用卷积替代自注意力时，要么忽略多级特征，要么缺乏动态适应性，导致性能不足。需设计兼顾多尺度特征提取与动态权重分配的机制。
AI.method: 提出动态多级注意力机制（DMA），通过多核尺寸捕捉不同模式，并利用门控机制实现输入自适应权重；基于DMA构建DMFormer网络，保留视觉Transformer架构但替换自注意力模块。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K和ADE20K数据集上，DMFormer在相似规模下超越现有视觉Transformer和CNN，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: DMFormer通过DMA机制有效融合CNN的归纳偏置与Transformer的全局建模能力，为高效视觉模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Hongji Liu,Linwei Zheng,Xiaoyang Yan,Zhenhua Xu,Bohuan Xue,Yang Yu,Ming Liu
title: Monocular Camera Mapping with Pose-Guided Optimization: Enhancing Marking-Level HD Map Accuracy
title_zh: 具有姿势引导优化的单目相机映射：提高标记级高清地图精度
abstract: Marking-level high-definition maps (HD maps) are of great significance for autonomous vehicles (AVs), especially in large-scale, appearance-changing scenarios where AVs rely on markings for localization and lanes for safe driving. In this paper, we propose a pose-guided optimization framework for automatically building a marking-level HD map with accurate markings positions using a simple sensor setup (one or more monocular cameras). We optimize the position of the marking corners to fit the result of marking segmentation and simultaneously optimize the inverse perspective mapping (IPM) matrix of the corresponding camera to obtain an accurate transformation from the front view image to the bird's-eye view (BEV). In the quantitative evaluation, the built HD map almost attains centimeter-level accuracy. The accuracy of the optimized IPM matrix is similar to that of the manual calibration. The method can also be generalized to build HD maps in a broader sense by increasing the types of recognizable markings. The supplementary materials and videos are available at http://liuhongji.site/V2HDM-Mono/.
summary: Marking-level high-definition maps (HD maps) are of great significance for autonomous vehicles (AVs), especially in large-scale, appearance-changing scenarios where AVs rely on markings for localization and lanes for safe driving. In this paper, we propose a pose-guided optimization framework for automatically building a marking-level HD map with accurate markings positions using a simple sensor setup (one or more monocular cameras). We optimize the position of the marking corners to fit the result of marking segmentation and simultaneously optimize the inverse perspective mapping (IPM) matrix of the corresponding camera to obtain an accurate transformation from the front view image to the bird's-eye view (BEV). In the quantitative evaluation, the built HD map almost attains centimeter-level accuracy. The accuracy of the optimized IPM matrix is similar to that of the manual calibration. The method can also be generalized to build HD maps in a broader sense by increasing the types of recognizable markings. The supplementary materials and videos are available at http://liuhongji.site/V2HDM-Mono/.
abstract_zh: 标记级高清地图对于自动驾驶汽车具有重要意义，尤其是在大规模、外观变化的场景下，自动驾驶汽车依靠标记进行定位和车道安全行驶。在本文中，我们提出了一种姿势引导优化框架，用于使用简单的传感器设置（一个或多个单目相机）自动构建具有精确标记位置的标记级高清地图。我们优化标记角的位置以适应标记分割的结果，同时优化相应相机的逆透视映射（IPM）矩阵，以获得从前视图图像到鸟瞰图（BEV）的精确转换。在定量评价中，所构建的高精地图几乎达到了厘米级的精度。优化后的IPM矩阵的精度与手动标定的精度相似。该方法还可以推广到通过增加可识别标记的类型来构建更广泛意义上的高清地图。补充材料和视频可在http://liuhongji.site/V2HDM-Mono/获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目相机的位姿引导优化框架，用于自动构建厘米级精度的标记级高清地图（HD地图）。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在大规模动态场景中依赖高精度地图进行定位和车道保持，但传统方法依赖复杂传感器或人工标定，难以适应环境变化。
AI.method: 通过优化标记分割结果中的标记角点位置，并同步优化相机逆透视映射矩阵（IPM），实现从路面视角到鸟瞰图的精确转换。
AI.result: 构建的HD地图达到厘米级精度，IPM矩阵精度接近人工标定水平，且方法可通过扩展可识别标记类型推广至更广泛场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了单目相机结合位姿引导优化在自动构建高精度HD地图中的有效性，为自动驾驶提供了轻量化、高适应性的地图构建方案。

ai_content_json.result: 构建的HD地图达到厘米级精度，IPM矩阵精度接近人工标定水平，且方法可通过扩展可识别标记类型推广至更广泛场景。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法验证了单目相机结合位姿引导优化在自动构建高精度HD地图中的有效性，为自动驾驶提供了轻量化、高适应性的地图构建方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目相机的位姿引导优化框架，用于自动构建厘米级精度的标记级高清地图（HD地图）。
motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在大规模动态场景中依赖高精度地图进行定位和车道保持，但传统方法依赖复杂传感器或人工标定，难以适应环境变化。
