conclusion: 该方法验证了单目相机结合位姿引导优化在自动构建高精度HD地图中的有效性，为自动驾驶提供了轻量化、高适应性的地图构建方案。
search_text: Monocular Camera Mapping with Pose-Guided Optimization: Enhancing Marking-Level HD Map Accuracy 具有姿势引导优化的单目相机映射：提高标记级高清地图精度 Marking-level high-definition maps (HD maps) are of great significance for autonomous vehicles (AVs), especially in large-scale, appearance-changing scenarios where AVs rely on markings for localization and lanes for safe driving. In this paper, we propose a pose-guided optimization framework for automatically building a marking-level HD map with accurate markings positions using a simple sensor setup (one or more monocular cameras). We optimize the position of the marking corners to fit the result of marking segmentation and simultaneously optimize the inverse perspective mapping (IPM) matrix of the corresponding camera to obtain an accurate transformation from the front view image to the bird's-eye view (BEV). In the quantitative evaluation, the built HD map almost attains centimeter-level accuracy. The accuracy of the optimized IPM matrix is similar to that of the manual calibration. The method can also be generalized to build HD maps in a broader sense by increasing the types of recognizable markings. The supplementary materials and videos are available at http://liuhongji.site/V2HDM-Mono/. 标记级高清地图对于自动驾驶汽车具有重要意义，尤其是在大规模、外观变化的场景下，自动驾驶汽车依靠标记进行定位和车道安全行驶。在本文中，我们提出了一种姿势引导优化框架，用于使用简单的传感器设置（一个或多个单目相机）自动构建具有精确标记位置的标记级高清地图。我们优化标记角的位置以适应标记分割的结果，同时优化相应相机的逆透视映射（IPM）矩阵，以获得从前视图图像到鸟瞰图（BEV）的精确转换。在定量评价中，所构建的高精地图几乎达到了厘米级的精度。优化后的IPM矩阵的精度与手动标定的精度相似。该方法还可以推广到通过增加可识别标记的类型来构建更广泛意义上的高清地图。补充材料和视频可在http://liuhongji.site/V2HDM-Mono/获取。 本文提出一种基于单目相机的位姿引导优化框架，用于自动构建厘米级精度的标记级高清地图（HD地图）。 Hongji Liu,Linwei Zheng,Xiaoyang Yan,Zhenhua Xu,Bohuan Xue,Yang Yu,Ming Liu cs.RO

authors_text: Yongtao Wu,Zhenyu Zhu,Fanghui Liu,Grigorios G Chrysos,Volkan Cevher
title: Extrapolation and Spectral Bias of Neural Nets with Hadamard Product: a Polynomial Net Study
title_zh: 带哈达玛积的神经网络的外推和谱偏差：一项多项式网络研究
abstract: Neural tangent kernel (NTK) is a powerful tool to analyze training dynamics of neural networks and their generalization bounds. The study on NTK has been devoted to typical neural network architectures, but it is incomplete for neural networks with Hadamard products (NNs-Hp), e.g., StyleGAN and polynomial neural networks (PNNs). In this work, we derive the finite-width NTK formulation for a special class of NNs-Hp, i.e., polynomial neural networks. We prove their equivalence to the kernel regression predictor with the associated NTK, which expands the application scope of NTK. Based on our results, we elucidate the separation of PNNs over standard neural networks with respect to extrapolation and spectral bias. Our two key insights are that when compared to standard neural networks, PNNs can fit more complicated functions in the extrapolation regime and admit a slower eigenvalue decay of the respective NTK, leading to a faster learning towards high-frequency functions. Besides, our theoretical results can be extended to other types of NNs-Hp, which expand the scope of our work. Our empirical results validate the separations in broader classes of NNs-Hp, which provide a good justification for a deeper understanding of neural architectures.
summary: Neural tangent kernel (NTK) is a powerful tool to analyze training dynamics of neural networks and their generalization bounds. The study on NTK has been devoted to typical neural network architectures, but it is incomplete for neural networks with Hadamard products (NNs-Hp), e.g., StyleGAN and polynomial neural networks (PNNs). In this work, we derive the finite-width NTK formulation for a special class of NNs-Hp, i.e., polynomial neural networks. We prove their equivalence to the kernel regression predictor with the associated NTK, which expands the application scope of NTK. Based on our results, we elucidate the separation of PNNs over standard neural networks with respect to extrapolation and spectral bias. Our two key insights are that when compared to standard neural networks, PNNs can fit more complicated functions in the extrapolation regime and admit a slower eigenvalue decay of the respective NTK, leading to a faster learning towards high-frequency functions. Besides, our theoretical results can be extended to other types of NNs-Hp, which expand the scope of our work. Our empirical results validate the separations in broader classes of NNs-Hp, which provide a good justification for a deeper understanding of neural architectures.
abstract_zh: 神经正切核（NTK）是分析神经网络训练动态及其泛化范围的强大工具。 NTK 的研究一直致力于典型的神经网络架构，但对于具有 Hadamard 产品（NNs-Hp）的神经网络（例如 StyleGAN 和多项式神经网络（PNNs））来说还不完整。在这项工作中，我们为一类特殊的 NN-Hp（即多项式神经网络）推导了有限宽度 NTK 公式。我们用相关的 NTK 证明了它们与核回归预测器的等价性，这扩展了 NTK 的应用范围。根据我们的结果，我们阐明了 PNN 与标准神经网络在外推和谱偏差方面的区别。我们的两个关键见解是，与标准神经网络相比，PNN 可以在外推机制中拟合更复杂的函数，并允许相应 NTK 的特征值衰减较慢，从而更快地学习高频函数。此外，我们的理论结果可以扩展到其他类型的 NNs-Hp，从而扩大了我们的工作范围。我们的实证结果验证了更广泛的 NNs-Hp 类别中的分离，这为更深入地理解神经架构提供了良好的理由。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有Hadamard积的神经网络（如多项式神经网络）的外推和谱偏置特性，通过神经切线核（NTK）理论分析其泛化能力与学习动态。
AI.motivation: 现有NTK理论主要针对传统神经网络架构，而对包含Hadamard积的网络（如StyleGAN、多项式神经网络）研究不足，需扩展NTK的应用范围并揭示其独特性质。
AI.method: 推导多项式神经网络的有限宽度NTK表达式，证明其等价于关联NTK的核回归预测器，并通过谱分析比较其与标准神经网络在谱偏置和外推能力上的差异。
AI.result: 多项式神经网络在外推场景下能拟合更复杂函数，其NTK特征值衰减更慢，从而更快学习高频函数；理论结果可推广至其他Hadamard积网络，实验验证了这一分离现象。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过理论与实验揭示了多项式神经网络相较于标准网络的优势，扩展了NTK理论的应用边界，为理解神经网络架构提供了新视角。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Mao,Yuefeng Chen,Ranjie Duan,Yao Zhu,Gege Qi,Shaokai Ye,Xiaodan Li,Rong Zhang,Hui Xue
title: Enhance the Visual Representation via Discrete Adversarial Training
title_zh: 通过离散对抗训练增强视觉表现
abstract: Adversarial Training (AT), which is commonly accepted as one of the most effective approaches defending against adversarial examples, can largely harm the standard performance, thus has limited usefulness on industrial-scale production and applications. Surprisingly, this phenomenon is totally opposite in Natural Language Processing (NLP) task, where AT can even benefit for generalization. We notice the merit of AT in NLP tasks could derive from the discrete and symbolic input space. For borrowing the advantage from NLP-style AT, we propose Discrete Adversarial Training (DAT). DAT leverages VQGAN to reform the image data to discrete text-like inputs, i.e. visual words. Then it minimizes the maximal risk on such discrete images with symbolic adversarial perturbations. We further give an explanation from the perspective of distribution to demonstrate the effectiveness of DAT. As a plug-and-play technique for enhancing the visual representation, DAT achieves significant improvement on multiple tasks including image classification, object detection and self-supervised learning. Especially, the model pre-trained with Masked Auto-Encoding (MAE) and fine-tuned by our DAT without extra data can get 31.40 mCE on ImageNet-C and 32.77% top-1 accuracy on Stylized-ImageNet, building the new state-of-the-art. The code will be available at https://github.com/alibaba/easyrobust.
summary: Adversarial Training (AT), which is commonly accepted as one of the most effective approaches defending against adversarial examples, can largely harm the standard performance, thus has limited usefulness on industrial-scale production and applications. Surprisingly, this phenomenon is totally opposite in Natural Language Processing (NLP) task, where AT can even benefit for generalization. We notice the merit of AT in NLP tasks could derive from the discrete and symbolic input space. For borrowing the advantage from NLP-style AT, we propose Discrete Adversarial Training (DAT). DAT leverages VQGAN to reform the image data to discrete text-like inputs, i.e. visual words. Then it minimizes the maximal risk on such discrete images with symbolic adversarial perturbations. We further give an explanation from the perspective of distribution to demonstrate the effectiveness of DAT. As a plug-and-play technique for enhancing the visual representation, DAT achieves significant improvement on multiple tasks including image classification, object detection and self-supervised learning. Especially, the model pre-trained with Masked Auto-Encoding (MAE) and fine-tuned by our DAT without extra data can get 31.40 mCE on ImageNet-C and 32.77% top-1 accuracy on Stylized-ImageNet, building the new state-of-the-art. The code will be available at https://github.com/alibaba/easyrobust.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练（AT）被普遍认为是防御对抗性例子的最有效方法之一，但它会在很大程度上损害标准性能，因此在工业规模生产和应用中的用处有限。令人惊讶的是，这种现象在自然语言处理（NLP）任务中完全相反，AT 甚至可以从泛化中受益。我们注意到 AT 在 NLP 任务中的优点可以源自离散和符号输入空间。为了借鉴 NLP 式 AT 的优势，我们提出了离散对抗训练（DAT）。 DAT 利用 VQGAN 将图像数据重组为离散的类似文本的输入，即视觉单词。然后，它通过象征性的对抗性扰动最小化此类离散图像的最大风险。我们进一步从分布的角度进行解释，以证明DAT的有效性。作为一种增强视觉表示的即插即用技术，DAT 在图像分类、目标检测和自监督学习等多项任务上取得了显着的改进。特别是，使用 Masked Auto-Encoding (MAE) 进行预训练并通过我们的 DAT 进行微调而无需额外数据的模型可以在 ImageNet-C 上获得 31.40 mCE，在 Stylized-ImageNet 上获得 32.77% 的 top-1 准确率，构建了新的最先进的技术。该代码可在 https://github.com/alibaba/easyrobust 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出离散对抗训练（DAT）方法，通过将图像转换为离散视觉单词并引入符号对抗扰动，增强视觉表示以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗训练在图像任务中损害标准性能，但NLP任务中因离散输入空间而受益。作者认为离散性是NLP中AT有效的关键，尝试将其迁移至视觉领域。
AI.method: 利用VQGAN将图像转化为离散视觉单词，通过最大化离散图像上的对抗扰动风险进行训练，结合分布视角解释其有效性。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测等任务中显著提升性能，尤其在ImageNet-C上达到31.40 mCE，Stylized-ImageNet上达32.77% top-1准确率，刷新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: DAT作为即插即用技术，通过离散化视觉输入继承NLP对抗训练优势，有效提升视觉模型鲁棒性与泛化能力。

tldr: 本文提出离散对抗训练（DAT）方法，通过将图像转换为离散视觉单词并引入符号对抗扰动，增强视觉表示以提升模型鲁棒性。
motivation: 传统对抗训练在图像任务中损害标准性能，但NLP任务中因离散输入空间而受益。作者认为离散性是NLP中AT有效的关键，尝试将其迁移至视觉领域。
method: 利用VQGAN将图像转化为离散视觉单词，通过最大化离散图像上的对抗扰动风险进行训练，结合分布视角解释其有效性。
result: 在图像分类、目标检测等任务中显著提升性能，尤其在ImageNet-C上达到31.40 mCE，Stylized-ImageNet上达32.77% top-1准确率，刷新SOTA。
conclusion: DAT作为即插即用技术，通过离散化视觉输入继承NLP对抗训练优势，有效提升视觉模型鲁棒性与泛化能力。
search_text: Enhance the Visual Representation via Discrete Adversarial Training 通过离散对抗训练增强视觉表现 Adversarial Training (AT), which is commonly accepted as one of the most effective approaches defending against adversarial examples, can largely harm the standard performance, thus has limited usefulness on industrial-scale production and applications. Surprisingly, this phenomenon is totally opposite in Natural Language Processing (NLP) task, where AT can even benefit for generalization. We notice the merit of AT in NLP tasks could derive from the discrete and symbolic input space. For borrowing the advantage from NLP-style AT, we propose Discrete Adversarial Training (DAT). DAT leverages VQGAN to reform the image data to discrete text-like inputs, i.e. visual words. Then it minimizes the maximal risk on such discrete images with symbolic adversarial perturbations. We further give an explanation from the perspective of distribution to demonstrate the effectiveness of DAT. As a plug-and-play technique for enhancing the visual representation, DAT achieves significant improvement on multiple tasks including image classification, object detection and self-supervised learning. Especially, the model pre-trained with Masked Auto-Encoding (MAE) and fine-tuned by our DAT without extra data can get 31.40 mCE on ImageNet-C and 32.77% top-1 accuracy on Stylized-ImageNet, building the new state-of-the-art. The code will be available at https://github.com/alibaba/easyrobust. 对抗性训练（AT）被普遍认为是防御对抗性例子的最有效方法之一，但它会在很大程度上损害标准性能，因此在工业规模生产和应用中的用处有限。令人惊讶的是，这种现象在自然语言处理（NLP）任务中完全相反，AT 甚至可以从泛化中受益。我们注意到 AT 在 NLP 任务中的优点可以源自离散和符号输入空间。为了借鉴 NLP 式 AT 的优势，我们提出了离散对抗训练（DAT）。 DAT 利用 VQGAN 将图像数据重组为离散的类似文本的输入，即视觉单词。然后，它通过象征性的对抗性扰动最小化此类离散图像的最大风险。我们进一步从分布的角度进行解释，以证明DAT的有效性。作为一种增强视觉表示的即插即用技术，DAT 在图像分类、目标检测和自监督学习等多项任务上取得了显着的改进。特别是，使用 Masked Auto-Encoding (MAE) 进行预训练并通过我们的 DAT 进行微调而无需额外数据的模型可以在 ImageNet-C 上获得 31.40 mCE，在 Stylized-ImageNet 上获得 32.77% 的 top-1 准确率，构建了新的最先进的技术。该代码可在 https://github.com/alibaba/easyrobust 获取。 本文提出离散对抗训练（DAT）方法，通过将图像转换为离散视觉单词并引入符号对抗扰动，增强视觉表示以提升模型鲁棒性。 Xiaofeng Mao,Yuefeng Chen,Ranjie Duan,Yao Zhu,Gege Qi,Shaokai Ye,Xiaodan Li,Rong Zhang,Hui Xue cs.CV

authors_text: Zhenhua Xu,Yuxuan Liu,Yuxiang Sun,Ming Liu,Lujia Wang
title: CenterLineDet: CenterLine Graph Detection for Road Lanes with Vehicle-mounted Sensors by Transformer for HD Map Generation
title_zh: CenterLineDet：利用车载传感器通过 Transformer 进行道路车道中心线图检测，生成高清地图
abstract: With the fast development of autonomous driving technologies, there is an increasing demand for high-definition (HD) maps, which provide reliable and robust prior information about the static part of the traffic environments. As one of the important elements in HD maps, road lane centerline is critical for downstream tasks, such as prediction and planning. Manually annotating centerlines for road lanes in HD maps is labor-intensive, expensive and inefficient, severely restricting the wide applications of autonomous driving systems. Previous work seldom explores the lane centerline detection problem due to the complicated topology and severe overlapping issues of lane centerlines. In this paper, we propose a novel method named CenterLineDet to detect lane centerlines for automatic HD map generation. Our CenterLineDet is trained by imitation learning and can effectively detect the graph of centerlines with vehicle-mounted sensors (i.e., six cameras and one LiDAR) through iterations. Due to the use of the DETR-like transformer network, CenterLineDet can handle complicated graph topology, such as lane intersections. The proposed approach is evaluated on the large-scale public dataset NuScenes. The superiority of our CenterLineDet is demonstrated by the comparative results. Our code, supplementary materials, and video demonstrations are available at \href{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/CenterLineDet/}{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/CenterLineDet/}.
summary: With the fast development of autonomous driving technologies, there is an increasing demand for high-definition (HD) maps, which provide reliable and robust prior information about the static part of the traffic environments. As one of the important elements in HD maps, road lane centerline is critical for downstream tasks, such as prediction and planning. Manually annotating centerlines for road lanes in HD maps is labor-intensive, expensive and inefficient, severely restricting the wide applications of autonomous driving systems. Previous work seldom explores the lane centerline detection problem due to the complicated topology and severe overlapping issues of lane centerlines. In this paper, we propose a novel method named CenterLineDet to detect lane centerlines for automatic HD map generation. Our CenterLineDet is trained by imitation learning and can effectively detect the graph of centerlines with vehicle-mounted sensors (i.e., six cameras and one LiDAR) through iterations. Due to the use of the DETR-like transformer network, CenterLineDet can handle complicated graph topology, such as lane intersections. The proposed approach is evaluated on the large-scale public dataset NuScenes. The superiority of our CenterLineDet is demonstrated by the comparative results. Our code, supplementary materials, and video demonstrations are available at \href{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/CenterLineDet/}{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/CenterLineDet/}.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶技术的快速发展，对高清（HD）地图的需求不断增加，高清地图可以提供有关交通环境静态部分的可靠且可靠的先验信息。作为高精地图的重要元素之一，道路车道中心线对于预测和规划等下游任务至关重要。在高精地图中手动标注道路车道中心线是一项劳动密集型、成本高昂且效率低下的工作，严重限制了自动驾驶系统的广泛应用。由于车道中心线拓扑复杂且重叠问题严重，以往的工作很少探讨车道中心线检测问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CenterLineDet 的新颖方法来检测车道中心线以自动生成高清地图。我们的 CenterLineDet 通过模仿学习进行训练，通过迭代可以有效地利用车载传感器（即 6 个摄像头和 1 个激光雷达）检测中心线图形。由于使用类似 DETR 的变压器网络，CenterLineDet 可以处理复杂的图形拓扑，例如车道交叉口。所提出的方法在大型公共数据集 NuScenes 上进行了评估。比较结果证明了我们 CenterLineDet 的优越性。我们的代码、补充材料和视频演示可在 \href{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/CenterLineDet/}{https://tonyxuqaq.github.io/projects/CenterLineDet/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CenterLineDet方法，利用车载传感器通过Transformer网络自动检测道路车道中心线，用于高精度地图生成。
AI.motivation: 高精度地图中的车道中心线对自动驾驶至关重要，但人工标注成本高且效率低，现有方法难以处理复杂拓扑和重叠问题。
AI.method: 基于模仿学习，采用类似DETR的Transformer架构，结合六摄像头和LiDAR传感器数据，迭代检测复杂拓扑结构的中心线图。
AI.result: 在NuScenes数据集上验证了方法优越性，提供代码、补充材料和视频演示。
AI.conclusion: CenterLineDet实现了复杂场景下车道中心线的自动检测，为高精度地图生成提供了有效解决方案。

Manually annotating centerlines for road lanes in HD maps is labor-intensive, expensive and inefficient, severely restricting the wide applications of autonomous driving systems. Due to the use of the DETR-like transformer network, CenterLineDet can handle complicated graph topology, such as lane intersections. title: On Weighted Graph Sparsification by Linear Sketching
title_zh: 基于线性草图的加权图稀疏化
abstract: A seminal work of [Ahn-Guha-McGregor, PODS'12] showed that one can compute a cut sparsifier of an unweighted undirected graph by taking a near-linear number of linear measurements on the graph. Subsequent works also studied computing other graph sparsifiers using linear sketching, and obtained near-linear upper bounds for spectral sparsifiers [Kapralov-Lee-Musco-Musco-Sidford, FOCS'14] and first non-trivial upper bounds for spanners [Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21]. All these linear sketching algorithms, however, only work on unweighted graphs. In this paper, we initiate the study of weighted graph sparsification by linear sketching by investigating a natural class of linear sketches that we call incidence sketches, in which each measurement is a linear combination of the weights of edges incident on a single vertex. Our results are: 1. Weighted cut sparsification: We give an algorithm that computes a $(1 + ε)$-cut sparsifier using $\tilde{O}(n ε^{-3})$ linear measurements, which is nearly optimal. 2. Weighted spectral sparsification: We give an algorithm that computes a $(1 + ε)$-spectral sparsifier using $\tilde{O}(n^{6/5} ε^{-4})$ linear measurements. Complementing our algorithm, we then prove a superlinear lower bound of $Ω(n^{21/20-o(1)})$ measurements for computing some $O(1)$-spectral sparsifier using incidence sketches. 3. Weighted spanner computation: We focus on graphs whose largest/smallest edge weights differ by an $O(1)$ factor, and prove that, for incidence sketches, the upper bounds obtained by~[Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21] are optimal up to an $n^{o(1)}$ factor.
summary: A seminal work of [Ahn-Guha-McGregor, PODS'12] showed that one can compute a cut sparsifier of an unweighted undirected graph by taking a near-linear number of linear measurements on the graph. Subsequent works also studied computing other graph sparsifiers using linear sketching, and obtained near-linear upper bounds for spectral sparsifiers [Kapralov-Lee-Musco-Musco-Sidford, FOCS'14] and first non-trivial upper bounds for spanners [Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21]. All these linear sketching algorithms, however, only work on unweighted graphs. In this paper, we initiate the study of weighted graph sparsification by linear sketching by investigating a natural class of linear sketches that we call incidence sketches, in which each measurement is a linear combination of the weights of edges incident on a single vertex. Our results are: 1. Weighted cut sparsification: We give an algorithm that computes a $(1 + ε)$-cut sparsifier using $\tilde{O}(n ε^{-3})$ linear measurements, which is nearly optimal. 2. Weighted spectral sparsification: We give an algorithm that computes a $(1 + ε)$-spectral sparsifier using $\tilde{O}(n^{6/5} ε^{-4})$ linear measurements. Complementing our algorithm, we then prove a superlinear lower bound of $Ω(n^{21/20-o(1)})$ measurements for computing some $O(1)$-spectral sparsifier using incidence sketches. 3. Weighted spanner computation: We focus on graphs whose largest/smallest edge weights differ by an $O(1)$ factor, and prove that, for incidence sketches, the upper bounds obtained by~[Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21] are optimal up to an $n^{o(1)}$ factor.
abstract_zh: [Ahn-Guha-McGregor, PODS'12] 的一项开创性工作表明，可以通过在图上进行近线性数量的线性测量来计算未加权无向图的切割稀疏器。随后的工作还研究了使用线性草图计算其他图稀疏器，并获得了谱稀疏器的近线性上限 [Kapralov-Lee-Musco-Musco-Sidford, FOCS'14] 和扳手的第一个非平凡上限 [Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21]。然而，所有这些线性草图算法仅适用于未加权的图。在本文中，我们通过研究线性草图的自然类（我们称为关联草图）来开始通过线性草图进行加权图稀疏化的研究，其中每个测量都是入射在单个顶点上的边权重的线性组合。我们的结果是： 1. 加权切割稀疏化：我们给出了一种使用 $\tilde{O}(n ε^{-3})$ 线性测量来计算 $(1 + ε)$ 切割稀疏化器的算法，该算法几乎是最优的。 2. 加权谱稀疏化：我们给出了一种使用 $\tilde{O}(n^{6/5} ε^{-4})$ 线性测量来计算 $(1 + ε)$ 谱稀疏化器的算法。作为对我们算法的补充，我们随后证明了 $Ω(n^{21/20-o(1)})$ 测量值的超线性下界，用于使用关联草图计算一些 $O(1)$ 谱稀疏器。 3. 加权扳手计算：我们关注最大/最小边权重相差 $O(1)$ 因子的图，并证明，对于重合草图，~[Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21] 获得的上限在 $n^{o(1)}$ 因子下是最佳的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过线性草图方法对有权图进行稀疏化，提出了适用于有权图的incidence sketches方法，并分析了其在割稀疏子图、谱稀疏子图和spanner计算中的性能。
AI.motivation: 此前基于线性草图的图稀疏化算法仅适用于无权图，而有权图的稀疏化方法研究尚不充分。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索有权图的线性草图稀疏化技术。
AI.method: 提出incidence sketches方法，即每个测量为单个顶点的相邻边权重的线性组合，并设计针对有权图的割稀疏子图、谱稀疏子图和spanner的算法。
AI.result: 1. 提出近线性测量的$(1+ε)$-割稀疏子图算法；2. 给出$(1+ε)$-谱稀疏子图的$\	ilde{O}(n^{6/5}ε^{-4})$测量算法，并证明Ω(n^{21/20-o(1)})下界；3. 证明spanner上界在特定权重条件下的最优性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究有权图的线性草图稀疏化，提出incidence sketches方法，填补了无权图与有权图之间的技术空白，并为相关问题的最优性分析提供了理论依据。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文首次系统研究有权图的线性草图稀疏化，提出incidence sketches方法，填补了无权图与有权图之间的技术空白，并为相关问题的最优性分析提供了理论依据。

tldr: 本文研究了如何通过线性草图方法对有权图进行稀疏化，提出了适用于有权图的incidence sketches方法，并分析了其在割稀疏子图、谱稀疏子图和spanner计算中的性能。

search_text: On Weighted Graph Sparsification by Linear Sketching 基于线性草图的加权图稀疏化 A seminal work of [Ahn-Guha-McGregor, PODS'12] showed that one can compute a cut sparsifier of an unweighted undirected graph by taking a near-linear number of linear measurements on the graph. Subsequent works also studied computing other graph sparsifiers using linear sketching, and obtained near-linear upper bounds for spectral sparsifiers [Kapralov-Lee-Musco-Musco-Sidford, FOCS'14] and first non-trivial upper bounds for spanners [Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21]. All these linear sketching algorithms, however, only work on unweighted graphs. In this paper, we initiate the study of weighted graph sparsification by linear sketching by investigating a natural class of linear sketches that we call incidence sketches, in which each measurement is a linear combination of the weights of edges incident on a single vertex. Our results are: 1. Weighted cut sparsification: We give an algorithm that computes a $(1 + ε)$-cut sparsifier using $\tilde{O}(n ε^{-3})$ linear measurements, which is nearly optimal. 2. Weighted spectral sparsification: We give an algorithm that computes a $(1 + ε)$-spectral sparsifier using $\tilde{O}(n^{6/5} ε^{-4})$ linear measurements. Complementing our algorithm, we then prove a superlinear lower bound of $Ω(n^{21/20-o(1)})$ measurements for computing some $O(1)$-spectral sparsifier using incidence sketches. 3. Weighted spanner computation: We focus on graphs whose largest/smallest edge weights differ by an $O(1)$ factor, and prove that, for incidence sketches, the upper bounds obtained by~[Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21] are optimal up to an $n^{o(1)}$ factor. [Ahn-Guha-McGregor, PODS'12] 的一项开创性工作表明，可以通过在图上进行近线性数量的线性测量来计算未加权无向图的切割稀疏器。随后的工作还研究了使用线性草图计算其他图稀疏器，并获得了谱稀疏器的近线性上限 [Kapralov-Lee-Musco-Musco-Sidford, FOCS'14] 和扳手的第一个非平凡上限 [Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21]。然而，所有这些线性草图算法仅适用于未加权的图。在本文中，我们通过研究线性草图的自然类（我们称为关联草图）来开始通过线性草图进行加权图稀疏化的研究，其中每个测量都是入射在单个顶点上的边权重的线性组合。我们的结果是： 1. 加权切割稀疏化：我们给出了一种使用 $\tilde{O}(n ε^{-3})$ 线性测量来计算 $(1 + ε)$ 切割稀疏化器的算法，该算法几乎是最优的。 2. 加权谱稀疏化：我们给出了一种使用 $\tilde{O}(n^{6/5} ε^{-4})$ 线性测量来计算 $(1 + ε)$ 谱稀疏化器的算法。作为对我们算法的补充，我们随后证明了 $Ω(n^{21/20-o(1)})$ 测量值的超线性下界，用于使用关联草图计算一些 $O(1)$ 谱稀疏器。 3. 加权扳手计算：我们关注最大/最小边权重相差 $O(1)$ 因子的图，并证明，对于重合草图，~[Filtser-Kapralov-Nouri, SODA'21] 获得的上限在 $n^{o(1)}$ 因子下是最佳的。 本文研究了如何通过线性草图方法对有权图进行稀疏化，提出了适用于有权图的incidence sketches方法，并分析了其在割稀疏子图、谱稀疏子图和spanner计算中的性能。 Yu Chen,Sanjeev Khanna,Huan Li cs.DS

title: VINet: Visual and Inertial-based Terrain Classification and Adaptive Navigation over Unknown Terrain
title_zh: VINet：基于视觉和惯性的地形分类以及未知地形的自适应导航
abstract: We present a visual and inertial-based terrain classification network (VINet) for robotic navigation over different traversable surfaces. We use a novel navigation-based labeling scheme for terrain classification and generalization on unknown surfaces. Our proposed perception method and adaptive scheduling control framework can make predictions according to terrain navigation properties and lead to better performance on both terrain classification and navigation control on known and unknown surfaces. Our VINet can achieve 98.37% in terms of accuracy under supervised setting on known terrains and improve the accuracy by 8.51% on unknown terrains compared to previous methods. We deploy VINet on a mobile tracked robot for trajectory following and navigation on different terrains, and we demonstrate an improvement of 10.3% compared to a baseline controller in terms of RMSE.
summary: We present a visual and inertial-based terrain classification network (VINet) for robotic navigation over different traversable surfaces. We use a novel navigation-based labeling scheme for terrain classification and generalization on unknown surfaces. Our proposed perception method and adaptive scheduling control framework can make predictions according to terrain navigation properties and lead to better performance on both terrain classification and navigation control on known and unknown surfaces. Our VINet can achieve 98.37% in terms of accuracy under supervised setting on known terrains and improve the accuracy by 8.51% on unknown terrains compared to previous methods. We deploy VINet on a mobile tracked robot for trajectory following and navigation on different terrains, and we demonstrate an improvement of 10.3% compared to a baseline controller in terms of RMSE.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于视觉和惯性的地形分类网络（VINet），用于在不同可穿越表面上进行机器人导航。我们使用一种新颖的基于导航的标记方案来对未知表面进行地形分类和概括。我们提出的感知方法和自适应调度控制框架可以根据地形导航特性进行预测，并在已知和未知表面上的地形分类和导航控制方面获得更好的性能。与之前的方法相比，我们的 VINet 在已知地形的监督设置下可以达到 98.37% 的准确率，而在未知地形上的准确率提高了 8.51%。我们在移动履带机器人上部署 VINet，用于不同地形上的轨迹跟踪和导航，与基线控制器相比，我们在 RMSE 方面表现出 10.3% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉与惯性信息的地形分类网络VINet，用于机器人在未知地形上的自适应导航。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在未知地形分类与导航控制中存在性能不足，需提升机器人对复杂地形的适应性与导航精度。
AI.method: 设计VINet网络，结合视觉与惯性数据，采用新型导航标签方案，并构建自适应调度控制框架实现地形特性驱动的预测。
AI.result: 在已知地形分类准确率达98.37%，未知地形分类准确率提升8.51%，机器人导航RMSE相较基线降低10.3%。
AI.conclusion: VINet通过融合感知与控制框架有效提升了地形分类与导航性能，验证了方法在未知环境中的可行性与优越性。

authors_text: Aswin Surya,David B. Peral,Austin VanLoon,Akhila Rajesh
title: A Mosquito is Worth 16x16 Larvae: Evaluation of Deep Learning Architectures for Mosquito Larvae Classification
title_zh: 一只蚊子值得 16x16 幼虫：评估蚊子幼虫分类的深度学习架构
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Image dataset, fine-tuning code, and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/thenerd31/vit-cnn-mosquito-image-classification
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Image dataset, fine-tuning code, and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/thenerd31/vit-cnn-mosquito-image-classification
abstract: Mosquito-borne diseases (MBDs), such as dengue virus, chikungunya virus, and West Nile virus, cause over one million deaths globally every year. Because many such diseases are spread by the Aedes and Culex mosquitoes, tracking these larvae becomes critical in mitigating the spread of MBDs. Even as citizen science grows and obtains larger mosquito image datasets, the manual annotation of mosquito images becomes ever more time-consuming and inefficient. Previous research has used computer vision to identify mosquito species, and the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) has become the de-facto for image classification. However, these models typically require substantial computational resources. This research introduces the application of the Vision Transformer (ViT) in a comparative study to improve image classification on Aedes and Culex larvae. Two ViT models, ViT-Base and CvT-13, and two CNN models, ResNet-18 and ConvNeXT, were trained on mosquito larvae image data and compared to determine the most effective model to distinguish mosquito larvae as Aedes or Culex. Testing revealed that ConvNeXT obtained the greatest values across all classification metrics, demonstrating its viability for mosquito larvae classification. Based on these results, future research includes creating a model specifically designed for mosquito larvae classification by combining elements of CNN and transformer architecture.
summary: Mosquito-borne diseases (MBDs), such as dengue virus, chikungunya virus, and West Nile virus, cause over one million deaths globally every year. Because many such diseases are spread by the Aedes and Culex mosquitoes, tracking these larvae becomes critical in mitigating the spread of MBDs. Even as citizen science grows and obtains larger mosquito image datasets, the manual annotation of mosquito images becomes ever more time-consuming and inefficient. Previous research has used computer vision to identify mosquito species, and the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) has become the de-facto for image classification. However, these models typically require substantial computational resources. This research introduces the application of the Vision Transformer (ViT) in a comparative study to improve image classification on Aedes and Culex larvae. Two ViT models, ViT-Base and CvT-13, and two CNN models, ResNet-18 and ConvNeXT, were trained on mosquito larvae image data and compared to determine the most effective model to distinguish mosquito larvae as Aedes or Culex. Testing revealed that ConvNeXT obtained the greatest values across all classification metrics, demonstrating its viability for mosquito larvae classification. Based on these results, future research includes creating a model specifically designed for mosquito larvae classification by combining elements of CNN and transformer architecture.
abstract_zh: 登革热病毒、基孔肯雅病毒和西尼罗河病毒等蚊媒疾病 (MBD) 每年在全球造成超过一百万人死亡。由于许多此类疾病是由伊蚊和库蚊传播的，因此追踪这些幼虫对于减轻 MBD 的传播至关重要。即使随着公民科学的发展并获得更大的蚊子图像数据集，蚊子图像的手动注释也变得更加耗时且低效。之前的研究已经使用计算机视觉来识别蚊子种类，而卷积神经网络（CNN）已成为图像分类的事实。然而，这些模型通常需要大量的计算资源。本研究介绍了视觉变换器 (ViT) 在比较研究中的应用，以改进伊蚊和库蚊幼虫的图像分类。两个 ViT 模型 ViT-Base 和 CvT-13 以及两个 CNN 模型 ResNet-18 和 ConvNeXT 在蚊子幼虫图像数据上进行训练，并进行比较，以确定区分蚊子幼虫为伊蚊或库蚊的最有效模型。测试表明，ConvNeXT 在所有分类指标中获得了最大值，证明了其对蚊子幼虫分类的可行性。基于这些结果，未来的研究包括通过结合 CNN 和 Transformer 架构的元素，创建专门用于蚊子幼虫分类的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了不同深度学习架构在蚊幼虫分类任务中的性能，旨在找到最适合区分埃及伊蚊和库蚊幼虫的模型。
AI.motivation: 蚊媒疾病导致全球每年超百万死亡，手动标注蚊幼虫图像效率低下，需开发高效自动分类方法以控制疾病传播。
AI.method: 训练并比较了两种Vision Transformer模型（ViT-Base、CvT-13）和两种CNN模型（ResNet-18、ConvNeXT）在蚊幼虫图像数据集上的分类效果。
AI.result: ConvNeXT模型在所有分类指标中表现最佳，验证了其在蚊幼虫分类任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究将结合CNN与Transformer架构优势，设计专用蚊幼虫分类模型以进一步提升性能。

Two ViT models, ViT-Base and CvT-13, and two CNN models, ResNet-18 and ConvNeXT, were trained on mosquito larvae image data and compared to determine the most effective model to distinguish mosquito larvae as Aedes or Culex. Testing revealed that ConvNeXT obtained the greatest values across all classification metrics, demonstrating its viability for mosquito larvae classification. Based on these results, future research includes creating a model specifically designed for mosquito larvae classification by combining elements of CNN and transformer architecture. 登革热病毒、基孔肯雅病毒和西尼罗河病毒等蚊媒疾病 (MBD) 每年在全球造成超过一百万人死亡。由于许多此类疾病是由伊蚊和库蚊传播的，因此追踪这些幼虫对于减轻 MBD 的传播至关重要。即使随着公民科学的发展并获得更大的蚊子图像数据集，蚊子图像的手动注释也变得更加耗时且低效。之前的研究已经使用计算机视觉来识别蚊子种类，而卷积神经网络（CNN）已成为图像分类的事实。然而，这些模型通常需要大量的计算资源。本研究介绍了视觉变换器 (ViT) 在比较研究中的应用，以改进伊蚊和库蚊幼虫的图像分类。两个 ViT 模型 ViT-Base 和 CvT-13 以及两个 CNN 模型 ResNet-18 和 ConvNeXT 在蚊子幼虫图像数据上进行训练，并进行比较，以确定区分蚊子幼虫为伊蚊或库蚊的最有效模型。测试表明，ConvNeXT 在所有分类指标中获得了最大值，证明了其对蚊子幼虫分类的可行性。基于这些结果，未来的研究包括通过结合 CNN 和 Transformer 架构的元素，创建专门用于蚊子幼虫分类的模型。 本文比较了不同深度学习架构在蚊幼虫分类任务中的性能，旨在找到最适合区分埃及伊蚊和库蚊幼虫的模型。 Aswin Surya,David B. Peral,Austin VanLoon,Akhila Rajesh cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Comments on "Iteratively Re-weighted Algorithm for Fuzzy c-Means"
title_zh: 对“模糊 c 均值的迭代重加权算法”的评论
abstract: In this comment, we present a simple alternate derivation to the IRW-FCM algorithm presented in "Iteratively Re-weighted Algorithm for Fuzzy c-Means" for Fuzzy c-Means problem. We show that the iterative steps derived for IRW-FCM algorithm are nothing but steps of the popular Majorization Minimization (MM) algorithm. The derivation presented in this note is much simpler and straightforward and, unlike the derivation of IRW-FCM, the derivation here does not involve introduction of any auxiliary variable. Moreover, by showing the steps of IRW-FCM as the MM algorithm, the inner loop of the IRW-FCM algorithm can be eliminated and the algorithm can be effectively run as a "single loop" algorithm. More precisely, the new MM-based derivation deduces that a single inner loop of IRW-FCM is sufficient to decrease the Fuzzy c-means objective function, which speeds up the IRW-FCM algorithm.
summary: In this comment, we present a simple alternate derivation to the IRW-FCM algorithm presented in "Iteratively Re-weighted Algorithm for Fuzzy c-Means" for Fuzzy c-Means problem. We show that the iterative steps derived for IRW-FCM algorithm are nothing but steps of the popular Majorization Minimization (MM) algorithm. The derivation presented in this note is much simpler and straightforward and, unlike the derivation of IRW-FCM, the derivation here does not involve introduction of any auxiliary variable. Moreover, by showing the steps of IRW-FCM as the MM algorithm, the inner loop of the IRW-FCM algorithm can be eliminated and the algorithm can be effectively run as a "single loop" algorithm. More precisely, the new MM-based derivation deduces that a single inner loop of IRW-FCM is sufficient to decrease the Fuzzy c-means objective function, which speeds up the IRW-FCM algorithm.
abstract_zh: 在这篇评论中，我们针对模糊 c 均值问题，提出了“模糊 c 均值的迭代重新加权算法”中提出的 IRW-FCM 算法的简单替代推导。我们证明了 IRW-FCM 算法导出的迭代步骤只不过是流行的Majorization Minimization (MM) 算法的步骤。本文中提出的推导更加简单和直接，并且与IRW-FCM的推导不同，这里的推导不涉及引入任何辅助变量。此外，通过将IRW-FCM的步骤显示为MM算法，可以消除IRW-FCM算法的内循环并且可以将该算法作为“单循环”算法有效地运行。更准确地说，新的基于 MM 的推导推论出 IRW-FCM 的单个内循环足以减少模糊 c 均值目标函数，从而加快 IRW-FCM 算法的速度。

AI.tldr: 本文对模糊c-均值（FCM）问题的迭代加权算法（IRW-FCM）提供了更简洁的推导方法，并通过消除内循环提升了算法效率。
AI.motivation: 原IRW-FCM算法的推导过程复杂且引入辅助变量，限制了其计算效率。本文旨在提供更简单直接的推导方式，并优化算法结构。
AI.method: 将IRW-FCM的迭代步骤重新解释为最大最小化（MM）算法的步骤，无需引入辅助变量，并消除内循环实现单循环运行。
AI.result: 证明单次内循环即可降低FCM目标函数，使算法运行速度显著提升，同时保持与原算法相同的效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过MM算法框架简化了IRW-FCM的推导过程，优化后的单循环算法在计算效率上更具优势。

authors_text: Dupati Srikar Chandra,Sakshi Varshney,P. K. Srijith,Sunil Gupta
title: Continual Learning with Dependency Preserving Hypernetworks
title_zh: 通过保持依赖的超网络进行持续学习
comment: Paper got accepted in IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: Paper got accepted in IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: Humans learn continually throughout their lifespan by accumulating diverse knowledge and fine-tuning it for future tasks. When presented with a similar goal, neural networks suffer from catastrophic forgetting if data distributions across sequential tasks are not stationary over the course of learning. An effective approach to address such continual learning (CL) problems is to use hypernetworks which generate task dependent weights for a target network. However, the continual learning performance of existing hypernetwork based approaches are affected by the assumption of independence of the weights across the layers in order to maintain parameter efficiency. To address this limitation, we propose a novel approach that uses a dependency preserving hypernetwork to generate weights for the target network while also maintaining the parameter efficiency. We propose to use recurrent neural network (RNN) based hypernetwork that can generate layer weights efficiently while allowing for dependencies across them. In addition, we propose novel regularisation and network growth techniques for the RNN based hypernetwork to further improve the continual learning performance. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods, we conducted experiments on several image classification continual learning tasks and settings. We found that the proposed methods based on the RNN hypernetworks outperformed the baselines in all these CL settings and tasks.
summary: Humans learn continually throughout their lifespan by accumulating diverse knowledge and fine-tuning it for future tasks. When presented with a similar goal, neural networks suffer from catastrophic forgetting if data distributions across sequential tasks are not stationary over the course of learning. An effective approach to address such continual learning (CL) problems is to use hypernetworks which generate task dependent weights for a target network. However, the continual learning performance of existing hypernetwork based approaches are affected by the assumption of independence of the weights across the layers in order to maintain parameter efficiency. To address this limitation, we propose a novel approach that uses a dependency preserving hypernetwork to generate weights for the target network while also maintaining the parameter efficiency. We propose to use recurrent neural network (RNN) based hypernetwork that can generate layer weights efficiently while allowing for dependencies across them. In addition, we propose novel regularisation and network growth techniques for the RNN based hypernetwork to further improve the continual learning performance. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods, we conducted experiments on several image classification continual learning tasks and settings. We found that the proposed methods based on the RNN hypernetworks outperformed the baselines in all these CL settings and tasks.
abstract_zh: 人类在一生中不断学习，积累不同的知识并针对未来的任务进行微调。当提出类似的目标时，如果连续任务之间的数据分布在学习过程中不稳定，神经网络就会遭受灾难性遗忘。解决此类持续学习（CL）问题的有效方法是使用超网络，为目标网络生成任务相关权重。然而，现有的基于超网络的方法的持续学习性能受到跨层权重独立性假设的影响，以保持参数效率。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法使用依赖关系保留超网络来生成目标网络的权重，同时保持参数效率。我们建议使用基于循环神经网络（RNN）的超网络，它可以有效地生成层权重，同时允许它们之间的依赖关系。此外，我们为基于 RNN 的超网络提出了新颖的正则化和网络增长技术，以进一步提高持续学习性能。为了证明所提出方法的有效性，我们对几个图像分类持续学习任务和设置进行了实验。我们发现，所提出的基于 RNN 超网络的方法在所有这些 CL 设置和任务中都优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种依赖保持的超网络方法，用于解决连续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超网络方法在连续学习中因假设层间权重独立而影响性能，需在保持参数效率的同时维护层间依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计基于循环神经网络（RNN）的超网络，生成具有层间依赖性的目标网络权重，并引入正则化和网络增长技术优化性能。
AI.result: 在多个图像分类连续学习任务中，所提方法优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 依赖保持的RNN超网络有效提升了连续学习的性能，同时维持了参数效率。

authors_text: Zhanchao Huang,Wei Li,Xiang-Gen Xia,Hao Wang,Feiran Jie,Ran Tao
title: LO-Det: Lightweight Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: LO-Det：遥感图像中的轻量级目标检测
abstract: A few lightweight convolutional neural network (CNN) models have been recently designed for remote sensing object detection (RSOD). However, most of them simply replace vanilla convolutions with stacked separable convolutions, which may not be efficient due to a lot of precision losses and may not be able to detect oriented bounding boxes (OBB). Also, the existing OBB detection methods are difficult to constrain the shape of objects predicted by CNNs accurately. In this paper, we propose an effective lightweight oriented object detector (LO-Det). Specifically, a channel separation-aggregation (CSA) structure is designed to simplify the complexity of stacked separable convolutions, and a dynamic receptive field (DRF) mechanism is developed to maintain high accuracy by customizing the convolution kernel and its perception range dynamically when reducing the network complexity. The CSA-DRF component optimizes efficiency while maintaining high accuracy. Then, a diagonal support constraint head (DSC-Head) component is designed to detect OBBs and constrain their shapes more accurately and stably. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that the proposed LO-Det can run very fast even on embedded devices with the competitive accuracy of detecting oriented objects.
summary: A few lightweight convolutional neural network (CNN) models have been recently designed for remote sensing object detection (RSOD). However, most of them simply replace vanilla convolutions with stacked separable convolutions, which may not be efficient due to a lot of precision losses and may not be able to detect oriented bounding boxes (OBB). Also, the existing OBB detection methods are difficult to constrain the shape of objects predicted by CNNs accurately. In this paper, we propose an effective lightweight oriented object detector (LO-Det). Specifically, a channel separation-aggregation (CSA) structure is designed to simplify the complexity of stacked separable convolutions, and a dynamic receptive field (DRF) mechanism is developed to maintain high accuracy by customizing the convolution kernel and its perception range dynamically when reducing the network complexity. The CSA-DRF component optimizes efficiency while maintaining high accuracy. Then, a diagonal support constraint head (DSC-Head) component is designed to detect OBBs and constrain their shapes more accurately and stably. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that the proposed LO-Det can run very fast even on embedded devices with the competitive accuracy of detecting oriented objects.
abstract_zh: 最近设计了一些用于遥感目标检测（RSOD）的轻量级卷积神经网络（CNN）模型。然而，它们中的大多数只是简单地将普通卷积替换为堆叠可分离卷积，这可能由于大量精度损失而效率不高，并且可能无法检测定向边界框（OBB）。此外，现有的 OBB 检测方法很难准确约束 CNN 预测的物体形状。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的轻量级目标检测器（LO-Det）。具体来说，设计了通道分离聚合（CSA）结构来简化堆叠可分离卷积的复杂性，并开发了动态感受野（DRF）机制，以在降低网络复杂性的同时通过动态定制卷积核及其感知范围来保持高精度。 CSA-DRF 组件在保持高精度的同时优化了效率。然后，设计了对角支撑约束头（DSC-Head）组件来更准确、稳定地检测OBB并约束其形状。对公共数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 LO-Det 即使在嵌入式设备上也可以运行得非常快，并且具有检测定向对象的竞争精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级定向目标检测模型LO-Det，用于提高遥感图像中定向目标检测的效率和精度。
AI.motivation: 现有轻量级CNN模型在遥感目标检测中存在精度损失和无法准确检测定向边界框（OBB）的问题，且难以约束CNN预测的物体形状。
AI.method: 设计通道分离-聚合（CSA）结构简化堆叠分离卷积复杂度，开发动态感受野（DRF）机制动态调整卷积核和感知范围，提出对角支持约束头（DSC-Head）精确检测OBB。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证LO-Det在嵌入式设备上运行速度快，且保持与现有方法竞争的定向目标检测精度。
AI.conclusion: LO-Det通过CSA-DRF组件和DSC-Head有效平衡了轻量化与检测精度，为遥感图像的高效定向目标检测提供了新方案。

search_text: LO-Det: Lightweight Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images LO-Det：遥感图像中的轻量级目标检测 A few lightweight convolutional neural network (CNN) models have been recently designed for remote sensing object detection (RSOD). However, most of them simply replace vanilla convolutions with stacked separable convolutions, which may not be efficient due to a lot of precision losses and may not be able to detect oriented bounding boxes (OBB). Also, the existing OBB detection methods are difficult to constrain the shape of objects predicted by CNNs accurately. In this paper, we propose an effective lightweight oriented object detector (LO-Det). Specifically, a channel separation-aggregation (CSA) structure is designed to simplify the complexity of stacked separable convolutions, and a dynamic receptive field (DRF) mechanism is developed to maintain high accuracy by customizing the convolution kernel and its perception range dynamically when reducing the network complexity. The CSA-DRF component optimizes efficiency while maintaining high accuracy. Then, a diagonal support constraint head (DSC-Head) component is designed to detect OBBs and constrain their shapes more accurately and stably. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that the proposed LO-Det can run very fast even on embedded devices with the competitive accuracy of detecting oriented objects. 最近设计了一些用于遥感目标检测（RSOD）的轻量级卷积神经网络（CNN）模型。然而，它们中的大多数只是简单地将普通卷积替换为堆叠可分离卷积，这可能由于大量精度损失而效率不高，并且可能无法检测定向边界框（OBB）。此外，现有的 OBB 检测方法很难准确约束 CNN 预测的物体形状。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的轻量级目标检测器（LO-Det）。具体来说，设计了通道分离聚合（CSA）结构来简化堆叠可分离卷积的复杂性，并开发了动态感受野（DRF）机制，以在降低网络复杂性的同时通过动态定制卷积核及其感知范围来保持高精度。 CSA-DRF 组件在保持高精度的同时优化了效率。然后，设计了对角支撑约束头（DSC-Head）组件来更准确、稳定地检测OBB并约束其形状。对公共数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 LO-Det 即使在嵌入式设备上也可以运行得非常快，并且具有检测定向对象的竞争精度。 本文提出一种轻量级定向目标检测模型LO-Det，用于提高遥感图像中定向目标检测的效率和精度。 Zhanchao Huang,Wei Li,Xiang-Gen Xia,Hao Wang,Feiran Jie,Ran Tao cs.CV

title: Automatic Tumor Segmentation via False Positive Reduction Network for Whole-Body Multi-Modal PET/CT Images
title_zh: 通过全身多模态 PET/CT 图像的误报减少网络自动肿瘤分割
comment: Pre-print paper for 2022 MICCAI AutoPET Challenge
comments: Pre-print paper for 2022 MICCAI AutoPET Challenge
abstract: Multi-modality Fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) positron emission tomography / computed tomography (PET/CT) has been routinely used in the assessment of common cancers, such as lung cancer, lymphoma, and melanoma. This is mainly attributed to the fact that PET/CT combines the high sensitivity for tumor detection of PET and anatomical information from CT. In PET/CT image assessment, automatic tumor segmentation is an important step, and in recent years, deep learning based methods have become the state-of-the-art. Unfortunately, existing methods tend to over-segment the tumor regions and include regions such as the normal high uptake organs, inflammation, and other infections. In this study, we introduce a false positive reduction network to overcome this limitation. We firstly introduced a self-supervised pre-trained global segmentation module to coarsely delineate the candidate tumor regions using a self-supervised pre-trained encoder. The candidate tumor regions were then refined by removing false positives via a local refinement module. Our experiments with the MICCAI 2022 Automated Lesion Segmentation in Whole-Body FDG-PET/CT (AutoPET) challenge dataset showed that our method achieved a dice score of 0.9324 with the preliminary testing data and was ranked 1st place in dice on the leaderboard. Our method was also ranked in the top 7 methods on the final testing data, the final ranking will be announced during the 2022 MICCAI AutoPET workshop. Our code is available at: https://github.com/YigePeng/AutoPET_False_Positive_Reduction.
summary: Multi-modality Fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) positron emission tomography / computed tomography (PET/CT) has been routinely used in the assessment of common cancers, such as lung cancer, lymphoma, and melanoma. This is mainly attributed to the fact that PET/CT combines the high sensitivity for tumor detection of PET and anatomical information from CT. In PET/CT image assessment, automatic tumor segmentation is an important step, and in recent years, deep learning based methods have become the state-of-the-art. Unfortunately, existing methods tend to over-segment the tumor regions and include regions such as the normal high uptake organs, inflammation, and other infections. In this study, we introduce a false positive reduction network to overcome this limitation. We firstly introduced a self-supervised pre-trained global segmentation module to coarsely delineate the candidate tumor regions using a self-supervised pre-trained encoder. The candidate tumor regions were then refined by removing false positives via a local refinement module. Our experiments with the MICCAI 2022 Automated Lesion Segmentation in Whole-Body FDG-PET/CT (AutoPET) challenge dataset showed that our method achieved a dice score of 0.9324 with the preliminary testing data and was ranked 1st place in dice on the leaderboard. Our method was also ranked in the top 7 methods on the final testing data, the final ranking will be announced during the 2022 MICCAI AutoPET workshop. Our code is available at: https://github.com/YigePeng/AutoPET_False_Positive_Reduction.
abstract_zh: 多模态氟脱氧葡萄糖（FDG）正电子发射断层扫描/计算机断层扫描（PET/CT）已常规用于评估常见癌症，如肺癌、淋巴瘤和黑色素瘤。这主要归因于PET/CT结合了PET肿瘤检测的高灵敏度和CT的解剖信息。在PET/CT图像评估中，自动肿瘤分割是重要的一步，近年来，基于深度学习的方法已成为最先进的方法。不幸的是，现有的方法往往过度分割肿瘤区域，包括正常的高摄取器官、炎症和其他感染等区域。在本研究中，我们引入了误报减少网络来克服这一限制。我们首先引入了自监督预训练全局分割模块，以使用自监督预训练编码器粗略地描绘候选肿瘤区域。然后通过局部细化模块消除误报来细化候选肿瘤区域。我们在全身 FDG-PET/CT (AutoPET) 挑战数据集中的 MICCAI 2022 自动病变分割实验中进行的实验表明，我们的方法在初步测试数据中获得了 0.9324 的 dice 分数，并在排行榜上的 dice 中排名第一。我们的方法在最终测试数据上也名列前7名，最终排名将在2022年MICCAI AutoPET研讨会期间公布。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/YigePeng/Au​​toPET_False_Positive_Reduction。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过减少假阳性区域的网络，用于全身多模态PET/CT图像的自动肿瘤分割。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在肿瘤分割中容易过度分割，包含正常高摄取器官和炎症等假阳性区域，需改进分割准确性。
AI.method: 采用自监督预训练的全局分割模块粗略划定候选肿瘤区域，并通过局部优化模块去除假阳性区域。
AI.result: 在MICCAI 2022 AutoPET挑战数据集上，初步测试Dice得分为0.9324，排名榜首；最终测试数据中位列前七。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少假阳性，显著提升肿瘤分割精度，在国际竞赛中表现优异。
